Name: Wiggles.in
Description:
Committed to making this world better for pets and community animals, we are on a mission to create a 360 ecosystem for pets, serving all their needs from the day they come home to end of life.

Made with love in India, we work with vets, nutritionists, behaviorists & other experts to create and curate products & services that solve real problems faced by Indian pets & their families. In addition to 60+ products across food & treats, grooming, wellness & pharmaceuticals, we are super proud of Petsville - our state of the art Pet boarding, training, Grooming & Healing facility in Pune.

We partner with pet parents, Welfare workers, NGOs, community groups & local bodies to educate hoomans about animals, in an attempt to learn & educate how hoomans and animals can live better, together.

We have a bunch of initiatives at all times - Wiggles Tribe Meet Ups, Adoption Camps, Wiggles Little Hoomans, Bonded By Blood & many more. Hit us up if you’d like to find out more.

Recognitions:
We are the first in India to acquire a license from the Ministry of Ayush to use cannabis oil for pets, voted as one of the top 500 brands in India by Yourstory, the first petcare brand in APAC to be invited to join the World Pet Association, awarded Pet Retail-er of the Year 2022 and certified by International Boarding & Pet Services Association.

Name: Kinship
Description:
Kinship—a division of Mars Petcare—is a platform of brands building the future of pet care, combining insights, products, and services to help people be the best pet parents they can be.  

Interested in learning more? Connect with us.

Name: Tuft & Paw
Description:
At Tuft & Paw, we're dedicated to helping cat parents navigate their quirks.

Nothing makes us happier than making cats happy. Literally nothing. That's why we spend every waking moment creating thoughtfully designed, premium products that actually live up to their impossibly high standards.

Name: Dogtopia
Description: Dogtopia is one of the early pioneers of dog daycare and leaders in the pet services industry. With more than 270+ stores open and 350+ in development, Dogtopia is the largest provider of specialty dog daycare in the US. We are a full-service dog daycare with boarding, training, and spa services that's been showing dogs the love since 2002. Under new ownership since 2015, Dogtopia is now the fastest-growing franchise in the $144B Pet Industry. Dogtopians are committed to chasing the highest standards of safety and professionalism while making it the "Most Exciting Day Ever" for your furry family members.

Name: Almo Nature Benefit S.p.A.
Description: Almo Nature Benefit SpA has been active since 2000, first in Italy and then worldwide, in the dog and cat food market. Since its inception, it has stood out for innovation, using ingredients that are originally fit for human consumption (HFC - Human Food Chain). This commitment to high quality and attention to raw materials has contributed to positioning Almo Nature as a point of reference in innovation in the Pet Food sector. The Capellino Foundation was born in 2018, with the aim of preserving biodiversity and fighting climate change: thanks to the irreversible public act, the Capellino brothers donate Almo Nature to the Foundation of the same name. This symbolic gesture represents a total embrace of the company philosophy, definitively renouncing 100% of ownership and voting rights. The "Reintegration Economy" is born, a revolutionary economic model, which involves the reintegration of the added value created by economic activities in nature, rather than in the growth of individual wealth. Today Almo Nature is an activist brand 100% owned by the Capellino Foundation. Those who purchase Almo Nature pet food support the activism generated by the Reintegration Economy and contribute to the protection of the Planet.

Name: PetPlate
Description:
PetPlate was founded in 2016 by Renaldo Webb when he decided it was time to feed his first dog, Winston, real food, so he started cooking for him and soon discovered a tremendous need for PetPlate. The business has grown exponentially since launching nationally in 2017. PetPlate is widely respected as a pioneer in the fresh-cooked pet food category, one of the fastest growing categories in the $35 billion pet food industry. PetPlate's relentless pursuit of excellence in the overall customer experience sets it apart. We have built a small but nimble team dedicated to providing dogs everywhere with a fresh-cooked diet that is healthy, delicious, and ready to eat. The meals are custom-portioned to meet the individual caloric needs of each and every pup, and the meals are delivered right to the pet parent’s door for ease, convenience, and peace of mind.

As a fast-growing DTC brand, we are looking for colleagues who love dogs and want to collaborate with other dog lovers to deliver the best possible experience for our furry friends and their pet parents. We are hiring at all levels and in all areas (marketing, ops, tech, finance). If you don't see a job matching your background, please send a note to petcare@petplate.com, and we'll reach out to learn more about each other.

Name: Docg.
Description:
A Docg nasceu com o propósito de fazer com que todos os pets vivam mais e melhor.
Cada produto é pensado para inovar e expressar ainda mais a paixão que todos os colaboradores têm pelos pets.
Além disso, a Docg possui mais de 100 franquias espalhadas por por todo o território nacional, oferecendo produtos e serviços autênticos.
Assim como a empresa irmã DrogaVet, que atua no mercado veterinário a mais de 15 anos, a Docg nasceu para mudar as vidas das pessoas e dos animais.
Por isso, promover a saúde, beleza e segurança para os animais, com qualidade e originalidade, bem como mudar a vida das pessoas através do empreendedorismo são os valores da empresa
Vem fazer parte do Docg, para levar a missão dos pets viverem mais e melhor a mais animais e ajudar pessoas a mudarem sua vida profissional.

#docg  #docgauthentic #docgauthenticpet  #petshop #empreendedorismo
#mercadopet #pequenosnegocios

Name: Univet
Description:
Univet, ce sont plus de 1200 collaborateurs, vétérinaires et auxiliaires de soins vétérinaires, unis au service d’une même cause : le droit de chaque animal à accéder à des soins d’excellence.  

Chaque jour, les 180 cliniques Univet, réparties en France et en Belgique conjuguent leurs compétences dans un esprit de bienveillance pour soigner les animaux qui leur sont confiés.

Plus qu’un réseau de cliniques, Univet réunit des femmes et des hommes qui ont fait le choix de croire en un modèle vétérinaire alternatif, mettant le progrès et la considération, qu’elle soit humaine ou animale, au cœur de leur mission et de leur offre de soins.

Name: Groombuggy
Description:
Groombuggy is the premier mobile dog grooming company in the San Francisco Bay Area.

We are growing rapidly. We are taking a Silicon Valley tech startup approach to the mobile dog grooming industry. We are proud of the work we do to create great jobs for dog groomers and help pet owners care for their loved ones.

Name: Pure Pet Food
Description:
Pure co-founders and childhood friends Mat and Dan set out with an ambition to create the healthiest, convenience pet food on the market.

Since then it’s been our mission to inspire a healthier world for pets.

All our food is made in own human grade food facility in Yorkshire, using only the very best fresh and raw ingredients, which are gently air-dried to lock in their goodness. Owners simply add water to create a healthy, natural meal for your dog.

Made with the same quality ingredients you'd find in your own food, containing no grains, meat derivatives or any other nasties. We’ve had thousands of success stories that mention such improvements as glossier coats, happier tummies and emptier bowls.

Name: Pet Paradise
Description: Headquartered in Jacksonville, Florida, Pet Paradise is a comprehensive pet health care provider offering resort-style day camp, overnight boarding, professional grooming and experienced service from NewDay Veterinary Care all under one roof. With over 60 locations spanning ten states, Pet Paradise continues to expand in the United States. Pet Paradise was ranked No. 1 for day camp and day care services by Newsweek’s 2021 Best Petcare Brands, and named a 2022, 2024, and 2025 Best-in-Class employer by Gallagher. For more information about Pet Paradise visit petparadise.com or our social media sites on: Facebook, Instagram, Linkedin, Twitter, and YouTube.

Name: Nootie
Description:
With more than 17 years of service to pet parents, The Pet Point is the largest and the most famous pet retailer in Delhi that have been fulfilling every single need of pets. They believe that pets can make lives better. It is remarkable how they support their customers and how they make a difference in every pet parent’s lives. Happy customers is their #1 priority. They are passionate about finding new ways to amaze pet owners and the industry at large. They have managed to maintain an incredible relationship with trusted companies, breeders, and dealers.

The Pet Point is located in Punjabi Bagh and Rajouri Garden, New Delhi. They have a world- class grooming salon for pets, with a waiting lounge for pet owners. What makes them unique is the 100% satisfaction guarantee. The services are convenient and affordable.

They strive to deliver a wide range of best pet food and products. One can find international brands at their stores, too.

An excellent veterinarian care with professional veterinarian and experts is available, that acts as a complete package of health and wellness care of pets. The store also has a in-built pet pharmacy.
They have worked with a lot of celebrities and public figures like Hardy Sandhu, Dharmendra, Yogi Adityanath and many more. They have always been the first on the list when it comes to finding a pet shop. All the customers deeply admire their vision which has made them happier and their lives better.

Name: TailBlaze
Description:
At TailBlaze, we're not just another pet food company—we're building India's first pet longevity movement. Every day, 38,000 dogs die prematurely worldwide due to nutrition-related issues, largely because commercial "premium" foods contain 45-55% harmful carbohydrates (dogs need only 12-15%). We exist to change that devastating reality.

Our Mission: Transform pet nutrition through science-backed, shelf-stable fresh meals that deliver 40-45% protein content (vs. industry standard 18-22%), giving pet families more precious years together.

The TailBlaze Difference:
Proprietary FreshTail Technology: Shelf-stable fresh nutrition without refrigeration requirements
WhatsApp-First Commerce: Serving India's 487M+ WhatsApp users with familiar, trusted ordering experience  
Manufacturing Excellence: Vertical integration enabling 60-72% gross margins while reducing costs by 5x
Proven Results: 95% customer retention, featured on Blinkit & BBNow

Founded by Manaall Maniyar (30u30 Rising Entrepreneur, 2 unicorn exits, Canine Nutritionist) after witnessing his Labrador Einstein's transformation from 42kg to 33kg through proper nutrition. What started as a personal mission has become a movement attracting recognition from industry leaders including the late Ratan Tata.

Vision 2030: Become India's dominant pet longevity brand, fundamentally transforming pet care by adding 3-5 years to dogs' lives while building India's first internationally recognized pet care brand.

From Einstein's journey to global recognition, we're proving that when science meets love, every tail deserves to blaze with health and happiness.
Join the movement. Transform your dog's life.

#PetNutrition #DogHealth #PetLongevity #FreshPetFood #IndianStartup #PetCare #AnimalHealth #Entrepreneurship

Name: KatKin
Description: KatKin goes hardcore for cat health: cutting the fluff, thinking fresh and channelling hardcore love into industry-wide change. We put cats over profits, and science over cheap marketing wins. We do things the right way, even if that means the hard way. So cats live long and cat parents can love hard without compromise. We’ll keep pushing until hardcore love is the standard for cat care everywhere. So cats jump higher, zoomie faster, purr louder and live longer. #LoveHard

Name: Topet company
Description: We are providing a subscription-based health monitoring, smart application, and sensors bundle for pet owners to help them with early diagnostics of their pets` diseases. The application is able to analyze gathered data to forecast any potential health problem and give advice just in time before it comes too late or costly for the owner to take care of their pets.

Name: SM BROS GROUP
Description: S M Bros Group is a renowned conglomerate with a rich legacy spanning over two decades. Since its inception in 2000, the company has emerged as a leading player in the fields of pet and aquatic supplies, FMCG, office supplies, printing & graphics, and more. Founded by Mr. Samed Muhammed, S M Bros Group has continuously strived for excellence, setting benchmarks in quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction.

Name: Wuffes
Description: At Wuffes, our mission is to alleviate the world's dogs of the most common, curable diseases by providing best-in-class products,  and promoting education about proper dog care. We are the world's fastest-growing, bootstrapped pet company.

Name: Just Russel
Description:
Just Russel is a Belgian DTC Pet Tech scale up on a mission to help pets live longer, healthier, happier lives.

We build data driven, personalized nutrition and preventive pet care that adapts as pets grow and life changes. Powered by our proprietary algorithm, we turn complex pet health into simple daily habits that actually work.

Our growing team works every day to make proactive pet care easy, accessible, and stress free for pet parents. No guesswork. No confusing labels. Just smart nutrition and honest guidance.

Founded in 2020, Just Russel now supports more than 100,000 happy customers and their pets across Belgium, the Netherlands, Germany, and France. Just Russel, Long Live Pets!

Name: Fetch
Description:
Hey there, we're Fetch — vets, data whizzes, techies, and insurance experts transforming the way we care for our pets.

Working with dozens of Aussie pet parents and vets, we’ve rethought the system to be easier, fairer, and more connected. We’re building a subscription and accompanying app that brings together insurance, prevention, insights, and rewards to simplify pet health and help more Aussie pets thrive. And we’re just getting started.

We’re backed by Aussie and international investors, including AirTree, vets, insurance CEOs, pet retailers, brand and marketing experts, start-up founders, and tech leaders.

Name: Petsfolio
Description:
Petsfolio is a unique company catering to pet-centric services that include dog walking, dog training, dog grooming, daycare center, and dog food delivery. With a team of highly enthusiastic, dedicated and professional pet caregivers, we ensure that your pet gets the best of love and affection under one roof. 
As a group of loving dog owners, we understand the daily requirement of pets to exercise, develop a routine, eat healthy meals, and ensure that they are active all the time. We help ease your woes by providing daily, monthly, and quarterly service packages customized as per your requirement. Our motto is to ensure a healthy pet with an amicable personality. Our personalized dog training solutions help you to graduate your pup into an obedient and friendly dog. All our trainers are licensed and certified. 
We are your one-stop pet solution located at the click of a button. Make the most of excellent dog walking and grooming services in your city today!

Name: Barkbus
Description:
Barkbus is the nation's premier mobile dog grooming company. We are dog-loving creatives, operators, technologists, and entrepreneurs taking a Silicon Valley startup approach to disrupt and modernize the fragmented legacy pet grooming industry. 

Driven by our mission to deliver joy to pets and their people, we're proud to operate across Arizona, California, Colorado, Connecticut, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Nevada, New Jersey, New York, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, South Carolina, Texas, and Virginia.

We’re the fastest-growing pet health & wellness startup in the country and would love you to join us in building the nation’s beloved pet brand.

Name: fable
Description: Fable is a fast-growing, venture-backed animal wellness brand based in New York. We design gear that solves problems for you and your pet, so the two of you can enjoy exploring the world together.

Name: Aleef
Description: ALEEF was founded in 2015. We began as an online pet supply store and have expanded to providing quality veterinary care. ALEEF is not only distinguished by its reputation but also by its dedicated employees.

Name: Confiance Co.
Description:
Welcome to Confiance – Your Trusted Partner in Pet Care! 

At Confiance, we're dedicated to providing premium pet products and services to keep your furry companions healthy and happy. From nutritious food to engaging toys and stylish accessories, we offer a comprehensive range of solutions for all your pet care needs.

With a commitment to quality and excellence, Confiance partners with leading international brands to ensure that your pets receive the best care possible. Our team consists of passionate pet lovers and experts in the field, trusted by pet owners and veterinarians worldwide.

Join the Confiance family today and experience the difference in pet care. Follow our page for updates, pet care tips, and exclusive offers!  #ConfiancePetCare #PetWellness #PetProducts

Name: KANGA STORES
Description: Helping you to take care of pets.

Name: Josera petfood
Description:
Josera means passion – for dogs, cats, & horses; but especially for super-premium petfood made in Germany. With over 80 years of experience, we are still ambitious to find - and follow - innovative, new paths: The best recipes, high-quality ingredients, modern, climate-friendly production, and continuous quality controls in our own accredited laboratory ensure the highest level of acceptance and compatibility. 

Let’s paint the world yellow  

Josera Petfood is an international pet food brand and a subsidiary of the family-owned business ERBACHER the food family. Our team at the locations in Bavaria, Poland and Ukraine is closely connected - with each other and with our long-standing partners in over 70 countries. Together we are constantly developing our reliable, and profitable product portfolio. Always with the well-being of our pets, people, and the environment in mind. 

Get in touch if you share our passion for pets & petfood! We are always looking for new colleagues and business partners from all over the world.

Josera - petfood with passion

Name: Mascotas365
Description:
En nuestra tienda, nos dedicamos a ofrecer una amplia gama de productos para el cuidado y bienestar de tus mascotas. Desde alimentos nutritivos hasta accesorios divertidos y prácticos, tenemos todo lo que necesitas para consentir a tus engreídos. Nuestro compromiso es proporcionar productos de alta calidad que satisfagan las necesidades de tus mascotas y te brinden tranquilidad. 

Únete a nuestra comunidad de amantes de mascotas y mantente al día con las últimas novedades y consejos en nuestras redes sociales. Síguenos en Facebook, TikTok e Instagram. Visítanos hoy mismo y descubre lo mejor para tus mascotas. Cuidamos a tus engreídos con amor.

Name: ThePetNest
Description:
𝐁𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞, 𝐚𝐥𝐥-𝐢𝐧-𝐨𝐧𝐞, 𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐡-𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞𝐝 𝐞𝐜𝐨𝐬𝐲𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐦 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐣𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐞𝐲 𝐨𝐟 𝐏𝐞𝐭 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 𝐚𝐜𝐫𝐨𝐬𝐬 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐚.

Our use of 𝐢𝐧𝐧𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐧𝐨𝐥𝐨𝐠𝐢𝐞𝐬 is transforming the unorganised pet care market, helping customers make 𝐟𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐬𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐝𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 when it comes to pet care. 

We offer a comprehensive range of services, including 𝑮𝒓𝒐𝒐𝒎𝒊𝒏𝒈, 𝑽𝒆𝒕𝒆𝒓𝒊𝒏𝒂𝒓𝒚, 𝑾𝒂𝒍𝒌𝒊𝒏𝒈, 𝑩𝒐𝒂𝒓𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝑫𝒐𝒈 𝑻𝒓𝒂𝒊𝒏𝒊𝒏𝒈 services in 25+ cities across India. 

𝐄𝐦𝐩𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐮𝐫𝐬 through a scalable franchise model, offering trusted services and products under a proven brand. 

With over 17,000+ 𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐬 listed for 𝐫𝐞𝐡𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐠, we are helping pets find loving forever homes. 

As a 𝐛𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐝 and 𝐄𝐁𝐈𝐓𝐃𝐀+ company, we are committed to innovating the pet care market and becoming an Indian pet-care leader.

Our 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐜𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐫 𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 on our platform through our website and mobile app is a testament to our commitment to providing exceptional service.

Our team of dedicated 𝐏𝐞𝐭-𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐏𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐬 is committed to providing the best possible care for your pet. We conduct background and identity checks on all our staff, ensuring you can trust us with your pet's care.

We offer 𝐓𝐡𝐞𝐏𝐞𝐭𝐍𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐆𝐮𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐞, 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧, and 24/7 𝐬𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭. Our ongoing service education ensures that our service partners are always up-to-date with the latest best practices.

𝐀𝐭 𝐓𝐡𝐞𝐏𝐞𝐭𝐍𝐞𝐬𝐭, 𝐰𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐛𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐨𝐧𝐞-𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐩 𝐬𝐡𝐨𝐩 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐩𝐞𝐭-𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝𝐬. 

𝑱𝒐𝒊𝒏 𝒖𝒔 𝒊𝒏 𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒎𝒊𝒔𝒔𝒊𝒐𝒏 𝒕𝒐 𝒎𝒂𝒌𝒆 𝒔𝒖𝒓𝒆 𝒕𝒉𝒂𝒕 𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒓𝒚 𝒑𝒆𝒕 𝒊𝒔 𝒉𝒂𝒑𝒑𝒚, 𝒉𝒆𝒂𝒍𝒕𝒉𝒚, 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒍𝒐𝒗𝒆𝒅.

Name: Clumsy Bumsy
Description: Fresh, complete and balanced food for cats with no preservatives, no fillers, no grains and no nonsense. Comes in an easy to use pouches, prepared using special technology developed for astronauts and the military that locks in the freshness of food upto 2 years.

Name: Empethy
Description: Empethy aiuta le aziende a unire purpose, wellbeing e impatto misurabile attraverso programmi pet-driven: adozioni responsabili, volontariato, donazioni tracciate e servizi per il benessere dei dipendenti. Offriamo una piattaforma white-label che semplifica l’attivazione dei progetti, coinvolge le persone e produce report ESG pronti per il bilancio di sostenibilità.

Name: Support Pets
Description:
At Support Pets, we believe that meaningful work is about empowering people, supporting pets, and providing the flexibility to thrive.

We exist to uplift the human-animal bond and ensure that the comfort, healing, and emotional strength pets bring into our lives is acknowledged, supported, and celebrated. From our fully remote team to the people and pets we serve, everything we do is rooted in purpose and compassion.

Our Mission
To make emotional support accessible, ethical, and empowering—for people and pets alike.
We connect individuals with licensed professionals, deliver secure ESA and PSD training and documentation, and offer a range of growing wellness tools so pet owners can feel confident, supported, and cared for throughout every stage of their journey.

Our Vision
We envision a future where the emotional value of pets is universally recognized and respected.
Through innovation, education, and responsible advocacy, we aim to create a world where individuals can thrive alongside their emotional support animals—and where pet ownership is met with trust, understanding, and compassion.
Why Join Us?
At Support Pets, you’re not just an employee—you’re part of a mission-driven team committed to making a difference.
Here’s what makes us unique:
 Impact-Driven Work – Help people and pets live happier, healthier lives through real solutions.
 Work From Anywhere – Enjoy the freedom and flexibility of a fully remote team.
 Financial Growth & Stability – Earn while doing work that truly matters.
 A Supportive Community – Join a collaborative, welcoming team that values your success.

Learn more about our work and how you can be part of a global team by visiting our website: https://www.supportpets.com and follow our page for insights, updates, and career opportunities.

Name: Bella+Duke
Description:
Our pets have always been right by us , it's time we do right by them too.

After our founders, Mark & Tony, both lost their dogs to cancer, they decided to investigate why. They discovered that the processed food their dogs had eaten their whole lives may have actually caused their illness. They rolled up their sleeves, dug into natural dog diets and started making the best raw pet food available anywhere in the country.

Designed by nutritionists and approved by vets, we deliver healthy raw pet food straight to your door, when you need it.

Backed by cutting edge science, we only add an ingredient if it enhances the nutritional value of your pet’s meal. Every ingredient we add to our raw dog food and raw cat food provides a real benefit to your pet’s health. 

We pride ourselves on carefully sourcing the best ingredients from British & Irish farms. Our food is free from grains, fillers and anything artificial.

Name: Carry My Pet
Description: An initiative of DBB Worldwide Private Limited, we at Carry My Pet ensure safe and comfortable transfer of your pets, at your doorstep. Transferring pets is a lengthy procedure, involving a lot of certification. But our experienced team provides a hassle-free transfer, to help your pet have a wonderful travel experience.

Name: Groomit
Description: Groomit - Pet Grooming On Demand At Your Time & Place - Download Now http://onelink.to/groom

Name: DogSpot Meals
Description:
Humans are selfish. First we created dogs, by selective breeding, to make an animal to be in a certain form, to perform a function for us; then we also created dog food.

The most prevalent dog food available in the market was made to satisfy our selfish convenience. Kibble, which we call food, has no identity without a brand label on it. No one can tell what is in the kibble by tasting it or by seeing it. The world's largest kibble making companies started to focus on the Indian Market in the late 90s. Our Founder, Rana Atheya, was 18 then, with more than 15 years of experience of feeding homemade dog food to our dogs. His father, a Professor of veterinary sciences, taught him how to make balanced food for dogs. It was simple and straightforward with minimal ingredients. Dogs were happy and used to live long. Then came kibble which appeared to be the most convenient food with so many ingredients. Suddenly, dog food became complicated. Unfortunately the average age of the dogs has gradually reduced since the introduction of kibble.

Our family and friends also suffered loss of our dear ones. We decided to make healthier dog food which would ensure healthier - longer lives of our pets. We started working on the dog food formulation in 2018. We identified the problem areas such as right balance, storage, palatability, transparency , digestibility and waste analysis for all types of dogs. We concluded that a homemade recipe is the panacea of all problems. Identifying and sourcing high quality, human grade fresh meat was our priority. DogSpot Meals is tested, tried and tasted by our human team before it reaches the market.

What motivates us?: We help pets to live a Healthier, Happier & Longer life.

Description:

If your dog ever goes missing, DogPack allows you to send notifications to all app users within your area to help track down your dog quickly. This community-driven feature has already helped reunite many lost pets with their owners, making DogPack a valuable tool for keeping dogs safe.

Founded by a team of four brothers who love dogs and community, DogPack brings dog lovers together in a way that’s easy, fun, and practical. Whether you're exploring new places, sharing special moments, or finding vital services, DogPack is your go-to app for all things dog-related.

Name: Spoton Dog Collar
Description:
Introducing SpotOn Fence, the revolutionary solution that redefines the way you keep your furry friend safe within boundaries. Designed with cutting-edge technology and a deep understanding of dog behavior, SpotOn Fence offers a seamless, reliable, and customizable containment system that eliminates the need for traditional physical fences.

Gone are the days of unsightly fences obstructing your beautiful landscape. SpotOn Fence uses a combination of GPS, wireless communication, and advanced algorithms to create virtual boundaries for your dog. The system consists of a compact and lightweight collar receiver and a user-friendly smartphone app, allowing you to effortlessly set up, monitor, and adjust the fence parameters according to your specific needs.

Setting up SpotOn Fence is a breeze. Simply download the app, walk the perimeter you desire, and mark the boundary on the map. The app leverages GPS technology to precisely establish the virtual fence, ensuring accuracy and reliability. You can define multiple boundaries, perfect for those with larger properties or complex layouts.

One of the key advantages of SpotOn Fence is its adaptability. Traditional physical fences often limit the freedom of movement for both pets and owners. With SpotOn Fence, you can easily take your dog on adventures while maintaining control over their boundaries. Whether you're camping, visiting friends, or going on a road trip, the system allows you to create a safe space wherever you go. No more worrying about escape attempts or your dog getting lost in unfamiliar surroundings.

SpotOn Fence is built with safety as a top priority. The collar receiver features built-in motion sensors and a gentle stimulation mechanism that ensures your dog's well-being. It provides audible and visual cues to warn your pet when they approach the virtual boundary. The customizable stimulation levels are tailored to suit your dog's size, breed, and temperament, ensuring an effective yet humane response.

Description: For many years, we’ve been the preferred DNA testing laboratory for pet owners, breeders, clubs, and veterinarians. In addition, we have an exciting pipeline of future animal health and wellbeing diagnostic services which will revolutionize genetic testing and breeding management. We do not only focus on B2C genetic testing but also provide customized genetic testing solutions for B2B partners as a service provider. Our team is experienced in different genetic testing and screening methods. For us it is of highest importance to perform genetic testing based on newest available technologies making dog testing comparable to human diagnostic standards. Our aim is providing the most comprehensive service tailored to our customers benefit. We are offering routine genetic analysis like parentage verification as well as testing for genetic disorders and traits, but also genetic diversity analysis. Based on this information we can help breeders making breeding decisions to improve health in the offspring. Additionally, to the classic genetic testing we are looking for new innovative services that could be of interest for “dog people”. Wellbeing diagnostic is a steadily growing market also for pets and we are happy to offer genetic analysis improving a dog’s life.

Through our process of educating ourselves about everything related to Canine Health and nutrition we came across the ancestral Raw food concept of feeding. This struck a chord in us. We as a family eat all organic, preservatives free natural food choosing the best organic farms to get our daily food, then why are we filling our pooches body with preservatives filled kibble, even the most premium brand have loads of preservatives in their processed foods. We researched for the best Dog Nutritionist across the world, consulted many of them, after hours and hours of consultation we finally decided to go ahead and switch Shadow’s diet to Natural Organic Raw food.
As Shadow’s Ancestral trail comes from wolf blood lines who feed on hunt and kill. It was very comforting for Shadow to switch and accept his new diet to replicate Hunt and kill. We took a complete 1 week to switch him from Kibble to Complete Raw food. First week Shadow lost weight, over the few weeks we realised his poop size became smaller and lesser in quantity compared to the huge poops when he was eating Kibbel. The best part was his interest in food had increased multiple folds, he is so excited everytime we start preparing his food, waiting to enjoy his delicious food which is changing with every meal.
The change in food with every meal keeps Shadow very hooked to his meal time, this is another best outcome we realised with the switch to Raw food, eating the same kibble every meal , 7 days a week must be so boring. Imagine yourselves eating the same food every meal , every day of your life.

His health started picking up real fast, no bad breath at all

Name: Gemini Genetics
Description:
Founded in 2018, Gemini Genetics is the UK's first animal tissue bank, specialising in the genetic preservation and cloning of your beloved pets; dogs, cats, and horses. 

Through the use of our state-of-the-art tissue preparation methods, your animal's DNA is able to be cryogenically preserved here with us in a living biobank. These samples are then able to be indefinably stored while retaining the necessary viability for use in future regenerative technologies such as cell culture and cloning. 

Gemini Genetics are a proud sister company of both Stallion AI Services and Elite Kennel Fertility, comprising the corporate team that won the Queen's Award for Enterprise: Innovation 2022. All as well as closely assisting charity Nature's SAFE on their mission to Save Animal From Extinction. 

Gemini Genetics is also partnered with ViaGen Pets and Equine in the US. So, after the initial genetic preservation with us, your animal's sample with be safely and securely shipped to ViaGen for the cloning process to be completed. For many people shipping directly to the US can be difficult, Gemini Genetics is here to make cloning accessible, accepting samples globally. 

Follow us on social media to keep updated: 
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/GeminiGenetics 
Instergram - https://www.instagram.com/gemini.genetics/
Twitter - https://twitter.com/GeneticsGemini

For more in-depth information about domestic animal genetic preservation and cloning visit the Gemini Genetics website - https://www.geminigenetics.com/

Name: FurBabies Botanicals
Description:
FurBabies Botanicals | Redefining Pet Skincare & Oral Health
At FurBabies Botanicals, we are transforming pet skincare with a veterinary research-informed approach, ensuring dogs, cats, rabbits, hamsters, and guinea pigs receive safe, effective, and evidence-based care. Unlike traditional grooming products that rely on harsh detergents, artificial chemicals, and fragrances, our range is designed to restore, protect, and fortify the delicate pet skin barrier and microbiome.

Why It Matters
Many pets suffer from persistent skin and coat concerns that impact their comfort and well-being:
 Itchy, inflamed skin
 Recurrent yeast infections & greasy skin
 Balding, hair loss & hotspots
 Persistent odours & excessive licking
 Ear discharge & yeast overgrowth

How FurBabies Botanicals is Different
 Veterinary Science-Informed – Developed with insights from dermatology, microbiome health, and evidence-based skincare.
 Skin Barrier & Microbiome Support – Many pet shampoos strip essential oils, weakening the skin. Our formulas nourish and repair rather than disrupt.
 Scent Identity Protection – Artificial fragrances alter a pet’s natural scent, affecting their mental health. We prioritise gentle, pet-safe aromatherapy.
 Sustainable & Ethical – Biodegradable, COSMOS-regulated ingredients in recyclable packaging ensure our products are good for pets and the planet.

The pet grooming industry still follows human cosmetic regulations, despite pet skin being up to five times thinner and pets ingesting topical chemicals through self-grooming. This regulatory gap leaves many products unsuitable for long-term health—and we’re here to change that.

Let’s connect and explore how safer, science-backed skincare solutions can improve pet health. 
#DefectiveSkinBarrier #HealthySkinHappyPets #SpeciesAppropriateProducts

Name: National Foundation for Retired Service Animals
Description:
The National Foundation for Retired Service Animals is a registered charity (1200949) promoting the welfare of retired dogs and horses from the police, fire, prison, and border force services by supporting their owners with medical and veterinary bills, which inevitably occur as the years advance.

When the career of a serving police/fire/prison/border force/National Crime Agency dog or horse comes to an end, the financial support they have enjoyed whilst working, including food, kennels or stables, medical and veterinary requirements, training, and equipment also stops.

Unfortunately, meaningful insurance is almost impossible to obtain due to their age and training, and even if available, the premiums insurance companies charge for retired animals is unattainable.

This can be intimidating for handlers who have their own financial obligations, and the thought of rising medical bills can be a real challenge.

As is widely acknowledged, the relationship between a handler and their working partner is second to none, and it is unthinkable the pair may be broken up due to financial pressure. 

Unfortunately, this does sometimes happen, and it causes great distress for the handlers, their families, and of course the animals themselves.

To help prevent this happening and where possible, the NFRSA ensures these heroic animals are able to stay where they belong, with the families they love, by supporting them with medical and veterinary bills.

Whether it’s treatment for arthritis, medication for epilepsy, or a life/saving operation for a stomach torsion, the NFRSA passionately believes these wonderful dogs and horses, who have spent their lives keeping us, the public safe, in ways some of could never even imagine, deserve the care and protection they have given us, in their twilight years.

Our motto is simple: ‘Protect Our Protectors’.

Please join us in whatever way you can.

Name: woohooPets
Description:
Sometimes, challenging times lead to great inspiration. That’s certainly true for woohooPets and our founder, Renee.

At the age of 25, Renee received a cancer diagnosis, and she quickly learned she was not alone. She was shocked to learn there has been a 300% increase in bowel cancer in young people over the last decade, with a similar trend in dogs and cats. Studies have shown that much of this rise can be linked to the processed food in our - and our pets’ - diets.

Diving deep into her exploration of nutrition, Renee learned not only how foundational clean nutrition is to our wellness but also how difficult it can be to access whole food products. She began thinking about how important transparency and clean food are to our health and well-being and to our fur buddies.

As she took steps to reclaim her vitality, Renee couldn’t help but think of her beloved pup: shouldn’t he have the same attention to his quality of life?

With over 12 years in the pet industry, Renee has interacted with thousands of customers and pets. She has seen a consistent need for true single protein products that are simple, affordable, and easy to integrate into existing diets.

Name: Proudi
Description:
It was 2015 when our founder, Dennis King, an entrepreneur and animal-lover, was looking for a high-quality, natural dog food for his beloved French bulldog Fergus. However, he didn’t quite anticipate where his quest would lead.

Dennis searched high and low for the right food, visiting pet food factories, researching food science and meeting with animal nutrition experts. There was simply nothing on the market that could live up to his expectations. Instead of giving up, Dennis decided to create from scratch, the very product he was searching for. After all, there was nothing he wouldn’t do for Fergus.

That’s when Proudi was born.

The mission: to break down pet food stereotypes and provide the best quality nutrition for dogs and cats. Dennis and his new team of food scientists and animal nutritionists worked tirelessly, putting heart and soul into developing a premium raw food he could trust. In the end, he was so Proud of the product they had created, he named it Proudi.

Soon after, Dennis fell in love with an orphaned domestic short-haired cat called Muffin and welcomed him into his family. He immediately faced the same dilemma regarding what to feed him. So, with just as much care and precision, Dennis and his team developed Proudi for cats.

Dennis’s philosophy is, “The quality of ingredients defines the health of the animal.” That’s why nothing goes into Proudi that we wouldn’t put on our own plates. Our patties contain 100% human grade ingredients, minimally processed in an Australian human grade facility and scientifically formulated to perfectly meet the nutritional needs of dogs and cats.

We are proud to be an Australian company, proud of the work we do, and proud to do it all for the health and happiness of the dogs and cats who make our lives complete.

Raw Feeders Kitchen is behind the brands  Proudi and YumGuard that are designed to support your pets health and overall wellbeing.

Name: Gizzls
Description:
Like all good stories, Gizzls began with a furry creature!

Gizzls was started in a kitchen with a mixer, an oven and a rescue kitty named Gizzy, with the belief that our furry friends deserve better. Better treats with fresher, simpler, all-natural ingredients.

When Gizzy got sick, all our founder Jacki, could find were treats with ingredient lists longer than your vet’s bill and shady things – like vague meat sources, sugars or unnecessary fillers – that you certainly don’t want to give your sick kitty.

So, she got baking and baked treats with short ingredient lists that heal. And to ensure that the correct amount of goodness goes into each recipe, all our treats are developed with a pet nutritionist and a holistic vet.  

We baked and baked, and we grew and grew! The bakeries are now bigger, but our batches are still small and our ingredients are still the best. We are committed to baking healthy, functional treats that make our furry friend's lives better.

Gizzls now offers four ranges – CBD (recommended by vets), Botanicals, Everyday and Soft Bites – of delicious hypoallergenic cat and dog treats that are 100% natural with zero nasties and a firm wiggle of approval from our chief taste tasters.

Name: Laqu & Company
Description:
At LAQU, we believe caring for our pets and caring for the planet should go hand in hand. That’s why we created the world’s first eco-friendly litter made from 100% upcycled seaweed — a natural, compostable alternative that keeps homes cleaner, cats happier, and our Earth greener.

Our story began with an unexpected discovery in the lab: seaweed, with its remarkable absorbency and odor control, had all the properties of the perfect litter. From that “accident” grew a vision — led by a mother and daughter team, united by love for animals and commitment to sustainability.

Today, LAQU offers a new generation of litter:
- Healthier for pets: dust-free, chemical-free, and gentle even on sensitive paws.
- Better for people: cleaner handling, flushable disposal, and a ready-to-use box for maximum convenience.
- Kinder to the planet: compostable and reusable as natural fertilizer, reducing waste and impact.

We are proud to be a woman-led brand challenging industry norms, proving that innovation and responsibility can go together. With every box of LAQU litter, we’re building not just a cleaner home, but a cleaner future.

 Our mission is simple: transform pet care through science, sustainability, and a touch of family heart.

Name: Tailr
Description:
Innovative Intersection of Pet Health and Pet Tech:
Tailr's beautifully designed QR code pet tags offer the most comprehensive and user-friendly way to manage your pet's health and care information. Our robust smartphone app centralizes all vital documents, making it easy for pet parents, veterinarians, groomers, and caregivers to access crucial information anytime, anywhere.


Beautiful Design with a Proven Real-Life impact:
Tailr isn’t just about looks—it’s about making a real impact in everyday situations.
 
Emergency Care: 
Veterinarians can instantly access crucial health data by scanning the Tailr tag, potentially saving lives during emergencies.


Grooming Precision: 
Groomers can view detailed instructions and preferences through the Tailr app, ensuring your pet gets exactly the care and style you want.


Pet Boarding and Daycare: 
Care providers can quickly access dietary restrictions, medication schedules, and other essential details, ensuring your pet receives personalized care even when you're not around.


Reuniting Lost Pets
Every pet parent’s nightmare is losing their pet. Tailr’s QR tags are designed to bring pets home faster by notifying nearby users instantly when a pet is lost or found. Our mission is to create a world where no pet stays lost, and every family is quickly reunited—safely and securely, with full data protection. 


Putting Pet Parents in Control:
We know that being a pet parent can be overwhelming, with so much to manage and remember. Tailr is here to lighten that load. Our QR code tags and app simplify everything, from health records to daily care, so you can focus on what matters most—sharing happy, worry-free moments with your pet.

Name: TILDA
Description:
TILDA is the operating system for pet health and longevity.

Today, pet care is fragmented. Data lives in devices, clinics, insurers, and services ,but no system connects it into continuous intelligence or actionable outcomes. As a result, most tools react too late, and meaningful prevention remains out of reach.

TILDA changes this.

We are building an OS-level intelligence layer that sits above wearables, veterinary care, insurance, and services, turning continuous signals into longitudinal health baselines, decisions, and real-world outcomes over a pet’s lifetime.

Inspired by the success of platforms like OURA and WHOOP in human health, TILDA applies the same operating-system approach to a global pet health market exceeding $500B, a category that, until now, has lacked a true OS.

Our system is designed to:

Detect subtle health signals early

Interpret them relative to each pet’s unique baseline

Trigger contextual actions across care and coverage

Learn continuously from outcomes over time

The result is a compounding intelligence loop that improves prediction, care quality, trust, and efficiency with every cohort and every signal.

TILDA is not a gadget or a point solution. Devices are simply sensors. The value lives in the operating system, where data, AI, outcomes, and ecosystems converge.

We are building foundational infrastructure for the future of pet health: longitudinal, outcome-driven, and designed to scale.

Name: OVCPetNutrition
Description:
Our mission is to explore innovations in pet nutrition based on a firm foundation of nutritional science. Our research investigates new ideas in pet nutrition; how changing their food can help to give them longer, healthier lives.

The OVC Pet Nutrition Team is led by Dr. Adronie Verbrugghe. After graduating as a companion animal veterinarian (DVM) from Ghent University, Belgium in 2005, she continued her education in companion animal nutrition at the same university. She finished her PhD focusing on nutritional modulation of carbohydrate metabolism in cats in 2009 and became a European Specialist in  Veterinary and Comparative Nutrition (Diplomat ECVCN) in 2010. Currently, Dr. Verbrugghe is an associate professor and Royal Canin Veterinary Diets Endowed Chair in Canine and Feline Clinical Nutrition in the Department of Clinical Studies at the Ontario Veterinary College, University of Guelph. The major goals of this position at OVC are to enhance nutrition education among veterinary professionals, to promote companion animal nutrition research and to provide a referral nutrition consultation service. 

Research conducted by the Pet Nutrition team at the Ontario Veterinary College focuses on how advances in nutrition can optimize the life of pets, utilizing the voluntary recruitment of client-owned hospital patients, on-campus research facilities and our specialized team. Special areas of interest include canine and feline metabolism, microbiome and metabolomics, obesity and body composition, nutrient bioavailability in disease process, client communication and special interests, as well as growing ingredient and feeding trends. Some of the research technology utilized by our highly-skilled team includes Duel-energy X-Ray absorptiometry (DEXA) and indirect calorimetry.

Pet360 is not your average software – it’s your clinic’s new best friend (after the pets, of course). We’re a modern SaaS platform that helps veterinary clinics ditch the paperwork, tame the chaos, and focus on what really matters – caring for our furry companions.

 For Vets & Clinics:

Name: Budapesti Törpenyúl Tenyészet
Description:
Budapesti Törpenyúl Tenyészet – Prémium minőség, ahol a törpenyuszik szabadon és boldogan élnek

A Budapesti Törpenyúl Tenyészet nem csupán egy tenyészet, hanem egy küldetés. Magyar vállalkozásként célunk, hogy szakítsunk a hagyományos ketreces tartással, és egy olyan exkluzív modellt képviseljünk, ahol a nyuszik szabadságban, boldogságban és szeretetben nevelkednek.

Hiszünk abban, hogy a minőség a mennyiség felett áll. Éppen ezért rendkívül kis állománnyal dolgozunk, ami lehetővé teszi, hogy minden egyes egyedre kiemelt figyelmet fordítsunk. Ez a garancia arra, hogy hozzánk érkezve nem csupán egy kisállatot, hanem egy kiegyensúlyozott, egészséges és prémium genetikai hátterű társat kapjon.

Miben vagyunk egyedülállóak? Magyarországon egyedüliként kínálunk olyan nyuszikat, amelyek több generáción keresztül szocializálódtak mind a kinti, mind a benti tartáshoz. Nálunk nincsenek ketrecek: nyulaink szabadon élnek, ami alapjaiban határozza meg barátságos és nyugodt természetüket.

Amit garantálunk minden gazdinak:
*  Elvihető nyuszik egész évben: Budapest III. kerületében várunk.
*  Garantált törpe méret: Kiemelkedő vérvonalakból.
*  Magas fokú szocializáció: Kézhez és más házikedvencekhez (kutya, macska) szoktatva.
*  Alapozás a tiszta otthonért: Szobatisztaságra előnevelve adjuk át a kicsiket.
*  Dokumentált háttér: Minden nyuszink származási lappal rendelkezik.

Támogatás az első perctől: Szakmai felelősségünk nem ér véget az átadással. Minden gazdinkat kezdőcsomaggal és részletes gondozási útmutatóval látjuk el, valamint folyamatos tanácsadást biztosítunk, hogy a közös élet zökkenőmentes legyen.

Válassza a prémium minőséget és a boldog tenyésztésből származó kisállatokat!

 Helyszín: Budapest III. kerület  Magyar vállalkozás

@torpenyultenyeszet

Description:
Bienvenue dans notre univers dédié aux Maine Coons ! 

Avec de nombreuses années d'expérience dans l'élevage de Maine Coons, je mets tout mon savoir-faire et ma passion au service de ces majestueux félins. Mon parcours professionnel, enrichi par des études spécialisées en élevage, témoigne de mon engagement à offrir le meilleur à chaque chaton et à chaque adoptant. 

En tant qu'éleveuse professionnelle, j'accorde une attention particulière à chaque détail de l'élevage : soins quotidiens, socialisation, et santé. Chaque Maine Coon est élevé avec amour, pour devenir un compagnon affectueux, équilibré et en parfaite santé. Mon expertise me permet de garantir que nos chatons sont non seulement magnifiques, mais aussi bien préparés pour une vie harmonieuse dans leur nouvelle famille. 

Je suis également à l'écoute de chaque adoptant, offrant des conseils personnalisés pour choisir le Maine Coon qui correspond le mieux à vos besoins et attentes. Mon rôle ne se limite pas à la simple adoption ; je suis là pour vous accompagner tout au long du parcours, avant, pendant et après l'adoption. 

Les compétences clés que je mets en avant comprennent :

Gestion experte de l’élevage
Soins réguliers des animaux
Socialisation et éducation des chatons
Conseils personnalisés pour les adoptants
Suivi post-adoption et soutien continu
 Nos Maine Coons, avec leur douceur incomparable et leur caractère unique, sauront vous séduire dès le premier regard. Si vous cherchez un compagnon fidèle, affectueux et au charme irrésistible, vous êtes au bon endroit ! Venez découvrir l'excellence de notre élevage et trouvez votre futur compagnon de vie parmi nos magnifiques félins. 

Contactez nous dès maintenant pour en savoir plus ou pour toute question !

Name: DarfSwiss
Description:
DARF is a leading provider of organic pet food for dogs and cats in Europe. DARF Pet food for dogs and cats means highly qualified fresh meat that is 100% organic based on the BARF principle. 
BARF stands for Biologically Appropriate Raw Food, and it offers pets the variety and nutrition they need, such as game, salmon, beef, goat, or chicken. All our products are made with the best ingredients without artificial additives, without sugar and with traceable raw material origins and gentle processes. We attach great importance to the highest quality and sustainability. 
At DARF, we have of course known for years that organic pet food offers many advantages. The demand for organic food is also increasing in the ‘world’ of pets. And that makes sense, because as humans we strive for a healthy and balanced diet. Our four-legged friends also deserve only the best.

Alexander Molenaar our analyst within DARF carefully composes all products and is always working on new even better compositions or making products for dogs with special diets. 
DARF started as a personal project in the Netherlands and since then it expanded to Belgium, Germany, Austria and Ireland. As the founders of DARF Swiss in Switzerland we are passionate about providing natural and organic food for dogs and cats. The organic seal for some of our products reflects our commitment to quality and sustainability..

Name: Real Nature's Food
Description: We are one of the most important and well-known producers of raw food for dogs (B.A.R.F.) and naturally dehydrated treats in Greece. Our factory is located in the area of Paiania close to Athens and we collaborate with more than 350 stores in Greece and abroad. Our products are designed to meet the needs of the most demanding consumers who seek to offer to their pets the best natural food possible. After a thorough market study, we selected the best available ingredients: fresh vegetables, fruits, superfoods, herbs from the Greek mountains, spices, extra virgin olive oil, minced meat from premium quality Greek meat and we used them in exquisite and nutritious recipes for dogs and cats. Our meals are 100% natural and free of preservatives, chemical supplements, flavour enhancers, artificial colours, aromas and known allergens: corn, soya, wheat. Real Nature’s Food is legally licensed to produce and market dog food by the Hellenic Ministry of Rural Development and Food (department of Animal Feed). The freshly frozen meat patties or mince products are kept frozen to -38°C in our facilities, in order to stay fresh without the use of preservatives. Moreover, we offer a wide variety of dehydrated treats produced using a state-of-the-art and natural 20-hour dehydration method. Thus, they preserve their nutritional value, vitamins, trace elements and minerals.

Sustainable

Fresh Scent
Our Amaizing premium corn litter provides a long-lasting, pleasant scent that effectively neutralizes odors, keeping your home fresh and inviting.

Traps Odor on Contact
Say goodbye to unpleasant odors. Amaizing Fresh’s formula traps odors on contact, providing a naturally fresh scent that lasts.

99.9% Dust-Free
Keep your home clean and dust-free. Amaizing Fresh's low-dust texture reduces tracking, making cleanup a breeze and keeping your floors pristine.

Quick Clumping and Easy Scooping
Our easy-to-scoop corn litter features a fast-clumping formula that simplifies cleanup, allowing for quick and efficient maintenance of your cat's litter box.

Flushable, Septic-Safe
Specially formulated to disintegrate quickly in water, our corn litter allows for safe disposal directly through household plumbing without risking damage to septic systems.

Name: Dunn Right Retrievers
Description:
Hey y'all! My name is Will Dunn and I am the owner/founder of Dunn Right Retrievers. After graduating college in 2019, I jumped straight into dog training, spending 2 years working for some of the most prominent professionals in the country. During those years I decided what styles of training I liked, and even more importantly the styles I don't like. Towards the end of 2022 I took a leap of faith to go out on my own and start my own kennel. Since the leap, I have been extremely blessed with some awesome clients, that took a chance on me. These clients have stuck with me since day 1 and we have been able to produce some very successful dogs that span the whole country from coast to coast. 

We are dedicated to bringing out the most of each and every dog that comes through our program! We are still thirsty to learn and get better! We continue travel to train on some of the most prestigious grounds in the country, and to train with some best pros and amateurs in the country!

Name: Other Half
Description:
You’re a no-nonsense pet parent. You do the research, you don’t fall for lies, you don’t settle
for junk, and you would never give your pet anything that you wouldn’t take yourself.
That’s because your pet is more than just a pet.
They are a part of you. They are your Other Half
.
But, let’s face it. When it comes to pet supplements, most brands these days are writing
checks that their chews can’t cash. If it’s not the useless ingredients they use, it’s the wild
and unproven claims they say just to make a quick buck. You’re over it… and so are we.
At Other Half
, our mission is to do what other pet brands don’t. That means crafting clean,
conscious, and clinically-tested supplements with quality we can actually prove. That’s why
we are committed to being a fully transparent brand that will never make you jump through
hoops to get the information you deserve. Everything you want to know about our batches,
testing, and manufacturing practices are just a QR code away. No smoke and mirrors. Ever.
You’re not stuck with subpar pet supplements anymore, so don’t let those lazy pet brands
drag you down. The life and longevity of your pet is in good paws with Other Half

Name: CentroVete
Description:
Presente in Sardegna dal 1992, CentroVete nasce come ingrosso di farmaci veterinari destinati alla salute ed al benessere degli animali.
Grazie all’esperienza acquisita negli anni, l’azienda si amplia e sviluppa la propria attività, offrendo molteplici servizi innovativi, con l’obiettivo di soddisfare le esigenze dei singoli clienti.

Nel 2008 la svolta; grazie a una brillante intuizione della titolare, spinta dalla graduale crescita del mercato elettronico nel settore dei piccoli animali, l’azienda si affaccia sul mercato dell’online, aprendo un sito e-commerce dedicato agli animali da compagnia ed entrando in un nuovo mondo dove nonostante le prime difficoltà, acquisisce man mano piena consapevolezza delle enormi potenzialità. 

Fin dall’inizio i risultati sono apparsi più che incoraggianti, pertanto si decide di impostare un piano pluriennale per lo sviluppo dell’e-commerce. Pian piano amplia la sua offerta vista la continua crescita, offrendo articoli sempre più specifici, attuando una politica che la posizionasse tra un normale Pet-shop e una farmacia veterinaria. Infatti, la caratteristica di CentroVete è quella di offrire “solo” prodotti per la salute e il benessere degli animali. Una politica che negli anni si è rivelata vincente e che ancora oggi continua ad essere seguita.

Name: zentry inc.
Description: We offer a wearable-based pet heart failure management platform, Dolittle. 6 out of 10 older pets suffer from heart disease. Accurate heart monitoring can improve their health and prolong their life. Alternative pet monitoring apps rely on ECG devices mainly developed for human use. Due to the presence of fur and the absence of sweat glands, this type of device is inappropriate, delivering inaccurate results. Our dual sensor monitoring system delivers 95% accurate heart rate and 99% accurate respiration results. The data can be monitored conveniently at home on the Dolittle app, or remotely by any veterinarian with our software. Our monitor is convenient and the wearable design is comfortable for pets.

Name: PETOUR INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD
Description:
Petour, the brainchild of a group of international friends with backgrounds in technology and a shared love for their pets, emerged from a collective concern about the alarming prevalence of unhealthy pet foods in the market. Fueled by a desire to safeguard the well-being of their furry companions, especially as they age, these friends decided to create a brand that prioritizes quality and nutrition.

Determined to make a difference, the team set rigorous standards for Petour's offerings. They insisted on a high protein level, sourcing premium meat ingredients while rejecting unverified animal meat. Production was exclusively entrusted to internationally certified factories adhering to global standards, ensuring the highest quality for pets worldwide. Scientifically formulated nutrition diets were crafted to prevent key diseases and promote overall health.

The journey began with the Bite Of Wild kibble brand, featuring freeze-dried meat and premium cat treats. The success paved the way for the Mr.Vet brand, expanding the product line to cater to diverse pet needs. Petour aspires to disrupt the pet industry globally, envisioning a world where every pet is cared for with the same dedication as the founder's own pets. Join us on this mission to redefine pet nutrition and prioritize the health and happiness of pets worldwide.

Here at Fambridge Co., we have been focusing on manufacturing pet products for more than 10 years, with a vision to offer high-quality products to pet lovers from all over the world.

Name: Humbl Pet Food
Description:
Humbl makes real food for dogs, prepared with the same care, quality, and integrity we expect from our own meals.

Our recipes are made in Europe using EU-grade ingredients and human-food standards, gently cooked to preserve nutrition and flavor. You’ll find real chunks of meat, fruits, and vegetables that are gently cooked and never blended or processed into a slurry.

We believe pet food should earn the same confidence as the food we serve at our own table. That’s why Humbl focuses on fewer, better ingredients, transparent sourcing, and thoughtful cooking from farm-to-bowl.

Unsere Produktpalette umfasst zum einen individuell gestaltete Halfter, die speziell für die Nutzung mit Flexileinen entwickelt wurden. Das heißt aber eben auch, dass wir eine Vielzahl weiterer Accessoires bis hin zu Snacks anbieten. Jedes unserer Produkte wird in sorgfältiger Handarbeit gefertigt und vereint hohe Qualität mit nachhaltigen Materialien. Wir setzen auf umweltfreundliche Produktionsmethoden und achten darauf, dass unsere Produkte langlebig und robust sind – für den alltäglichen Einsatz ebenso wie für besondere Gelegenheiten.

Bei pawINAYA glauben wir daran, dass das Zubehör für Ihre Haustiere nicht nur funktional, sondern auch ein Ausdruck von Stil und Persönlichkeit sein sollte. Deshalb legen wir großen Wert auf ein ansprechendes Design, das sich perfekt in den modernen Lifestyle integriert.

Entdecken Sie mit pawINAYA die neue Art, stilvoll und verantwortungsbewusst mit Ihrem Vierbeiner unterwegs zu sein.

Mission: To provide high-quality cat care solutions that enhance the lives of pets and their owners, while respecting and protecting our planet.

Innovation: Constantly developing new solutions that exceed expectations.
Quality: Ensuring excellence in every product we offer.
Sustainability: Committing to environmental protection at every step of our process.
Animal Welfare: Placing the well-being of pets at the heart of everything we do.

 Discover Our Lightweight Cat Litter
Experience the convenience of our lightweight clumping cat litters, designed for easy maintenance and superior performance. Sepicat’s innovative formulations create tight, easy-to-clean clumps, while the lightweight nature of the litter makes it effortless to handle and dispose of. These litters combine exceptional capabilities with environmental respect. https://bit.ly/SepicatProducts

If you would like to become a distributor, contact us https://bit.ly/ContactUsSepicat

Name: Tailbox
Description:

Name: The Cat Show Live
Description:
The Cat Show Live (TCSL) - Revolutionizing Cat Ownership and Experiences

The Cat Show Live (TCSL) is the UK’s premier platform for cat enthusiasts, breeders, rescues, and pet brands. We are dedicated to promoting Responsible Educated Cat Ownership (RECO) while uniting the feline community through innovative events and digital experiences.

What We Do
TCSL creates immersive live events that bring the world of cats to life. Our shows feature:

Two theaters with educational sessions and exciting showcases.
Extensive trade stands highlighting the latest pet care products.
Partnerships with GCCF, TICA, FIFe, and other key organizations.
We are also developing a robust digital presence, including:

TCSL Membership Platform: Exclusive content, perks, and breed-specific education.
Breeder Directory: Ethical and traceable breeder listings.
Hope Alley: Supporting rescues and breed-specific adoptions.
Pet Brand Directory: A hub connecting pet brands to consumers and businesses.
Our Vision
To be the UK’s trusted resource for cat owners, breeders, and rescues, offering education, support, and opportunities to connect.

Our Recognition
As a proud recipient of the Small Business Sunday (#SBS) award in September 2024, we are recognized for our innovative contributions to the pet industry.

Join us as we shape the future of cat ownership and experiences. Follow us to stay updated on our journey, events, and innovations.

We stand for:
- Service before self, in business and in life
- Honest ingredients, clear labeling, and standards that hold up
- High quality, durability, and performance you can count on

Operation Good Boy exists to honor the bond between people and dogs, and to help every dog live stronger, healthier, and longer.

Name: PKPetsitters
Description:
Paula and Kristo are a dynamic duo originally from Argentina, living in New York for over two years.

Paula is a passionate veterinarian with extensive experience in animal care, dedicating her career to improving the health and well-being of her patients. Her expertise ensures that

His skill in capturing the unique personality of each pet has created unforgettable memories for many owners through his stunning photographs, reflecting his passion for both rescue work and photography.

Together, they have rescued over 300 animals and fostered more than 50 in their own home, while also donating their photography and rescue services to major shelters.
Paula and Kristo offer an exceptional blend of veterinary care and artistic photography, providing a complete and loving service for your pets.

At PKPetsitters, we go beyond basic pet care to offer a truly premium experience. With a unique blend of veterinary expertise and the skills of a photographer passionate about animal welfare, we treat your pets like they’re part of our family. Our personalized services ensure that each pet receives the attention, love, and care they deserve, whether they’re at your home or ours.

By choosing us, you’re opting for a team dedicated to excellence, reliability, and your pet’s happiness. Our personalized approach, combined with constant updates
and communication, gives you peace of mind knowing your furry friend is in the best hands. Let us provide your pet with the care they deserve, so you can enjoy

your time away worry-free.

Name: Chonk Pet Food
Description:
Every cat parent wants to give their furbabies the best life possible, and it starts with the right nutrition. But as cat parents ourselves, we were frustrated by the dismal state of the cat food market in Bangladesh— with skyrocketing prices, frequent stock-outs, and counterfeit products putting cat health in danger everywhere.

That's why we launched Chonk—Bangladesh’s first locally made cat food brand. Chonk offers complete & balanced nutrition at an affordable price, using high-quality, carefully sourced ingredients that meet rigorous international standards.

To formulate the recipe, we consulted with a global leader in pet nutrition. With an R & D process spanning months and hundreds of kitties, we ensured the final product not only gives your cat the best of nourishment, but also tastes so good they become fans of Chonk themselves!

Our ingredients are procured from top local and global suppliers. They are all meticulously lab-tested for quality compliance . Strict monitoring takes place at every stage of production, from sourcing to the final packaging, to ensure consistency and safety.

In short, we leave no stones unturned in ensuring your furbaby’s safe and sound health.

So join the Chonk family and gift your cat the nutrition they deserve—because every cat deserves the best!

Name: Animo+ (anciennement Doctopet)
Description:
Animo+, la plateforme gratuite de mise en relation entre les propriétaires d’animaux et les professionnels animaliers. 

 Conçue avec l’aide d’experts animaliers pour répondre à vos besoins, notre plateforme connecte les propriétaires d’animaux avec des vétérinaires, toiletteurs, éducateurs canins, petsitters et bien d’autres.

Notre mission : Simplifier et démocratiser l’accès au bien-être animal, parce que nos compagnons méritent le meilleur.

Grâce à une interface intuitive et des outils modernes, Animo+ permet :

 Pour les propriétaires : réservez en quelques clics un rendez-vous avec un professionnel du monde animalier. Plus besoin de passer des heures à chercher ! Et ce n’est pas tout : 

 L’onglet Urgence pour trouver immédiatement un professionnel en cas de besoin critique.
 L’onglet Doute pour poser vos questions et obtenir des réponses 24h/24 et 7j/7.

Tout est pensé pour que vous puissiez agir rapidement et sereinement, sans perdre de temps.

 Pour les professionnels : Une interface regroupant plus de 15 fonctionnalités  pour automatiser votre gestion quotidienne (stocks, rendez-vous, comptabilité) sans changer votre manière d'exercer et en réduisant vos rendez-vous non honorés grâce aux rappels automatiques. De plus, gagnez en visibilité grâce à une présence sur une plateforme connectant des propriétaires à des experts comme vous.  Libérez du temps pour vous concentrer sur ce qui compte vraiment : nos animaux . 

 Notre mission va au-delà des services. Animo+ met l’humain et les animaux au cœur de chaque décision. Que vous soyez propriétaire ou professionnel, nous sommes votre allié pour offrir le meilleur à ceux qui comptent tant pour nous. Parce qu’en fin de compte, chaque clic, chaque rendez-vous et chaque action sur Animo+ est une preuve d’amour pour nos compagnons à quatre pattes.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure ! Ensemble, prenons soin de ceux qui nous apportent tant de joie.

Le concept est simple : fédérer les annonces de tous les organismes œuvrant dans le secours aux animaux pour proposer au public un moteur de recherche unique qui leur permettra de trouver leur futur compagnon. 

Le but : promouvoir l’adoption en France en offrant aux particuliers, comme aux associations, une plate-forme unique de mise en relation. Seconde Chance fédère de mille associations et espéré pouvoir continuer à augmenter le nombre de refuges et d’animaux présentés sur le site.

Name: Petlearnia

We envisage a world where pet owners have the information they need to become engaged partners in their pet’s healthcare.

And a world where the pet – pet owner – vet dynamic is strengthened. Because when we work together, our pets are healthier.

That’s why we created Petlearnia – an e-learning solution that allows vets to 'prescribe' trusted digital content to their clients. Whether you get in a muddle explaining cruciate surgery, or you don't have time to go through canine atopy several times a day, our courses can help your practice regain lost time and improve communication with your clients.

Notre mission est de simplifier la vie des propriétaires d'animaux en leur offrant une solution de confiance pour veiller sur leurs précieux compagnons pendant leurs absences.

Nous savons à quel point vos animaux sont importants pour vous. C'est pourquoi nous avons créé une plateforme de mise en relation où vous pouvez trouver des pet-sitters passionnés et dévoués, prêts à prendre soin de vos amis à quatre pattes, à plumes, à écailles, ou autres, dans le confort de leur propre foyer.

Vous êtes un amoureux des animaux et souhaitez offrir vos services de pet-sitter ? 
Blooming Pets vous offre la possibilité de rejoindre notre communauté grandissante. En tant que pet-sitter, vous pouvez proposer vos compétences, fixer vos tarifs et votre zone géographique mais aussi gérer votre emploi du temps en toute autonomie.

Vous cherchez un pet-sitter de confiance ou souhaitez devenir un pet-sitter avec Blooming Pets ? N'hésitez pas à nous contacter. Nous sommes là pour répondre à toutes vos questions et vous accompagner dans votre expérience Blooming Pets.

Rejoignez Blooming Pets dès aujourd'hui et offrez à vos animaux la garde chaleureuse et personnalisée qu'ils méritent !

Name: Emerald City Pet Rescue
Description:
Emerald City Pet Rescue was originally founded in 2013 by a wonderful individual with an incredible vision. Vivian Goldbloom started the rescue in a back room at a vet clinic in West Seattle, and we have now expanded to three buildings which include our boarding facility and our in-house vet clinic, our main adoption facility, and our cat facility. We also have an equine and farm animal sanctuary on Vashon! 

Our entire team works hard on a daily basis to rescue, rehabilitate, and rehome animals in need! With our dynamic team consisting of rescue coordinators, animal caregivers, veterinarians, vet techs, vet assistants, equine caregivers, accountants, retail associates, warehouse, and more, we all work together to make sure that any animal in our care gets the absolute best care possible while we help them find their forever homes.
 
While our employees have a wide range of talents and specialties, we are all uniquely united and bonded through our collective passion for helping these special animals. Many are saved from high-kill shelters around the country and sometimes even around the world, while others are local relinquishments right here in the Seattle area. If an animal needs help and we are able, we will always step in!

We have a long-term vision of continuing to provide complete care for these animals, continuing to expand our reach and our helping hands, and working together to make the world a better place, one cat, dog, horse, rabbit, ferret, goat, chicken, or any other animal - at a time. 

Please explore our open positions, we would love to have you join us as a part of our team!

Name: Pet Portal AI
Description:
Transforming Pet Care Through AI That Actually Understands

It started with Cooper, a Shih-Tzu with a chronic eye ulcer, and a founder facing every pet parent's 3 AM nightmare: Not knowing if your companion needs emergency care or if you're overreacting. That moment of helplessness sparked Pet Portal AI's mission: building trustworthy AI that bridges the gap between panic and professional veterinary care.

We're not another generic AI company. We're pet parents who built specialized intelligence that never hallucinates about medical advice, always knows when to say "see a vet immediately," and understands that accurate guidance can be the difference between life and death for the animals we love.

Our Pet Health Advisor provides instant, veterinary-trained responses to pet health questions, currently in our free beta at petportal.ai. Unlike Facebook groups with conflicting advice or generic AI that fabricates dangerous guidance, we've engineered reliability into every response through constitutional AI principles and multi-node architecture.

We believe in enhancement, not replacement. Our AI strengthens the human-animal bond and supports veterinarians by educating pet parents and guiding appropriate care decisions. When Cooper's eye required removal in 2025, our own system helped navigate that heartbreaking decision—the ultimate validation of technology built with love.

We're targeting 73+ million pet-owning households seeking trustworthy health guidance, addressing a market gap between expensive emergency visits and unreliable online advice.

Currently in free beta, with monetization launching 2025. Because every pet deserves an advocate, and every 3 AM worry deserves a trustworthy answer.
Pet Portal AI: We Save Pets' Lives Using AI 

Try our free Pet Health Advisor at petportal.ai

Name: Paws Pal Connect
Description:
Paws Pal Connect is a PetTech company building India’s first Pet Operating System (PetOS - PetGPT + Marketplace) — a unified digital ecosystem that manages pet services, health records, AI-driven care guidance, adoption, and lifecycle intelligence from birth to senior care.

India’s $10B+ & Global $ 200B pet industry is growing rapidly, yet remains fragmented, offline, and trust-deficient. Pet parents rely on unverified providers, paper-based medical records, and fear-driven decisions. There is no single trusted digital platform that connects the entire pet ecosystem.

Paws Pal Connect solves this by combining:

Verified hyperlocal pet services (grooming, walking, boarding, training, daycare, vets)

Digital Pet EMR for vaccinations and medical history

PetGPT, our AI-powered pet care assistant that helps owners make informed decisions, avoid hoaxes, and plan preventive care

Adoption & post-adoption support

Lifecycle-based reminders, insights, and automation

We are building a platform where every pet has a digital identity, and every pet parent can manage care, health, and services in one intelligent system.

 Currently piloting in Bangalore with strong early traction
 AI-native marketplace & digital health platform
 Building infrastructure for the future of pet care in India

Paws Pal Connect is not just a marketplace — it’s the operating system for the pet industry.

A lo largo de los años, hemos mantenido este compromiso incansablemente.

Nos esforzamos por adaptarnos a los cambios legislativos y exigencias del sector, cumpliendo rigurosamente con las normativas de la Comunidad Económica Europea, el Estado español, y la ley del medicamento 29/2006. Nuestro objetivo es garantizar el uso racional y seguro de medicamentos y productos zoosanitarios.

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios adicionales, incluyendo asesoría veterinaria y legal, formación, servicio técnico y colaboraciones con laboratorios de diagnóstico de primer nivel. Estos servicios refuerzan nuestro compromiso con la salud animal, abarcando desde análisis de agua y pienso hasta diagnósticos inmunológicos y control de plaguicidas.
