Name: VOFFii
Description:
VOFFii is Norway’s largest free social app dedicated entirely to dog owners. Built around the simple idea that life becomes better when dogs bring people together, VOFFii has grown into a thriving community with thousands of engaged users across the country.
Our mission is clear:
More activity. Less loneliness. Stronger communities.
We Stand For
At VOFFii, we believe technology should strengthen real human connections. That’s why the platform is designed to make everyday dog life easier, healthier, and more social—for both dogs and people.
We actively support socially valuable initiatives such as:
•	Reducing loneliness through organised meetups and “mental health walks”
•	Promoting inclusivity and equal access to dog-friendly activities
•	Creating safer, more engaged local communities through events and partnerships
Product Vision
VOFFii is built with a community-first mindset. We combine practical tools with new technology to help dog owners connect, explore, and organise their routines—smarter and more seamlessly.
Our roadmap includes:
•	Enhanced social features for local engagement
•	Tools for breed clubs, trainers, dog sitters, and municipalities
•	Activity maps, treasure hunts, and gamified outdoor experiences
•	Verified business profiles and a growing benefits program
•	Continuous improvements driven by user behaviour and real-world needs
We’re building the digital infrastructure for Norway’s (and soon the Nordics’) dog-owning communities.
Team & Partners
VOFFii is expanding rapidly. Our team includes passionate developers, designers, community builders, and partners from the dog industry, sports, health, insurance, and local government.
As we scale, we continue to welcome:
•	Breed clubs and local dog associations
•	Trainers, sitters, and dog-related businesses
•	Municipalities seeking to strengthen community health
•	Strategic partners who share our long-term vision
If you want to help shape the future of how people and dogs connect, we’d love to talk.

Name: Everfur
Description:
WAITLIST NOW LIVE
 www.everfur.com
Estimated launch: April 2026

Everfur is building a new standard for proactive dog health.

We start with something simple. A small fur sample you collect at home.

From that sample, our lab analyzes 200+ biomarkers to understand what’s actually happening inside your dog’s body right now. Inflammation. Organ wellness. Nutrient balance.

Using that data, along with your dog’s age, breed, and weight, we generate a clear health report and a personalized care plan. This includes targeted, clinical-grade supplements designed to support real needs, not generic wellness claims.

Our goal is simple. Turn better data into better daily decisions.

This is the future of personalized, proactive dog health.

Keeping Pets Active, Happy & Healthy – Backed by Science

Antinol Plus is a powerful, all-natural supplement made from a patented blend of marine lipid oils—fully traceable, sustainably sourced, and free from preservatives or fillers. 

Trusted by vets worldwide, it’s used to:
 Support joint and mobility health
 Promote healthy skin and a shiny coat
 Provide natural wellness support at any age

We stand by our product with a 60-day risk-free trial—because we believe in transparency, trust, and results.

Join us as we work with vets, pet parents and industry professionals to make a real difference in pet health.

Name: PRONOVA
Description:
Pronova is revolutionizing the pet care industry by making advanced, proactive pet health technology accessible to everyone, everywhere. As pioneers in our field, we harness the power of biotechnology to elevate the well-being of our beloved companions, empowering pet owners to better care for their pets' health. 

Our innovative, non-invasive point-of-care device allows pet owners to monitor their pet's health at home, in real time. By analyzing biomarkers in saliva, Pronova's technology enables the early detection of health issues, facilitating timely interventions, and fostering proactive care.

We believe that pets, as integral members of our families, deserve the best care possible. Our subscription model ensures regular delivery of our bio-sensor strips, while our app provides comprehensive insights and analytics based on the data collected.

At Pronova, we're not just a biotech company - we're a team of pet lovers dedicated to fostering a future where pet health care is proactive, preventative, and accessible. Join us on our mission to give pets the life and care they deserve!

La volonté de départ de cette aventure familiale et entrepreunariale était de proposer :
- une animalerie avec le bien-être animal comme philosophie principale
- un magasin de conseils avec des collaborateurs passionnés et ultra-spécialisés à l’écoute des clients et de leurs animaux
- une enseigne 100% indépendante dans ses choix de produits afin d’offrir le meilleur à ses clients

Ce leitmotiv est toujours resté la raison d’existence de notre point de vente ! 

4 univers différents se cotoient chez Aqua'nimal : 

L’univers « chien/chat »  possède un espace conséquent dédié à la vente de nourritures (croquettes, mastication, patés…), de produits d’hygiènes et d’accessoires

Trois univers avec la vente d’animaux ainsi que l’ensemble du matériel indispensable à leur bien-être : « reptiles » / « aquariophilie » / « rongeurs » 

Initialement dans un local de 230 m2, Aqua’nimal a su évoluer, s’agrandir (par 2 fois) et répondre aux nouvelles attentes de ses client et de leurs animaux !

Depuis 2016, nos 6 conseillers vous accueillent désormais dans un espace de 650 m2. Notre expertise du secteur de l’animalerie et la totale indépendance de nos choix permettent de proposer à nos clients le meilleur référencement en termes de produits, d’innovations, de rapport qualité-prix…

Notre équipe donne au quotidien son maximum afin que, venir chez Aqua’nimal, reste une superbe expérience client. 
L’ambiance familiale et conviviale du magasin se ressent grâce à sa dimension humaine et à l’épanouissement de ses collaborateurs, très majoritairement présents depuis plusieurs années.

Frontier Pets is Australia’s top-rated pet food for dogs and cats for good reason. All Frontier Pets recipes are specially developed by holistic veterinarian to meet dog’s and cat’s Biologically Appropriate Raw Feeding (BARF) dietary requirements.

Frontier Pets has been helping pet owners feed raw and serve up fresh warm meals for their beloved dogs and cats for almost a decade. But we do more than make the best raw pet food in Australia. Our mission is to go ‘beyond the bowl’ to look after the health of our pets and our planet. We believe that raw nutritious pet food can have a higher purpose.

Name: L'Arche de Ringo
Description:
Refuge pour animaux domestiques : NAC, petits animaux de ferme et de basse-cour. 

Face au manque de structures spécialisées pour accueillir les animaux lâchement abandonnés ou laissés pour compte, nous créons le premier refuge pour animaux de compagnie du Val d’Azun, au cœur des Hautes Pyrénées. Ce lieu sera un véritable hâvre de paix pour les animaux de compagnie (NACs, petits animaux de ferme ou de basse cour) rescapés de l’abandon, de maltraitance, de trafic, réformés de laboratoires, ou tout simplement confiés suite à un décès.

Certains animaux seront proposés à l’adoption mais d’autres pour différentes raisons ne le seront pas. Nous prendrons soin des animaux non adoptés (ou non adoptables) toute leur vie. Il n’y aura ni euthanasie, ni petites cages dans notre refuge. Tous nos animaux y vivront en semi liberté. Nous voulons offrir une vie décente à tous les animaux de compagnie, pour quelques mois ou pour toute leur vie au sein de L’Arche de Ringo.

Nous résolvons les problèmes communs des pet parents en vacances : le stress des animaux, la disponibilité et l'expérience des petsitters, ainsi que le coût élevé que représente la garde.

Notre modèle économique est conçu pour être à la fois avantageux et flexible. Grâce à notre plateforme, faire garder son animal de compagnie est totalement gratuit. En échange, le propriétaire confie son logement à un home-sitter, qui ne paie qu'un forfait par nuitée. Ainsi, nos utilisateurs ne sont facturés que lorsqu'ils utilisent effectivement notre service.

Nous plaçons les valeurs du bien-être animal au cœur de nos actions : une partie de nos revenus est reversée à des associations et refuges pour chaque séjour effectué avec Huppii.

Name: EcoCão Espaço Pet
Description:
Sua proprietária, Tia Pati, pedagoga de formação e 21 anos dedicados à educação, nunca sequer imaginou estar, um dia, tão próxima e tão envolvida com os animais e com as causas ambientais.

Depois de tantos anos de trabalho e após sua primeira demissão, com mais tempo em casa, passou ela mesma a levar seus dois pequenos cães para o petshop semanalmente. Bastaram poucas semanas para que o desconforto e o medo dos dois fossem incentivos para que se matriculasse no curso de banho e tosa. Até aqui, desejo algum de abrir um espaço pet, a vontade era apenas de minimizar o estresse que as palavras “banho” e “petshop” causavam nos dois.

Infelizmente, ou felizmente, Tia Pati não se sentiu confortável com o que viu. Os animais expostos ao vento, ao barulho e à água de forma mecânica, sem que seus medos e suas necessidades fossem respeitados, justificaram o sentimento e a reação do Jimmy e do Kenai quando iam para o banho. Aí surgiu o grande desejo de criar um espaço que olhasse o animal como um todo, que o respeitasse, que desse carinho, que observasse e tratasse cada um como único.

Name: VDA - Verband Deutscher Vereine für Aquarien- und Terrarienkunde e.V.
Description:
Der "Verband Deutscher Vereine für Aquarien- und Terrarienkunde (VDA) e.V. gegr. 1911" ist der älteste und größte Verband für Aquarianer und Terrarianer weltweit. Ihm sind in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland ca. 350 Vereine mit ca. 13.000 Mitgliedern angeschlossen.

Ziele:
- Der VDA tritt ein für eine sachgerechte Pflege von Aquarien- und Terrarientieren unter Beachtung des Arten- und Tierschutzes.
- Der VDA fördert die Nachzucht von Aquarien- und Terrarientieren in der Obhut des Menschen mit dem Ziel, Entnahmen aus der Natur zu minimieren.
- Der VDA lehnt es ab, Aquarien- und Terrarientiere physikalisch, chemisch oder züchterisch oder durch genetische Manipulationen so zu verändern, dass artgerechtes Verhalten erschwert wird und Schmerzen, Leiden oder Schäden auftreten.
- Der VDA befürwortet einen verantwortungsvollen Schutz der Umwelt, insbesondere den fachgerechten Arten- und Biotopschutz.
- Der VDA verfolgt keine gewerbsmäßigen Interessen und setzt sich dafür ein, dass das Wohlbefinden und die Gesundheit von Aquarien- und Terrarientieren Vorrang vor wirtschaftlichen Interessen haben.
- Der VDA vertritt die Belange der organisierten Aquaristik und Terraristik bei der politischen und gesellschaftspolitischen Meinungsbildung.
- Der VDA leistet Fort- und Weiterbildung und informiert wie sachkundig mit Aquarien- und Terrarientieren umzugehen ist.
- Der VDA fördert nationalen und internationalen Erfahrungsaustausch und setzt sich für die wissenschaftliche Forschung der Tier- und Pflanzenkunde ein.
- Der VDA achtet die Würde der Kreatur und vermittelt ethische Werte.

We also own Animal Tracker, a DEFRA compliant pet microchip database. We are one of the leading databases in the UK.

The microchips are manufactured in Europe to ISO standards, at what we believe to be the most cost effective price available. This in turn allows Implanters to pass on the saving to the pet owners.  All PeddyMark microchips have a unique number which is stored on a national database owned by the Kennel Club called PetLog.

PeddyMark is very happy to be able to offer both standard 12mm x 2mm ISO microchips and the super small mini chip 8mm x 1.4mm. The mini chip is very suitable for all animals that are under 15 KG adult body weight.

PeddyMark conforms to the MTA (Microchip Trade Association) code of conduct for microchip suppliers and has its own Secretary of State approved training which was granted on the 18/06/2015 under the new legislation (The Microchipping of Dogs (England) Regulations 2015).  

Prices for microchip implanter training are worked out depending on your location.  
For more information and a detailed quote please call us on 01279 507363.

Name: Tras las Huellas del Gato
Description:
El mundo humano está dominado por los gatos en todos los aspectos. Muchos ya lo sabeis (y os encanta). A vosotros y a todos los que quereis descubrirlo os lo voy a demostrar con hechos!

Soy Lidia, la loca humana-gatuna que está detrás de este pequeño proyecto. 

Soy bióloga (especialidad en zoología), auxiliar clínico de veterinaria, catsitter y estudiosa del comportamiento felino (nunca dejo de aprender y formarme)... y ¿qué significa todo esto? Pues esto muestra mi pasión y absoluta dedicación a los animales en general y a los gatos en particular. Ellos nunca dejarán de enseñarme y yo nunca dejaré de aprender de ellos. 

Se que en ocasiones parecen "independientes", "locos", "vengativos", "perezosos", "bordes"... Mi misión es que entiendas que todo comportamiento de tu gato tiene una razón de ser que NADA tiene que ver con las emociones humanas y que con paciencia, conocimiento, constancia y mucho amor, todo se puede trabajar. 

Ofrezco un servicio de CatSitter a domicilio desde Alcalá de Henares (Madrid), en el que ayudo a evitar el estrés que les supone a la mayoría de los gatos salir de su territorio. Damos un servicio totalmente personalizado y adaptado a las necesidades de cada gato.

Tras las Huellas del Gato es más que una marca, es un sentimiento que me representa y que espero compartir con tod@s vosotr@s a partir de ahora. 

Yo no soy yo sin gatos en mi vida, y nunca quiero "ser" sin ellos. 

Bienvenidos a Tras las Huellas del Gato.

At Nana’s Home, we believe pets deserve more than a safe place to stay. They deserve a familiar, nurturing environment that makes them feel secure — and gives their humans the reassurance they need while away.

Our hosts are not just service providers — they’re part of a carefully selected and supported network trained to offer care that feels personal, reliable, and grounded in empathy. 

From customized routines and bonding time to calm environments and private transport, everything we do is designed to elevate the experience for both pets and their people.

What makes Nana’s Home different?
• Individualized Care: Stays are tailored to each pet’s habits and needs.
• Private Transport: Secure pick-up and drop-off ease transitions.
• Trusted Hosting: Vetted, trained hosts offer consistent care.

Name: coco's management
Description:
coco‘s management je prva konzultantska agencija za pet friendly poslovanje.

Pet friendly je termin koji obilježava objekt koji dozvoljava boravak kućnim ljubimcima, no ne odgovara na sljedeća pitanja:
•Što vlasnik i njegov ljubimac očekuju na takvoj lokaciji? 
•Samo dozvoljen boravak ili i neku dodatnu uslugu?
•Kako diferencirati ponudu mnogobrojnih hotela, apartmana, kampova, restorana, kafića i sličnih? 
•Kako svojim zaposlenicima dozvoliti boravak njihovih ljubimaca u uredu, a da time ne nastane kaos u uredu? 
•Što na javnim površinama ponuditi građanima i njihovim ljubimcima kako bi im grad, općina ili županija nudila što bolju kvalitetu života?

Na ta, a i mnoga druga pitanja odgovor imaju Coco i Valentina sa cijelim timom svojih partnera.

Name: Masterson Method Equine Bodywork
Description: The Masterson Method is an integrated, multi-modality method of equine massage. It is a unique, interactive method of equine massage in which you learn to recognize and use the responses of the horse to your touch to find and release accumulated tension in key junctions of the body that most affect performance. In contrast to most traditional modalities, it enables the horse to actively participate in the process of releasing tension. It is something you do with the horse, rather than to the horse.

Name: Nana's Home - Pet Concierge
Description:
More than pet care — we provide peace of mind.

At Nana’s Home, we believe pets deserve more than a safe place to stay. They deserve a familiar, nurturing environment that makes them feel secure — and gives their humans the reassurance they need while away.

We’ve reimagined the traditional pet-sitting model, moving beyond apps and automated bookings to offer a boutique, concierge-style experience rooted in trust, care, and consistency. From the start, we’ve focused on creating a high-end alternative to conventional solutions — one that blends thoughtful hospitality with humanized attention to detail.

What sets us apart is our commitment to emotional care, not just logistics. Every pet is carefully matched with a dedicated host based on personality, routine, and lifestyle, ensuring a seamless, stress-free experience built on genuine compatibility. This approach eliminates the uncertainty that often comes with online platforms or one-size-fits-all care.

Our hosts are not just service providers — they’re part of a carefully selected and supported network trained to offer care that feels personal, reliable, and grounded in empathy. 

From customized routines and bonding time to calm environments and private transport, everything we do is designed to elevate the experience for both pets and their people.

What makes Nana’s Home different?
• Individualized Care: Stays are tailored to each pet’s habits and needs.
• Private Transport: Secure pick-up and drop-off ease transitions.
• Trusted Hosting: Vetted, trained hosts offer consistent care.
• Calm, Comfortable Homes: No kennels — just peace and safety.
• Transparent Process: Communication and trust at every step.

Founded in the Netherlands in 2021, we’re expanding across BeNeLux, setting a new standard for pet hospitality — where comfort meets reliability, and peace of mind is always part of the package.

Name: Dr. Dobias Healing Solutions Inc.
Description:
Our love for dogs is more than just a passion - it's a lifestyle. We believe in a world where every dog and their humans are living their happiest, healthiest lives. And guess what? We're all about helping you make that happen.

With over 30 years of experience in conventional and integrative veterinary medicine, Dr. Peter Dobias, DVM, has dedicated his professional life to helping dogs and their people to prevent and treat disease naturally, and create solid foundations for a happier and healthier life.

We are very grateful that our customers give our natural products the highest rating and we continue to work tirelessly to bring innovation, learning tools and products to keep your dogs happy and healthy.

Name: BIOME9
Description:
BIOME9 is revolutionising pet care, through personalised, data-led solutions. We use cutting-edge science and AI to decode the complex science of the gut microbiome, eliminating the guesswork around choosing the right diet and nutrition for our dogs. 

If there was one thing you could do to transform your dog’s health and happiness, wouldn’t you want to know?

GutDiscovery will change that for good. Our groundbreaking, at-home, gut microbiome test gives you a window into your dog’s inner world, and pinpoints their specific nutritional and dietary requirements.

Our UK laboratory leads the way for speed and accuracy whilst our proprietary InvisibleHealth algorithm, uses the most advanced generative AI to instantly process millions of complex data points and turn them into insights and a care plan, as unique as your dog.

A personalised report features a tailored nutritional plan and a precision supplement programme, built specifically around your dog's complex biological makeup.

Why test my dog’s microbiome? Research is proving connections to far more than we once thought:
Discover root-cause solutions for digestive issues and IBD
Enhance joint, skin, and dental health
Boost immunity
Detect early health-risks and complications
Reduce risk of obesity and allergies

We're dedicated to transforming pet health through research and tech, providing an innovative science-backed approach to personalised pet nutrition, so you get to enjoy the very best version of your pet - healthy and happy, inside and out.

Join the pet care revolution!

Name: Vivus Pets Inc.
Description:
Based in Canada, VIVUS is a plant-based pet nutrition company that gives pet owners a real option to provide their dogs with all natural, animal-free, nutritious foods that aligns with their own dietary restrictions and environmental beliefs.

Dogs are family. Period. This is the foundation that VIVUS has been built on, and so we believe in feeding dogs like we would feed ourselves. It is our mission to sustainably support the health and happiness of our fur-mily
by providing our pets the nutrition they require with the flavour they desire.

Superfood Ingredients: Our delicious vegan recipes for dogs are filled with nutritious superfood fruits and veggies rich in antioxidants to support health, and are free of all animal ingredients to reduce the risks for dogs with common allergies. Our ingredients are carefully selected not only to exceed the nutrient requirements of dogs to make complete and balanced diets, but also to bring extra health boosters on board. 

Veterinary Nutritionist Formulated: VIVUS’s plant-based products are formulated by a board certified veterinary nutritionist to provide a nutritionally complete and balanced diet. All ingredients are carefully selected for their nutritional profile, safety, efficacy, and benefit based on peer reviewed scientific research.

Sustainable: To benefit the health of our pets and the whole planet, we use only plant-based ingredients, recyclable packaging, and donate a portion of our profits to reforestation and helping dog rescues all over the world. Together, let’s create a brighter future for our dogs and planet to thrive!

Name: Pawdel Inc.
Description:
Two Tails, One Vision: Every Beat and Byte, We Care

At Pawdel Inc., every innovation is driven by a profound love for pets—a love that fuels our mission to nurture the cherished bond between pets and their families. From this deep-seated affection, we've evolved from crafting wearable pieces of love into pioneering wearable tech that safeguards and enhances the pet-human relationship.

Our journey began with personalized collars, leading to the transformative leap to Pawnec, our pet technology software, in 2022. This leap was not just a stride in innovation but a bold statement of our vision: to blend the warmth of pet care with the intelligence of technology. By digitizing our collars and tags, we've empowered individuals everywhere to return lost pets safely and care for them effectively—with just a simple scan of a QR code.

Pawnec's QR Code-based technology has evolved into a veterinary technology, innovating pet governance and pet health management for veterinarians and pet owners alike. Our vision is to become the leading company in understanding the intricate dynamics between pets and their human companions. Guided by relentless R&D, we continue to refine and expand our smart ID and eHealth Card solutions.

By operating through the dual lens of a pet parent and technologist, we bridge the gap between affection and innovation. Our commitment is to create technologies that resonate with pet parents' needs, fostering pet-human relationships.

This unwavering commitment is embodied in our new corporate logo: a heart within a paw, symbolizing our dedication to being at the forefront of compassionate technological solutions for pet care. As we venture into new frontiers with our essential care business unit and Pawnec, our mantra "Two Tails, One Vision" resonates more profoundly than ever—every heartbeat of our pets and every byte of data we analyze reinforces our pledge: "We care."

Name: The Cat Fanciers' Association, Inc
Description: The Cat Fanciers’ Association, Inc. (CFA) was founded in 1906 as a not-for-profit association of member clubs and is the world’s largest registry of pedigreed cats. CFA’s mission is to preserve and promote the pedigreed breeds of cats and to enhance the well being of ALL cats. CFA promotes education, responsible cat ownership and proper care to the owners of millions of cats worldwide. CFA and its affiliate clubs work nationally with local shelters, at a grassroots level, to help humanely reduce homeless and feral cat populations, and to encourage voluntary neuter/spay of pet cats. To learn more about the Cat Fanciers’ Association, the pedigreed breeds of cats, visit their web site at www.cfa.org

Nous cherchons actuellement à développer une communauté de PetSitters motivés et bienveillants, partout en France.

Description: Our mission is to give every family, regardless of where they live, access to a safe, secure, and good-looking coop for their flock. Name: VETUX LONDON
Description:
Vetux London is a pet health brand established in 2014, shaped by the expertise of experienced veterinarians. With a strong foundation built on over 11 years of experience, we produce science-based supplements and functional wet food products for cats and dogs.

Thanks to our flexible production capabilities, we develop high-quality premixes and nutritional supplements. Our products are formulated based on clinical experience and scientific research to support immune function, digestive health, and overall well-being of pets.

Without compromising on high quality standards at any stage of production, we manufacture in Turkey and distribute our products to veterinary clinics and pet lovers across the world — primarily in the UK.

Name: Pet Impact
Description:
Pet Impact is on a mission to go beyond simply reducing our pets' environmental pawprints; we are here so pet owners can make a positive impact. We want every product we create to be a proactive step towards a cleaner, healthier planet.

B Corp certified and vet-founded, we keep pet health and wellbeing a primary focus, while ensuring our quality products are backed by evidence and research to enable outsized impact.
We account for the entire life cycle of products, with a focus on minimising resource use and waste generated. We then push further to see how pet owners can not only "reduce harm", but "positively improve" the state of our planet through everyday products - and we're starting with poo bags .

Pet Impact's ReSEAcled Poo Bags are the world's first and only certified Plastic Negative poo bags, removing 5x more plastic waste from nature than they introduce! They also have a published full Life Cycle Assessment, showing their environmental benefits over other market alternatives.

We strive to make it easier for all owners to make better choices by maintaining simplicity, affordability and clarity around all we offer.

Name: Happy Pet Tech
Description:
We are a global pet technology company developing intelligent, end-to-end  software for the pet care industry. Our mission is to help pet businesses run smarter, faster, and more efficiently by bringing everything they need into one integrated platform. 

Whether it's a grooming salon, pet boarding facility, veterinary clinic, or retail store, our software simplifies daily operations like appointment bookings, customer data management, staff coordination, inventory tracking, billing, reminders, and communication, all in one easy-to-use system.

Happy Pet Tech helps pet-preneurs automate and streamline their workflow so they can focus on what truly matters, which is providing better care and experiences for pets and pet parents.

Name: PadsPass Pet Travel App + ID
Description: PadsPass is a pet travel and care platform that simplifies documentation, compliance, and verification for pet parents and veterinary teams. The free PadsPass Pet ID provides an always‑available profile for medical records, while the Digital Pet Passport upgrades trips with documents formatted for airline and border requirements. For clinics, PadsPass CheckPoint streamlines verification and reduces errors through a staff‑friendly workflow. Built for clarity, trust, and interoperability, PadsPass partners across the pet ecosystem to make mobility safer and simpler. By turning complex rules into a smooth, verified journey, PadsPass helps families travel with confidence and helps clinics deliver faster, more accurate service.

Name: Waf Waf House
Description:
At Waf Waf House, we're more than just a pet care facility; we're an extension of your loving home. We understand that your pets are cherished members of your family, and we treat them with the same love and care that you do.

Our mission is to provide exceptional pet care that exceeds expectations, ensuring that every furry friend feels loved, safe, and well-cared for. We strive to create a nurturing environment where pets can thrive and owners can feel confident knowing their loved ones are in the best hands.
We offer a comprehensive range of pet care services, tailored to meet the unique needs of each individual pet, including:

Boarding: We provide comfortable and spacious boarding accommodations, ensuring your pet feels right at home while you're away.

Daycare: Our daycare program offers a stimulating and enriching environment for your pet to socialize, play, and exercise while you're at work or busy.

Dog walking: We provide safe and reliable dog walking services to keep your pet active and engaged, even when you're unable to.

Pet sitting: Our pet sitting services offer peace of mind when you're away, ensuring your pet receives the same love and care they're accustomed to.

Our team of passionate and dedicated animal lovers is the heart of Waf Waf House. They possess a wealth of experience and expertise in pet care, ensuring that your furry friend receives the highest level of attention and care. Our team is committed to ongoing training and education, staying up-to-date with the latest advancements in pet care practices.

We are committed to providing a safe, clean, and stimulating environment where your pets can enjoy their time at Waf Waf House. We believe in using positive reinforcement techniques to ensure your pets have a positive and enriching experience.

Name: Tails Nation
Description:
It all started in 2020 when the pandemic hit hard and our founders struggled to find essential pet supplies for their fur kids. On their quest to find the right products for their pets, they realised a huge gap in the market for these products. Avid animal lovers, our founders Atishay, Pallavi & Aditya decided to help out pet parents in need by making quality pet products available on Amazon and to cater to the needs of these beautiful beings.

As time went by, their love for animals led them to create Tails Nation into the brand that it is today. With love as their core value, our founders aim to make this world a kinder and more accepting place for our furry friends. Our ever growing love for animals made us curate a collection of pet products like no other and make Tails Nation into a one-stop solution for all pet-related needs.

Every pet parent thinks that their pets are the best and none of them are wrong! We truly believe that every animal deserves the best and so, we house the best pet products from across the globe and enable pet parents to splurge on their favourite family members!


TAILS NATION FAMILY

Introducing to you theTails Nation Family. The backbone of our company, here is a group of animal lovers that put their blood and sweat into making sure that we create a community of like-minded people who work towards the betterment of our furries. We aim to empower pet parents by introducing some of the best pet products from across the globe to them.

Our team members work hard to make every user experience a special one and to bring Pallavi & Atishay & Aditya’s vision into life. With the goal of making this world a kinder place for our furry friends, we work in sync towards bringing in the best for you. At Tails Nation we continuously work towards improving ourselves and bringing nothing but the best for our beloved animals.

Description:
About Us:
Welcome to Pup N Treats, where we are passionate about providing high-quality and nutritious treats for your beloved pets. As pet lovers ourselves, we understand the importance of ensuring that your furry companions receive only the best.

Our Mission:
At Pup N Treats, our mission is to enhance the well-being of pets through thoughtfully crafted products that prioritize health, happiness, and the unique needs of each animal. We strive to create a bond between pets and their owners by offering treats that are not only delicious but also contribute to their overall vitality.

Core Values:

Pet Wellness: We prioritize the health and wellness of pets, formulating treats with premium ingredients to support their nutritional needs.

Transparency: We believe in transparency in everything we do. From sourcing ingredients to manufacturing processes, we are committed to providing clear information to pet owners.

Sustainability: As stewards of the environment, we are dedicated to sustainable practices in both sourcing and packaging. We aim to minimize our ecological footprint and contribute to a healthier planet.

Ethical Treatment: We advocate for the ethical treatment of animals. Our commitment extends beyond providing excellent products to supporting initiatives that enhance the lives of pets around the world.

Innovation: We continuously strive to innovate and bring new, exciting treats to the market. Our team is dedicated to staying ahead of the curve in pet nutrition and taste preferences.

Himalayan Yak Cheese:
One of our proudest offerings is our Himalayan Yak Cheese treats. Sourced from the pristine Himalayan region, these treats are not only delicious but also provide a natural source of essential nutrients. We understand the value of incorporating unique and high-quality ingredients into your pet's diet, and our Himalayan Yak Cheese treats are a testament to that commitment.

Description:

Woof Caddy is a sling bag, intentionally designed for every dog parent. Woof Caddy turns an ordinary walk into a ready-for-anything outing.

As your furry friends ‘caddy’, you are now able to carry their favorite things.

Whether you are playing fetch, throwing a flying-disc, treat training, the inevitable potty break or hydrating… Woof Caddy provides quick and easy access.  

Woof Caddy easily transitions from your back to your front; and front to back again without removing.

Carry everything your best friend needs and loves with Woof Caddy; including human valuables, such as keys, cards, cell phone, ID, cash.

We believe in giving back, a portion of each Woof Caddy sold goes to support the San Francisco Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (SFSPCA).

Name: Pet Pass ID - Smart Tags
Description:

Check dog and cat Infos anywhere with a smartphone.

What would happen to your pet, if it was lost? Don't worry, we deliver the solution!

If someone finds your pet, just scans with a phone the tag hung on the collar and get all important information.

Easy and clever.

At Anicura, we aim to create high quality products that will contribute to your pet’s health and happiness. All our products contain naturally proven ingredients which are highly effective for deep hydration and nutrition to help with your pet’s skin.

Everyone who is looking for an effective natural alternative to all the chemical based products on the market, has come to the right place. Especially animals prone to sensitive skin, dry and flaky skin, itchy and chapped skin, eczema, hot spots or any type of skin allergy or skin problem will find great satisfaction in using our products.

Name: Princely Paws
Description:
It's been 20 years now in the pet service industry, and I've donned many hats from working as an assistant to a veterinarian, to grooming dogs, to becoming an internationally certified Dog Behaviourist & Trainer.

I constantly strive to help people understand their dogs better so they can thrive using a unique approach that involves the use of free will, body language communication & telepathic animal communication that honours your dog's free will where learning (training) is concerned.

My speciality is handling dogs that are misunderstood, reactive, aggressive, or anxious. By helping pet parents understand their dog's behaviour and learning how to manage it and not "control" it.

Offer dog training services to most parts in Mumbai; however,r also do online sessions for dog training & behaviour 

Conduct courses online for dog training and behaviour for pet parents globally, also certified courses to be a professional Dog Trainer & Behaviourist, and workshops on Telepathic Animal communication on a basic and advanced level.

Name: Snouts & Stouts
Description:
At Snouts & Stouts, your dog will be able to run around our indoor dog park, off-leash, while you can sit back and relax with a beer in your hand.

As dog owners who frequent the dog park, the biggest concern is always the weather. Rain? No dog park. Intense heat? No dog park. Intense cold? No dog park. Even if the weather is fine, our dogs always come home dirty and need a bath.

Well at Snouts & Stouts weather and dirt is never a concern! Our massive indoor dog park, with specialized K9 turf, means that no matter the weather, your dog will be able to play and not need a bath afterward. 

Indoor dog park? Won't it smell? Nope! With our specialized K9 turf and flushing system, Snouts & Stouts won't actually smell like a dog park, but will look exactly like one!

We will also have our own "Dog Patrol", that will be walking around making sure all dogs are playing correctly, having fun, getting enough water, and picking up after them. This way you can relax and grab a drink!

Managerial and Ownership Staff are Certified Professional Animal Care Providers (CPACP) by the Professional Animal Care Certification Council (PACCC). Employees are trained by this staff along with the Dog Gurus Training Program. Snouts & Stouts takes extra steps to make sure your dog is always in safe, trained, and knowledgable hands.

Name: 9ja k9
Description:

Name: SPA Saint Etienne Loire
Description:
La SPA de Saint-Étienne, une association à but non lucratif fondée en 1910, a été reconnue d’utilité publique par décret le 22 avril 1969. Le refuge actuel, situé au 52 rue Florent Evrard dans le quartier Montmartre depuis 1988, peut accueillir 83 chiens et environ 40 chats. La devise de l’association est "bonté, justice, hygiène".
Socle des Valeurs, Objectifs et Éthique

1. Recueillir et Soigner les Animaux Malades et Abandonnés

    Accueillir tous les animaux en détresse, même si le refuge est complet, en utilisant des solutions alternatives comme les familles d’accueil ou les pensions.
    Admettre tous les animaux abandonnés, sans distinction d’âge, de sexe, de race ou d’espèce.
    Examiner et soigner les animaux dès leur arrivée, suivant un protocole rigoureux.
    Ne pratiquer l’euthanasie que pour des raisons médicales, sur prescription vétérinaire et après approbation de la commission euthanasie.

2. Organiser et Développer les Adoptions ou l’Accueil Temporaire

    Assurer des adoptions responsables en enquêtant sur les conditions de vie futures des animaux.
    Favoriser l’adoption des animaux moins "adoptables" (âgés, malades, avec un caractère particulier) par divers moyens, notamment les médias.
    Développer le service de familles d’accueil pour les animaux fragiles ne pouvant rester au refuge.

3. Protéger les Animaux et Améliorer leurs Droits

    Lutter contre la maltraitance animale via des enquêtes et collaborations avec les autorités et les administrations compétentes.
    Porter plainte et se constituer partie civile en cas de maltraitance animale.
    Limiter la reproduction et les abandons en faisant adopter les animaux stérilisés sauf contre-indication vétérinaire.
    Protéger tous les animaux signalés comme maltraités, en partenariat avec d’autres associations spécialisées.
    Placer les chiens "difficiles" dans des structures adaptées.
    Promouvoir la douceur et l’humanité dans les relations homme-animal

Ved at skifte til BE BUGGY's hundefoder, kan danske hundeejere bidrage til at reducere deres aftryk på miljøet og hjælpe med, at vi som samfund kan bevæge os mod en mere bæredygtig fremtid. 

Vi tilbyder vores hundefoder gennem en praktisk abonnementsmodel, der sikrer, at vores kunder altid har den rigtige mængde foder til deres hunde. Når vores kunder tilmelder sig vores abonnementstjeneste, kan de vælge den ønskede mængde foder og den leveringsfrekvens, der passer bedst til deres behov.

Con servicios de guardería canina, hotel, entrenamiento, paseos, peluquería, baño y una tienda completa, Dogterra simplifica la vida de los dueños y asegura el bienestar de cada perro. Desde reservas en línea/app hasta servicio nocturno y espacios de primer nivel, Dogterra no es solo un
sitio de paso; es un rincón seguro, una experiencia de confianza y amor, diseñada para brindar a cada mascota el cuidado excepcional que merece.

Name: Petcademy
Description:
At Petcademy, our mission is simple: to keep pets and people together by providing affordable, accessible training and behavioral support during the most critical moments—post-adoption and key life transitions. We partner with rescues, shelters, and community organizations across North America to ensure that pet parents, regardless of budget or location, receive the expert guidance they need to create a lasting bond with their new companion.

Through our seamless integration with shelter management systems, we make it easy for pet parents to connect with us via text messaging, delivering fast, reliable support when they need it most. By leveraging shelter data, we offer tailored advice and solutions that reduce surrenders by 50%, alleviate the workload for shelter staff, and improve job satisfaction.

Our services include personalized, actionable guidance, animated course materials, and a combination of human trainers and AI-driven support to provide instant, accurate responses to common pet care concerns. We’ve supported over 80,000 pet parents to date and have long-standing partnerships with leading organizations like 24Pet, Shelterluv, and ASPCA Pet Health Insurance.

With a vision to expand our impact, we are launching new initiatives, such as the Pet Parent Hub, AI Community Trainer, and integrations with veterinary offices, ensuring even more pet parents receive the support they need. Together, we are creating a future where every pet stays in a loving home, and every shelter has the tools to succeed.

Name: Solveig NG - Formation équine
Description:
Convaincue que le bien-être équin et celui des humains qui les entourent sont indissociables, j’ai créé Solveig NG - Formation Équine pour accompagner particuliers et professionnels vers une approche plus respectueuse et éclairée du cheval.

 Formation 
J’interviens sur les thèmes du bien-être équin, des sciences équines, et de la valeur du dialogue entre l'homme et le cheval, en intégrant les dernières avancées scientifiques, et une réflexion introspective. L’objectif : mieux comprendre le cheval, et mieux nous comprendre nous-même pour améliorer la relation homme-animal.

 Conseil & accompagnement
J’accompagne les professionnels dans l’aménagement des structures équestres, l’optimisation du travail et la réflexion sur le bien-être des chevaux et des humains (cavaliers, soigneurs).

 Méthodes éthiques & renforcement positif
Spécialisée en renforcement positif et clicker training, et expérimentée avec les jeunes chevaux de sport, je propose des solutions pour allier performance, sérénité et respect du cheval.

 Bien-être humain, et relation homme-cheval
Mon approche intègre la gestion du stress, la posture et l’impact émotionnel du cavalier, pour une communication plus fluide et harmonieuse.

 Démarche Scientifique & Formation Continue
Je m’appuie sur les avancées en sciences équines et ergonomie équestre pour proposer un enseignement évolutif et réfléchi.

 En savoir plus : solveigngformation.wordpress.com

For residential customers, we pick up your backyard dog poop, for you, at your house. As a pet waste removal company, we offer a professional service of cleaning and taking it to the landfill, as per Region of Waterloo guidelines. 

We have a large database of customers whom we do dog poop pickup for weekly, bi-weekly or as a one-time cleaning. Many of our customers are seniors, disabled or injured, or folks who just don't have the time or energy to clean their backyards. 

A clean yard means less tracking in of poop and reduces the risk of disease. We offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee for our pet waste management services!

PetPal provides a suite of services that ensures your pet gets the proper healthcare service they need from licensed and accredited veterinarians. The following services are available in PetPal: 

Teleconsultation - Book a video consult with a vet for 500 PHP - https://petpal.asia/calendar/

Book a Clinic - Book a clinic reservation in any of partner clinics nationwide for 100 PHP - https://petpal.asia/calendar/

Home Vet Visit/Home Vaccination - Get a vet consult or a vet vaccination at the comfort of your own home for 1200 PHP (exclusive of lab tests, vaccines and any medicine) - https://petpal.asia/home-vet-visit/

Chat with a Vet: Chat with a licensed veterinary for only 99 PHP - https://petpal.asia/chat-with-a-vet/

PetPal Club Annual Subscription: Get unlimited teleconsilts, a free home vet visit, discounted home vet visits and 30,000 PHP worth of discounts from pet brands - https://petpal.asia/petpal-club

 Most dogs are living in a state of low-grade dehydration — and owners don’t know the signs.

Name: VETiNSTANT
Description:
Woof, meow, whinny, moo. 

None of us are animal whisperers or named Doctor Dolittle. So we haven’t got the foggiest idea of what our animal friends are saying. And that would be terrible indeed, if they happen to be hurting. 

At VETiNSTANT, we believe that the sooner we get reliable data about a pet, the faster vets have a shot at providing timely care and resolution. 

For that to happen, data will need to be gathered by the pet’s caregiver, who mind you, isn’t qualified to handle a pet and operate fidgety medical equipment simultaneously. 

VETiNSTANT hopes to change this through several innovative handheld devices that are non-invasive, non-anaesthetic and non-technical, making it easy for just anyone to gather clinically accurate data without a fuss and without causing pain. 

ExamD, a diagnostic device for dogs is in the works, with others for cats, cows and horses on the way. It’s a game changer for pets, vets and pet parents when good data can be secured early and easily. 

Vets can get involved sooner. Care can be prompt. Physical visits to hospitals can be minimized. Pets can bounce back sooner. Preventive & predictive care is now a reality in animal healthcare. These are early pug marks.

VETiNSTANT—Help Vets, help pets.

Our lightweight collar integrates GPS + Wi-Fi/LTE geofencing, real-time health vitals monitoring, and AI-driven alerts into one seamless experience, all accessible from the MyPerro mobile app. From preventing escapes to detecting early signs of illness, MyPerro gives pet parents peace of mind and dogs a safer, healthier life.

We’re working closely with the leading shelters and veterinary experts to refine our solution and are preparing for large-scale pilots. With 97% accuracy achieved in early testing, MyPerro is on a mission to redefine how the world cares for dogs, one collar at a time.

Name: Pelos & Cabelos
Description:
Uma criativa ideia foi consolidada.

Após pensar nas pessoas que amam seus bichinhos de estimação e por falta de tempo não conseguem resolver dois problemas juntos na hora de se dedicar ao tratamento estético.

Com a falta de tempo dos dias de hoje, ele se torna cada vez mais precioso e mais difícil de administrar, afinal, comtanta coisa por fazer, o que fazer primeiro?

Se você tem seu bichinho de estimação, sabe muito bem do que estou falando, pois é um tempo a mais para se dedicar.

Levar o seu pet para passear, dar banho, comprar ração, ir ao veterinário, comprar acessórios pra ele ou cuidar de você indo ao cabeleireiro, à manicupe, pedicure?

Foi pensando nisso que encontramos uma agradável solução: fazer os dois ao mesmo tempo.

A Pelos & cabelos surgiu extamente dessa ideia, a de passear com seu pet até nosso estúdio e aproveitar os espaços reservados à você e à ele.

São dois ambientes distintos, separados por andar. No andar superior, você encontrao Studiohair, onde todo cuidado á você é dedicado. São profissionais altamente qualificados com um objetivo: deixar você com a máxima satisfação e estilo.

No andar térreo, dedicamos todo o cuidado ao seu bichinho de estimação, com experientes profissionais, prontos para realizar todos os serviços desejados.

Imagine o resultado maravilhoso que vocês encontrarão, com economia de tempo, conforto e dedicação.

Conheça hoje mesmo nosso espaço, agende um horário e confira. teremos o maior prazer e lhe receber.

A Pelos & Cabelos trabalha normalmente com todos clientes independentes de acompanhado de seu pet ou não.

Você pode traze-lo ou pedir nosso serviço de Taxi para traze-lo e levá-lo de volta com todo conforto e segurança.

Name: AwesomePetCo
Description:
Avec plus de 20 000 coffrets envoyés chaque mois, AwesomePetCo est devenu en quelques années le spécialiste de l’e-commerce de box mensuelles par abonnement, particulièrement sur le secteur animalier avec Woufbox.com et Miaoubox.com.

Fondée en 2012, la société s’est d’abord développée dans le secteur animalier. 
Consciente de l’envie de certains médias de monétiser leurs audiences et de se développer dans le secteur des box, la start-up a ensuite mis en place une solution clé en main pour faciliter leur démarche, et a accompagné des dizaines de clients sur des coffrets variés (Lifestyle, bougies, protections hygiéniques féminines...).

En 2021, AwesomePetCo a décidé de se concentrer sur ses trois box phares leader sur leurs marchés respectifs:
- Woufbox et Miaoubox, les marques mères destinées aux « pet lovers » chiens et chats
- FisherBox, la box dédiée aux mordus de la pêche aux leurres

Malheureusement et au plus grand regret de toute l'équipe, la société a malheureusement été contrainte de fermer en juillet 2024. La situation économique a fait que malgré tous les efforts, il n'était plus possible de joindre les deux bouts. 
AwesomePetCo, c'est 12 ans d'aventures, 187,000 clients, plus de 900,000 coffrets envoyés, une team d'experts soudée et des partenaires fidèles. 
L'équipe reste fière d'avoir pu satisfaire autant de clients aussi longtemps, et vous informera si un nouveau projet se profile !

Name: Macahl Animal Health
Description:
Macahl is a family business from Northern Ireland that prioritises pet health. 

In 2004, John and Anthony Mackle developed the first isotonic pet hydration formula called 'Dx' for sick and dehydrated pets. 

In 2006, JAM Animal Health was established, and the Oralade brand was launched. With its unique, highly palatable formula, Oralade quickly became the go-to hydration solution for veterinarians and pet owners, revolutionising how pets are cared for when sick or dehydrated. The business continued to innovate and grow, becoming Mac Animal Health Ltd (now known as Macahl) in 2015.

Oralade is now available in two expanding ranges: Advanced for veterinary-led animal care and Active for sporting and working dogs, with continuous product development in progress. 

In 2023, the Vets Menu brand launched, bringing the scientific backing of Oralade to the healthy pet treat market. The debut of meal-enhancing gravy toppers provides a junk-free boost to your dog’s dining experience while promoting healthy bodily functions. The Vets Menu range is set to grow further with more healthy treats and cat-specific product development underway.

Macahl manages the manufacturing, distribution, marketing, and technical support of its evolving range of products. Distributing to over 60 countries worldwide, the company continues to invest and grow, developing new products and entering new markets. Macahl aims to deliver top-quality products, services, and assistance to every customer. With GMP+ accreditation in the manufacture of complementary feeds, Macahl guarantees the quality and traceability of its product ingredients, from source to bottle. 

Macahl is committed to developing new and innovative products that support a happier, healthier life for your pet.

That’s why we created Furble – a platform that connects pet parents, local charities, and veterinarians, ensuring that every purchase contributes to the wellness of pets across Canada. We’re turning everyday pet buys into real, positive change.

What Furble Offers:

  For Pet Parents: A convenient, online platform to access pet food, products, and prescription delivery—all in one place.

  For Veterinarians: We ease the burden of product selling, so you can focus on the care your patients need.

  For Communities: Every purchase supports local charities and helps keep pet care accessible and affordable for Canadian families.

From food and toys to prescription delivery, Furble makes it easy for pet parents to care for their pets while strengthening communities and supporting veterinary practices across Canada. 

Together, we can build a more sustainable, pet-focused future.

Description:
PRIDE+GROOM was born because a group of New York City dog lovers wanted the same level of grooming products for their dogs that they themselves enjoyed. They looked (hard) but nothing was up to snuff. Or sniff. Like so many, we love our families and take pride in our homes, and we consider our pets to be integral parts of those entities. That said, we could not find an effective way to coif them that was on par with the way we tended to our children, our homes, or ourselves. These beloved pets are allowed on the furniture and in our beds, and yet even when fresh from the groomer, we knew they did not smell or feel as good as they could.

With the development of our coat-specific shampoos, conditioner and deodorizing spray, we think we found just the way to say thanks for being the best and the sweetest MVP of the house. Skin and coat health is very important to us.

PRIDE+GROOM is the first dog grooming brand launched under a beauty platform, with formulas made in a clean beauty and scent lab. We know beauty is not only skin deep. We did a ton of research to create the entire line. Each product is formulated with its own unique blend of essential oils sourced from around the world.

IN DOG WE TRUST

Description:
Life Pet Care nasce nel 2009, dalla volontà di un gruppo di appassionati di animali, da tempo impegnati nel mondo del pet food, di offrire ai propri cani e gatti la migliore nutrizione possibile.

Fin dagli inizi, la nostra mission è stata: Nutrire cani e gatti in modo naturale, ovvero come loro stessi farebbero se vivessero liberi in natura.  Per questo ci siamo specializzati nel fare alimenti naturali e super premium. 

Ma cosa vuol offrire a cani e gatti una nutrizione naturale? Significa dar loro una dieta a base di carne e pesce. Infatti, in natura cane e gatto caccerebbero le loro prede, perché i nostri pets sono sempre stati e restano carnivori.

Per questo motivo ci siamo dati delle semplici regole che stanno alla base di tutti i nostri prodotti: utilizziamo solo materie prime di qualità, mettiamo sempre carne e pesce come primo ingrediente, alte percentuali di proteine animali e scegliamo ingredienti naturali.

Questa coerenza ci ha permesso di sviluppare un catalogo con oltre 200 prodotti, tutti di alta qualità, e essere, ad oggi, un punto di riferimento nel mercato super premium del pet food.

Name: La Ferme Tropicale
Description:
Depuis 1993, La Ferme Tropicale n’a eu de cesse de partager sa passion pour les reptiles et la terrariophilie avec ses clients. Avec 30 années d’expérience, elle est devenue l’une des entreprises leader de la terrariophilie dans l’hexagone et sa renommée dépasse nos frontières européennes. 

Des serpents aux lézards, ou encore des amphibiens aux invertébrés, La Ferme Tropicale commercialise des espèces variées, ce qui fait d’elle une des meilleures références pour les éleveurs du monde entier. De nombreuses structures travaillent en partenariat exclusif avec nous, et des visites régulières nous permettent de contribuer au bien-être des animaux, et d’optimiser les résultats de leur reproduction. 

Le siège social est constitué du magasin historique à Paris, et le site d’acclimatation qui est notre plateforme logistique se trouve à Combs-la-Ville et compte près d’une trentaine de collaborateurs. Entreprise à taille humaine, notre équipe réunie des conseillers passionnés, toujours enclins à transmettre et d’échanger leurs connaissances de ce vaste monde qu’est la terrariophilie. 

Ces animaux sont passionnants pour nous comme pour notre clientèle, nous avons appris à y ajouter de la méthode et du professionnalisme.

Name: LuckyChef
Description:
Wir bei LuckyChef lieben Hunde und wollen, dass sie fit und glücklich sind. Mit unserer Idee des „Guided Cooking“ machen wir es Hundebesitzern leicht, ihre Vierbeiner individuell und bedarfsgerecht zu ernähren.

Unsere von Tierärzten entwickelten Rezepte, die speziell auf die Bedürfnisse jedes Hundes abgestimmt sind, werden durch unsere hochwertigen Supplements bedarfsgerecht ergänzt.

So einfach und mühelos war das Zubereiten von köstlichen, bedarfsgerechten Mahlzeiten für Hunde noch nie. Mit unserer innovativen Küchenmaschine CookA wird das Kochen vitaminschonend, zeiteffizient und kinderleicht – und es schafft zudem eine noch engere Bindung zu deinem Hund.

Unsere Vision:
Jeder Hund soll vollwertige, selbstgekochte Mahlzeiten bekommen – und Hundebesitzer haben dabei volle Kontrolle über die Zutaten.

Unsere Mission:
Wir helfen Hundebesitzern, ihre Hunde mit minimalem Aufwand gesund und individuell zu ernähren. Mit der CookA-Küchenmaschine, unserer Rezeptwelt und hochwertigen Supplements bieten wir eine einfache Lösung für ausgewogene Hundemahlzeiten.

Warum LuckyChef?
Wir bei LuckyChef vereinen Leidenschaft für Hunde mit Innovation. Wir suchen Menschen, die sich für gesunde Hundeernährung begeistern und unser Team mit ihren Ideen bereichern. Bei uns erwarten dich ein kreatives Arbeitsumfeld, spannende Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten – und natürlich Bürohunde!

Mimi Bow Bow is leading a new era in pet health, bringing together AI scanning, IoT integration, and groundbreaking products to solve real-world challenges for pet parents and empower veterinary professionals.
 AI-Powered Health Scanning
With Mimi Bow Bow’s advanced AI scanning, pet parents can instantly check their pet’s health by snapping a photo. In seconds, receive a detailed health report with actionable insights, allowing you to catch potential issues early and make informed care decisions. It’s like having a health expert on call anytime, anywhere.
 IoT Integration for Daily Monitoring
Our IoT devices give pet parents unparalleled oversight of their pet’s daily routines, from feeding and hydration to activity levels. Receive alerts for any unusual patterns and keep tabs on your pet’s well-being even when you’re away. With Mimi Bow Bow, you’re always in the loop, ensuring a healthy, balanced lifestyle for your pet.
 Innovative Products to Solve Pet Parenting Challenges
Our curated line of innovative products is designed to address common concerns for pet parents—whether it’s specialized nutrition, grooming essentials, or interactive toys that promote mental stimulation. Each product is crafted to simplify pet care and enhance the quality of life for both pets and their parents.
 A Game-Changer for Veterinarians
Mimi Bow Bow is not just for pet parents; it’s also transforming veterinary practices. Veterinarians can now access AI-generated health scans for their clients’ pets, enabling more accurate assessments and tailored care plans. By recommending Mimi Bow Bow, vets can provide a proactive approach to health management, empowering them to stay connected with pet health like never before.
With Mimi Bow Bow, we’re bridging the gap between technology and pet care, creating a healthier future for pets, peace of mind for parents, and advanced tools for vets. Join the revolution in pet wellness today!

We knew that wood is the perfect scratching surface, so we headed to the local forest to find something to turn into a cat tree. The end result was good for the cat, good for the planet, and it looks good in our home.

That’s the Ucci way.

KeepPet is not just an app or a service, it’s a global community of pet owners and veterinary professionals who share their passion of making this world a safe and happy place for our pets.

- Chats and video calls with the veterinarian
- KeepPet Academy where vets publish a monthly digest with valuable information for pet owners
- Pet profile with your pet’s pedigree and achievements

Name: Learn FETCH
Description:
Learn FETCH: Reimagining Health Through the Lens of the Dog–Human–Planet Bond

At FETCH, we believe companion animals belong in the conversation - not under the table.

We are not a pet brand. We are a movement - bridging the gap between individual wellness, planetary health, and conscious care for our dogs.

Co-founded by two Holistic Canine Nutrition Consultants; Dr. Alexia Mellor, a former academic with a doctorate in climate change engagement and participatory systems design, and Stacey Renphrey, a systems strategist & long-term home educator, FETCH brings together evidence-based insight and intuitive intelligence to disrupt how we think about nourishment, health and care.

We use the dog–human relationship as an entry point to rewire how we approach food, energy, leadership, and healing - not just for our animals, but for ourselves and the world we’re part of.

Through our framework and platform, we’re inviting dog guardians, thought leaders, and mission-aligned organisations to rethink:

→ Why companion animals must be included in any sustainable food system
→ What environmental consequences are hidden in everyday practices (like routine chemical parasite prevention)
→ And how new models of conscious, relational care can create scalable ripples across health, sustainability, and culture

We are especially interested in collaborating with:

 Environmental and sustainability orgs
 Regenerative food and farming initiatives
 Ethical vet and wellness tech innovators
 Policy advocates and citizen science platforms
 Holistic health, education, and social impact partners

FETCH isn’t just about dog care. It’s a systems-level reframe for how we tend to life.

 If your work explores ecology, food, climate, public health or sustainable living - and you’re ready to bring companion animals into the dialogue - we’d love to connect.

Because what we do to our dogs, we do to ourselves. And to the Earth.

As the first dual registered animal relocation company in Africa, we pride ourselves on our collaboration with major international animal governing body, IPATA (International Pet Animal Transport Association) and ATA (Animal Transportation Association) 

All our consultants have been trained at an international level, have completed IPATA exams and hold training certificates that reflect their expertise. Our branch managers have also obtained IATA Certificates in Live Animals Regulation (LAR).

IPATA is a non-profit, worldwide trade association for animal handlers, pet moving providers, kennel operators and veterinarians who are dedicated to the care and welfare of pets and small animals during transport. PETport is an active member of the IPATA team, which has more than 400 members in over 80 countries. 

IPATA serves its members, the pet transport industry and the public at large.

Name: Cultura Canina
Description:
Los perros, al igual que los niños, requieren un entorno estimulante que fomente el desarrollo de sus capacidades emocionales, cognitivas y comportamentales. A lo largo de la historia, los colegios caninos y guarderías se han centrado en un único aspecto, ofreciendo una atención parcial que aborda la prevención de futuros problemas de socialización, la expresión de emociones y las habilidades de afrontamiento en los perros. En este contexto, presentamos CULTURA CANINA, un Colegio pedagógico canino y guardería canina campestre  que aborda de manera integral el bienestar de tus peludos amigos con un enfoque científico basado en 3 principios: Animal Welfare, Etología y la Bioética.

Somos conscientes de los desafíos comunes que enfrentan los dueños de perros al elegir un colegio canino. Uno de estos desafíos es la incomodidad y la seguridad durante los largos trayectos y el transporte de los perros. En Cultura Canina, hemos diseñado un entorno que garantiza la comodidad y la seguridad de tus mascotas a lo largo de todo su proceso de aprendizaje y socialización.

Name: Petstreet
Description:
Our story began in 2005, in a 1BHK rented apartment in Delhi. Petstreet's founder couple, Mrs Shalini Wadhwa & Mr Rajesh Wadhwa, were looking for ways to come out of debt to provide a better lifestyle for their children.  

Inspired by their love for dogs, they decided to register for Kennel Club of India and within a few years, they became the most sought after, ethical & licensed breeders of St Bernards and Neapolitan Mastiffs across India.

However, Authentic Kennel & Dog Home were destined to be shut because the emotional disruption and heartbreak was extremely high when the dogs used to come of age and depart; or when the pups wouldn't survive, it would take a toll on the family’s mental health. Hence, these ventures were closed in 2010 marking a complete stop on sale and purchase of dogs.

In 2010, Petstreet was born. It started out as one retail store of aquariums and pet products in Sector 27, Atta Market, Noida, which was a hit in the market because of the expertise and free counseling that was provided by the couple to every walk-in client. They soon went on to open another retail store in Indirapuram in 2013 where Mrs Shalini Wadhwa launched a veterinary clinic and a grooming salon, after which there was no looking back. Cut to 2020, we have 4 retail stores and 1 dog resort under Petstreet, and all of them are run by the Wadhwa family members

We have recently launched our virtual store which is one stop solutions for all your pet's needs and requirements. www.petstreet.in allows you to make an order from comfort of your homes.  

Check out our website www.petstreet.in for OFFERS & DISCOUNTS!

Description:
Augie Bones is more than just another dog toy company; Augie Bones is an advocacy brand, a sustainable dog toy company which supports the health and welfare of our dogs and planet. 
We say we are Nylon and petroleum plastic free…because we really are! 
Finally, dogs can freely chew away while mitigating exposure to harmful microplastics. 

We knew it wouldn’t be easy, however, we wanted to show what’s possible and lead by example. One simple mission; to produce fun toys that are better for our dogs and planet! 
So how do we chew? Augie Bones are tough, but not too tough, dogs can still get their teeth into them, to chew them down. 

 We make four sizes - Tiny (for Toy dogs up to 6lbs) Mini (up to 30 lbs) Mighty (up to 90lbs) and a Mega (up to 125lbs)  and three tantalizing flavors - Braised Beef, Smokey Bacon and Roasted Peanut Butter. All AAFCO certified hypoallergenic. Yum! 

Augie Bones are made primarily from corn starch cellulose and biobased, biodegradable and compostable materials. Finally a feel good solution for your tough chewer. 
We proudly make all our toys in Michigan, USA.

Augie Bones is for Pet Health and Planet Health.

Name: The International Cat Association, Inc.  (TICA)
Description:
TICA - A Global Leader in the Cat Fancy
The International Cat Association (TICA) stands as the unrivaled global leader in the realm of feline appreciation and pedigree cat registrations. As the world's largest genetic registry for pedigreed cats and household pet cats of unknown ancestry, TICA has earned a reputation for excellence, steady growth, and fostering a vibrant community of cat enthusiasts.
At TICA, we distinguish ourselves by our commitment to continuous expansion. We proudly hold the title of being the sole registry in both the cat fancy and dog fancy arenas that consistently experiences steady growth in registrations across the globe. Our membership, clientele, and catteries are flourishing on every continent, reflecting our unwavering dedication to the world of feline companionship.
What sets TICA apart is our remarkable ability to embrace and celebrate diversity within the cat fancy. We take pride in recognizing a multitude of breeds, and our household pets are given the same platform to compete for prestigious titles and awards alongside pedigreed cats. Moreover, TICA actively contributes to the future of the cat fancy through our Junior Exhibitors Program and Mentoring Program. These initiatives pair seasoned TICA Members and Breeders with new exhibitors and breeders, ensuring a nurturing and supportive environment for the next generation of cat enthusiasts.
The heart and soul of TICA lie in its members – an extraordinary community of breeders, exhibitors, and cat aficionados. By becoming a part of TICA, members gain the privilege to actively influence the Association's evolution. Unlike many other organizations, in TICA, it is our members who hold the power to vote on pivotal issues shaping our future. Members can also align themselves with breed sections of their choice, with the possibility of being elected as officers to lead and guide the organization.

Visão

Transformar o mercado e a alimentação pet, por meio de inovações e possibilidades, tornando o convívio entre animais e humanos mais harmonioso, feliz e duradouro.

Name: WaldoPet
Description:
WaldoPet – Transforming Pet Wellness Through Technology

WaldoPet is building the future of pet health through a connected ecosystem designed to improve the human-animal bond.

Our mission is to enhance pet wellness using real-time health data and smart veterinary tools. At the center of the WaldoPet ecosystem is a seamless flow of information from pet to cloud to care provider, helping animals live longer, healthier lives while giving owners greater peace of mind.

How It Works:
	1.	Real-time data is collected from WaldoPet devices, including heart rate, respiratory rate, temperature, location, sleep cycles, calories burned, weight, steps, SpO2, NIBP, and historical trends
	2.	Data is securely transferred to our proprietary cloud platform
	3.	Veterinarians and technicians access the insights through our mobile app or portal, enabling more personalized and efficient care

WaldoPet is more than a product line. It is an integrated care system built for both pet parents and veterinary professionals. Our goal is to empower prevention, support better diagnostics, and elevate the standard of care in animal health.

We are proud to serve as a trusted partner in advancing pet wellness through innovation.

Description:
Morty’s Bark & Brew

Mission: Pets, people, and places coexisting in harmony.
Vision:  A world where being pet-inclusive is as fundamental as being ADA-compliant.

Morty’s Bark & Brew flips the script on “pet-friendly.”
We’re built for dogs first — with human-friendly amenities that make tails (and hearts) wag. Think: an indoor-outdoor social hub where dogs can play safely and humans can relax, connect, and maybe grab a cold one.

At Morty’s, dogs aren’t sidekicks or accessories — they’re the reason we exist. Every design choice, surface, and sniff zone starts with canine comfort in mind. Humans just get the perks: good vibes, great drinks, and a community that actually gets it.

We’re here to build more than a dog park — we’re shaping a future where pet-inclusive spaces are the norm, not the novelty. Where shared spaces mean shared joy, shared learning, and shared responsibility.

Because when dogs thrive, communities do too.

Name: Zoomies
Description:
Pets are a big part of our world. In this day and age, they're treated like our own children. We love to have them around, and we love to take care of them, but more often than not, there's a lot of work involved in getting them from point A to point B, especially if you don't own a car. Because the Auto and Cab Drivers choose not to allow them. And all of the jhik-jhik and arguments involved in trying to get them to take you and not cancel the ride, results in making your pets super anxious.
And when they do allow you, they will want to charge you thrice the amount for having your Fur Baby Onboard - who is also made to sit on the dirty floor of their vehicles.

That's why we want to create a ride-hailing Ecosystem that is primarily focused on pets and pet parents. We believe that pets deserve the best possible experience when they travel with their owners—and that means making sure everything goes as smoothly as possible. From pet-friendly cars to drivers who are also pet lovers and trained by Pet Behaviourists. We're committed to providing the best service for your furry friend.
‘Zoomies’ is reinventing mobility for Pets and Pet Parents. We are bringing together and aggregating the world's most innovative mobility concepts under a single mobility platform [under one roof] – RideSharing, CarSharing, SharedCharging, Rentals, Purchase Lease Back, and Personal Contract Purchasing (PCP). Zoomies will be a 100% electric vehicle powered smart ride Hailing and Renting platform. We are building a ride hailing ecosystem for Pet Parents. With Zoomies Ride hailing Services – the customers (Your Pets) will always get the most optimum experience while travelling with their Human Parents.

As a Devoted dog parent, we know you want to give your dog the best food, without breaking the bank.

To do that, you need affordable, tummy-loving kibble.

The trouble is you’re overwhelmed by a sea of dog food options, unsure of what’s best for your dog. It’s hard to find a solution that ticks all the boxes: convenience, flavour, health, and affordability.

At Devoted, we understand how challenging it is to find the best kibble for your dog.
