Description:
PAWS & PATCH – PREMIUM NUTRITION UND PFLEGE FÜR DAS WOHLBEFINDEN UND DIE VITALITÄT VON HAUSTIEREN 
PAWS & PATCH ist ein modernes Familienunternehmen aus Bayern. Gegründet im Jahr 2017 umfasst das Sortiment aktuell hochwertige Futterzusätze, BARF-Zusätze, Futterergänzungsmittel, sowie Zubehör für
Hunde, Katzen, Kleintiere und Pferde. 
Alles getreu dem Motto: NATÜRLICH. NACHHALTIG. BESONDERS. 
Natürliches Wohlbefinden der Haustiere verbunden mit dem Thema Nachhaltigkeit sind die DNA der Firma. Deswegen achtet PAWS & PATCH sorgfältig auf die Qualität und die Herkunft aller Materialien und Rohstoffe sowie auf eine schonende Verarbeitung. Die Firma verwendet für die Futterzusätze ausschließlich hochwertige pflanzliche Inhaltsstoffe und verzichtet konsequent auf Füllstoffe und künstliche Zusätze. Die Produkte werden in wunderschönen Designverpackungen aus nachwachsenden Rohstoffen angeboten. Ganz ohne Plastik und Aluminium. 
Alles wird in einer eigenen Produktion in Bayern hergestellt - Made in Germany!

PAWS & PATCH – PREMIUM NUTRION AND CARE FOR THE WELL-BEING AND THE VITALITY OF PETS 
PAWS & PATCH is a modern family company from Bavaria, Germany. Founded in 2017, the company currently offers high-quality feed additives, BARF and feed supplements as well as accessories for dogs, cats, small animals and horses.
Following the company’s core values: NATURAL. SUSTAINABLE. EXTRAORDINARY.
The health and the well-being of pets are the company’s DNA. That's why PAWS & PATCH pays careful attention to the quality and origin of all materials and raw materials, as well as gentle processing. PAWS & PATCH only uses high-quality natural ingredients for the feed supplements and completely avoids filling and artificial additives. The products are offered in beautiful design packaging made out of renewable raw materials. Completely without any plastic or aluminum. 
All products are produced in an own production facility - "Made in Germany".

Name: Willow & I
Description:
Nurturing bonds with wholesome dog treats and chews. 

Willow & I is a female-owned brand born from the frustration of misleading pet products and the lack of transparency when it comes to ingredients. We built a brand that stands against deception and prioritizes the well-being of our furry companions so that pet parents can focus on loving their dogs the way they deserve. 


Get in touch: hello@willowandi.co

Name: PetPins
Description:
Petpins is a sri lankan startup specializing in the manufacturing  and distributing of high-quality, affordable dog and cat accessories. Founded by Fakeer Mohamed and fayaj Mohamed, petpins aims to address the market gap created by the high prices of imported pet accessories. By sourcing raw materials locally and maintaining stringent quality standards, we offer pet lovers products that combine quality with affordability.


Our products are designed to match the quality of imported items but are priced significantly lower due to our cost-effective production process. We ensure that every product is durable, comfortable, and stylish, catering to the practical and aesthetic needs of pet owners.

Name: Central Bark Rochester
Description:
Welcome to Central Bark Rochester!
Central Bark Rochester is your local hub for “whole dog care”. Our personalized approach aims to enrich your dog’s whole health and well-being – throughout their entire life. We offer everything from dog day care to dog grooming, dog boarding, dog training, healthy and enriching pet care products and more. All with the mission to help you and your best friend enjoy a whole, healthy, happy and loving life together.

At the heart of our whole dog care approach is Enrichment Doggy Day Care, which combines our industry-leading doggy day care expertise with the latest dog behavior science. Our program provides a healthy and balanced blend of exercise, social group play, learning, rest, and TLC to help your dog be a healthy, happy, calm, and well-rounded member of your family.

“We welcome you to join our Central Bark family.”
-Lenny Hoisington, Central Bark Rochester

Name: Max's Furrever Friends
Description:
"Max's Furrever Friends is a premium pet care provider serving the Lake Norman community. With over 10 years of professional experience, we specialize in providing structured, safety-focused care that goes far beyond the standard 'app-based' experience.

Our signature service, The Weekly Walk Club, is designed for the modern pet parent who values consistency. By operating on a 28-day cycle with 4 scheduled 30-minute walks, we ensure your pet maintains a healthy routine while building a deep bond with a certified professional.

Why Local Professionals Choose Us:

Certified Safety: Every visit is performed by a Pet Tech Certified professional (CPR & First Aid).

Reliability: We prioritize consistency and long-term relationships over high-volume booking.

Specialized Expertise: Proven experience in puppy development, senior dog mobility, and feline wellness.

In-Home Excellence: We provide secure, high-end overnight care that keeps your pet in their own comfortable environment.

We are proud to be a trusted partner for families in Huntersville, Cornelius, and Davidson."

Name: The Red Dog House
Description:
The Red Dog House is a transformative pet care facility providing crucial services including boarding, daycare, and comprehensive specialized training for dogs with challenging behaviors, blending mission-driven activities with pragmatic revenue streams, ensuring both community impact and financial growth all aimed at elevating adoption rates, addressing essential health needs, and maximizing revenue while ensuring accessibility for everyone. 

The Red Dog House offers:
1.	Specialized Training: We target dogs with challenging behaviors with customize strategies ensuring transformative results. Owners regain confidence, reducing stress, and the value proposition is quick, noticeable behavioral changes and a safer community
2.	Tailored Boarding: Recognizing the scarcity of boarding options for dogs, our facility is built to ensure they feel safe and nurtured. No more hesitation on trips or vacations. The value proposition is Peace of Mind. Owners can travel or work knowing their pet is in skilled hands.
3.	Expert Daycare: If your dog has been kicked out of daycare, he or she is welcomed here. Our staff understands intricate canine behaviors. Our daycare doesn't just supervise but actively engages, promoting positive interactions, and training with a human touch. The value proposition is holistic care, which is beyond mere boarding, we ensure each dog's emotional and physical well-being, lessening chances of shelter handovers.
Our services bridge the gap between need and availability, ensuring that more dogs stay happily with their families.

Todos os animais que frequentam a creche e o hotel, têm um dia inteiro com atividades sociais, mentais e físicas, programadas para que o pet tenha uma experiência positiva de muito aprendizado.

Estrutura diferenciada com 800m² de espaço, incluindo áreas abertas e cobertas. O que permitirá separar os cachorros por porte e temperamento, levando muito mais segurança e qualidade a todos. 

Nossos serviços: Daycare (Creche), Hotel, Banho & Tosa e Adestramento.

Contamos também com: Serviço de leva e traz, câmeras 24 horas, profissionais apaixonados por animais e monitores treinados pela equipe de adestramento.

Description:
Everybody loves their pets, they are family to us.

PetNote is here for the homeless animals, for all pet parents, volunteers, fosters, veterinarians, and for any animal lover in the world. We are taking the benefits of the modern world and use it to help you and your furry best friend. 

We work together with a private animal shelter, with the common goal of finding loving homes for over 300 poor adorable souls that have been living there their whole life, whilst also gaining resources to continue supporting the shelter (animal food, utility bills, rent for the place etc.). 

Since 2021, PetNote is officially a new type of social media mobile application for animals and with animals, because "We Love Them Too" (available on App Store, coming soon on Google Play).
 Create and manage pet profiles for free in an app created only for animal lovers
 Connect with other pet parents or animal lovers, share your best moments with our beloved community
 Easily keep track of your pets’ health with personalized PetNotes

 Adopt your new buddy

https://petnotecommunity.com

Best of all, tofu litter is sustainably made, using an upcycled waste byproduct of consumable tofu production. Our goal is to reduce our landfill contribution just as it is to provide our furry family members a safe and non-toxic natural litter.

Name: InterPet Vietnam - International Pet Expo Vietnam
Description:
Vietnam's most anticipated B2B2C Pet event for 2025. Why

- The ONLY pet event in Vietnam that is solely about pets. InterPetFest guarantees a 100% exhibition space dedicated to showcasing pet-related products, services, and goods.

InterPetFest, the biggest one-stop pet show, links your company with potential importers, distributors, buyers, retailers, industry experts, legal consultants for the pet sector, pet custom experts, law firms, marketing agencies and consumers. Market information is also supported by InterPetFest.
 
- In several APAC nations, B2B2C pet events have been shown to be the most suitable concept.

- For the FIRST time, starting from 2025, pets are permitted inside SECC, Vietnam's most up-to-date and expert display venue. 

- Since 2018, the organizers have been holding numerous local pet events under names: Vietnam Pet Festival, Pet Perfect Pet Festival Dam Sen. Beginning in 2025, we decide to expand it internationally under the name InterPetFest.

*The best moment to enter the Vietnamese pet industry is at InterPetFest 2025.
*Displaying at InterPetFest, to enhance your domestic and Indochina distribution networks
*Increasing brand recognition through InterPetFest

Name: Almo Nature UK Ltd
Description:
Almo Nature is a pet food company specialising in high-quality, natural food for dogs and cats. Established in Italy in 2001 by Pier Giovanni Capellino, it aimed to set a new standard by creating the world's first wet pet food with human-grade ingredients. In 2010, the company expanded globally, evolving into a small multi-national corporation.

In 2013, the company extended its commitment to excellence by introducing the same high standards to dry food and kibble, ensuring that pets everywhere could enjoy a consistently exceptional diet.

Environmental consciousness and sustainability are at the core of Almo Nature's ethos. In 2017, the company introduced two lines of plant-based cat litter, providing a sustainable and eco-friendly choice for cat owners. 

The Fondazione Capellino was established in 2018 by Pier Giovanni and Lorenzo Capellino as a non-profit organisation, dedicated to protecting life, enhancing biodiversity, and combating climate change.

In 2019, the ownership of Almo Nature was irrevesibly transferred by it's owners Pier Giovanni and Lorenzo Capellino to the Fondazione Capellino.

In 2020, the 'Renitergration Economy' was born. This new concept means that 100% of the proceeds generated from the sale of Almo Nature products, after costs and taxes are then re-invested into the Fondazione Capellino - helping to setup and support existing and new projects around the world to help nature, restore biodivesity and combat climate change.

It comes with a first-of-its-kind mobile app that features a pet-friendly locations & services finder, a pet parent community, a pet health record management, and goal setting options, etc.

Our Mission:

To create a smart and connected life-cycle ecosystem for pets.

 Notre mission ? Créer une meute engagée où professionnels passionnés et pet parents se retrouvent pour offrir une vie plus heureuse à nos fidèles compagnons.

 L’Éthique avant tout
Chez Tobalgo, on ne plaisante pas avec le respect animal. Nous privilégions des pros qui partagent notre vision : le bien-être animal. Cela signifie que nous refusons catégoriquement toute forme de pratique contraire à nos valeurs.

Name: Real Dog Box
Description:
“We help you #feedreal food.”

We build digital tools to help dog owners #feedreal food. We believe in feeding fresh food, but dog food is centered around mass production. Big Food corporations must make high quantities of processed food to lower production costs, then their marketing department must figure out how to sell this cheap food, and this fuels a cycle of promoting feedlot food for dogs. Mass production is not conducive to fresh food. It requires cheap ingredients and additives to stay in the market. We built a system to stay small, buy local, and air-dry small batches of fresh food to serve millions of dogs. We supplement our food with digital tools to support dog owners on their wellness journey and teach them why and how to feed real food. We are creating a global marketplace to connect dog owners to certified canine nutritionists and veterinarians. 

Real Dog Box complements any diet and any budget and teaches dog owners how to incorporate fresh food into their lifestyle. We make and deliver a monthly box of fresh dog treats & chews to prevent food-related illnesses. A few dollars a day spent on real food can prevent 6 out of the 10 most common dog vet visits. Every human-dog bond is special, and it starts with real food.

Name: Tulipa Dog
Description:
Nós amamos cachorro e nosso principal objetivo é fazer com que eles se sintam em casa quando estão conosco! Aqui, cada um deles é tratado de maneira especial, personalizada em todos os nossos serviços.
Contamos com 800m² para dormitórios, atividades e aprendizados. São dois complexos totalmente equipados, um externo em contato direto com a natureza, e outro interno, protegido para os dias chuvosos. Nenhuma atividade é prejudicada pelo clima. Nossas instalações são certificadas pelas autoridades públicas, e os ambientes são monitorados por câmeras com inteligência artificial.
Cada cãozinho estará assistido integralmente pelo time, com formação em adestramento e acompanhamento canino, com garantia de muito carinho, treinos de energia, atividades recreativas e de socialização, além é claro, dos momentos de descanso e refeições.
Nossos circuitos recreativos são para todos os portes. As atividades de aprendizado, academia e energia são realizadas com tecnologia referência de mercado, em equipamentos MalhaCão e DegranPet.
E, na hora de descansar, todos relaxam em um ambiente acolhedor, com cromoterapia, musicoterapia e aromaterapia. As camas são sustentáveis, os colchões e almofadas impermeáveis, e a grama sintética da área interna é Velve, com proteção à fungos.
Usamos os cosméticos da Dog&Co. Nossos serviços de estética visam o máximo de conforto. Portanto, estamos equipados com duchas Lorenzetti, secadores Maestro Kyklon, e inovadores sopradores silenciosos Homerumpet Blow, todos com ajuste de temperatura. Contribui ainda para o bem-estar animal a moderna máquina de secagem rotomoldada Kyklon. E, nenhum cãozinho fica em gaiola conosco. 
Temos serviços de transporte e planos especiais para fornecer os insumos da alimentação dos cães que estão sob nossa guarda. Contamos com um lounge especial para os tutores e, claro, uma boutique, para aquele mimo especial que seu melhor amigo merece. 
Afinal, todos nós amamos cachorro!

Name: Everything Dog & School of Woof
Description:
At the Everything Dog & School of Woof, we believe in a holistic approach to dog care. We tailor our programs to meet the unique needs of each dog, considering their personality, breed, and specific requirements. Our comprehensive programs focus on:

Socialization: Encouraging positive interactions with other dogs and people.
Training: Enhancing obedience, tricks, and agility through structured activities.
Wellness: Promoting physical health through core strength and conditioning exercises.
Enrichment: Utilizing dogs' natural instincts and senses to create a fulfilling experience.

Daily Schedule

During their stay, your dog will enjoy a balanced welfare and enrichment program that runs throughout the day. Dogs will have classes throughout the day and will also be given breaks to nap and unwind. Dogs need to sleep between 12 to 17 hours a day depending on their age and size, and our program incorporates that.

A typical day includes:

Morning: Socialization and playtime to burn off energy.
Midday: Training sessions focused on obedience and specific skills.
Afternoon: Relaxation and enrichment activities to stimulate mental engagement.
Evening: Light exercise and cool-down periods before pick-up.
Training Programs

Our training programs are customized to address various needs, whether it's basic obedience, advanced tricks, or agility training. Our experienced trainers work closely with each dog, ensuring progress and positive reinforcement.

Safety and Comfort

We prioritize the safety and comfort of all our canine guests. Our facility is equipped with the latest safety features, and we maintain a zero-risk policy. We adhere to best-in-class welfare standards and use enrichment tools that guarantee a secure and enjoyable environment.

We combine the latest in nutritional science with cutting edge manufacturing technologies to bring you a complete & balanced food that’s light on the planet.

Our recipes are over 90% ethically sourced Australian meat, organ and bone – delivering a high protein, low carb ancestral diet for your best mate. We have prioritised wild proteins and Australian sourced superfoods for their health and sustainability benefits. By gently air drying all our ingredients in a solar oven, we maximise nutritional value while keeping our impact on the planet light.

Plus – no grains, no fillers, no nonsense!

Just the right stuff to help your best mate and the planet thrive.

Name: Sniffspot
Description:
Sniffspot enables anyone to rent land by-the-hour as a safe and private dog park

We are a unique community

In a “me first” world, we put dogs first. We love dogs, we have dogs, we try to give dogs as much overflowing joy as they give us. We believe that dogs have inherent worth, and we care deeply about their well-being. As long as we share a place on Earth, we believe dogs have an inherent right to live a fulfilling, joyful and rewarding life.

We believe a more dog-friendly world is a better world. Dogs evolved and were bred in a world where they could run free in fields and forests. Modern society doesn’t carve spaces out for our canine companions and, as a result, dogs in the modern world are having all kinds of problems, like obesity, reactivity, and anxiety. We are coming together to provide safe spaces that allow dogs to let their instincts rise back to the top, to go wild and free, and to just be dogs again. Healing is a beautiful thing to witness.

Our Story

The Sniffspot story begins in 2016 when founder, David Adams, adopted his first dog, Soba. Soba is a wonderful, outgoing dog with leash reactivity. The year after David met a wonderful woman named Rebecca and her dog Toshii. Toshii grew up on the streets of Altanta and is dog selective. Rebecca and Toshii were traveling for work in Baltimore and Rebecca was having a terrible time just taking care of Toshii's basic needs. There was nowhere she could safely let him off leash. She texted him and said "There has to be a better way, I wish there was an app where I could find places to let Toshii off leash". And that was the light bulb for Sniffspot. 

Inspired by the idea of making things better for dogs, David put up a simple website and started crowdsourcing yards. Sniffspot has grown from there. Now Sniffspot operates in all 50 states and all around the world. The world is still not dog friendly enough, but Sniffspot is making it a more dog friendly place one spot at a time.

Name: Pupford
Description:
At Pupford, our mission is to empower you to create a healthier and happier relationship with your pup.

Hi, I’m Yukiko, Mother to two senior Dachshunds and a fluffball Samoyed. And one of the founders of Pupford. I LOVE dogs (maybe a little too much… actually that’s not possible.) and got into fostering surrendered pups in my home state of Utah about three years ago.

The rescue organizations in Utah seriously rock and I’ve been lucky enough to foster 20+ dogs that needed a little TLC before finding their forever homes.

When you bring a new foster pup into your home, most of their background is a complete mystery. All you know is that it’s your duty to prepare them for adoption into a loving home. Preparing pups for adoption is like caring for any other dog, and it revolves around three critical components:

Companionship
Both man and dog are social beings and neither can thrive without meaningful relationships.

Nutrition
Receiving the right daily nutrition can rapidly transform a dog’s physical and mental health.

Training
Proper obedience encourages positive behaviors, provides mental stimulation, and builds trust.

These three things work together in tandem to make a pup truly happy!

Naszym celem jest oferowanie rozwiązań, które odpowiadają na współczesne potrzeby - mobilność, design, estetyka i trwałość. Torby LileTink sprawdzają się w przestrzeni miejskiej, w podróży, podczas wizyt u weterynarza czy jeździe na rowerze. Każdy projekt powstaje z myślą o maksymalnej funkcjonalności: lekkiej konstrukcji, solidnych przeszyciach, miękkich wypełnieniach oraz detalach zwiększających komfort i bezpieczeństwo zarówno zwierzaka, jak i właściciela.

Produkujemy w Polsce, korzystając z wysokogatunkowych materiałów i lokalnego zaplecza krawieckiego. Dzięki temu kontrolujemy jakość na każdym etapie, tworząc akcesoria, które wyróżniają się trwałością i dopracowaną formą. Wierzymy, że produkt premium to nie tylko wygląd – to również przemyślana konstrukcja, odpowiedzialne podejście do produkcji oraz dbałość o doświadczenie użytkownika.

LileTink wybierają osoby, które chcą łączyć aktywny styl życia z troską o pupila, bez kompromisów między wygodą a estetyką. Nasze produkty towarzyszą klientom w pracy, w aktywnościach i w codziennym życiu, pozwalając zabierać ukochanego zwierzaka zawsze i wszędzie - wygodnie, pewnie i w dobrym stylu.

The processing of our bully sticks involves a series of stringent quality checks to guarantee that only the finest sticks make their way to your pet's bowl.

Our manufacturing process is characterized by its diligence and precision. Each bully stick undergoes a careful inspection to meet our high standards for consistency in size, texture, and overall quality. We understand the importance of ensuring that your dog receives a safe and enjoyable chewing experience, and every Okiniiri Bully Stick is a testament to our unwavering commitment to achieving this goal.

One of the key features that sets Okiniiri apart is our dedication to maintaining the natural goodness of our treats. Our bully sticks are slowly oven-dried to perfection, preserving the savory flavors and locking in essential nutrients. This slow-drying process not only enhances the taste but also results in a longer-lasting chew, promoting dental health and satisfying your dog's instinct

Name: Barkle
Description:
Barkle is your pet's path to oral health.

Barkle’s origin was inspired by a recommendation by Dr. Walter Cohen, former Dean of the University of Pennsylvania's Dental school, who recognized a pressing need for a solution to combat periodontal infection in dogs.

Scientific Milestone:
As Barkle embarked on its journey, a pivotal revelation emerged—dogs develop plaque and tartar primarily on the outer surfaces of their teeth. This groundbreaking insight paved the way for an owner-friendly solution. Barkle, designed to easily and gently prevent plaque, is a dog-friendly alternative to brushing that improves oral health.

On a Mission: Barkle, led by our CEO, Byron J. Kerr, and Chief Science Officer, Dr. Henry Crosetti, has undertaken a mission to confront the epidemic of periodontal disease in dogs by educating the public about the reality of the disease while acknowledging the impracticality of daily brushing and expensive cleanings under anesthesia.

We envision a future where the seamless incorporation of daily application becomes a routine for pet owners, under the supervision of a veterinarian. The mission of Barkle is to encourage pet owners, breeders and shelters to emphasize how important daily oral healthcare is for pets as a major part of the pet owner's responsibilities.

Future Outlook:
Barkle aspires to redefine canine oral care, establishing daily prevention as the new standard. The envisioned future includes the introduction of an easily accessible at-home diagnostic device for the early detection of infections, fostering positive and proactive oral health for our furry companions.

Name: Furvor
Description:
OUR FERVOR FOR FURVOR

Fervor [fur-ver] – an intense and passionate feeling

Furvor is more than a pet food company. We are on a mission to bring high-quality, natural nutrition to pets everywhere while helping expand the awareness and availability of service and therapy dogs that help those in need live a richer, fuller life.

OUR ORIGINS

It all started following a hot summer hike.  Our two exhausted dogs – Henry and Ollie - seemed to need more than just water, so we added some bone broth to their water and kibble.  The result was more energy, more mobility, and a faster recovery time. We were inspired to use our passion – our fervor - for the health and well-being of our dogs to create Furvor.

Why? Because we know all the incredible health benefits this one single product provides us humans, and we wanted our pets to experience those same benefits. Although bone broth products for dogs already existed in the market, we wanted to create a better broth—one with more nutrition, more flavor and more value. So that’s just what we did.

Name: Purrrlandia Cat Lounge & Cafe
Description:
Welcome to Purrrlandia Cat Lounge & Cafe – Where Rescue Meets Community.

Purrrlandia is more than a cafe—it’s a haven for rescue cats and a welcoming space for cat lovers. Our mission is to reduce shelter overcrowding, promote responsible guardianship, and create meaningful human-feline connections.

OUR MISSION
We provide a stress-free, enriching environment where rescue cats can flourish, build confidence, and find their forever homes. By blending rescue, relaxation, and education, we help bridge the gap between shelters and adopters, ensuring every cat gets the second chance they deserve.

WHAT WE OFFER
 A Haven for Rescue Cats – Our space is designed to support the well-being of adoptable cats, allowing them to express their true personalities and make stronger connections with potential adopters.
 A Unique Gathering Place for Cat Enthusiasts – Enjoy high-quality refreshments in a relaxing, cat-friendly environment. Whether you’re here to adopt, learn, or simply unwind, Purrrlandia is designed to be a space for connection, discovery, and joy.

OUR CORE VALUES
 Compassion – Every decision we make prioritizes the well-being of rescue cats and the education of our community.
 Connection – We create meaningful opportunities for people and cats to bond, building relationships that lead to better adoption matches.
 Innovation – We reimagine the cat cafe experience, integrating rescue, education, and community-driven solutions to create a lasting impact.

We invite you to follow our page for updates on our initiatives, adoption opportunities, and ways to get involved. Whether you’re a cat lover, future adopter, or an organization looking to collaborate, we welcome you to be part of Purrrlandia’s journey.

Name: Pumpkins Pets and Youth Services
Description:
At Pumpkins Pets and Youth Services, we are dedicated to providing comprehensive and quality pet care services. From grooming sessions that ensure your pets look and feel their best to specialized three-level dog training programs, agility course training for an active and engaged lifestyle, and a safe and comfortable boarding facility – we've got it all. Our services extend to pet daycare, where your furry companions can socialize and play, and dog walking for those moments when they need a breath of fresh air. Soon, we'll be introducing veterinary care to offer a complete range of services for your beloved pets.
Wendy's Wish Youth Program:
Wendy's Wish is our free educational program designed by Wendy Brooker focuses on empowering youth and teens. This program is divided into three age groups, each tailored to address the unique needs and challenges faced by individuals at different stages of their development. The youth program is named in the memory of its founder Wendy who sadly passed away before getting to see the program working its magic on the youth and teens. We know she's smiling down  on us watching over all the youth and teens in her program.
Group 1 (Ages 10-13):
Duration: 8 weeks
Curriculum: Introduction to pet care, responsible pet ownership, pet nutrition, grooming techniques, self-nutrition, and self-care (hygiene).
Group 2 (Ages 14-17):
Duration: 7 weeks
Curriculum: Pet CPR and first aid, animal behavior, mental health awareness, coping skills, social skills, and agility course training.
Field Trip: A visit to the Windsor Essex Humane Society for hands-on experience.
Group 3 (Ages 18-19):
Duration: 4 months (modular learning program)
Curriculum: In-depth exploration of pet care careers, grooming, dog training, emergency care for pets, mental health, and addiction awareness.
Opportunities: Chance for teens to be employed in the pet care sector, with five lucky individuals each year winning higher education scholarship by submitting an essay.

Name: Tilting Heads
Description:
At Tilting Heads, we believe grooming is more than clean fur — it’s care, trust, and love made visible. We started this journey with a single question: why do so many pet products treat our companions like afterthoughts?

Born from a deep need to do better, Tilting Heads is a science-led pet care brand that puts skin health and emotional comfort at the center of everything we do. Our formulations are pH-balanced, microbiome-friendly, and built to calm, cleanse, and protect — because we know that every itch, every flinch, every bath-time battle is your pet asking for something gentler. Something kinder.

As pet parents, we’ve lived the helpless nights. As formulators, we’ve built the solution we always wished existed. Today, our growing range of grooming products — including India-first shampoos for microbiome restoration — is helping pet families everywhere turn bath time into a ritual of care.

We're proudly made in India and deeply driven by purpose. And while we’re still young, we've already earned the trust of thousands of pet parents across the country who now see grooming not just as hygiene — but as healing.

At Tilting Heads, we’re not here to follow trends. We’re here to raise standards.
One bottle. One bath. One happier pet at a time.

Playful Pups also offers a wide variety of fun group classes.

Our owner, Laurie Yost, is a certified Operator through the Professional Animal Care Certification Council and she and our team are certified in pet first aid and CPR. We take pet care seriously, so at this time 16 of our team members, including our management team, are Fear Free Certified as well.

Remember, you deserve peace of mind when you're away from your furry family member, and your dog deserves a pet care team who will care for them the same way that you do!

Name: LYO DOG - online shop for outdoor adventure dogs (& their humans)
Description:
We are a brand from Slovenia, focusing on promoting healthy and active lifestyle of dogs and their humans (#activeLYOutdoors), as well as aiming to be as sustainable as possible and give back with environmental and socially responsible projects (#responsibLYOutdoors). 

We believe that dogs are our best friends, family members and adventure buddies. We take our dogs on outdoor activities such as hiking, ski touring, mountain biking or camping, we also put a lot of effort into their training. For us, an active lifestyle with dogs is more than just a hobby – it’s a way of life. Therefore, our dogs deserve only the best.

Our own LYO DOG treats are 100% natural, made from organically grown fruits, vegetables, meat and fish. Sourced ingredients are freeze dried or dried through a special process in order to sustain the most nutritional value as possible. We don´t use any additives, preservatives, artificial colours or flavour enhancers. Since our treats consist of only one ingredient, they are a great solution for dogs with allergies and/or food sensitivities. 

Besides that, we collaborate with other brands that share values, so that we can offer a wider range of high-quality products for our customers. We carefully and thoroughly test all the products ourselves with our dogs, before including them into our shop. If a product doesn’t meet our quality standards and values, we won’t offer it to our customers.

In our online shop, you can find limited edition high-quality products for active dogs:
•	Dog treats, food and supplements, suitable also for dogs with allergies and sensitivities,
•	Adventure dog gear for outdoor activities,
•	Sustainable packaging options,
•	Monthly bundles, limited edition flavours and gift boxes,
•	In-person and online dog training courses and tips.

We are also a distributor for Best Barf 100% natural raw freeze-dried snacks for dogs and cats: www.bestbarf.com

Name: Paul's Custom Pet Food
Description:
Paul’s Custom Pet Food (PCPF) is a Connecticut-licensed pet food manufacturer that prepares fresh, made-to-order therapeutic diets, six varieties of veterinary nutritionist-developed complete and balanced food for healthy adult dogs, one fresh cat food topper, two bone broths, and five single-ingredient dehydrated treats.
     Since 2014, PCPF has been preparing fresh pet food by hand in small batches, overseeing every aspect of production. We do not use co-packers or third-party manufacturers. Recipes are prepared with ingredients sourced from local farms and businesses, and/or businesses committed to ethical practices. We use both novel and traditional proteins from animals that were humanely raised.
     Preparing fresh, made-to-order therapeutic diets is a keystone of what we do. All made-to-order therapeutic recipes originate with you, the veterinarian, and/or a veterinary nutritionist you partner with. We work closely with national board-certified veterinary nutritionists that we can recommend. 
     Over the past eight years, PCPF has prepared whole-food recipes, recipes with premixed vitamins/supplements, and raw or gently cooked recipes – all based on veterinarian preferences. We work directly with veterinarians and their clients, putting both at ease knowing that a licensed, experienced manufacturer is making food according to specific instructions.

Evcil hayvan dünyasındaki en son haberler ve güncellemelerle her zaman güncel kalın. Yeni çıkan ürünler, veterinerlik hizmetlerindeki yenilikler ve hayvan hakları ile ilgili gelişmeler hakkında bilgi sahibi olabilirsiniz.

Sağlık ve Beslenme
Beslenme ipuçları, yaygın hastalıklar, tedavi yöntemleri ve sağlıklı yaşam önerileri hakkında uzman görüşlerine yer veriyoruz. Kediler ve köpekler için özel diyetler, vitamin ve mineral ihtiyaçları hakkında detaylı bilgilere ulaşabilirsiniz.

Davranış ve Eğitim
Evcil hayvanlarınızın davranışlarını anlamak ve onları eğitmek için ihtiyacınız olan tüm bilgileri burada bulabilirsiniz. Yavru köpek eğitimi, kedi davranış problemleri ve pozitif pekiştirme yöntemleri hakkında kapsamlı rehberler sunuyoruz. Ayrıca, evcil hayvan psikolojisi üzerine yazılmış makaleler ile onların dünyasını daha iyi anlamanızı sağlıyoruz.

Eğlence ve Yaşam
Evcil hayvanlarınızla geçirdiğiniz zamanı daha eğlenceli ve kaliteli hale getirmek için çeşitli öneriler ve aktiviteler sunuyoruz. Evde oynayabileceğiniz oyunlar, dış mekan aktiviteleri ve evcil hayvan dostu tatil yerleri hakkında bilgilere buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

Ürün İncelemeleri ve Öneriler
Evcil hayvanlarınız için en iyi ürünleri seçmenize yardımcı olmak amacıyla, piyasadaki çeşitli ürünleri detaylı bir şekilde inceliyoruz. Mama kaplarından taşıma çantalarına, oyuncaklardan sağlık ürünlerine kadar geniş bir yelpazede ürün incelemeleri ve kullanıcı yorumlarına ulaşabilirsiniz.

petsorucevap.com, evcil hayvan sahiplerinin hayatlarını kolaylaştırmayı ve evcil hayvanlarının yaşam kalitesini artırmayı hedeflemektedir.

Name: Normpati
Description:
Hakkımızda
Normpati olarak kedi ve köpek mamalarımızda uyguladığımız yüksek standartların temelini, uzun yıllara dayanan balık yemi üretim tecrübemizden alıyoruz. Balık yemi üretimi; formülasyon hassasiyeti, ekstrüzyon teknolojisi, pelet yoğunluğu kontrolü, sterilizasyon ve homojenlik gibi son derece zorlu teknik süreçler gerektirir. Bu süreçlerde edindiğimiz bilgi birikimi ve altyapı, evcil hayvan maması üretiminde bizi bir adım öne taşımaktadır.

Balık yemi üretiminden kazandığımız uzmanlık sayesinde, mamalarımızda doğru protein, yağ, vitamin ve mineral dengesini hassas formülasyonlarla sağlıyor; ileri üretim teknolojileriyle yüksek sindirilebilirlik ve lezzet sunan ürünler geliştiriyoruz. Sürekli kalite kontrol yaklaşımımızla her üretim partisinde aynı güvenilirliği garanti ediyoruz.

İzmir Torbalı’daki modern üretim tesisimizde, çift vida ekstrüzyon sistemi ve otomasyon kontrollü proseslerle uluslararası standartlara uygun üretim gerçekleştiriyoruz. Tüm ürünlerimiz, uzman ekibimiz tarafından laboratuvar testlerinden geçirilerek kalite onayından geçmektedir. Formüllerimiz, FEDIAF (Avrupa Evcil Hayvan Gıda Endüstrisi Federasyonu) yönergelerine uygun olarak geliştirilmekte ve Ar-Ge çalışmalarımızla düzenli olarak güncellenmektedir.

Normpati olarak her formülümüzde yalnızca doğal ve premium hammaddeler kullanıyor; geleneksel üretim anlayışını modern otomasyon sistemleri ve güçlü Ar-Ge altyapısıyla birleştiriyoruz. Sonuç olarak Normpati mamaları, yalnızca lezzetli değil; aynı zamanda yüksek sindirilebilirlik, güçlü bağışıklık desteği ve dengeli beslenme sunan güvenilir bir beslenme deneyimi sağlar.

Normpati, teknik uzmanlık, hijyen ve kalite standartlarına dayalı sıra dışı bir mama deneyimidir.

Description:
www.biendanssespattounes.com

Vous rencontrez des difficultés avec votre chien ou votre chat ? 
- Malpropreté
- Destructions, 
- Hyper-dépendance, anxiété de séparation
- Peur, agressivité
- Miaulements ou aboiements intempestifs
- Agitations
- Griffades sur support(s) inapproprié(s)
- Cohabitation difficile entre chiens/chats  
- Mauvaise entente humain/animal...

Ou vous souhaitez simplement des conseils pour le bien-être de votre animal? Particulièrement à l'occasion d'un changement dans votre vie (déménagement, arrivée d'un bébé...) ? 

Titulaire d'un master en préservation de la biodiversité et diplômée en tant que comportementaliste chien et chat, je dispose de l'esprit d'analyse et des connaissances nécessaires sur l'animal et ses besoins pour déterminer la (ou les) cause(s) d'apparition d'un comportement. Puis nous établissons ensemble un plan d'actions* adapté pour retrouver calme et harmonie dans votre foyer. Quelques jours plus tard, un suivi par téléphone ou e-mail permet de discuter de la manière dont l'animal réagit à la thérapie comportementale et d'ajuster les propositions, si besoin. 

Je propose également de promener votre chien, de manière ponctuelle ou régulière.

Je me déplace à votre domicile dans le Calvados (14). 

*Toutes les mesures proposées sont respectueuses de l'animal et de ses besoins fondamentaux. Je prends également en compte vos possibilités et vos limites. 
La méthode employée est positive/douce, mais n'en est pas moins efficace ! De plus, elle a le mérite de fortifier votre relation avec votre petit protégé.

Name: Control The Meerkat Ltd
Description:
At Control The Meerkat, we believe dogs deserve more than training plans — they deserve safety, compassion, and understanding.

We specialise in **trauma-informed practice**, helping both pet professionals and dog caregivers recognise and respond to the emotional needs driving behaviour. Using our unique “Meerkat Analogy,” we translate complex neuroscience into practical strategies that reduce stress, build resilience, and improve welfare.

Our work also extends to **assistance dog support**, where we help disabled people train and thrive with their dogs, creating partnerships built on trust, regulation, and mutual care.

What we offer:

* Professional mentoring, courses, and resources for trainers and behaviourists.
* Specialist support for assistance dog handlers and candidates.
* Thought-leadership, webinars, and education on trauma-informed care.

Whether you’re a professional looking to deepen your skills, or a caregiver seeking compassionate solutions, Control The Meerkat provides science-based, welfare-driven support.

 Learn more: www.controlthemeerkat.com
 Follow this page for weekly insights on trauma-informed practice and assistance dogs.

Name: Gentle Pet Crossing
Description:
Gentle Pet Crossing is a place of honor, dignity, and compassion. We provide a comforting, welcoming, and supportive environment while we help you plan your pet’s afterlife care. We are a Pet funeral home that also offers euthanasia services— both in-home or on-site.

Gentle Pet Crossing provides afterlife care services for pets in the form of cremation through water, or aquamation. Aquamation, like cremation by fire, reduces the body to its essential elements, but it is a gentler and more eco-friendly option than fire-based cremation; there are zero direct emissions to the atmosphere, and 90% less energy is used. Instead of cremation by fire or burial, consider the alternative cremation by water: aquamation.

With aquamation, you can expect 20 to 30% more remains back compared to cremation by fire. Not only is the process gentle, but each pet is placed in a separate compartment, so your pet’s remains never get mixed with another pet’s.

At Gentle Pet Crossing, we have a peaceful sanctuary and facilities for formal pet funeral gatherings where you can give your pet a peaceful, loving goodbye. Our staff works by appointment for funeral services on Saturday or Sunday.

Each owner receives their pet’s remains in a rosewood urn with a brass engraved nameplate along with a lock of hair and an aquamation certificate. We also offer a wide range of keepsake products, including memory portraits, urns, cremation jewelry, and more.

Name: Doggy Duty
Description:
Doggy Duty was founded by Tatiana Anderson, an LCAM with over 25 years of experience managing residential communities. After struggling to find reliable vendors who understood the unique demands of HOAs, Condos and apartment complexes, she created a solution that puts professionalism, consistency, and community needs first.

We specialize in dog waste station management, removing bagged waste from your property and hauling it to the landfill at no extra cost to your association. Our goal is simple: keep your pet-friendly areas clean, stocked, and compliant.

 Core Services
	•	Dog Waste Station Servicing
We empty dog waste bins, restock bags, and haul waste off-site to a landfill, keeping pet areas clean and compliant.
	•	Dog Waste Station Installation
We install pet waste stations in high-traffic areas for easy, sanitary use.
	•	Bag Restocking
We ensure doggy bags are always available so residents are never left without supplies.

 Additional Community Services
	•	Community Trash Disposal – Removal of bagged trash from common areas (excluding bulk items).
	•	Trash Bin Replacement – We install new bins when damaged or missing.
•	Storm Preparation & Cleanup – We’re on-site before and after storms to secure and restore your community quickly.
	•	Installation of Signage, Notice Boards & Outdoor Seating – Professionally installed to enhance community appeal and communication.
•	Minor HOA Tasks & Repairs
Need an extra hand with light maintenance? We’re here to help with the small stuff too.

 Your Extra Set of Eyes Onsite
Our team doesn’t just show up—we take note. If something is out of place, broken, or needs attention, we let you know right away. Think of us as your community’s first responder for the little things that matter.

 Why Work With Doggy Duty, LLC?
We’ve sat on your side of the table and understand the expectations of boards, residents, and property managers. Our proactive service model ensures your community stays clean, safe, and satisfied.

Name: Pets2GO International
Description:
BestPetStayEVER is a national certification and rewards program created to elevate compassion, dignity, and inclusivity in pet-friendly travel. Powered by the King Cortez Pet Care Foundation—a service-disabled, minority- and woman-led nonprofit—our mission is to ensure that pets and the people who love them are welcomed, not just tolerated, across the hospitality & housing landscape.

We partner with hotels, vacation rentals, airports & interstate  to provide:

Branded pet amenity gift kits for guests traveling with animals
Humane training and certification for hospitality staff via our Pets2GO University
Clean protocol and supply chain guidance for safe, pet-inclusive environments
And national recognition for establishments who uphold compassionate, high-standard care
Through our international distribution partnership with Sysco brand Guest Supply, we’re already placing BestPetStayEVER products in the hands of hotel guests across the globe, But our mission doesn’t stop there.

We are currently raising $4 million to build the BestPetStayEVER Pet Resort & Crisis Center—a one-of-a-kind facility in Clayton County, Georgia that will serve veterans, displaced families, and pet owners impacted by eviction or foreclosure. Our center will provide:
Up to 90 days of loving care for their pets, while owners secure safe, stable housing Trauma-informed support, reunification assistance, and a dignified path to healing A national model for humane crisis response for people and their pets At its core, BestPetStayEVER isn’t just about travel—it’s about transformation. It’s about building a world where no one has to choose between survival and surrendering the pet they love.

We're inviting hotel brands, corporate partners, and values-driven investors to join us in creating the gold standard of inclusive pet care—because when we protect pets, we protect people.

#BestPetStayEVER #PetFriendlyHotels #VeteranSupport #MinorityLedNonprofit #SupplierDiversity #PetCareInnovation

Name: Petsy
Description:
As a pet owner, there's nothing more heart-wrenching than the thought of your furry friend getting lost or going missing. It's a scary and uncertain time, filled with worry and fear for their safety. That's why we developed the NFC Pet Collar Tag – to give you peace of mind and the knowledge that you're doing everything you can to keep your pet safe. 

The NFC Pet Collar Tag is more than just a stylish accessory for your pet – it's a lifeline. Using Near Field Communication (NFC) technology , this innovative pet collar tag securely stores important information about your pet, including their name, breed, and any medical conditions or special needs. If your pet ever goes missing, all someone has to do is tap the tag with their smartphone to access this information, making it easy for them to quickly identify and contact you. 

But the NFC Pet Collar Tag isn't just for emergencies. It's also great for traveling with your pet. You can store your contact information and your pet's vaccination records on the tag, so you can easily present them to officials at border crossings or during international travel. 

So don't wait until it's too late – give yourself and your pet the gift of peace of mind with the NFC Pet Collar Tag. Order yours today!

Name: Carrot Cake Corgis
Description:
Добре дошли в Carrot Cake Welsh Corgi Pembroke Kennel, семеен развъдник, регистриран във FCI, посветен на породата Уелско Корги Пембрук.

Още от деня, в който първото ни Уелско Корги пристигна в нашия дом - нашата CIB (международен шампион) Шарли - Laif Spring Sharlin, ние знаехме, че коргитата ще станат неизменна част от живота ни. За нас те не са просто наши домашни любимци, а пълноценни и незаменими членове на нашето растящо семейство. Нашата история като развъдчици на коргита започна с безкрайна обич към една рижава топка козина, а днес вече с гордост стоим като предани пазители на тази невероятна порода. 

С всяко следващо поколение се стремим да постигаме отлични Коргита с крепко здраве, типичен породен темперамент и безупречни конформация и функционалност, следвайки всички отговорни практики при развъждането на кучета. 

Нашите Коргита печелят не само сърцата на хората, но и признание на голямата сцена на кинологията. Печелейки титли като BISS, BIS, J BISS, J BIS, BOB, J BOB, BOS, J BOS, BOG на престижни международни събития, като ENCI Winner в Италия, ежегодната специализирана монопородна изложба, на която се събират най-добрите представители на породата от Европа и отвъд - EUROCORGI, известната KOMAROM CACIB в Унгария и много други. 

Фокусът на нашата развъдна дейност не e разплождането на голям брой кучета, нашата мисия и цел е с всяко следващо поколение да опазваме и подобряваме уникалните качества на породата. Коргитата се отличават с висока интелигентност, безкрайна привързаност към хората, лоялност и игрив и комуникативен нрав, което ги прави идеални спътници в живота на всеки. 

С отворени сърца, открехваме вратите на дома си за вас и ви каним да надникнете във вълшебния свят на Carrot Cake Corgis, където усмихнатите коргита и пухкавите дупета са на почит. Без значение дали сте любители на коргита, бъдещи собственици или просто обичате кучета, ние ви каним да ни последвате тук в LinkedIn и да се присъедините към нашето семейство.

Garde d’animaux (toutes espèces domestiques), promenades et transport, dans le respect du rythme et des besoins de chacun.

 Bien-être & approche holistique
Communication animale, soins énergétiques (Reiki, magnétisme, radiesthésie, thérapie quantique, lithothérapie), notions en géobiologie.

 Approche relationnelle & comportementale
Observation, écoute, bienveillance et compréhension de la relation humain–animal.

 Travail en collaboration
Kutunza s’inscrit dans un réseau de professionnels du monde animal : éducateurs et comportementalistes, ostéopathes et naturopathes animaliers, afin d’offrir un accompagnement cohérent et complémentaire.

 Kutunza, c’est une présence engagée, une écoute attentive et une volonté profonde de prendre soin du vivant avec conscience et justesse.

Losing a pet is a deeply emotional experience for families. At Reflections, we are long-time pet parents too and believe pets are family so we understand the importance of providing compassionate support at this difficult time. We use an innovative tracking program that ensures your pet's aftercare journey is transparent. Name: Loststolendog.com
Description:
Loststolendog.com was founded in early 2021 by a group of dog lovers & owners who want to make a difference.

Our initial aim was to raise awareness to the horrendous increase in dog thefts and help reunite lost and stolen dogs with their human families. Having your dog taken from you or go missing is not only traumatic for the dogs, but their owners as well, and can have lasting negative impacts on their lives.

The team at loststolendog.com came together and conducted in-depth market research interviewing over 1000 dog owners up and down the country. One of the key questions was “what they would do in that moment if their dog was being stolen?” and “what they would do in that moment if they realised their dog was lost or missing?”

The top response to both questions was “Panic”. Interestingly, 97% of those surveyed had no idea who to contact (other than the police) if the unthinkable was to happen to their beloved dog. We also asked “Over the past year, have you become more fearful of taking your dog out for a walk in the daytime”? A staggering 65% of respondents answered “YES”.

After analysing the results of the survey, the loststolendog team sat down to come up with a solution to help reduce some of the panic and stress should the situation arise.

We launched an alert system that our members could trigger if their dog was lost or stolen that would be posted to all local dog groups and across our social media platforms. Spreading the word far and fast.

Now twelve months later we’ve grown into a ‘dog community’ with thousands of followers on the various social media platforms who interact, share and communicate with each other regularly. We share news, topical blogs, tips, advice, fun facts and a few funny stories and videos across all channels. This is in addition to being a unique warning system should someone’s dog be lost or stolen.

We encourage all members to share any details of lost or stolen dogs so we can help find them through our network.

- Massage; Deep Tissue, Swedish, Manual Lymphatic Drainage
- Myofascial release; direct and indirect techniques via the Lenton Method
- Canine Touch

- The science of exercise
- Canine Pathologies and injuries
 
From a dedicated home clinic I can now support you and your dog both during a crisis such as rehabilitation after an injury and, just as importantly, for their general health and injury prevention.

The clinical massage therapy and the Lenton Method that I am trained in has undergone successful clinical trials with the results showing 95% of dogs show a visible improvement in as little as a single massage treatment.

I only offer services that have been proven to work and that I use regularly with my own dogs. Services improve a dogs fitness, mobility and overall health and the benefits are seen by owners after as little as 1-2 weeks.

Name: Saltsox LLC
Description:
Saltsox became a reality in 2012 after a blistery cold and particularly extreme winter in the city of Chicago, IL. Several years earlier Cindy and her husband were concerned for the well being of their dogs Zeke and Zoe. The de-icing salt used to clear the city streets and sidewalks was proving to be a major pain in the paw. While there were many great products out there, (and we tried a ton) not a one of them was what we needed for the hustle and bustle of everyday city life. We needed a boot that was:

~ water-proof and kept the paws dry and clean
~ insulated
~ comfortable
~ easy to put on and take off
~ stayed in place

Zeke and Zoe became the original test pilots and over a few winters, with several fabric and design changes we were able to perfect our design by testing on dogs of all ages, size, and activity levels on the tough streets of the city. They were put to the test when the polar vortex hit in the winter of 2014 where temperatures plunged to -15 F and quickly turned into one of the worst winters on record. Born of ice and snow and designed from the heart, we began production the following spring.

We have your pup's well-being covered year-round now. Saltsox are the perfect boots for dealing with old man winter and all that he can throw your way, while Lavasox offer unique protection from hot pavement and sidewalks, filth and debris.

Saltsox are proudly handmade locally in Chicago, IL.

Description:
The Idea of ReefAmorous started with three experienced Jordanian reefers who want to make Marine and Reef Aquarium keeping much easier in the Arabic region and specifically in Jordan.

At ReefAmorous We Design, Build, Install, and Maintain all Types of Aquariums. We provide high-quality equipment, supplies, fish, corals, and invertebrates at affordable and competitive prices.

We provide residential and commercial aquarium services throughout the Greater Amman city. Our aquarium services include but are not limited to, Aquarium installation and full-service maintenance. We are ready to take care of all your aquarium needs. We Import our fish from high-quality suppliers, All Fish are quarantined before selling to our customers. With strict quarantine protocol, we make sure to provide you with healthy fish.

We are building the first Coral Aquaculture facility in Jordan, to provide the hobbyist with colorful and popular designer corals. All of our corals are 100% aquacultured, nothing is harvested from with wild.

Aquacultured corals from known strains and lineage are easier to keep and have amazing colors. Our coral broodstock is chosen from reputable international coral farms. We seek out amazing corals from all over the globe. Then aqua-culture them until they are hard, fully colored, and ready for your aquarium!

We also guide and help all Aquarium hobbyists, Novice or experienced. Please feel free to contact us should you have any questions or comments. We are always more than happy to help!

Together, we’re creating a future where every pet receives the healthcare they need.

Name: Bark River Pets
Description: Our journey at Bark River Pets began with a heartwarming encounter at an animal rescue in West Allis, WI. It was here that we met Finley – a fluffy dog from Alabama with a tail that never stopped wagging and a love for fetch that melted our hearts. Finley quickly became more than just a pet; he became a part of our family, inspiring us with his energetic zest for life. Together, we embarked on countless adventures, from hiking and swimming to simple joys like visiting our local ice cream shop. These moments, especially our summer walks to the Bark River bridge, sparked the idea for Bark River Pets. Inspired by Finley's adventurous spirit and our shared love for the outdoors, we set out to create something that would nourish and fuel the adventures of dogs everywhere. We specialize in crafting freeze-dried, species-appropriate dog treats at Bark River Pets. Our ingredients are locally sourced in the USA and freeze-dried in Wisconsin, ensuring they are as pure and authentic as the bond you share with your pup. We firmly believe in transparency and quality – our treats are free from fillers and artificial additives, reflecting our commitment to wholesome nutrition and the well-being of pets. Bark River Pets is more than just a dog treat company; it celebrates the unbreakable bond between dogs and their human companions. Our mission is to encourage an active and adventurous lifestyle supported by nutritious treats. Whether it's a hike through the woods, a swim in the river, or a relaxing day at home, our treats are designed to supplement each precious moment. Every product we create carries the spirit of adventure and the promise of quality. We hope our treats will inspire you and your pets to step outside, discover new trails, and create unforgettable memories. At Bark River Pets, our motto is simple: Work like a dog, play like a puppy. Thank you for being a part of our journey and for choosing Bark River Pets. Together, let's help every dog find their adventure!

Name: Adopted Tails
Description:
Adopted Tails By AcciLives is a pioneering pet care startup committed to revolutionizing the way we care for our beloved furry companions. Our mission is to enhance the safety, health, and well-being of pets through innovative technology solutions.

At Adopted Tails By AcciLives, we have developed cutting-edge QR code lockets specifically designed for pets. These lockets serve as a comprehensive solution for pet identification, medication tracking, and location guidance. By wearing our QR code lockets, pets are easily identifiable, ensuring a swift reunion with their owners in the event they become lost.

Our lockets also integrate a convenient medication tracking feature. Pet owners can store their pet's medication details, including dosage, frequency, and special instructions, within the QR code. This helps pet owners stay organized and ensures that their pets receive the correct medications at the right times.

In addition, our QR code lockets are equipped with GPS technology, enabling location guidance for lost pets. When someone finds a lost pet wearing our locket, they can scan the QR code and receive the owner's contact information. The built-in GPS technology guides the person who finds the pet to the owner's location, facilitating a speedy reunion.

Adopted Tails By AcciLives aims to provide pet owners with peace of mind, knowing that their pets are safe, identifiable, and well-cared for. We are dedicated to fostering strong bonds between pets and their owners by offering innovative solutions that simplify pet care and improve the overall quality of life for both.

Join us at Adopted Tails By AcciLives as we embark on this mission to enhance pet safety, streamline medication management, and facilitate quick reunions for lost pets. Together, we can make a significant impact on the well-being and happiness of our furry friends.

Name: Eternal Tides, LLC
Description:
Eternal Tides is dedicated to providing compassionate, eco-friendly aftercare services for pets. We specialize in aquamation—a sustainable alternative to traditional cremation that gently returns pets to the earth using water-based technology. At Eternal Tides, we understand that losing a beloved companion is a deeply personal and emotional experience, and we are committed to offering services that honor pets with dignity and care.

Our Services Include:
--Aquamation (Alkaline Hydrolysis): A gentle, water-based process that uses potassium hydroxide to accelerate natural decomposition. Aquamation is a more sustainable option than flame-based cremation, reducing carbon emissions and avoiding harmful pollutants.
--Pet Funeral Services: Personalized memorial services that celebrate the unique bond between pets and their families. Our serene memorial space provides a comforting environment for saying goodbye.
--On-Site Comfort Room: A tranquil, private setting for pet owners to spend their final moments with their pets, ensuring a peaceful and respectful farewell.

Why Choose Eternal Tides?
At Eternal Tides, we prioritize a greener future and compassionate care. Our approach to pet aftercare focuses on reducing our ecological footprint while providing the highest level of service to our clients. We are proud to offer an eco-friendly alternative that aligns with the values of pet owners who are committed to sustainable living.

Our Values:
-Empathy
-Environmental Stewardship
-Education

Why Aquamation?
Aquamation is a growing trend among environmentally conscious pet owners and animal stewards. As awareness of climate change and environmental responsibility increases, more people are seeking green alternatives for their lives; those choices can and should include considerations for aftercare. Aquamation provides a safe, effective, and gentle way to care for pets after they pass, minimizing the environmental impact associated with traditional methods.

Name: PetMyPal
Description:
PetMyPal is a pet health and safety platform powered by AI and Social Media!

“Wait, what?, Aren’t there quite a few pet health services companies out there?.” Yes, you are right, there are quite a few “out there” as you put it succinctly. But the problem is that all the pet health services (medical, wellbeing, insurance, food etc.) are really fragmented and they are not designed to cater to your pet’s unique requirement. And, what about pet safety and security. Add a few more vendors to the list. That is, for each of your pet’s health and safe, you have to deal with multiple vendors who may or may not talk to each other to understand your pet’s unique requirements.

PetMyPal’s vision is to unify all the major pet health and safety needs under one umbrella. With this in mind, we are currently developing 4 different domains as follows:

Pet health information hub: Designed for “DIY” and “look before you leap” pet parents, this function is built based on social media principles. Aspects of this are already operational and more will be added in the future.
Vet telehealth: We just launched first version of telehealth that lets pet parents to chat with a healthcare expert and get answers to non-emergency pet healthcare and wellbeing questions from the comfort of  home. We are building several ways to connect with Vets including additional telehealth features, mobile Vet, a data base of Vets etc.
Pet safety and protection: We are developing capabilities to prevent pets from getting lost and should they be lost to locate them quickly. We are also developing a health monitor for pets.
Pet health food: Healthy food is very important for pets to maintain their health. Over time, we will be offering health food that pet parents can purchase.

La soluzione Biodegradabile e disinfettante che solidifica Liquidi , semi solidi e solidi 
"Ascolta bene, perché ti sto per dire come Popo’s Dry sta cambiando il gioco. Primo, è eco-compatibile. Non stiamo parlando di qualche finta promessa verde, ma di una formula che rispetta davvero il pianeta. Secondo, la solidificazione rapida e controllata. Dimentica quei prodotti che lasciano dietro di sé un disastro gelatinoso. Popo’s Dry fa il lavoro in modo pulito e veloce. Terzo, l’efficienza superiore. Mentre gli altri si perdono in chiacchiere, Popo’s Dry solidifica 100 ml di liquido in pochi secondi netti. E quarto, la praticità. Questo non è un prodotto per chi si accontenta. È per quelli che vogliono la soluzione definitiva, sempre a portata di mano.

E i vantaggi? Sono così ovvi che quasi mi vergogno a doverli elencare. Ma per te, farò un’eccezione. Con Popo’s Dry, dici addio alle scene imbarazzanti, alle pulizie infinite e ai sacchetti che si rompono. È la fine dell’era delle scuse. È tempo di agire con sicurezza, rispetto per l’ambiente e, soprattutto, rispetto per te stesso e il tuo cane. Questo è Popo’s Dry, la rivoluzione della pulizia canina. Se non lo usi, sei fuori."

Name: Get Your Pet
Description:
GetYourPet.com is the online community where people who have to rehome their pet connect directly with people who want to adopt a pet. The radically new Get Your Pet model for pet adoption allows pets to go directly from one good home to another, thereby keeping them from ever entering the shelter, with its attendant stress, exposure to illness and potential of being euthanized. GetYourPet.com operates across the USA, partnering with local shelters to reduce their intake of animals; and with veterinarian practices, including Banfield and VCA Animal Hospitals, to provide initial pet exams as part of the adoption process. Name: HUNGRY EYES
Description:
At Hungry Eyes, we focus on the whole experience of feeding your dog; starting from shopping for fresh dog food.

While dog food definitely is different from human food, when it comes to ingredients to recommended quantity, we believe, what is safe for your dog should be safe for you too.
Having said that, there is no compulsion for you to try our food, however, if you would like to…there’s no stopping you.

We strongly believe that you, as a pet owner, needs to be equally pleased with the food you serve your dog, so much so, that you need to be able to smell the food, see the ingredients, be able to mix the food with your own hands. There is no better way to use feed time as a bonding time with your pet.

Keeping this in mind, we provide you with information of what’s best for your dog and yet you make that decision. 
For us, food is the main source of positive energy and nutrition for a healthy happy pup, however, we do not believe in medicating dog food, since it is a meal to be enjoyed by your pup and to keep them active and robust.

Name: Alan's K9 Academy
Description:
Hi, I’m Alan Carr, owner of Alan’s K9 Academy in Bartow County, GA. With over 35 years of professional dog training experience—as both a military veteran and law enforcement K-9 officer—I’ve dedicated my career to helping families and their dogs live happier, safer, and stress-free lives together.

In 2021, I founded Alan’s K9 Academy with the goal of creating a trusted, results-driven training center. From our 12-acre facility, we proudly serve families across Georgia. Thanks to the loyalty of our clients, we’ve built a 5-star reputation and were voted Best of Georgia 2024.

 Our Specialties

Board & Train Programs – immersive, results-driven training while your dog stays with us.

Day Training & Private Lessons – personalized sessions built around your schedule.

Puppy Training – giving young dogs the foundation for lifelong success.

Behavior Modification – solving challenges like leash pulling, reactivity, anxiety, and aggression.

Therapy & Service Dog Training – preparing dogs for real-world support roles.

Exclusive Client Boarding – structured play, exercise, and training refreshers for continued progress.

 Graduate Perks: Every dog that completes a program receives FREE ongoing group classes, because training should grow with your dog, not stop when the program ends.

 Coming Soon: Doggy daycare, grooming, and more group options—making Alan’s K9 Academy your all-in-one destination for dog care and training.

 Why Families Choose Us

35+ years of hands-on training experience.

Proven, measurable results backed by client success stories.

Partnerships with local veterinary clinics and rescues.

Lifetime support through graduate group classes.

Personal accessibility—while my team supports daily operations, I remain directly involved and available to my clients.

 Convenience: Pickup and drop-off services make training easy for busy families.
 Let’s connect: Reach out today to schedule a consultation. I’d love to meet you and your pup!

 Follow us

Name: BetterBites
Description:
BetterBites nació del amor por los perros y la convicción de que merecen comer tan bien como nosotros. Comenzamos con una simple idea: ofrecer una alternativa real, natural y personalizada a la comida ultraprocesada que domina el mercado actual.

Todo partió al observar cómo muchos perros mejoraban radicalmente su salud y energía al dejar los pellets y comenzar a comer comida casera. Lo que comenzó como una solución puntual a un problema común, se transformó en una misión: crear una marca que redefiniera la alimentación canina en Chile y Latinoamérica, con comida real, nutritiva y hecha a la medida de cada perro.

En BetterBites, cocinamos con ingredientes reales, sin conservantes ni subproductos. Cada receta se adapta al tamaño, edad, peso y necesidades específicas de cada perro, y es preparada en cocinas humanas, con estándares de calidad reales.

Hoy entregamos nuestros planes personalizados directamente a la puerta de cientos de familias y hoteles caninos en Santiago. Nuestro objetivo es simple pero ambicioso: mejorar la vida de los perros a través de una mejor alimentación, y darles a sus humanos la tranquilidad de saber que están haciendo lo mejor por ellos.

 Entregas a domicilio
 Ingredientes 100% naturales
 Personalización nutricional
 Más energía, mejor salud, perros felices

En BetterBites, también creemos en construir una empresa tan sana como los perros que alimentamos. Por eso trabajamos con veterinarios, nutricionistas y cocineros apasionados que comparten nuestra visión de bienestar y cuidado real.

Description:
Welcome to Cambridge Canine Haven, where tails wag and paws play in a cozy, family-run oasis for your furry friends! Nestled in the heart of Cambridge, Ontario, our dog boarding and daycare service is more than just a place for your pet to stay – it's a home away from home.

At Cambridge Canine Haven, we understand that leaving your beloved pet in someone else's care can be a daunting task. That's why we've created a warm and welcoming environment where dogs receive the individualized attention and affection they deserve. Our team consists of lifelong dog lovers who treat every pup as if they were our own, ensuring they feel loved, safe, and happy throughout their stay.

Located in a fun and loving family home, our facilities offer the perfect blend of comfort and entertainment for your furry companions. From spacious play areas to cozy nap spots, we've thoughtfully designed every aspect of our space to cater to your dog's needs. Whether they prefer romping around with new friends or snuggling up for a nap, we provide a variety of activities to keep them engaged and content.

Safety is our top priority at Cambridge Canine Haven. Our team is trained in canine first aid and CPR, and our facilities are equipped with secure fencing and surveillance cameras for added peace of mind. We also adhere to strict cleanliness standards to ensure a healthy environment for all our guests.

But don't just take our word for it – our happy clients speak for themselves! With glowing reviews and wagging tails, we've built a reputation for excellence in pet care throughout the Cambridge community and beyond.

So, whether you're heading out of town for a weekend getaway or simply need a day of fun and socialization for your furry friend, trust Cambridge Canine Haven to provide top-notch care in a home-like setting. Because when it comes to your dog, only the best will do. Welcome to the family!

Name: LA Pet Apparel
Description:
Welcome to LA Pet Apparel: Apparel for Pets and Their Humans.

LA Pet Apparel is a lifestyle brand deeply rooted in Los Angeles culture, designed to celebrate the bond between pets and their owners through high-quality, locally crafted matching apparel. Our products are sustainably made, blending style, comfort, and eco-conscious practices to meet the demand for premium pet fashion.

Our Mission
We're redefining pet fashion with a focus on sustainability, quality, and innovation. By leveraging cutting-edge technology like AI and 3D design, we’re crafting stylish, environmentally-friendly pet apparel that meets consumer needs while promoting environmental responsibility.

Why Partner with Us
Our commitment to the local economy runs through our supply chain, fostering strong partnerships with LA-based suppliers and ensuring premium quality. Beyond apparel, we’re building a lifestyle brand, featuring Fetch LA - Explore LA with Your BFF (an interactive tool for discovering pet-friendly spots in LA) and LA Pet Chronicles, our pet and LA lifestyle magazine, focusing on strategic growth and diverse revenue streams.

Our DNA: LA Culture, Technology, and Philanthropy
At LA Pet Apparel, we combine LA’s creative spirit, tech-driven innovation, and a dedication to giving back. Through our #NoDogLeftBehindLA initiative, we support local rescue dogs, with 100% of sales from Dogtown LA benefiting local rescues to fund medical care.

Why LA Pet Apparel

 What We Do:

	2.	IoT-Based Real-Time Monitoring
Whether during the trial or while you’re traveling and your dog is at our partnered creche, you get live updates and video access to your pet through our integrated IoT system—ensuring complete transparency and peace of mind.
	3.	Pet Therapy for Emotional Wellbeing
We also promote the healing power of pets by offering therapy dog sessions in schools, senior care homes, and wellness centers—using certified dogs to reduce stress, anxiety, and loneliness through structured, supervised interaction.


Whether you’re a dog lover seeking a lifelong companion, a working professional who wants trusted monitoring while away, or a wellness center looking to collaborate on pet therapy—PetHusly is where technology meets compassion.

Name: Farmina South Africa
Description:
Farmina Pet Foods is an Italian based family company with over 50 years of experience in pet nutrition and pet well-being, offering a series of products and services to help pet parents with the care of their pets.
Based on the needs of the pet, Farmina offers personalized dynamic nutrition plans, thanks to a worldwide network of Consultants and Veterinarians to help pet parents monitor their pet’s health, during the different stages of their life.
The company was founded in 1965 when Mr. Francesco Russo founded the Russo Mangimi company specialized in animal nutrition. In 1999, his son Dr. Angelo Russo, , driven by a passion for animals and from affection decided to operate in the pet food category with a new perspective; setting itself the ambitious goal to develop foods that are the result of scientific studies centered on the pet and his well-being.
Today Farmina has four factories and sells in more than 65 countries in the world on 5 continents.
More than ever pets are integral part of family households. They require love and affection, and most importantly, particular attention to their health needs.
Our mission is to help pet parents in taking extra care of their dogs and cats, by providing personalized solutions for their well-being.

We know well that making happy and healthy pets starts with a correct and balanced nutrition. That’s why we have developed a network of Nutrition Consultants to follow each pet in every stage of its life, with the correct nutrition plan based on its needs.

Happy pet. Happy you.

Ser líderes en el mercado de productos y servicios para mascotas, capacitándonos continuamente, ofreciendo productos innovadores y buscando soluciones a cada necesidad, para garantizar la satisfacción de nuestros clientes y el bienestar de sus mascotas.

Anipet, Israel’s biggest, leading pet food and supplies store chain, established in 2008, heralds a new age in the field of pet equipment. All Anipet branches are owned by the chain, without concessionaires or outside investors, except for the company’s owners. Anipet was established by three partners, Oded Shilon, Eran Shilon and Ben Efrati, who joined forces on the basis of their shared love of animals and their desire to benefit them, in addition to their business synergy. Anipet’s economic operating turnover is over ILS 130 million per year. Anipet currently represent over 40 international brands from 22 different countries around the world. The chain’s customers are private customers, and Anipet mainly performs retail sale, together with specific wholesale. Anipet employs a unique, uniform branding language, expressed in all levels of the company’s operations, from the employees’ shirts to the stores’ design, vehicle and truck branding as well as the company’s website and Facebook page.

A New Age for Pets
Anipet brings a new and innovative message to the world of pets and their owners. The chain offers its customers the largest, widest variety of products, so you can find almost all pet products under one roof.
Anipet sells over 5,000 diverse and different items intended for pets, including food, toys, snacks, doghouses, clothing, straps, leashes, collars, gadgets, and more.
