Name: WildHQ Petfood
Description:
Made with the finest wild game from the pristine mountains of New Zealand, we combine nature’s best bounty with cutting-edge science to create pet food that’s truly premium. 
As pet lovers ourselves, we believe our dogs and cats should be eating the same quality food as the rest of our family. So we go to great lengths (and altitudes) to source New Zealand’s finest wild game and freshest produce to create protein-powered pet food and treats that are nothing but natural.  Loaded with prime cuts of wild game for the purest of tastes, our range of complete and balanced meals give pets the right nutrition in the right amounts. So your pet will keep that spring in their step for longer. Delicious, nutritious and nothing but natural. 
We make raw and air-dried New Zealand wild game petfood and treats into complete and balanced meals, with recipes created and tested by pet nutritionists, that exceed AAFCO standards. We supply Dogfood and Catfood made with: Wild Venison, Wild Goat, Wild Tahr and Wild NZ Wallaby. 
We supply: Frozen Mince, Prozen Medallions, Fresh Sausages, trays of tenderloin, loin and rump steaks served with a balancing gravy sauce. 
Our air-dried treats include: liver, trachea, shanks, golden sinews, pizzles, testicles, hooves, ears, tongue, neck strap. Our MPI certification includes sourcing the animals ourselves from helicopters, through DOC concessions and large private landowners from New Zealands high country and transporting them in chilled trucks to our state-of-the-art factory in Nelson. We process and pack the petfood ourselves.
We’re raising the bar for pet food, but with that comes the responsibility to educate people on what good pet nutrition is. So we build credibility by teaming up with experts. We act with integrity by being transparent and honest. And we stay committed to our purpose so we can set a new standard of premium. 
We're sustainably minded. We do everything we can to support conservation and bush preservation in New Zealand.

Name: FFE Fédération d'Equitation et d'Attelage, association de partenaires d'équidés
Description:
La FFE rassemble des amoureux du cheval et de l’âne. 
La FFE promotionne le tourisme équestre et soutien les disciplines «orphelines» comme la monte dans les fourches (amazone), la voltige (gymnastique à cheval), l’archerie équestre, les joutes, le cheval d’arme, l’Equidance, le Ride & run, etc. et c’est ainsi qu’en son sein se sont développés en Belgique l’endurance, le TREC…
La FFE représente auprès des autorités les usagers équestres : cavaliers, meneurs de véhicule hippomobile et personnes avec équidé à la main. Cela pour qu’ils gardent accès à la voie publique en général et aux chemins et sentiers en particulier et aient leur place dans le Code de la Route. 
Depuis 1972, la FFE s’attache à la formation des «hommes et femmes » de chevaux afin qu’avec leurs partenaires équins ils puissent évoluer en harmonie et sécurité. 
La FFE ne vise pas à sélectionner des sportifs d'élite, mais à améliorer la connaissance du cheval, de l’âne et des cultures équestres par le plus grand nombre.

Name: Los Perros Hermanos
Description:
Los Perros Hermanos es una empresa joven, dinámica, comprometida, defensora de los derechos de los animales y de la tenencia responsable de nuestras mascotas.

Salimos al mercado en el 2020, año donde transcurríamos los primeros meses de pandemia. 

Nos inquietaba la necesidad de lanzarnos con una nueva propuesta dentro del mundo de la alimentación para mascotas. 

Como amantes de los animales que somos, y habiendo convivido con ellos durante muchos años, detectamos que hay mucha desinformación respecto a la alimentación de nuestros hijos peludos. 

Decidimos entonces comenzar a indagar un poco más, entender los diferentes factores que involucran una correcta alimentación, y fundamentalmente brindarles a nuestros clientes mejores herramientas a la hora de decidir el alimento que mejor se adapte a las necesidades de cada animal. 

Fue así como nos posicionamos como un referente del rubro a la hora de ofrecer un asesoramiento profesional y dedicado a cada caso en particular.

Name: Matilha Feliz - Daycare e Hotel Pet
Description:
Bem vindos à Matilha Feliz - Daycare e Hotel Pet! 

Estamos localizados na cidade de Cajamar, próximo à Tenente Marques, a 10 minutos da Rodovia Anhanguera, com fácil acesso a Alphaville e Santana de Parnaíba.

A Matilha Feliz conta com de mais de 2.000 m² de área verde, proporcionando um ambiente saudável e estimulante para os cães. Nossas instalações incluem áreas cobertas, ao ar livre, áreas molhadas e brinquedos interativos, garantindo diversão e exercício.

Objetivo
Nosso principal objetivo é focar no bem-estar, socialização e saúde física e mental dos cães, garantindo um ambiente harmonioso e controlado onde possam expressar seus comportamentos naturais. Trabalhamos com dedicação e excelência em nosso atendimento.

Daycare (Creche)
O daycare  é solução perfeita para os cachorros que ficam sozinhos em casa ou precisam gastar sua energia de forma saudável! Oferecemos uma rotina equilibrada com atividades interativas e cognitivas, promovendo o bem-estar físico e mental dos cães.
O daycare na Matilha é de segunda a sexta, das 7h às 19h, com pacotes mensais flexíveis que variam de 1 a 5 dias por semana.


Hotel
Os cães hospedados desfrutam de toda a estrutura da creche durante o dia. À noite, são acolhidos em nossa casa, proporcionando um ambiente seguro e familiar. Este serviço é ideal para tutores em viagem ou ausentes por longos períodos.

Venha Conhecer a Matilha Feliz!

Na Matilha Feliz, trabalhamos com profissionalismo, oferecendo cuidados personalizados, carinho e atenção em um ambiente seguro e estimulante.

Agende uma visita e descubra como podemos transformar a rotina do seu cão em uma experiência positiva e enriquecedora.

#VemPraMatilha

In a world where uncertainty looms, our four-legged companions remain steadfast. At Karapet, we don’t just provide services; we weave bonds, mend hearts, and celebrate the indomitable spirit of pets.  

Why “Pet Service Innovation”? Because innovation is our heartbeat. It’s in the way we soothe anxious paws with telehealth consultations, the way we curate organic treats for wagging tails, and the way we reimagine pet boutiques as havens of joy. We’re not just adapting to change; we’re sculpting it.

Why “Uncertain Future”? Because every bark, every purr, whispers a tale of resilience. Our furry friends teach us that even amidst chaos, love thrives. Whether it’s a senior cat finding solace in acupuncture or a mischievous pup learning through virtual training, we’re there—steadfast, compassionate, and ready to embrace the unknown.

So, join us on this journey. Let’s paint a canvas of hope, one pawprint at a time. Because in the eyes of a pet, there’s no uncertainty—only unwavering trust.

Name: Ruhrpott Rabauken - Mobile Tierpflege
Description:
Hey! Ich bin Lynn, ausgebildete Tierpflegerin und seit Anfang 2025 selbstständig mit meinem Unternehmen Ruhrpott Rabauken. 
Ruhrpott Rabauken ist ein mobiler Tierpflegeservice im Ruhrgebiet mit Hauptsitz in Essen. Mein Ziel ist es Tierpflege neu zu denken, Standards zu erhöhen und Sichtbarkeit zu schaffen. Dabei vereine ich Fachwissen, Praxis und Herz. 

Meine Leistungen beinhalten:
• Hausbesuche - ob Urlaub, Geschäftsreise oder Krankheit. Ich fahre 1-2x/Tag zu dir nach Hause und versorge deine Tiere. Auch bei medizinischer Versorgung biete ich eine zuverlässige Unterstützung.
• Tagesbetreuung - ich versorge und beschäftige deine Tiere für 2-8h bei dir Zuhause, wenn du einen Tagesausflug o.Ä. geplant hast.
• Spaziergänge - ich hole deinen Hund von deiner Arbeit oder deinem Zuhause ab und gehe mit ihm spazieren. Dieser wird individuell auf Alter, Gesundheitszustand und äußere Umstände (z.B. Hitze) angepasst.
• Beratung rund um das Thema Haustier - welches Haustier passt zu dir? Wie sieht eine artgerechte Haltung von Heimtieren aus? 

Jede Leistung ist flexibel und wird individuell auf die Bedürfnisse der Tiere angepasst, um die bestmögliche Versorgung zu gewährleisten. 

Ich möchte ausdrücklich hervorheben, dass Hunde nach §3 und §10 des LHundG NRW willkommen sind. Genau so wie sämtliche andere Tiere, die etwas originell oder verhaltensauffällig sind. Als gelernte Tierpflegerin verfüge ich über ausreichend Erfahrung und biete eine zuverlässige und sichere Betreuung nach tierschutzrechtlichen Vorschriften.

Mehr Infos findest du auf meiner Website https://www.ruhrpott-rabauken.com

Description:
Lotus Petfood | Sağlıklı Patiler, Mutlu Yarınlar

Lotus Petfood olarak temel misyonumuz, evcil hayvanların sağlıklı ve mutlu bir yaşam sürmelerine katkı sağlamaktır. Kedi ve köpekler için özenle formüle ettiğimiz besleyici mamalarımızla, yalnızca onların değil, sahiplerinin de güvenini kazanmayı hedefliyoruz.

Vizyonumuz, kaliteli ürünlerimiz ve bilimsel yaklaşımla desteklenen üretim anlayışımızla sektörün öncü ve güvenilir markalarından biri haline gelmektir.

Değerlerimiz; kalite, şeffaflık, yenilikçilik ve sürdürülebilirlik ilkeleri üzerine inşa edilmiştir. Her bir ürünümüz, evcil dostlarımızın özgün ihtiyaçlarını göz önünde bulundurarak geliştirilir; Ar-Ge faaliyetlerimizle sürekli olarak beslenme çözümlerimizi ileriye taşırız.

Müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutmayı ilke edinen markamız, yalnızca ürün kalitesiyle değil, aynı zamanda topluma ve çevreye olan sorumluluğuyla da hareket etmektedir.

Lotus Petfood olarak her adımımızda, evcil hayvanlar ve onların sahipleri için en iyisini sunma tutkusuyla ilerliyoruz. Çünkü biliyoruz ki; sevgiyle beslenen her can, daha sağlıklı bir geleceğe açılan kapıdır.

Name: Chonky Paws
Description:
Chonky Paws began with a simple thought: our pets deserve the same care and comfort we’d want for ourselves.

Every day, we see dogs rushing through their meals - gulping down food, struggling with digestion, and sometimes even facing painful bloating. What should feel nourishing often turns stressful. As pet parents, that broke our hearts.

So we decided to change it.

This December, we’re introducing our very first product - a slow feeder dog bowl designed not just to slow eating, but to bring peace back to mealtime. It’s built with love and science: ridges that guide calmer bites, a design that supports better digestion, and a shape that turns every meal into an enriching experience.

Because food should never be just fuel, it should be a moment of care, connection, and comfort.

 Designed to prevent bloating, choking, and discomfort
 Encourages mindful, slower eating
 Doubles as enrichment for mental stimulation

At Chonky Paws, we believe health and happiness are intertwined. Every product we make is our promise to put pets’ wellbeing first.

 Launching December 2025.
If you share our vision, whether as a pet parent, partner, or collaborator we’d love to hear from you.

 Reach us anytime at contact@chonkypaws.com

Name: Crunchy Pup
Description:
Hey there,

I’m Andrew Hutcheson, but most people call me Hutch. I wanted to share a little bit about something I’ve been building lately—it's called Crunchy Pup.

My life partner, Wendy, and I started making homemade meals for our dogs a while back, and we quickly realized how much care (and research) goes into trying to get it right. 

We have a growing list of tools for making homemade dog food that don't exist yet, so we are building Crunchy Pup to solve those pain points. 

Right now, we’re in the early stages of developing our first product. It’s a daily supplement to help balance homemade meals. Think of it like a dog’s daily vitamin that's tasty (think bacon or cheese flavored), so it's  great for putting on top of your pup's food if they're a picky eater.

The product doesn’t have a name yet. And honestly, it’s still evolving. We’re talking to other dog parents, listening closely, learning what’s hard, what’s missing, and what would make life easier.  The goal is to build something real and useful.

Because at the end of the day, this isn’t just about launching a product. It’s about helping dog parents feel peaceful, supported and confident in the  care we provide for our dogs.

If you’ve ever stood over your dog’s bowl wondering if you’re getting it right, or if you’ve ever wished someone else cared as much as you do, you are our people. 
I’d love for you to be part of it. 

Join our early access list at mycrunchypup.com to follow the behind the scenes stories, receive discounts and provide input to shape our upcoming products! 

Talk soon,
Hutch

Name: DearDogClub
Description:
Chi Siamo?
Siamo un'azienda dedicata al benessere e alla felicità dei vostri animali domestici, attiva nelle splendide zone di Como, Varese e Ticino. La nostra missione è offrire servizi personalizzati e di alta qualità per soddisfare tutte le esigenze dei vostri amici a quattro zampe.

I Nostri Servizi
Con un'ampia gamma di servizi, ci impegniamo a garantire che ogni esperienza sia piacevole, sicura e divertente per i vostri animali:
- Dog Walking: Passeggiate individuali o di gruppo, con attenzione personalizzata per assicurare che ogni cane riceva l'esercizio e la stimolazione di cui ha bisogno.
- House Sitting: Assistenza e cura dei vostri animali direttamente a casa vostra, per farli sentire al sicuro e a proprio agio anche in vostra assenza.
- Passeggiate Educative: Sessioni di socializzazione e apprendimento condotte da educatori esperti, ideali per migliorare il comportamento e le abilità sociali dei vostri animali.
- Retreat in Maremma: 3 giorni di passeggiate, natura e piatti tipici, da goderti con il tuo migliore amico a quattro zampe

Perché Sceglierci
DearDog vuole essere il tuo appoggio quotidiano su cui puoi  contare.  Siamo orgogliosi di offrire un servizio affidabile e amorevole, trattando ogni animale come se fosse il nostro. La sicurezza, il benessere e la felicità dei vostri animali sono le nostre priorità.

Name: Fleuretchevaux
Description:
Vous êtes propriétaire d'un cheval ou d'un poney, Fleuretchevaux, à Autry le Châtel dans le Loiret (45), vous propose une pension pour votre ami. Chez nous, vos « séniors » trouvent repos et sérénité dans un cadre familial et convivial.

Etant habituée à l’exigence apportée aux soins des chevaux de spectacle et de sport, je souhaitais poursuivre dans cette optique à leur retraite. J’attache donc une importance particulière à leur état physique, physiologique tout en leur faisant découvrir les joies de la vie en extérieure, au pré sur de grands espaces et surtout au contact direct d’autres chevaux.
Les chevaux sont au pré en fonction de leurs affinités et sur des parcelles qui leur conviennent le plus possible : des prés plats, parfaitement adaptés au retraités ou chevaux souffrant de troubles tendineux. 
Le vieillissement est un phénomène naturel, il ne s’agit donc pas de mettre son vieux cheval au pré et de le laisser vivre sa vie ; il est nécessaire de leur apporter des soins adaptés et personnalisés ; une surveillance et une attention de tous les instants et une bonne connaissance des affections fréquentes du vieux cheval.

Fundada há 13 anos, trabalhamos orientados por muitos estudos científicos e experiências internacionais no mercado PET. A SNAKEDOG vem para trazer um novo conceito de se interagir com a natureza e seu animal de estimação, em especial seu cão.

Trabalhamos com estímulos naturais dos cães e oferecemos diversas atividades baseadas em enriquecimento cognitivo para que possam se divertir, aprender e relaxar na medida certa, estruturando um novo conceito de interação e cuidado de cães, em um ambiente totalmente pensado no seu comportamento, priorizando o bem-estar e qualidade de vida dos nossos melhores amigos, com serviços personalizados de alta qualidade, credibilidade e confiança.

Name: Little Beaks
Description:
About Little Beaks

Little Beaks is a registered non-profit sanctuary and advocacy organisation based in Perth, Australia. We provide lifelong care for small pet birds — including those with special needs — who have been abandoned, surrendered, or deemed “unsellable.”

Founded to challenge the hidden suffering in the pet bird trade, we offer more than rescue. At Little Beaks, we create space for healing, flock connection, and freedom from commercial expectations.

We do not rehome or adopt out. Every bird here is safe for life.

Alongside sanctuary care, we work to raise public awareness about ethical bird ownership, campaign for better legislative protections, and share educational content with a fast-growing online community of 180,000+ people.

Focus areas:
	•	Lifelong sanctuary care for companion birds
	•	Public education on welfare and behavioral needs
	•	Advocacy against unethical breeding and pet trade practices
	•	Policy reform for improved protections across Australia

 www.littlebeaks.org
 Based in Perth, operating nationally
 Open to collaboration, media coverage, and expert partnerships

At Cuddle Crew, we prioritize your pet's safety and well-being above all else. Our team consists of highly verified petsitters who have been meticulously screened and trained to provide the highest level of care.

Established in 2017, Squishface is a line of naturally based dog skin care that delivers results. Assuming a product already existed to help, she quickly learned that wasn’t the case. After extensive googling, Pinterest exploring and trying multiple DIY suggestions, nothing worked. As word has gotten out about the improvement Squishface Wrinkle Paste gives, other products were created to help improve dog skin care. Made in the USA, with natural ingredients, by helping dogs we create happy humans. Mavis joined the Squishface team in 2019 & Minnie joined in 2023.

Name: Fast ESA Letter
Description:
Fast ESA Letter is your compassionate bridge to a life filled with unconditional support and understanding, offering a seamless and efficient service for obtaining Emotional Support Animal (ESA) Letters. In a world where mental health is paramount, we understand the irreplaceable comfort and companionship an ESA can provide. Our mission is to facilitate a straightforward, hassle-free process, connecting clients with licensed mental health professionals who recognize the profound impact an ESA can have on an individual's wellbeing.

Our services are designed with your convenience and confidentiality in mind. From the comfort of your home, you can access our online platform, where a few simple steps lead you to the support you need. Whether you're facing anxiety, depression, or any other mental health challenge, our team is dedicated to ensuring you receive the validation and the ESA Letter necessary for your companion to stay by your side, making every space more accessible and every moment more bearable.

Fast ESA Letter stands out for its commitment to authenticity, compassion, and speed. Understanding the urgency that often accompanies the need for an ESA, we strive to expedite the approval process, ensuring that our clients can swiftly move forward with their lives, backed by the support of their emotional support animals. Our service extends beyond mere documentation; it's about building a community of understanding, respect, and unwavering support for those who need it most.

Join the countless individuals who have found solace and support through Fast ESA Letter. Embrace the opportunity to navigate life's challenges with your beloved pet by your side, legally recognized as your essential emotional support animal. With Fast ESA Letter, embark on a journey towards a more supportive, understanding, and compassionate tomorrow.

YOUDOG.IT è un progetto innovativo che prende vita da una storia vera, quella tra Paola Nicolai, ideatrice del progetto e fondatrice dell’agenzia NIC PR, e il suo cane Ugo, un Piccolo Levriero Italiano che l’ha accompagnata nel percorso di riabilitazione dopo un ictus, restituendole gioia, fiducia e senso.

Direttore Paola Nicolai

Each month, a new local community shelter is chosen for our Round-up for a Cause campaign. Our customers can round up their change at checkout and 100% of their donation goes to that shelter. When you shop local, you give local.

Fish is one of the richest natural sources of Omega-3, which is good for the coat, skin and joints of dogs. Fish is also a good source of protein that is easy to digest, compared to some types of meat. In addition, fish and other seafood are low in saturated fat and empty calories.

Vitbit is based on quality fish approved for human consumption, where we use the whole fish to ensure sustainable utilization of our resources. Name: Dog's Heaven GmbH
Description:
Heavenly Fresh Menus for Dogs
Dog's Heaven Fresh Menus are the first and only fresh meals for dogs that are cooked very briefly and gently using the sous-vide method in a water bath, and thanks to modern HPP technology, they can be stored in the refrigerator for 5 months. 

Until now, fresh products for dogs could only be stored in the refrigerator for a few days or had to be kept frozen. With the innovative HPP cold pressure process, it is now possible for the first time to store natural fresh menus for dogs in the refrigerator for several weeks and months without the development of germs and the meat spoiling. This is made possible by the unique, very gentle HPP technology (cold pressure process), which uses pressure at 5 degrees Celsius to burst all harmful germs and bacteria in just 5 minutes while almost all vitamins, minerals, and trace elements are preserved, as they are not pressure-sensitive. All Dog's Heaven Fresh Menus are produced in a food-grade facility near Munich using exclusively food-grade ingredients. Due to the approximately 70% shorter cooking time and nearly 30% lower temperature during sous-vide cooking, a very high degree of freshness and naturalness is achieved compared to canned food, resulting in a higher preservation of naturally occurring vitamins, minerals, and trace elements. This allows us to completely avoid synthetic vitamin additives in our Clean-Recipe menus (*except for Hypo and vegan menus). You can immediately smell this quality and the uniquely long-lasting freshness in the pet food industry when you first open a Dog's Heaven Fresh Menu.

Name: Buzz and Bark Animal Reiki
Description:
My story began with a sad overweight senior dog who I nicknamed Chewy. I had nowhere to live so I stayed with my parents and during that time I fostered a German short haired pointer who led me to become an energy healer and animal communicator for all species.

When I was dealing with troublesome behaviors from Chewy, I wished that I had an animal communicator to consult. When I had trouble bonding more deeply with Chewy, I wished that I had a Reiki practitioner to help both me and Chewy become more mindful. And having a communicator who was also a mindfulness coach would have helped during the frustration of getting an obese dog to lose fifty pounds and to heal from anxiety.

Since becoming certified as a Reiki Master and animal communicator, I have worked with animals with unusual behavioral issues such as a cat who bit her human's feet at night. I've helped animals to cross the Rainbow Bridge. I have helped dogs with separation anxiety become calmer. I have worked with domestic, wild, and shelter animals. And my mission has always been the same--to help humans bond more deeply with animals.

When animals feel calm and grounded--which they obtain from both Reiki and the validation of being heard through animal communication, they bond more readily with their human guardians. They experience less behavioral issues since they don't act out when they feel validated. Humans receive the benefits too of a happy and content animal companion who can go the distance with them.

Sign up for a session with me so you can bond more deeply with your pet.

Name: FEDERATION FRANCAISE DES SPORTS DU CHAMEAU
Description:
Présentation de la Fédération Française des Chameaux sur LinkedIn

Bienvenue sur la page officielle de la Fédération Française des Chameaux (FFC) sur LinkedIn, votre source d'informations privilégiée sur le monde passionnant des grands camélidés en France.

Notre Mission:
La FFC a pour mission de développer le secteur amateur et professionnel des grands camélidés en France, en mettant en avant la relation humaine et animale, ainsi que les activités et métiers liés à l'environnement du chameau.

Notre Expertise:
En 2023, la FFC propose des solutions uniques pour les passionnés et professionnels des camélidés, y compris une assurance exclusive, SIMPLI CAMELIDES FFC, offrant une couverture en Responsabilité Civile Professionnelle pour diverses activités telles que la fabrication et distribution de cosmétiques à base de lait de chamelle, le filage, la laine et la conception artisanale.

Découvrez nos garanties individuelles accidents sur [notre site](https://www.ffcamels.com/assurance-federation).

Pourquoi nous rejoindre:
1. Promotion du secteur du chameau: Si vous avez du talent, un esprit créatif, et une passion pour les camélidés, rejoignez notre équipe sympathique et dynamique. Ensemble, mettons en valeur la relation humaine et animale, ainsi que les activités liées à l'environnement du chameau.

2. Accompagnement dans la découverte du chameau: La FFC s'engage à créer une synergie et à valoriser la relation cavalier/monture. Nous vous accompagnons à chaque étape de la découverte du chameau, offrant des formations sur l'approche et le lien avec le chameau, les techniques d'harnachement, les soins et l'alimentation, ainsi que la gestion comportementale du couple cavalier/chameau.

Actions de Défense du Bien-Être Animal:
La FFC s'engage activement dans des actions de défense du bien-être animal. Rejoignez nous sur [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/ffchameaux) pour partager vos communications d'actions

Le shiatsu est une technique de massage d'origine japonaise  qui vise à rétablir l'équilibre énergétique dans le corps en stimulant les points spécifiques le long des méridiens d'énergie.

Les praticiens de shiatsu équin utilisent leurs mains, leurs doigts et leurs paumes pour appliquer une pression douce mais précise sur les points clés du corps du cheval. Cette pression aide à relâcher les tensions, à stimuler la circulation sanguine et à favoriser un équilibre général dans le corps.
C'est une approche holistique qui prend en compte à la fois le physique et le mental du cheval.

Convenience:
We bring our services directly to your doorstep, eliminating the stress of pet care and allowing your pets to stay in their familiar surroundings.

Quality Care:
Our team of dedicated professionals is committed to providing top-notch care, ensuring your pets thrive both physically and emotionally.

Personalized Attention:
Every pet is unique, and so is our approach. We tailor our services to meet the individual needs and preferences of each pet.

Safety First:
Your pet's safety is our priority. We implement stringent safety protocols to ensure their well-being during every service.

Transparent Communication:

Petwork is more than a service; we're a partner.

Prestations :

Visites à Domicile et Cat Sitting :
Visites à Domicile : Garde à domicile pour tous types d'animaux (chiens, oiseaux, petits mammifères, reptiles) en l'absence de leurs maîtres.
Cat Sitting : Soins spécifiques pour chats à domicile (alimentation, litière, jeux et câlins).

Zoothérapie : Thérapie assistée par les animaux pour améliorer la santé mentale et émotionnelle.
Médiation par l'Animal : Activités thérapeutiques pour améliorer les interactions sociales.

Comportementaliste Félin :
Consultations : Évaluation et résolution des comportements problématiques.
Plan Personnalisé : Stratégies sur mesure pour le bien-être de votre chat.

Créatrice de Contenu Animalier : Graphisme et contenu éducatif pour promouvoir le bien-être animal.

Goodies Personnalisés :
Accessoires sur mesure : Colliers, laisses, vêtements personnalisés.
Produits dérivés : Jouets, bols, et accessoires avec le nom ou l'image de votre animal.

Ateliers de Sensibilisation :
Ateliers Éducatifs : Sessions sur l'importance de l'environnement et des pratiques durables.
Activités Pratiques : Projets interactifs pour sensibiliser à la protection de l'environnement et au respect des animaux.

Philosophie :
Chez Coussinets "Aurélie et Compagnie", nous croyons que le bien-être des animaux et de leurs maîtres est indissociable. En offrant des prestations de qualité dans un cadre bienveillant, nous renforçons les liens entre vous et vos compagnons

Name: Champ's Pet Kitchen
Description:
Dogs deserve treats that taste amazing and help them live their happiest, healthiest lives—without costing a fortune. That’s why we created Champ’s: a fresh, fun new name in the dog treat aisle, delivering big flavor, real nutrition, and unbeatable value in every bite.

Proudly made in the USA, Champ’s treats are packed with premium ingredients and tail-wagging taste. Every recipe features at least 25% real protein, approximately 2% fat, and key nutrients to support essential health needs like strong muscles, healthy joints, and a shiny coat—so you can find the right treat for your pup. No corn, wheat, or soy—just wholesome, soft-chew treats that break apart easily for dogs of all sizes.

We believe pet parents should know exactly what they’re feeding their dogs. That’s why Champ’s is one of the first pet brands to introduce a human-style Pet Nutrition Fact panel—giving you a clear, honest look at ingredients, health benefits, and portion sizes.

But we’re more than just great treats—we’re here to make pet nutrition simple, fun, and accessible for all. As the voice of our brand, Champ (our spokesdog), helps pet parents make smarter choices about the treats they serve the dogs they love.

Weekly, bi-weekly or just one time- it's up to you!

Name: JAKÜ-PET
Description:
JAKÜ-PET, the pet care assistant that empowers Jaküs to care for their pets as family.

We anticipate your pet's next needs, coordinate across vets, groomers, walkers, boarding, and more, and execute with a single tap so care happens on time.

Today, pets are considered family, and expectations are higher; yet, the pet care ecosystem remains reactive, fragmented, and inefficient. Jaküs juggle calendars, apps and calls just to keep up.

JAKÜ-PET addresses this by integrating the ecosystem into a single AI-powered orchestration layer that connects Jaküs and providers without requiring anyone to adopt new software.

The result is healthier pets, more time and peace of mind for Jaküs, and steadier demand with smoother operations for trusted providers.

We are not just another platform. We redefine what it means to care for pets by equipping every Jakü with a system that works for them, encompassing prevention, everyday services, and urgent care.

Whether it’s household noise, thunderstorms, or loud events like fireworks, Pet Shell gives your furry friend a place to retreat and unwind..

Our Journey Forward

By supporting us, you’ll be part of an exciting journey to make the world a quieter, more comfortable place for pets. At Mission Cats In-Home Care, we specialize in providing top-tier, personalized care for your feline friends. Based in California, our mission is simple: to offer peace of mind to cat owners who travel for business or pleasure, knowing their beloved pets are in experienced and loving hands.

With over 15 years of experience, we are proud to serve the Bay Area with four convenient locations:
 6114 La Salle Ave., Oakland, CA 94611
 660 4th St., San Francisco, CA 94107
 1555 Botelho Dr., Walnut Creek, CA 94596
 555 Bryant St., Palo Alto, CA 94301

At Mission Cats, we understand that every cat is unique, and we tailor our services to meet their specific needs—whether it's extra playtime, administering medication, or simply ensuring they get all the cuddles they deserve. Our professional team goes the extra mile to create a stress-free environment for your pets while maintaining the highest standards of care.

Our commitment extends beyond pet sitting. We aim to build lasting relationships with our clients and their furry companions. We’re here to make life easier for you while ensuring your cats feel safe, loved, and cared for in your absence.

We are always looking to connect with pet lovers and fellow cat enthusiasts.  If you're in the Bay Area and need reliable, compassionate care for your cats, or if you're interested in learning more about our services, we’d love to hear from you!

 Let’s keep your cats purring happily while you're away!
 Contact us or visit our website to learn more about how Mission Cats can serve you and your feline family.

#MissionCats #CatSitting #BayAreaPets #PetCare #CatLovers #MissionCatsCare

Name: Rawme
Description:
Hayatta değer verdiğimiz şeylere karşı sevgimizi göstermenin en güçlü yolu, onlara nasıl baktığımızdır. Bizim de sevgisini koşulsuz olarak veren bu canlılara karşı en büyük sorumluluğumuz, bir anne ve babanın özverisiyle sağlık ve beslenme ihtiyaçlarını en doğru şekilde karşılamaktır. Bilimin rehberliğinde ve bu sektörde kazanılan yılların tecrübesini bir araya getirerek, onların damaklarına en uygun mamayı 'Doğallık', 'Kalite' ve 'Şeffaflık' prensipleriyle sizinle paylaşıyoruz. Çünkü evcil dostlarımızın ne yediklerinin içeriğini bilmek, bizim onlara olan sorumluluğumuzdur.

Bu nedenle, beslenme kalitesini en üst düzeye çıkarmak için veteriner hekimlerin rehberliğinde, freeze-dry teknolojisini kullanarak doğal ham maddelerin besin değerini koruyoruz. Aynı zamanda, ürünlerimizi geliştirirken bilimsellik ve doğallığı bir arada tutarak, hiçbir katkı maddesi bulundurmadan tazeliğini koruyor ve onlara en önemli şeyi; doğal yaşam kaynaklarını sunuyoruz.

Name: Land & Sea Pets Inc.
Description:
Land & Sea’s mission is to exclusively use cod by-products from Newfoundland & Labrador to create premium pet consumables such as treats, supplements, raw food and canned food.

Land & Sea Pets Inc. flagship product, Land & Sea Cod Skins are a sustainable and all-natural pet treat made from a single ingredient: North Atlantic cod waste. Sourced, processed and packaged by hand on the east coast of Newfoundland & Labrador. 

Cod skins, which are generally discarded in the filleting process, can be vital in providing pets with protein, Omega - 3 fatty acids, and collagen, for a healthy skin, coat, joints and teeth.  Upcycling the cod waste produces a pet treat that is both socially and environmentally responsible.

Name: Fetch! Pet Care of West Trenton and Yardley
Description:
Cora Baker and Sue Reeg have been pet parents for 30+ years. We know that the search for caring and dependable pet care can be challenging. We discovered Fetch! in 2014 and began pet sitting and walking dogs. After adopting Sadie, our Jack Russell/Greyhound mix, in 2017, we also became Fetch! customers. When the previous owners announced their retirement, we jumped at the chance to continue the outstanding service they began.

Our services include boarding and day care in our home in Ewing, dog walking, and in-your-home care for dogs, cats and other small pets. We are both pet first aid and CPR certified and have undergone extensive training by Fetch! Our goal is to provide loving, safe, and reliable care for your pet.

We schedule a free 1/2 hour meet & greet with you and your pet in our home or yours, depending on where your pet will stay. We interview you to get all the details pertinent to your pet's care. We also take time to answer all your questions regarding the service. And we make sure we interact with your pet! Once the meet & greet is complete, we will suggest next steps to customize your service to fit your and your pet's needs.

Please contact us at (609) 643-0843 or (215) 337-4193 to discuss your needs.  We look forward to meeting you and your pet soon!

Because at Mylo, we're not just feeding pets, we're building longevity from the inside out.

Name: Nevis Animal Speak
Description:
Nevis Animal Speak is committed to keeping pets happy and healthy through best practices in small animal care and the continuing education of the people who care for them.

Located on the resource constrained island of Nevis, St. Kitts and Nevis, we are the ONLY dedicated small animal clinic in the country.

All of our medical is at or below-cost to all who use our services. This is achieved through a host of dedicated volunteers vets and vet nurses, and charitable partners.

Nevis Animal Speak’s Nevis Nice Foster Project shelter program also enables us to medically treat, foster and re-home dogs and cats each year both locally and internationally.

Education is at the core of everything we do and Nevis Animal Speak
And we are honored to be an Externship site for future vets and frequently requested location by volunteer veterinary students.  Additionally, our Love, Kindness, Respect programs are tailored for the needs of the general population with a focus on ages K-12. Our specialty adult classes range from general small animal care to behavior, socialization and training.

Mission:
NO DOG OR CAT, HOMED OR STRAY, GO WITHOUT NECESSARY MEDICAL CARE

Name: NUTRALGAPE SLU
Description:
Nutralgape is an independent company dedicated to the nutrition of cats and dogs, actively collaborating in the improvement of feline and canine food formulas and orchestrating their distribution among individuals, companies, and animal care entities such as shelters, sanctuaries, or feline colonies, as well as professional veterinary organizations. Nutralgape is thus committed to the welfare of cats, dogs, and the people who dedicate their lives and efforts to them. To this end, it offers its own high-end animal feed brands: DIALPET Classic, DIALPET Excellence, and DIALPET Professional (https://www.dialpetexcellence.com/). The best experts (veterinarians, ethologists, nutritionists, etc.) provide specialized criteria to improve their products daily and to offer quality information about the needs of cats and dogs.

Nutralgape places the same emphasis on animal nutrition as it does on social commitment, through Nutralgape Social Work (https://nutralgape.com/obra-social/), dedicated to developing and sponsoring projects to assist entities involved in animal care (https://nutralgape.com/un-qr-x-tu-causa/), supporting women at risk of exclusion, who can improve their situation by starting a new life with a dog (https://nutralgape.com/blog/blog-el-plan-amma/), and promoting high-level cultural (https://www.catanddogtank.com/) and scientific publications (https://www.cuadernosdecienciaynutricion.es/) with significant impact.

Name: Snores and Toots
Description:
Snores & Toots is not your typical pet lifestyle brand. We exist to celebrate the messy, magical bond between people and their pets—especially the overlooked, the rescued, the chaotic, and the deeply loved.

Born from a personal journey with three unforgettable dogs, Snores & Toots creates durable, personality-packed pet gear that reflects real life with real pets. We don’t chase perfection. We honor quirks: the snorers, the tooters, the toy destroyers, the ones who changed everything.

At our core, we believe pets aren’t accessories—they’re family. And family comes with noise, laughter, and a few stains on the couch. Every product is designed with that truth in mind: high-quality, emotionally resonant, and built for the long haul.

We proudly support adoption-first values through our ongoing partnership with Boston Terrier Rescue South Africa. While Lily (our beloved Frenchie) is not a rescue, she reminds us that every pet deserves to be loved like one.

Leadership Team:
Xander Collen – Chief Visionary Officer
Lily – Chief Marketing Officer
Ayla – Chief Executive Officer
Ragnar – Chief Financial Officer

Headquartered between Cape Town, South Africa, Colorado & California, USA.

We’re building a global community of pet lovers who see the beauty in imperfection—and wouldn’t have it any other way.

Je m’appelle Kevin, je suis conseiller en éducation et comportement canins.

Passionné par la relation entre l’Humain et le chien depuis mon enfance, j’ai au fil des années, eu l’opportunité de me former auprès de plusieurs experts du milieu canin.
Je propose aujourd’hui mon savoir pour vous aider à communiquer de manière plus respectueuse avec votre chien, pour une cohabitation harmonieuse et une relation solide. 

Je crois qu'un autre chemin est possible où le chien et son humain sont capables de se comprendre à partir du moment où chacun a appris à décrypter le mode de communication de l'autre. Comme une langue étrangère, notre langage corporel est appris par notre compagnon et nous devons alors en retour apprendre le sien, à force d'attention et d'outils que je vous apporterai. 

Je suis également formateur pour Woufi.com pour accompagner les éducateurs et éducatrices canins de demain. Je propose une formation mettant en avant une approche coopérative où la relation entre l’Humain & le Chien n’est fondée ni sur des techniques de leurre, ni sur la théorie de hiérarchie et de dominance.

Fondateur de la société Woufï - Education, Formation & Comportement canin.
Méthode sans violence, récompenses avec la caresse et la voix uniquement.

Waarom Woef & Wandel?
- Omdat jij aan het werk bent of andere verplichtingen hebt.
- Ik wandel met kleine groepen (én 1-1) waardoor je hond persoonlijke aandacht krijgt.
- Je hond heeft plezier (met andere honden) en komt moe en voldaan weer thuis.
- Ik wandel ook met hondenweer.
- Jij ontvangt leuke updates over je hond en onze wandeling, bekijk de filmpjes op Insta onder het hoogtepunt 'Op pad met..'

Name: Bartow Rescue & Resources
Description:
At Bartow Rescue & Resources (Bogey's Buddies), we care for pets and their people right here in our community—offering kindness, hope, and support when it’s needed most.

We rescue animals from local Animal Control facilities that do not allow public adoptions and take in urgent owner surrenders to give every pet a second chance. Beyond rescue, we work to keep families together by providing financial assistance for veterinary care, pet food, and other essential needs.

Our outreach also extends to community organizations that support individuals facing domestic violence, homelessness, and substance abuse. Through funding, medical care, and temporary fostering, we ensure that pets remain safe and loved, even in life’s hardest moments.

Together, we’re building a compassionate network of neighbors dedicated to reducing the local pet crisis and keeping love where it belongs—at home.
Because we believe real change starts within our own community, and by lifting each other up, we make a lasting difference for both animals and the humans who cherish them.

Description:
Nimble Lifecycle was established as a cricket farm in a "grow shed" located in Bob and Laura Christopher's backyard in February 2023. From the beginning Bob and Laura focused on the goal of breeding and raising the highest quality Gryllodes sigillatus, more commonly known as the Tropical Banded Cricket, for human consumption.

Almost immediately, demand for Nimble Lifecycle Crickets came from local reptile sellers and owners for feeder crickets.  Learning about the huge need in the Twin Cities for a reliable source of locally available live feeders Nimble Lifecycle decided to focus in the feeder cricket market.

With the little backyard farm bursting at the seams, Nimble Lifecycle found a perfect location for their expanding farming needs to serve the Twin Cities market and on February 1st, 2024 Twin Cities Crickets was born at their new 3,000 sf farming space in Spring Lake Park!

We are Papercut Lab. In 2014, we introduced KATRIS with a vision to craft sustainable and stylish lifestyle cat furniture pieces.

We delved deep into paper materials to explore structural innovations and contemporary colors, redefining the bond between humans and cats. 

The modularity of our KATRIS Modular Cat Tree and KATRIS Nest break away the norm of pet furniture, enabling users to creatively shape their pet spaces, expressing individuality and uniqueness.

Driven by our commitment to creating a better world for pets and humans, we embraced sustainability. All KATRIS products are crafted from 100% FSC certified recycled paper and adhere to RoHS compliance standards. 

We believe that furniture embodies our emotions. Our mission is to enhance the quality of life and embrace a lifestyle where cats and humans coexist in harmony.


KATRIS 為美國矽谷 Papercut Lab 團隊於 2014 年所創立的品牌，以設計思考為本，打造永續與美學兼具的貓傢俱。

我們深入研究紙材，創新結構與現代色彩，為人貓之間的相互陪伴增添更多可能性。系列產品貓好居 (KATRIS Modular Cat Tree)、與貓好巢 (KATRIS Nest) ，不僅能透過組合變化隨心擺放，還能藉由顏色搭配展現獨特風格，打破寵物居家產品常規，為愛寵空間帶來全新品味。

我們相信傢俱是情感的載體，更是一種對寵物、地球和人的美好承諾：KATRIS 全系列產品使用經 FSC 認證的 100% 回收紙材，同時原料皆通過 RoHS 無毒認證，提升生活品質，享受舒適自在的人貓共生體驗。

Excellence & Recognition: Multiple show-winning dogs and internationally acknowledged breeding standards.

Quality over Quantity: Limited litters to ensure every puppy receives personal care and attention.

We are proud to be members of recognized international kennel clubs and associations, upholding the highest breeding and ethical standards.

Name: Tara Sitara Pet Services LLP
Description:
While the mainstreaming of Pet Care Services has ensured support and availability of resources to help a family raise a pet, we feel that the market still assumed that the needs of the pets are secondary to that of its human and the human family. The products and services are geared towards making life comfortable for the humans and making the pet fit in the human’s world. The space where the pet’s needs are specifically address still does not have enough players. The pet parents also are not fully aware of how to shift the focus to the dog needs too.

Tara Sitara Pet Services (hereafter, called TaraSitara) wants to address this for the dogs. 

One of the major aspects here is the dog’s need for an environment where they can be dogs – an environment that is built to meet their needs as per their natural behavior (ethology). We are doing this through our Dog Park and Boarding (Rocks and Pebbles Dog Park and Boarding). Our focus on understanding of dogs and dog-human relationship has helped us fine tune our offerings and processes. Our focus includes, but is not limited to parent education and awareness, safe spaces and environment for dogs and the right expertise for the care givers at these spaces.

Name: animalltag
Description:
Animalltag is revolutionizing the world of pet care with cutting-edge identification and health monitoring solutions designed to cater to the diverse needs of veterinary clinics. Our advanced microchips come in 3 sizes, ensuring a perfect fit for any pet, from medium and large dogs to small rodents, birds, fish, and reptiles. These unique microchips offer double protection with QR codes, providing immediate access to pet and owner information, along with GPS location tracking to swiftly reunite lost pets with their owners.

Our innovative T-Tag system simplifies health monitoring by providing real-time temperature and identification readings in a single scan. With the glowing, phosphorescent border on our tags, locating animals at night becomes a breeze, ensuring their safety in low-light conditions.

Animalltag's Microchip Certificate and Emergency Card provide essential documentation for international travel and pet theft situations, while our easy-to-use database guarantees seamless registration and up-to-date information storage. Our commitment to quality, research, and development is backed by a highly skilled team, modern machinery, and strict quality control, which has propelled our products to more than 30 countries.

By choosing Animalltag, your veterinary clinic will not only enhance the care and protection you offer your clients' beloved pets but also elevate your practice with state-of-the-art solutions. From hardware to software, we ensure seamless integration and versatility in our products, tailoring them to the needs of owners, veterinarians, shelters, and municipalities.

Embrace Animalltag's innovative solutions and join the growing network of veterinary professionals committed to fostering a safer, healthier environment for pets and their owners. Elevate your clinic's standard of care and become a trusted provider of advanced pet identification and health monitoring services.

Name: The Dog Wizard Ann Arbor, MI
Description:
Our training is not just about teaching behaviors (Sit, Come, Down). Instead, we believe in teaching your dog how to make better choices and how to listen to us instead of their impulses.

Of course we teach your dogs all of the basic obedience and commands you will need to communicate with them, but we also teach them how to be engaged and to follow through with these commands even in the most distracting of environments. What good is the “Come” command if it does not work when you need your dog to come because he is running after a squirrel into the path of a car!?

We believe in refining your dog’s comprehension of obedience so that it becomes a way of life for them, not just a few tricks they can show off when they are in the mood.

HOW WE GOT STARTED

The Dog Wizard is more than just a Dog Training Business; it’s an opportunity to create a stronger, more connected community—one where dog owners can come together, share experiences, and learn from one another. Through The Dog Wizard, we aim to foster a network of like-minded individuals who understand the unique joys and challenges of raising furry family members.

The Dog Wizard offers much more than just training programs. It’s a hub of knowledge, camaraderie, and support. Whether you’re a first-time dog owner or a seasoned pro, our passion for helping others shines through in every aspect of our work. We understand that training is not just about obedience—it’s about building a lifelong bond between you and your pup.

So, if you’re ready to embark on an adventure of canine discovery, join us and The Dog Wizard community. Let’s unleash the magic of technology, compassion, and dog training expertise together, and create a harmonious world where every dog and their human can thrive.

Name: Mountain Wild Pet
Description:
PURE, WILD-SOURCED PET NUTRITION:
At Mountain Wild, we specialize in crafting premium, all-natural dog treats from 100% wild roaming elk and deer of the Rockies—no farms, no fences. Our commitment to purity and quality ensures that every treat we produce is free of artificial preservatives, fillers, and grains, aligning with the instinctual dietary needs of dogs, who share over 99% of their DNA with wolves.

SUSTAINABLE EXCELLENCE:
We partner with wild game butchers to prevent post-butchery trimmings and bones from ending up in landfills, turning potential waste into premium pet nutrition. We saved 35 tons from just one butcher in one year.

POSITIVE ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACT:
Our process diverts rich, natural resources from landfills, reducing environmental pollution by preventing methane release. Decomposing biological matter is 10 times more harmful to the environment than typical landfill waste. 

COMMITTED TO CONSERVATION:
In addition to the full utilization of wildlife resources, we also donate a portion of our annual proceeds to support wildlife conservation and anti-poaching initiatives. 

OUR MISSION:
With every drool-worthy bite, Mountain Wild promises premium, all-natural, wild-sourced nutrition with a commitment to responsible stewardship and conservation of precious wildlife resources.

Name: Best friend hondenmassage
Description:
Een hond kan net als wij mensen last hebben van stress, angst en onrust. Ook de hond heeft last van de drukke maatschappij waarin we leven, waardoor er veel prikkels binnen kunnen komen. Ontspannen kan daardoor moeilijk zijn.
Wat doet massage dan bij de hond? Eigenlijk hetzelfde als bij de mens, tot rust komen en ontspannen. De stress en spanning die in het hoofd van de hond zit, wordt verminderd. De hond wordt weer bewust van zijn lichaam.
Naast ontspanning kan hondenmassage ook ingezet worden bij lichamelijk problemen en bij gedragsproblemen. Doordat er allerlei stoffen vrijkomen die een positief effect hebben op de gemoedstoestand, krijgt de hond ondersteuning om bijvoorbeeld stress of angst te verminderen.
Met massage ontspannen de spieren, het bindweefsel, de banden, pezen en gewrichten worden soepel gehouden. Massage kan ook helpen bij een hond met bijvoorbeeld artrose, ouderdomsklachten of blessures. Het kan pijn verlichten, littekenweefsel en zelfs verklevingen kunnen verminderen. Dus ook na een operatie kan massage ingezet worden voor een sneller en prettiger herstel.
Daarnaast zorgt massage ervoor dat alle lichaamssystemen in beweging worden gebracht, waardoor bijvoorbeeld afvalstoffen sneller worden afgevloeid.
Dit zijn enkele voordelen van massage bij de hond.
De massage vindt plaats bij jouw thuis, in de vertrouwde omgeving van je hond, hierdoor zal je hond zich makkelijker kunnen ontspannen. Er zal, voordat ik met de massage begin, eerst een intakegesprek plaatsvinden, om daarna een observatie en palpatie van je hond te doen. Tijdens de observatie en palpatie kan voor mij al het een en ander duidelijk worden, waar een “probleem” zit. Daarnaast zal ik starten met het bewust aanraken en van daaruit kijken wat je hond aan kan en toelaat.
Heb nu niet de illusie dat je hond dit in een keer toelaat, er heerlijk voor gaat liggen, en volledig gemasseerd kan worden, dit heeft meestal wel een aantal sessies nodig.

Name: Woofnosis
Description:
It’s a well known fact. Hoomans speak doggo. But no doggo speaks hooman. And therein lies the rub. 

Until our floofy friends can talk, we’ll have to find other ways of knowing what’s going on with them. Especially, god forbid, if there’s something wrong with them. 

Rather than rely on anecdotal accounts, wouldn’t it be great if there were at-home devices that can measure a dog’s vitals, without givin’ them a scare? Woofnosis’ ExamD diagnostic device will do just that. 

ExamD non-invasively measures cardiac condition and heart beat, respiratory rate, temperature and SPO2 parameters through an accurate, easy to use, handheld device. 

The data captured by ExamD and its accompanying app is relayed to a vet of your choice, who is on the platform, who can then begin to provide advice and resolution as soon as you fix an appointment online. 

We also offer in the absence of your fave vet, a first available vet on our platform for any emergencies..

With ExamD, the need for frequent hospital visits is minimised. Pet parents now can play an even more active part in their pet’s well-being. Vets on the other hand, now have access to reliable data that can lead to quick and accurate diagnosis. 

Woofnosis then enables a tippy-tap triple win, where the pet, the pet parent and the vet all come out ahead. Progress that we humbly think deserves a heckin’ round of a-paws!

Woofnosis—Discover the Wow in Bow!

Description:

Nosso trabalho iniciou com o conceito de hospedagem domiciliar, a intenção era oferecer um local confortável, seguro e divertido para que os dogs pudessem ficar. Fomos expandindo, e mais dogs vinham fazer parte da família Dog Care, crescemos, mas nossa essência segue sendo a intensa vontade de oferecer um ambiente agradável, seguro, divertido e afetivo para cada pet. 

Em 2021 mudamos para SP, buscando trazer a tranquilidade interiorana para o cotidiano corrido de SP. Viemos para que ao adentrar em nosso espaço, os dogs pudessem ter a experiência imersiva de “quintal de casa”, pensando na qualidade de vida animal. Nessa nossa história de quase 08 anos, já passaram por nós mais de 800 dogs, de todos os portes e personalidades possíveis. Nossa família segue aumentando, e cada um de vocês que passaram por nós, fazem parte dessa história. 

Hoje, somos não só hospedagem, mas também day care, banho, iniciando banho e tosa, e o autocuidado pet. Além de estarmos entre as 3 empresas de hospedagem para cães mais bem avaliadas de São Paulo.

Whether it’s a fresh new look, a wellness upgrade, or a treat-filled shopping spree — Waggly is your go-to destination for everything pets love.

Name: Wags Bakery
Description:
Wags Bakery draws its inspiration from our cherished companion, Buckeye, a beloved Golden Retriever who left an indelible mark on our hearts. In 2017, Buckeye battled Blastomycosis, yet his spirit remained the heartbeat of our family, cherished by all who crossed his path. A gentle and loving soul, he found joy in every moment spent with his loved ones—be it sailing on a boat, strolling through the park, splashing in the water, or simply lounging by our side.

Through Buckeye's illness, we came to understand the vital role of nutrition in our pets' lives. This journey inspired us to spread our passion for dogs and treat-making to the wider community. At Wags Bakery, we specialize in handcrafting nutritious and wholesome dog treats using only the finest, human-grade ingredients sourced from nature.

Nuestra misión es encontrar el hogar perfecto para cada uno de nuestros corgis, donde puedan vivir felices y seguros. Si estás interesado en adoptar un cachorro de corgi o simplemente quieres conocer más sobre esta increíble raza, no dudes en ponerte en contacto con nosotros.

Estaremos encantados de ayudarte a encontrar el compañero perfecto para tu familia.

Using our client app for scheduling, invoicing, and communication, you can manage your pet’s care with ease — knowing your dog’s routine will always be covered, even when life gets busy.

Whether you need recurring dog walks, drop-in pet sitting visits, or exclusive in-home care while you’re away, Happy Tails delivers professional service with a personal touch.

Discover your worth

Enjoy your job
Expand without fear
Using our GROOMER programme, delivered over our training portal and regular Zoom calls, we can help you develop your business toolkit and increase your confidence so you can develop an enjoyable, healthy and sustainable business that will adapt and grow with you.
Maybe you started out in dog grooming as a hobby but now you want something more? We can help you turn it into a well-paid and rewarding career.
So if you’re lacking in confidence, looking for a supportive mentor or coach and want to build your business into something better but just don’t know how, we can help.

Description:
Welcome to BREEDING BUSINESS, your ultimate source of information and education for all things related to pets! We are a pet-related blog that publishes articles, courses, and informational products about cats, dogs, and other companion animals. Our team of in-house vets fact-checks and verifies our content to ensure that our readers get accurate and reliable information.

Founded in 2014, breedingbusiness.com has been a go-to source of information for millions of pet parents across the world each year. Our aim is to provide high-quality content that pet parents can trust and rely on when it comes to taking care of their furry friends.

Our website covers a wide range of topics that pet parents love to read about, including pet gear reviews, health and nutrition, veterinary opinions, behavioral and training tips, and much more. We understand the importance of staying informed and up-to-date with the latest trends and developments in the pet industry, and we strive to keep our readers informed with everything that's happening in the world of pets, veterinary science, and animals in general.

At BREEDING BUSINESS, we believe that pets are not just animals, but they are a part of our families. That's why we are passionate about providing pet parents with trustworthy resources they need to give their pets the best care possible. We are committed to empowering pet parents to make informed decisions about their pet's health and well-being.

We appreciate your trust in us and look forward to being your go-to source of information and education for all things related to pets. Thank you for your support!

Name: PETFLIX
Description:
Bem-vindo ao PETFLIX - Onde Cuidado e Compromisso se Encontram! 

No PETFLIX, não estamos apenas comprometidos em oferecer os melhores serviços e produtos para os seus pets - estamos moldando o futuro do cuidado animal com uma abordagem única e consciente. Aqui, nossos valores fundamentais giram em torno da sustentabilidade, responsabilidade social e, acima de tudo, respeito aos nossos amigos peludos.

 Cuidado com Sustentabilidade:
Acreditamos que cada passo conta. Nossas práticas diárias refletem nosso compromisso com a sustentabilidade, desde escolhas conscientes de produtos até iniciativas para redução de resíduos. Ao optar pelo PETFLIX, você também está fazendo uma escolha pelo planeta.

 Responsabilidade Social:
Não somos apenas uma empresa, somos membros ativos da comunidade. Nossas ações têm o poder de causar impacto positivo. Colaboramos com organizações locais, apoiando causas que beneficiam não apenas pets, mas toda a comunidade. Juntos, podemos fazer a diferença.

 Respeito aos Pets:
Cada peludo é único e merece ser tratado com o máximo respeito. Em nosso estabelecimento, promovemos um ambiente que celebra a individualidade de cada animal. Desde a seleção cuidadosa de produtos até o atendimento personalizado, o bem-estar e a felicidade do seu pet são nossa prioridade.

 Retorno Social:
Acreditamos que o sucesso de uma empresa deve se refletir no bem-estar da comunidade que a cerca. Por isso, estamos constantemente buscando oportunidades para retribuir. Ao escolher PETFLIX, você está contribuindo para iniciativas que promovem o bem social.

Junte-se a nós nessa jornada onde o cuidado vai além das quatro patas. PETFLIX é mais do que um lugar para cuidar dos seus pets; é um compromisso com um futuro mais sustentável, socialmente responsável e repleto de amor pelos animais.

Name: PAWSWING
Description:
PawSwing began with a simple act of kindness that changed everything. In 2019, Andrew Tian—an national award-winning robotics engineer–rescued a little muddy kitten he named Orange. 

Like so many cat owners, Andrew soon faced a common problem: grooming wars. Orange, like 90% of cats, hated being brushed. This isn’t just about convenience—loose fur can lead to mats, hairballs, and even digestive issues.
That’s when Andrew put his robotics background to work. 

After years of research and testing, he and his team created the PawSwing Cat Self-Grooming House—a solution that helps prevent these health concerns while finally ending grooming problems.

Today, PawSwing continues to combine smart technology with real understanding of cats. We don’t just make products—we help strengthen the special connection between pets and their people.

Name: Red Dog Pet Resort and Spa
Description:
Red Dog is a family owned and operated full-service pet care company. While we are not a big corporation, we are focused on growth and opening new locations, where we can continue to provide the very best in pet care. The “Red Dog” brand began in 2007 with the opening of our flagship location in the Greater Cincinnati area.

The Schneider Family, created the brand with the goal of offering five-star service to all furry family members. This includes overnight accommodations, upgraded private suites with music, TVs, as well as villas offering outdoor patios, and larger “family” accommodations. Our doggie daycare program gives dogs a fun, friendly and safe environment to play every day. Pet guests enjoy separate play areas, with activities directed by our Pet Care Specialists. Dogs are selected to daycare groups based on their size, temperament and play style to ensure the best experience for all our pet guests. We also offer options for dogs who do not enjoy socializing for other pups. Our Day Stay program is an alternative option for pet guests that are not a good match for Daycare, specifically for dogs over six months of age that are not neutered or spayed or for those that do not pass the Daycare Evaluation. Name: Queen of Cats Ltd
Description:
Queen of Cats is dedicated to breeding healthy, loving and friendly British Shorthair and Ragdoll kittens. 

Breeder Jessica has always loved cats and was introduced to the British Shorthair breed as a young girl and instantly fell in love with them. She was given her pet boy Milo three years ago and he hasn’t left her side since. Drawn to their mellow nature, fierce loyalty, beauty and companionship, she adores the breed.

Jessica also loves and breeds Ragdolls. These calm and friendly cats with their soft fluffy coats and beautiful blue eyes are often referred to as cuddly teddy bears. They love company, are very trusting and make the perfect companion.

Our kittens are born and raised on our family farm in Norfolk. They are part of our family and raised with the upmost care in a friendly, loving environment and just adore being picked up. As it’s a working farm they are used to loud noises and are confident and curious little bundles of joy. They are fed a high quality nutritious diet, fully litter trained, socialised and play with a toys and scratch posts. 

All Queen of Cats kittens and their queens and kings are registered with the GCCF (The Governing Council of the Cat Fancy) so you can be assured of the quality of pedigree when buying a kitten from us.

Name: Omega Pet Food Co
Description:
We set up Omega Pet Food Company based on our years of nutritional expertise and ingredient knowledge, and a shared lifelong love of dogs.

Bri Omega Oils  provide dog & Horse owners with a range of highly functional health benefits.  Bri Flaxseed Oil provides Omega-3, a fatty acids which are essential for ongoing skin regeneration and reducing sensitivity to allergens that cause inflammation and itch. 
Health issues in animals can be caused by active and uncontrolled inflammation, resulting in the gradual destruction of cartilage, and joint connective tissue. The Omega -3 in Bri  supports a normal, healthy anti - inflammatory response resulting in healthy skin, coat, cartilage and ligaments. 



Sustainability is at the centre of our mission at Omega Pet.
We developed V-Pro plant-based supplemental treats to care for your pet, while simultaneously respecting the planet. Centred on rigorous research, testing and the best, proven food-science – our treats benefit from very specific ingredient combinations and the latest, meticulous manufacturing processes.

V-Pro is a healthy reward dog owners can really trust, free of any curious (and often useless) hidden ingredients. Based on palatability testing by a citizen-science Dog Squad, we’re delighted to report that all three delicious flavours of V-Pro left tails wagging and are clearly irresistible. They are the perfect moment to enrich the diet of any dog, and to affirm that magical, deep bond between owner and pet that we all cherish.

Name: Jaikla
Description:
At JAIKLA, we believe that our dogs can enjoy HEALTHY and TASTY food while SAVING THE PLANET at the same time!

After a lot of research into sustainable protein sources, we found that insect-based proteins have  great potential for their nutritional benefits and are highly sustainable to the environment.

———
We work closely with pet food nutritionists and entomologists to develop dog food that are great for dog’s nutritional needs and their taste bud, but at the same time, does not cost our Earth.

We choose insect protein as a key ingredient for our dog treat recipes because they have high protein, healthy fat, and a great source of vitamins and minerals suitable for dogs’ healthy diet.

———
We are very serious about what goes into our recipe. This is why we only choose the natural ingredients that you can pronounce and only those that are essential. We make sure there are NO salt added, coloring, flavouring, or artificial preservatives. Our pet food nutritionists make sure that each recipe is packed with essential nutrients and health benefits for your pups.

This is a golden opportunity for your dogs to enjoy healthy, tasty treat, and save our planet at the same time!

Join us and be a part of our journey!

Description:

As the consumer-facing brand of Petrust — a global OEM/ODM pet product manufacturer with over a decade of industry experience — Tikpaws blends advanced technology with functional style. Name: Tail Plus
Description:
At Tail Plus, we were aware about the importance of Collagen in Humans. However, on researching we realised that our furry friends also suffer from lack of collagen related problems. Traditionally, dogs are not meant to be walking in a human adapted environment of hard cement floorings. However, since they have become man’s best friend, they suffer from high impact on their joints and bones while walking and running around with us humans, which on a long term basis makes them more susceptible to Arthritis, Joint & hip problems. 

Being Animal lovers and seeing the gap in the market and desire to help animals, we at Tail Plus decided to come up with Collagen for Dogs. Consuming Collagen will help our furry friends strengthen their joints, improve their gut and coat health and helps prevent / reduce injuries.

Description:
Welcome to Dazy Dog, where we’ve mastered the blend of comfort, style and care for your cherished canine companion.

At Dazy Dog, our passion lies in ensuring your beloved pets experience the pinnacle of comfort, style, and attention. Our collection of beds stands out, featuring a luxurious blend of plush memory foam and robust orthopaedic support, guaranteeing unparalleled cosiness for your furry friends. With an array of trending fabrics and designs, including effortlessly fitted covers, we seamlessly merge practicality with style.

Name: Orma Planet
Description:
OrmaPlanet è l’ecosistema digitale innovativo pensato per semplificare la gestione del tempo e delle informazioni nel settore veterinario e della cura degli animali.
 Offriamo a veterinari, cliniche e professionisti del settore strumenti avanzati per gestire appuntamenti, accedere e aggiornare cartelle sanitarie digitali, e condividere in sicurezza i dati medici con i proprietari.
 La nostra piattaforma cloud-based favorisce collaborazione e trasparenza, permettendo ai professionisti di concentrarsi su ciò che conta davvero: la salute e il benessere degli animali.
 Con il rivoluzionario ORMATAG, un tag intelligente e indistruttibile abbinato alla nostra app, i proprietari possono proteggere i propri animali accedendo facilmente a dati identificativi, cartelle cliniche e promemoria – restando sempre connessi con il proprio veterinario di fiducia.
  Pensato per i professionisti.
  Amato dai proprietari.
  Impegnato per una cura degli animali più intelligente, sicura e consapevole.

Name: Petsin
Description:
Petsin is Pakistan’s first dedicated platform designed to connect pet owners with trusted, verified, and reliable pet services all in one place. From 24-hour veterinary hospitals and emergency care to grooming, boarding, training, rescues, and pet product stores, Petsin makes it simple and stress-free for pet owners to find exactly what they need. Our mission is to make pet care accessible, transparent, and convenient while helping Pakistan’s pet industry grow through digital visibility.

We are building a complete ecosystem where pet owners, veterinarians, groomers, trainers, shelters, and pet-service businesses can discover each other effortlessly. For pet owners, Petsin provides organized categories and verified listings to make informed decisions easier. For service providers, it offers a powerful platform to increase visibility, attract new clients, and build trust with their audience.

More than just a directory, Petsin is a community-driven initiative committed to improving animal welfare, promoting responsible pet ownership, and empowering Pakistan’s growing pet community. Whether you need emergency vet care, daily pet essentials, expert grooming, or adoption and rescue support, Petsin is here to connect you with the right services at the right time.

Name: Complexe le Colibri - Centre de soins pour animaux et salle événementielle
Belgian Shepherd Malinois Dog Farm
Description:
Our mission at the dog farm is to train and preserve the Malinois pedigree, which is the most trainable dog in the world. 

We are regisered with KUSA and CanineSA as breeders, and breed our puppies naturally in exlusive pairs. We take great care and precaution to match them to new owners. and often insist on home visits before rehoming. Our dogs are  raised in a pack environment and very well socialised, and sometimes trained. We also offer a pet-sitting service in the Pretoria area.

The Belgian Shepherd Malinois Dog Farm provides a Malinois breeding and homing service. 

Our pups are naturally bred from a pack of three exclusive pairs and raised in a pack environment and are well socialised. 

Our mission at the dog farm is to train and preserve the Malinois pedigree, and take great care and precaution in matching them to new owners. 
We rehome puppies when they are between 8 weeks and 8 months, and after that focus on training them for personal protection and safety. 

We have a special interest in community pet safety, and offer workshop and advisory services that focuses on bite avoidance and aimed at reducing the amount of people bitten by dogs in townships and the subsequent negative attitude towards canines.

Name: PawSaathi
Description:
PawSaathi is a trusted pet care brand based in Hyderabad, Telangana, offering professional Dog Walking and Dog Sitting services within a 3 km radius of Erragadda and nearby areas of Hyderabad. Founded and managed by a passionate pet parent, PawSaathi focuses on creating a safe, stress-free, and loving experience for dogs while their parents are away.

PawSaathi provides personalized in-home dog sitting and daily walking sessions tailored to each dog’s temperament, energy level, and routine. I bring over two decades of hands-on experience as a dog parent, currently caring for an Indian Spitz, and having raised five amazing dogs since childhood.

At PawSaathi, your pets are not just looked after—they’re loved like family. Every walk, every visit, is done with compassion, consistency, and a deep understanding of canine behavior. Whether you’re away for the day or need regular support, I ensure your furry companions are safe, stimulated, and emotionally cared for.

What makes PawSaathi unique is the heart behind it. I’ve been raised in a family of animal lovers. Beyond personal pets, I regularly feed stray dogs across Hyderabad and spread awareness during my motorcycle rides across India.

This isn’t just a service—it’s companionship rooted in empathy.

My goal is to build a reliable support system for Indian pet parents who need someone who genuinely cares. From offering regular walks to sitting sessions right at the pet’s home, I make sure every dog feels secure, seen, and happy.

If you’re in Hyderabad and searching for someone who treats your dog like their own—I’d be honoured to be your PawSaathi.

Currently available in Hyderabad, Telangana.

Name: Karma Dog LLC
Description:
Founded in 2005, Karma Dog Training is the largest 100% positive reinforcement dog training company in the US. Karma Dog’s training methods are endorsed by the AHA, HSUS, SPCA, ASPCA and The Veterinarian Community as the most gentle and effective behavior shaping techniques available. Karma Teachers have been available all across the United States helping Karma clients achieve their training goals and meet their dog's needs for over 20 years. 

Featured regularly on ABC, NBC and CBS news outlets as well as recently appearing on “The Doctors” television program, Karma Dog Training is currently rated by the Yelp directory as the highest-rated dog training company in the country and has been rated #1 for the past 5 years. The company has nearly 100 teachers throughout the United States helping people every day in most major metropolitan areas including: Los Angeles, San Diego, San Francisco, Houston, San Antonio, Dallas, Austin, Denver, New York, Nashville, Washington DC and Seattle. We offer communities an average of 50 classes a week conducted by the top science-based dog teachers in the country.

Additionally, Karma Dog Training has an active online community with over 3,500 Facebook followers on Karma Dog Training’s public page, as well as a private professional community network page with over 350 animal behaviorists.

Karma Dog Teachers have helped hundreds of thousands of families create lifelong loving bonds through Karma Dog’s multiple award-winning training programs including teaching clients online by offering virtual group classes and virtual private sessions with their innovative, virtual online ”Sky Sessions”. The same Karma Teachers who work with Hollywood's biggest movie stars, Washington DC's most venerable politicians and the Sports World's biggest athletes are available via Karma Dog Sky Sessions. The information and teachings are exactly the same as if you were working with us in person, however, Karma Dog Sky Sessions are 40% off the price.

Name: Well Groomed Pets Franchise
Description: Welcome to Well Groomed Pets (WGP). We employ AI and machine learning to customize every pet grooming treatment for optimal results that are specific to your pet breed and your pet’s wellness condition. Speaking of wellness, we stand alone as the industry’s most comprehensive wellness salon. Many groomers will offer a light physical wellness inspection which is a good start but we REALLY do wellness. We include physical, physiological and behavioral wellness exams. Name: Happy Hounds (Pty) Ltd by The Kaye Kids
Description:
At Happy Hounds, we're dedicated to ensuring the best for our beloved dogs. We believe in the transformative power of fresh, nutritious food and are committed to making it easy for pet owners to provide their dogs with the healthiest meals while minimizing their environmental paw-print.

Founded by Emma Kaye, a passionate advocate for animals and impactful entrepreneurship, Happy Hounds is more than just a pet food company. We produce lightly cooked, organic, certified dog food using sustainably-sourced ingredients. From our kitchen in Cape Town, we deliver this premium food directly to our customers and stockists across the Western Cape and Gauteng.

Our fresh dog food is making a significant difference. We’ve seen firsthand how feeding fresh can dramatically improve the health and happiness of dogs compared to the majority of ultraprocessed foods on the market. By minimizing our environmental impact, we ensure that every tub of dog food is made with care. We source certified organic vegetables from 22 micro-farmers and fish from 5 artisanal boats on the West Coast of South Africa, supporting 20 fishers and their families. We are proud to produce the only fresh dog food using Black Soldier Fly (BSF), a sustainable protein that is not only environmentally friendly but also beneficial for a dog's gut and cognitive health. Additionally, all our other proteins are pasture-raised and grass-fed, minimizing cruelty to animals in the process. Our entire production process is powered by solar energy, allowing us to proudly say that each tub of dog food is made with sunshine.

Our fresh dog food is making a difference—not just for our canine companions and their human families, but also for our supply chain, which supports small-scale, inclusive farmers and fishers. At Happy Hounds, we're changing lives, one bowl at a time.
