Name: Swell Hound Dog Training & Behaviour Consulting
Description:
I am a positive reinforcement trainer, and my personal philosophy is that training should be fun (like games!); should be bite sized (like treats!); and ultimately about engaging in 2-way communication (like walks!). This means that I use treats, toys, praise and games as a means of shaping canine behavior. 
 
At Swell Hound Dog Training, my goal is to help you cultivate your dog (that’s right- the one beside you, with all their wonderful quirks) into one who not only knows their manners, but who is also confident, and able to cope with whatever their environment throws their way. Similarly, I teach you how to be a reliable support system for your dog, and how you can become a better listener (because our dogs are always telling us stuff- but sometimes our hearing is selective...sound familiar?). 
 
At the end of the day, we get our dogs for companionship; but first, we must show them how to do this by becoming a companion for them.

Name: Trees for Pets
Description:
Trees for Pets sparks positivity and a sense of purpose amongst grieving pet parents, enabling pet memorial tree planting as a collective reforestation effort.

Trees for Pets enters the Australian market with a meaningful, yet simple and affordable solution to memorialise beloved pets - providing a new avenue for pet owners to cope with their loss.

After planting a memorial tree, grieving pet parents receive a personalised certificate and gain access to the virtual Trees for Pets forest, where each tree is personalised with the acknowledgement of the funding person, the honoured pet’s name and details about the tree’s species, planting location and the reforestation effort it supports. 

Reforestation Memorial trees, planted globally and locally in Australia, are a tribute to beloved pets who passed and a gift to future generations, benefiting from reforestation efforts to protect our planet. In partnership with global reforestation organisation Ecologi, the company simplifies pet memorial tree planting in memory of beloved pets while impacting as a community through reforestation at scale. The collective achievement is tracked in real-time to highlight the community’s growing reforestation impact over time.

Name: Rescue Partners
Description:
Rescue Partners is a unique online platform, aiming to change the rescue world by bringing it together in one place.

For our users, the site allows them to easily navigate all available animals across multiple shelters. Our handy filter options allows them to refine their search even further, and specify options such as location, breed, age, and whether they can live with children and other animals.

For the shelters we provide full access to the website, allowing them to have complete control over their listings, from adding a profile to hiding when reserved, and deleting when rehomed. All at the click of a button.
We also provide a 'copy and paste' html function which will allow them to embed their listings on their own site - any time they make a change of Rescue Partners their own website is instantly updating, saving the time of making changes on multiple platforms.

We use our social media page to promote all the shelters we work with, actively pushing those harder to rehome animals.

'Like' us, share our posts, and spread the word. Follow us as we work to find homes for those still searching.

Human Canine Collaborative provides coaching, consulting, and classes to cultivate embodied attunement and reciprocity between humans and dogs so they can mutually flourish.

Co-Regulation Coaching helps you establish a daily practice that supports you in cultivating embodied awareness, recognizing your dog’s internal state, and taking action to support you both in finding grounded connection.  

Collaborative Care Coaching supports you in cultivating a daily practice of consent that will allow you to experience ease, safety, and confidence while your dog becomes an active partner in their own care.

Consulting Services include:
 - Adoption Consulting is designed to help you learn about your options for living with dogs that support your health, including assistance dogs and emotional support dogs.

- Animal Assisted Intervention Consulting supports professionals or organizations who are in the process of developing or enhancing services that incorporate companion, therapy, facility, or assistance animals. 

- Professional Consulting is a collaborative service for pet industry professionals (ie. dog trainers, behavior consultants, veterinarians, etc) to identify barriers to forward progress, shift your perspective so you can see a clearer picture, and make a plan to overcome obstacles. 

Classes (coming summer 2022) will support you in developing skills to practice somatic consent in the context of human-canine interactions, cooperative care with dogs, and trauma-informed animal-assisted interventions.

Name: Tessa's Organic Dog Treats
Description:
Our story

In the beginning of 2020 Tessa was diagnosed with lymphoma. With no pet insurance and the devastating effects of a global pandemic unfolding before my eyes, everything looked bleak. Two months after her diagnosis I was laid off. I hustled for months to pay for treatments before returning to work. It was the most stressful time of my entire life. 

Because of the wonderful doctors that helped care for Tessa, we enjoyed another 18 months together. It was beautiful and I am beyond grateful for the extra time we had. Tessa was always a picky eater, so being a professional chef I cooked supplemental meals for her twice a month in big batches. The process took all day and she absolutely loved it! It was like being in a grandmother’s kitchen during summer break, sampling bits of goodness here and there. Oh, the begging! It was a joy for both of us. In a similar way I continue to cook for her. I choose the best ingredients and handle them with care and love just as I did for her and in the same way I do professionally. 

Tessa’s Organic Dog Treats was created to honor her memory with a pledge to help support canine cancer treatment research and development. Though she never got a chance to try these treats, I know she would have been obsessed and I know yours will love them too.  

Our treats are made with USDA-certified organic lean chicken breast cut to the perfect thickness for easy tear, dried to optimal pliancy to give your dog a toothsome chew. With just one ingredient you can feel confident in knowing exactly what you’re giving your dog.

Love,
Tess & Chef

Name: Water Bridge Aquamation
Description:
OUR MISSION 

At Water Bridge Aquamation, our mission is to provide pet owners with a compassionate and eco-friendly aftercare solution through the utilization of aquamation, a gentle and sustainable alternative to traditional flame-based cremation. With a commitment to reducing our ecological footprint and providing exceptional service to families during times of loss, we are here to help preserve the memory of your cherished pet while caring for our planet.

WHAT IS AQUAMATION?

Aquamation, also known as, bio cremation, or water cremation, represents a revolutionary approach to pet aftercare. Unlike traditional flame-based cremation, aquamation embraces the principles of natural decomposition, using a combination of gentle water flow, temperature, and alkalinity to mimic the Earth’s own processes. This method accelerates the natural disposition of organic matter that would naturally take months or even years, achieving the same result in hours by gently immersing your beloved pet in a solution of 95% warm water and 5% alkali.

WHY CHOOSE AQUAMATION?

By choosing aquamation, you’re not only honoring your beloved companions with a gentler approach, but you’re also making a conscious choice towards reducing your environmental impact.  The aquamation process is inherently eco-friendly, reducing carbon emissions by 75% and utilizing 90% less energy compared to traditional flame-based cremation methods.  

At Water Bridge Aquamation, we're passionate about redefining traditional aftercare methods, and through the utilization of aquamation, we aim to make a positive difference in our community and in the environment. Join us in this meaningful venture, where compassion meets sustainability, and together, let's create a lasting legacy for our cherished animal companions and for our world.

Description:
TravelReadyPets℠ is a patent-pending, all-in-one platform created to revolutionize the way pet owners, veterinarians, and transporters manage the complexities of pet travel. As pet travel continues to grow at a forecasted 3-5% annually, our solution is designed to meet the evolving needs of pet owners while saving valuable time for veterinarians and ensuring pets’ safety. 

Our platform offers a comprehensive suite of tools and resources, including: 

•	Health & Vaccination Tracking: Keeps track of vaccination records, medical history, and important health certificates, ensuring pets are always compliant with travel regulations. 

•	Travel Requirements Database: A constantly updated resource on global pet travel regulations, making it easy for users to find and comply with the necessary requirements for their destination. 

•	Automated Document Generation: Generate digital health certificates and other essential documents, removing the need for manual paperwork and ensuring compliance with international and domestic travel laws. 

•	Veterinary Appointment Scheduling: Seamlessly schedule appointments with licensed veterinarians, simplifying the process for both pet owners and clinics. 

•	Transporter Connections: For pet owners needing ground transport, we offer a network of trusted, independent gig transporters who assist in moving pets safely across the country. 

•	Customizable Checklists & Reminders: Provide step-by-step guidance, ensuring pet owners and veterinarians don’t miss crucial travel preparation steps. 

TravelReadyPets℠ is more than a tool—it’s a partner in making pet travel smoother, safer, and stress-free. By integrating AI and real-time updates, our platform simplifies decision-making for veterinarians and pet owners, while reducing time and costs associated with regulatory compliance.

We launched the business with a selection of 'Everyday' treats which have been a huge hit, but then naturally we were asked for other items, which led us onto the pawtiserrie range.

We are proud to say we are the UK's only manufacturer to offer natural, grain free and shelf stable birthday cakes, pupcakes, cannolis, brownies, unmeltable ice creams, cream tea scones, dog eclairs, doughnuts and more.

We develop our own recipes from scratch in house with the guidance of a nutritionist - including our no mess icing recipes which unlike many others contain no sugar or animal products.

We offer bespoke options to our stockists, as well as customisable products and can even design, and produce and manufacturer our own custom stamps and cookie cutters on site.

Our USP is that we can offer all the gimmick products without the worry, as all our treats are hypoallergenic, grain free and developed for dogs with sensitive tummies and intolerances - we use no preservatives, animal products, artificial colours, salt or sugar in any of our treats - EVER!

Name: Special Pet Care
Description:
Over 15 years of experience
First Aid & CPR APSE Member Verified Background Check Rover 101

I am happy to work with one client at a time, so please feel free to ask. However, most of my profile pictures are old as I am currently updating them. I offer discounts for senior citizens and neighbors, as well as those on a budget. I am comfortable caring for animals and plants, so please do not hesitate to ask. My areas of focus include training, grooming, and working on behavior. The most important thing for me is making both the animal and owner happy.

If you're interested in my pet sitting services, here are some things I like to learn ahead of time:

- Would you like to schedule a meet-and-greet before the stay?
- What's your preferred method of communication?
- Does your pet have any health issues that need to be tended to? For instance, dietary restrictions, medicine, or behavior triggers?
- Do you have a vet nearby that you trust?
- Is your pet spayed/neutered?
- Does your pet like to stick to a given schedule, like regular walks in the morning and evening?
- What does your pet do well around? What does your pet try to avoid?
- What's the best way to spoil your pet?
- Does your pet have aggressive tendencies?

I have a deep passion for taking care of animals, and being a pet sitter and caregiver is a great way for me to help make pets happy and balance out my work life. I know just how much love and happiness pets bring into our lives and getting to take care of them is a dream come true for me. It's my goal to bring a smile to as many pets' faces as I possibly can! I also love that I can give back to the community by providing owners with peace of mind while they're away. All in all, I love seeing animals happy!

TailsPath: Giving Pets a Voice Before It's Too Late

71% of pets suffer from chronic illness before anyone notices.
They can’t speak, so we built a way to listen.

TailsPath is a preventive care platform that uses AI to detect early signs of disease in pets before it becomes a crisis.

We provide:

Simple, AI-powered health reports
This company was born from a painful truth.
I’m Alex Moses. I’ve spent my life helping people transform.
But I couldn’t save my own dog.
I didn’t know he was hurting until it was too late.

That loss changed everything.
TailsPath isn’t just a business, it’s my way of making things right.

No hype.
No empty promises.
Just a commitment to truth, healing, and doing better—
for pets and for the people who love them.

TailsPath is for animals.
But really, it’s for all of us who want to get it right this time.

Name: Towarzystwo Przyjaciół Zwierząt ARKADIA Przytulisko w Głownie
Description:
Przytulisko dla Zwierząt w Głownie – miejsce, gdzie zaczyna się druga szansa 

 Założone w 1998 roku, Przytulisko w Głownie powstało z myślą o tych, którzy najbardziej potrzebują naszej pomocy – zwierzętach porzucanych, zagubionych i pozbawionych domu 
  Codziennie otwieramy drzwi i serca dla psów i kotów, które błąkały się po ulicach, znalazły się w dramatycznych warunkach, a czasem zostały oddane przez swoich "właścicieli" 

 W naszym schronisku przebywa średnio około 80 psów i 20 kotów. Dzięki zaangażowaniu wolontariuszy nie tylko zapewniamy im schronienie, ale także pomagamy im odzyskać zaufanie do ludzi. Wspólna praca i troska sprawiają, że nasi podopieczni stają się gotowi na nowy rozdział życia w kochających domach.

Nad Przytuliskiem czuwa Towarzystwo Przyjaciół Zwierząt „Arkadia” w Głownie we współpracy z miastem Głowno. Od 2015 roku posiadamy status Schroniska Miejskiego, co pozwala nam działać jeszcze skuteczniej na rzecz zwierząt w potrzebie.

Każda podarowana chwila, każde wsparcie, każde otwarte serce ma znaczenie. Razem tworzymy miejsce, które daje zwierzętom nadzieję na lepsze jutro.

Name: EssenzialMente Cane...e la libertà di esserlo!!!
Description:
Essenzialmente Cane…e la libertà di esserlo!!! è un progetto di educazione cinofila con sede a Sordevolo (Biella, Piemonte), nato dal desiderio profondo di vedere cani e persone felici insieme, liberi di esprimersi e capirsi davvero.

Mi chiamo Sofia Mercandino, sono educatrice cinofila e accompagno cani e umani nella costruzione di una relazione autentica, fondata su ascolto, fiducia e conoscenza reciproca.

Lavoro sul territorio con consulenze individuali e percorsi personalizzati, secondo un approccio cognitivo e zooantropologico, che riconosce il cane come individuo, con i suoi bisogni, emozioni e linguaggi.

Non faccio addestramento: il mio obiettivo non sono comportamenti perfetti, ma relazioni che funzionano davvero nella vita quotidiana. Offro strumenti concreti al binomio per comunicare meglio, vivere meglio, crescere insieme.

 Ogni binomio è unico. Ogni percorso è su misura.
 Camminiamo tra natura, silenzi, boschi… con un pizzico di Finlandia nel cuore.

Essenzialmente Cane è anche divulgazione, connessioni locali, e cultura del benessere animale attraverso collaborazioni, eventi e formazione continua.

 Operativa a domicilio su Biella e provincia
 Seguimi anche su Instagram e Facebook per scoprire un altro modo di vivere il cane:
 @sofia_educatore_cinofilo
 Sofia Mercandino Educatore Cinofilo

⸻

 #educazionecinofila #approcciocognitivo #relazioneuomocane #benessereanimale #zooantropologia #educatorecinofilo #biella #cani #essenzialmentecane #dogeducation #caniefelici

Name: Pati Kolektif
Description:
Neden Pati Kolektif ? 

Çünkü yaşayan her canlıya saygı duyuyoruz. 
Ülkemizde 30 temmuz tarihinde yürürlüğe giren yeni  Hayvan Hakları Yasası artan köpek popülasyonunu durdurmak için genel anlamı ile sahipsiz hayvanlar için toplama, barınak ve 3 hafta içinde  yuvalanmazsa aldığın yere bırak yerine, itlaf yönünde değişiklik yapmış yüzbinlerce sokak hayvanının ölüm kararı çıkmıştır. 

Misyonumuz, yıllardır canla başla popülasyonun kontrolsüz artışını durdurmak, terk edilenlere sahip çıkmak, yeni yuvalar bulmak hastaları tedavi ettirmek olan  birey veya dernek olarak kendini adamış kişilere destek olmak onlarla ekip olmaktır. Şu ekibimiz kayıtlı, aşılı, çipli yaklaşık 100 köpeğin olduğu köpeklerin özgürce dolaştığı bir yaşam alanında, 150 tanesi pansiyonlarda 40 tane tam engelli köpek için yapılan bir diğer  yaşam alanında yaşayan  yaklaşık 300 köpeğin olduğu projemize başladık.
Bu çocuklarımızın yaşam standartlarını yükseltip , alanları genişletip barınak veya sokaktan ölüme gitmeden daha fazla canın kurtulması için hiç bir şey karşılığı çırpınan kişi ve kişilerin daha çok  hayat kurtarabilmesine  destek ve vesile olmak için elimizi taşın altına koyduk. Ve birlik olduk. 

Markalarla işbirliği yaparak, köpekler için kaliteli mama, konforlu yaşam alanları ve diğer ihtiyaçları sağlayan projeler üretmeyi hedefliyoruz. Projelerimizin her şeffaf bir şekilde yürütülmektedir. Kısa vadeli hedefimiz, bu köpeklerin mümkün olduğunca sahiplendirilmesini desteklemek ve barınaklardan yeni köpeklerin yaşam alanımıza gelmesini teşvik etmektir. Uzun vadede ise, yaşam alanımızın inşaat işleri ve diğer ihtiyaçlarını karşılayabilecek sponsorlar bularak, burayı köpekler için ideal bir yuva haline getirmeyi amaçlıyoruz.
Sizlerin desteğiyle, köpeklerin yaşam kalitesini artırabilir ve toplumsal duyarlılığı güçlendirebiliriz. İlgilendiğiniz takdirde, projelerimiz hakkında daha detaylı bilgi vermekten ve olası işbirliklerini konuşmaktan memnuniyet duyarız.

Description:
Engagée pour regrouper le bien-être et la performance des chevaux de sport au plus haut niveau, l’objectif des interventions Global Horse Care est d’amener les animaux vers leur condition optimale, dans le cadre d'une carrière sportive ou d'une vie de famille !

Considérant l’animal dans son ensemble et comme interdépendant avec ses conditions de vie, le massage et la naturopathie -conseil en soins naturels et alimentation-, sont pratiqués de manière associée pour viser ce qui se fait de mieux en terme de soin d’entretien/soutien et d’hygiène de vie, en alliant globalité, précision et innovation !

Cumulant une connaissance du milieu équin depuis jeune et 8 années de pratique professionnelle sur le terrain et en enseignement, les voies d'amélioration du bien-être équin et animal sont identifiées et une réponse adaptée à leur quotidien est apportée, en adéquation avec les spécifiés de chaque discipline et contexte de vie.

Engagée pour une équitation et une pratique des sports équestres toujours plus compatibles avec le bien-être des équidés, la modernisation des outils et techniques utilisés est un des leviers de l’approche GlOBAL HORSE CARE.
L’adaptation précise à chaque animal, à chaque instant est également au coeur de l'approche. La réponse aux besoins de l’animal de sport à un instant T, liée à sa condition physique, émotionnelle, son planning d’entrainement, ses échéances à venir et la collaboration avec toute l’équipe qui l’entoure, permet de le mener vers une condition optimale pour les échéances.

Plus de 5 années de formation suivies en France à l’école d’ostéopathie, massage et stretching animaliers de Paris et en Suisse à l’ESNA – Ecole Suisse de Naturopathie Animale, pour apporter chaque jour le meilleur du massage et de la naturopathie, aux animaux de sport et de compagnie, et aux personnes qui les entourent.

 Prenez contact pour obtenir toutes les informations sur les séances en massage et naturopathie pour vos animaux de sport ou de compagnie !

Name: RYERCAT
Description:
Meet the RYERCAT Toothbrush: Designed for Feline Anatomy!

Why is brushing your cat’s teeth such a struggle? The answer lies in a little-known feature of feline anatomy: The Jacobson's Organ—a sensitive nerve right behind a cat's front teeth. Most pet toothbrushes are too large, making brushing uncomfortable, if not painful, for our cats.

Samantha & Melanie know this challenge all too well. Like many cat owners, they used to wrestle with their cat, Henry, just to keep his teeth clean. After a $2,000 dental procedure, they realized something had to change. But every toothbrush they tried was too big and only made things worse.

So they took action! The result? RYERCAT—a toothbrush specifically designed for a cat’s unique dental anatomy. Finally, a brushing experience that’s easy, comfortable, and actually effective. 

Want to know more about the story behind RYERCAT and how it’s changing the way we think about cat dental health? Check out our story here: https://ryercat.com/pages/about-us

 AI assistant is already live, helping users with real-time guidance.

A Twin Cities Boutique Family Dog Trainer
Offering Customized Training Programs

Welcome to North Star Family K-9, where our 20 years of combined dog ownership and training experience drive our passion for fostering harmonious human-canine relationships. For the last 17 years, we've worked together to integrate our dogs into our family and daily lives, ensuring their happiness and fulfillment. Now, our mission is to share our expertise with you.

Through consistent communication, structured guidance, and effective training, we aim to help you build a strong, joyful bond with your furry companion. By learning from our experiences, you can avoid common pitfalls and maximize your dog's quality of life. At NSFK9, we believe that when humans and canines connect deeply, life becomes richer for both. Join us on this journey to create a world where every dog enjoys a happy, fulfilling life by your side.

We offer virtual and in-person private lessons, immersive board and train experiences with our family and pack. We specialize in integrating family dogs into the lifestyle of the dogs family, we can work on general anxiety, separation anxiety, on and off leash reactivity, canine aggression and human aggression.

The foundation of our program is crate and leash training leveraging their intrinsic motivation for food to build structure and your communication with your dog. We then work to socialize your dog through a variety of environments ensuring you have as strong as a dog as possible to integrate into your family. We train through three phases; learning, proofing and then maintaining once the dog returns home!

We serve the entire Twin Cities Metro area and have had clients from Golden Valley, Minneapolis, St. Paul, Inver Grove Heights, Eagan, Mendota Heights, Stillwater, Bloomington, Richfield, Edina, Burnsville, Eden Prairie, Shakopee, Savage, Prior Lake, Credit River, Lakeville, New Prague, Elko New Market, Northfield and Faribault

Name: Escuela Canina Selva
Description:
Escuela Canina Selva es un espacio de educación canina profesional orientado a la comprensión profunda del comportamiento del perro y a la mejora real de la convivencia con las personas.

Trabajamos desde un enfoque basado en ciencia, bienestar y análisis del contexto, integrando teoría actualizada con práctica aplicada. Nuestro objetivo no es repetir técnicas, sino desarrollar criterio: entender por qué un perro se comporta como lo hace y cómo intervenir de forma ética, efectiva y responsable.

En Selva formamos, acompañamos e intervenimos. Ofrecemos formación profesional en educación canina, cursos para tutores, clases grupales, sesiones individuales y espacios de aprendizaje continuo, siempre con foco en el perro  y las situaciones reales que atraviesan las familias.

Creemos que educar perros implica, ante todo, educar personas. Por eso ponemos el énfasis en la lectura del comportamiento, la prevención, la gestión ambiental y la construcción de vínculos saludables, evitando enfoques simplistas o recetas universales.

Selva es formación, práctica y comunidad. Un lugar donde la educación canina se aborda con seriedad, compromiso y respeto por el perro.

Name: Southern Divine Kennels Pet Grooming
Description:
Southern Divine Kennels Pet Grooming: Our Journey

Founded in 2011 by Heather, a certified professional groomer, 
Southern Divine Kennels Pet Grooming began as a passion project in Sherrills Ford, NC. From humble beginnings grooming out of our home, we quickly grew, moving to a larger facility in Iron Station in 2013.

By 2016, we opened our first storefront, Southern Belle Pet Grooming, in Lincolnton, NC, and expanded in 2018 to offer an even wider range of pet retail products. Despite the pandemic’s challenges, we continued thriving thanks to our loyal customers and dedicated staff.

In December 2021, we rebranded and relocated to 119 Dave Warlick Drive in Lincolnton, consolidating our grooming services into one comprehensive space.

Now, we’re thrilled to announce our expansion into Brunswick County, NC, offering mobile in-home grooming services, dog walking, and in-home pet visits—each tailored to the unique needs of your pets.

We’re incredibly grateful to our clients and supporters for being an essential part of our journey.

Thank you!
The Cothrans

Name: ScooperHero
Description:
ScooperHero is a veteran-owned pet waste removal marketplace that connects pet parents (“Poopers”) with trusted local “Scoopers” for fast, reliable dog poop removal and yard cleanup. Most of our Poopers and Scoopers are based in Oklahoma, especially throughout the Oklahoma City metro areas, but anyone across the United States can sign up as we continue to expand.

Built as a modern two-sided platform, ScooperHero lets dog owners easily hire nearby scoopers for dog poop pickup, pet waste removal, fecal matter cleanup, and recurring yard sanitation. Through our mobile app, users can schedule cleanups, choose service frequency, view ratings, pay securely, and keep their yards clean, safe, and enjoyable for pets and families.

For workers, ScooperHero offers a flexible gig-economy opportunity. Scoopers can earn money completing pet waste pickup and dog yard cleanup jobs on their own schedule, making this a great option for gig workers, freelancers, students, stay-at-home parents, pet waste removal companies, small business startups, and anyone looking for consistent side income or outdoor work. Work full-time, part-time as much or little as you please. Set your own hours and be your own boss!

Pet Parents Benefit From:
• Fast, dependable dog poop removal
• One-time or recurring pet waste cleanup
• Cleaner, safer yards for pets and kids
• Transparent pricing and secure payments
• Trusted local scoopers in Oklahoma and growing U.S. regions

Scoopers Benefit From:
• Flexible gig work with no set schedule
• Local routes and direct earnings
• Easy job management through the app
• Strong demand in Oklahoma with nationwide sign-ups open

As a veteran-owned company, ScooperHero donates a portion of proceeds to veteran K9 organizations. Our mission is to keep yards clean, support local workers, and make life easier for pet and animal parents everywhere.

Clean yards. Happy pets. Flexible income. Oklahoma strong — nationwide ready.

Name: Miléa adoption
Description:
La mission de Miléa est de promouvoir l'adoption responsable des animaux de compagnie en France en mettant en lien les associations de protection animale avec des personnes sérieuses et engagées dans leur démarche d'adoption. Avec 300 000 abandons chaque année, la France est championne d'Europe. Il est temps d'inverser la tendance. 
 
5 raisons de rejoindre Miléa si vous êtes une association de protection animale : 
1. La même visibilité pour tous les animaux : Que votre association soit grande ou petite, Miléa adoption assure à toutes les associations une visibilité égale, garantissant à chaque animal la même chance d'être adopté.

2. Recevez uniquement des demandes d'adoption de familles qui correspondent aux besoins de vos animaux : grâce au formulaire d'inscription poussé, Miléa adoption ne présente que les animaux qui peuvent correspondre au mode de vie de l'adoptant potentiel.

3. Agissez sur le sort de vos animaux : Envoyez le profil de vos animaux à l'adoption en un clic aux personnes qui peuvent répondre à leurs besoins. En tant qu’association, vous pouvez directement contacter des adoptants potentiels parmi les utilisateurs inscrits, en fonction des besoins spécifiques de vos animaux. 

4. Vos animaux sont inséparables ? Faites-les adopter en duo ! Miléa adoption permet de proposer des adoptions en duo sur la même fiche. Une fonctionnalité essentielle et pratique !

5. C'est gratuit ! Les services proposés par Miléa sont entièrement gratuits pour les associations et les adoptants.

Vous souhaitez inscrire votre association sur Miléa et bénéficier d'un gain de temps et d'un véritable outil d'adoption responsable pour vos animaux ? Inscrivez-vous dès maintenant sur milea-adoption.com !

Recherche de partenariats : Je suis à la recherche de partenaires du secteur animalier pour enrichir l’offre de Miléa adoption et répondre aux besoins de ma communauté. N’hésitez pas à me contacter : contact@milea-adoption.com pour explorer les opportunités de collaboration.

Name: Anim'O3
Description:
Notre ferme d'animation ANIM'O3 se distingue par son approche unique de médiation animale et d'inclusion et partage. Située dans un cadre paisible, au lieu-dit MOUGON commune de CROUZILLES, notre ferme offre un refuge où le bien-être humain et animal est au cœur des préoccupations. En mettant l'accent sur l'interaction bienveillante avec les animaux, nous créons un environnement où petits et grands peuvent se reconnecter avec la nature et découvrir les bienfaits thérapeutiques de la relation homme-animal.

Anim'O3, se veut être également un lieu inclusif accueillant des personnes de tout horizon, y compris celles en situation de handicap. Nous proposerons une variété d'ateliers éducatifs, ludiques, pédagogiques et créatifs, adaptés à tous les âges et besoins spécifiques. Ces ateliers permettent aux participants d'apprendre à soigner et interagir avec les animaux, tout en développant des compétences sociales, émotionnelles et physiques.

Les activités proposées incluent des séances de médiation animale (chèvres, moutons, abeilles, poules) où les participants peuvent se détendre et trouver du réconfort en compagnie des animaux, des ateliers de découverte de la vie à la ferme, en passant par le monde fascinant des abeilles grâce à une expérience unique, une visite dans le verger de Mougon, son jardin des senteurs et son parcours sensoriel où on vous invite à venir pieds nus, vous connecter à la nature et pourquoi ne pas vous laissez envouter aux rythmes de nos percussions.

Notre ferme d'animation incarne donc une vision harmonieuse où la nature, les animaux et les humains coexistent en symbiose, offrant un havre de paix et de croissance pour tous ceux qui la visitent.

Name: Scenthound Carmel

Name: Petamorphosis
Description:
Petamorposis is the transformation of understanding and relationship between you and your pet. As a highly trained professional animal behavior consultant, I work with humans and their canine companions to change unwanted behavior (in both species). You might guess that a lot of this work is about understanding one another.

Each day brings a new challenge in understanding motivation and behavior. Whether it be figuring out why a dog growls, snarls and lunges when they see another dog, or how to train another to relax in the company of strangers.

To get to this point, I have worked over the last ten years to expand my knowledge and skills with the goal to teach others what they need to know to work with their pets using positive, science-based training techniques.

My educational background is animal behavior and biology. I have trudged through forests, jungles and military airfields to study a variety of amazing creatures including squirrels, vultures, and crows.

I became fascinated with canine behavior during my undergrad research on wolves' social behavior - at that time I began training dogs. After my undergrad I wanted to understand more about animal behavior and animal learning. The culmination was a master's research on collective movement in Tibetan Macaques in China.

After working in the field I wanted to work with animals closer to home. So, my love for dogs and cats brought me to my current work with domestic animals in people's homes. I take on a variety of behavior issues in dogs and cats with my specialty in working with aggressive behavior in dogs as well as separation anxiety.

I continue to grow as a professional in my field through ongoing education, professional mentors, and through my work with each and every human-animal team. Petamorphosis is a growing company, offering structured services to make this expertise accessible and effective for remote clients worldwide, as well as in person on the Island of Hawaii.

Name: ThermoHorse Thermographie Équine
Description:
ThermoHorse est la première entreprise à proposer un service de thermographie équine en France, ouvert aux particuliers et aux professionnels.

L'activité principale de celle-ci est de fournir des prestations de thermographie dans le secteur équin, dans le but d'améliorer le bien-être des chevaux, mais aussi dans la surveillance de l’intégrité physique du cheval athlète.

La thermographie est une technique d’imagerie physiologique, non invasive.
Nous connaissons son utilisation dans l’industrie, le bâtiment et dans les applications militaires. Mais elle est aussi employée dans le domaine du vivant (humain comme animal).

Étant un examen physiologique, elle rend possible la visualisation d’un équidé dans sa globalité, tout en localisant les défauts de symétrie thermique, évocateurs de pathologies naissantes ou avérées.

La thermographie constitue un complément à un examen vétérinaire, à faire réaliser en prévention ou non, pour identifier ou localiser une problématique. C’est alors un outil d’aide au diagnostic.

Name: Pet Laud
Description:
Pet Laud is a pet supplies small business based in California. Our love and care for animals and nature together became the inspiration behind this brand. Our mission is kindness – toward our pets and our planet. Pet Laud pet products are designed for guilt-free use.

By using our products you are not causing harm to your environment. We make our pet owners free of the feelings of having done something wrong or bad. The materials used in manufacturing are plastic-free, compostable and 100% recycled.

We love our Planet Earth and share the purpose of minimizing the harmful impact on the environment. Our personal experience with plastic dog poop bags was a stepping stone to researching and planning the use of biodegradable material. Although the pet supplies market is full of claims of biodegradable, earth-friendly, eco-friendly, and green products yet most of them are not.

We design our products with a 'Zero Waste' philosophy. Our products are sustainable and guilt-free. We aim to achieve two goals:
1) Provide high-quality pro-environment pet supplies in line with sustainable living.
2) Educate and encourage our pet owners to save the future of our pets and the Planet.

Not only do we make premium quality, innovative products, but also understand our ‘Social Responsibility’. Our mission is to extend our help towards support shelters & rescues for pets. Also, we donate a certain share of our proceeds to non-profit projects like ‘Ten Billion Tree Tsunami’ in collaboration with the United Nations.

Additionally, at Pet Laud, we believe businesses can play a critically important role in helping fight climate change. We’re proud to fund next-generation carbon removal. Such projects make a huge difference in curtailing environmental pollution.

Name: Heyrex Pet Technologies Ltd
Description:
Heyrex is an AI-powered pet wearable that monitors your dog’s daily habits – keeping them healthier and happier over a lifetime.  A personal health, fitness and location tracker for your best friend.  

The Heyrex 2.0 monitor collates data related to your dog’s behaviour: everything from exercise levels, scratching, sleep quality and a host of other behavioural or health issues. 

Because its algorithms have been designed by veterinarians, Heyrex filters all this data and delivers you the ‘need-to-know’ updates. In other words, it translates everything that’s important to your dog’s health and well-being. (Yes, it’s seriously smart).

Heyrex also provides weekly and monthly summaries in user-friendly graphs that are easy to interpret. There’s even a diary function where you can record key milestones in your dog’s life, and get reminders of their ‘doggy diary’ appointments. 

Heyrex 2.0 is totally safe, ergonomically designed, waterproof and durable. Your dog won’t even notice it’s there.

Description:
Tumblewood Canine offers customized positive reinforcement Private Dog Training, Board and Train, and Behaviour Modification programs. We understand how frustrating and overwhelming it can be to have a dog with training or behavioural needs, especially when you don’t have the time or knowledge to address them. We’ll work with you to get to the root of your training or behaviour challenges and develop a customized program that targets the specific needs of you and your dog. Let’s work together and help your dog become the perfect addition to your family.

Kim French has been training dogs personally and professionally since 2010. She decided to leave the corporate world behind to pursue dog training full-time, and founded Tumblewood Canine. Kim has completed Sue McMullen’s Dog Trainer Certification Program, is a member of the Canadian Association for Professional Dog Trainers, and is certified in Canine Emergency Health and First Aid. She has taught at various dog training schools as well as privately, and has experience in puppy development and socialization, basic obedience, competitive obedience, rally obedience, agility, scenting and canine behaviour.

Name: V-in-Aspects-Pets
Description:
Export-Ready Manufacturer of Technical, Custom-Tailored Pet Apparel | Solving for Hard-to-Fit Breeds | Black-Women-Owned | South Africa

About Us:

V in Aspects Pets is a premium manufacturer of bespoke pet apparel, specializing in technical clothing for dogs of all breeds and sizes. Founded in 2023, we solve a critical gap in the pet industry by providing perfect fits for the often considered "hard-to-fit breeds"—including extra-small, extra-large, and unique body shapes like Bulldogs, Greyhounds, and Ridgebacks—that mass-market producers consistently overlook.

Our differentiator is master craftsmanship, backed by a qualified tailor with decades of experience in industrial clothing manufacturing. We combine this artisanal skill with a data-driven approach from our directorial team, whose backgrounds in research and chemistry inform our material selection and future innovation in fabric technology.

Our Core Capabilities:

* B2C Customization: Direct-to-consumer sales of personalized apparel for events, brand ambassadors, and everyday wear.

* B2B & White-Label Manufacturing: We partner with pet boutiques and brands, producing high-quality, custom-fit apparel under their label.

* Technical Design: Proprietary pattern blocks developed in-house to address complex canine anatomies.

* Operational Excellence: Leveraging advanced technology, industrial cutting, to ensure efficiency, reduce costs, and maintain quality at scale.

Our Mission: To ensure no dog is left behind, cold, or unseen. We are building a global community where every pet’s unique shape is celebrated, not accommodated as an afterthought.

We are certified for import/export and are actively seeking B2B partnerships in local  and international markets.

Connect with us to explore how we can partner to bring unparalleled fit and quality to the pet apparel industry.

Headquarters: KwaMashu and Ballito

Name: Happy Tails, Pune
Description:
Happy Tails, Pune is an embodiment of Meera Thosar's balance training methodology. Here, we foster the affirmative method of training. Our goal is driven by the understanding of dog's requirements for love, attention, play and companionship - without which they can develop various types of behavior problems. We help you make the right decision with our training and behavior rehab programs that can culminate in a healthy and long lasting human -dog bond!
Happy Tails, Pune offers personalized accommodation services for all small, big, you and old dogs when you are away. 
Situated on a one-acre plot, the facility is well organized, spacious and in sylvan surroundings. Rest assured, while you are away, your pet will be enjoying playing, running, sniffing, sleeping, and rolling around in our grassy play areas. 
Designed with comfort in mind, we can accommodate 25 pet guests individually, at any given time. Large-size individual kennels with attached runs (12ft x 5.5ft) keep your pet happy and well exercised. A chain-link fixed onto a 4 ft wall separates the kennels, ensuring that the dogs are not lonely while still providing a barrier.

Quality food — packaged dog food as well as home-cooked meals like chicken and rice and liver soup — is provided. At the same time, any food allergies, or particular individual food habits, are taken into account.

Individual attention is provided to each of our guests, as is medical attention when required. Each pet is exercised twice daily and apart from their walks, they can enjoy fun training sessions with us too.
We have facilitated a pool for your pets to have fun at and get fit. We take due care to maintain the cleanliness of our pool. With a walking ramp that makes the in and out moment easy for all breeds and ages, our pool also ticks the safety factor. For young puppies, we have safety jackets. In addition, our pool is secured by the gate so no dog can enter the pool without human assistance.

Description:
Simply Jaspers is a family-run business based on the Isle of Wight, born from a deep love for pets and a desire to provide them with truly nourishing food. Our journey started with Jasper, our beloved beagle, who inspired us to create pet food free from artificial additives, colourants, cereals, and anything that doesn’t contribute to a pet’s long-term health and happiness. As pet owners ourselves, we understand the importance of a balanced diet and have worked closely with leading nutritionists to develop food that supports the well-being of dogs of all breeds, ages, and sizes.

Our commitment to quality goes beyond just great ingredients. We take pride in offering a friendly and personal service, ensuring that every order arrives with care. In addition to our carefully formulated dog food, we also offer a premium range of cat food and treats under our Huckabees brand, as well as a selection of high-quality bird feed to help support garden wildlife.

At Simply Jaspers, we believe every pet deserves food that is made with expertise, passion, and a true understanding of what keeps them happy and healthy.

Name: The Combine Dog
Description:
Welcome to The Combine Dog, where we embark on a profound journey that places the remarkable bond between humans and their cherished canine companions at its heart. What we offer transcends mere business; it's a testament to the visionary leadership of Nelly, our dedicated founder, who breathes life into her unwavering passion for dogs.

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐣𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐞𝐲

Imagine a world where the extraordinary bond between humans and their dogs is not just celebrated but explored, where the unique narrative of each dog's journey is given the spotlight it deserves. That's precisely what we do at The Combine Dog. We are the result of Nelly's unwavering commitment to the well-being of our four-legged friends.

𝐂𝐫𝐚𝐟𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐋𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐃𝐞𝐯𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧

Nelly, our founder, is not just a dog lover; she's a tireless advocate for creating meaningful content that enriches the lives of dogs and their owners. Our flagship project, the "You, Me & the Dogs" podcast, isn't just a podcast; it's a labor of love, a visual and emotional journey across the USA. Here, Nelly, joined by her esteemed guests and their cherished canine companions, uncovers the stories and experiences that define the unique bond we share with our dogs.

𝐀𝐝𝐯𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐄𝐱𝐜𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞

The Combine Dog is more than a content platform; it's a community committed to challenging norms, reshaping narratives, and delivering the very best for our furry companions. Name: Horse Tech

Monitoramento de Equinos 
Mantenha seu animal mais saudável.
Nosso produto busca evitar estresses e cólicas em equinos, oferecendo a você a gestão total do que está acontecendo na baia, com sensores fundamentais para monitorar e garantir uma boa qualidade de vida ao seu animal. 



Desidratação é uma das principais causas de cólicas em equinos. Por sua vez equinos podem se desidratar por não gostarem de beber água muito quente nem muito gelada, além disso, água demasiadamente salgada pode ser prejudicial e desidratar o animal. 



Monitorar e garantir uma boa qualidade de água é fundamental para evitar que seu animal venha a ter cólicas.

Um dos comportamentos comuns em animais sofrendo de cólica é a redução do consumo de alimento. Monitorando o nível de alimento, é possível identificar uma possível situação de mal-estar do animal.

Name: WIODOGS
Description:
About Us

WIODOGS began when its founder, Taran Richardson, was just 13 years old. Inspired by his aunt, a passionate dog lover who cared for three doodles, Taran spent countless hours pet-sitting her dogs whenever she was out of town. It was through this hands-on experience that he discovered a deep connection to dogs and a desire to make their care easier, more reliable, and more meaningful.

From these early beginnings, WIODOGS was born—a company rooted in genuine love for dogs and a commitment to serving pet parents. What started as a local service offering dog walking, sitting, and training has grown into a modern, community-driven brand. Today, WIODOGS extends beyond traditional services into wellness-focused, eco-friendly products designed to fit seamlessly into every dog’s lifestyle, while promoting sustainability and responsible pet care.

Our Vision

We envision a community-driven brand where stewardship is not just a value, but a daily practice. Every service, product, and outreach effort reflects our dedication to sustainability, care, and the belief that doing right by dogs also means doing right by the world they explore.

For Dogs. By People. Benefiting the Planet.

Name: POLY4PAWS s.r.l.
Description:
Poly4Paws è un'azienda italiana nata dall'amore per gli animali e dalla passione per la natura.
Crediamo che la cura del proprio animale debba essere un'esperienza piacevole e sicura, sia per l'animale stesso che per il suo padrone. Tutta la nostra linea di cosmetici per animali è realizzata con ingredienti naturali al 100%, accuratamente selezionati per garantire la massima sicurezza ed efficacia. Il nostro prodotto di punta è il Poly4Liquid, un innovativo estratto brevettato a base di polifenoli dell'olivo, dalle proprietà antiossidanti, antinfiammatorie e rigeneranti.
Impegno per l'ecologia e il benessere animale
Poly4Paws si distingue per il suo profondo impegno verso la sostenibilità ambientale e il benessere degli animali. Tutti i nostri prodotti sono cruelty-free, il che significa che non vengono testati su animali in nessuna fase della produzione. Ci assicuriamo che ogni ingrediente provenga da fonti sostenibili, riducendo al minimo l'impatto ambientale.
Packaging ecologico e valorizzazione del territorio
Per noi, la cura del pianeta è fondamentale. Utilizziamo packaging sostenibili, realizzati con materiali riciclabili e biodegradabili, per ridurre l'uso della plastica e l'impatto ambientale complessivo. Sosteniamo inoltre l'economia circolare, impegnandoci a valorizzare le risorse del territorio italiano attraverso l'uso di ingredienti locali e promuovendo pratiche agricole rispettose dell'ambiente.
Impegno sociale e iniziative benefiche
Il nostro amore per gli animali e la natura si traduce anche in un impegno concreto per il miglioramento del territorio. Parte dei nostri profitti viene destinata a iniziative benefiche, a sostegno di progetti di conservazione ambientale e di tutela degli animali in Italia. Collaboriamo con associazioni locali per promuovere la biodiversità e proteggere gli habitat naturali, contribuendo attivamente al benessere del nostro pianeta.

Name: Naturopathie humaine et animale
Description:
Passionnée depuis plus de 20ans par les animaux, la Nature et les médecines alternatives, j'ai suivi de nombreuses formations certifiantes et reconnues par l'Etat dans ces domaines.
J'ai jusqu'à présent conseillé ma famille, mes amis et je me suis occupée de mes animaux ainsi que des leurs, mais suite à une reconversion professionnelle, je vous propose aujourd'hui mes services pour vous et vos animaux de compagnie (chiens, chats, chevaux, etc).
Des ateliers et des conférences à thème seront proposées. Il m'est également possible, sur demande, d'intervenir dans des entreprises, des maisons de retraites, des pharmacies, afin de sensibiliser la population à cette alternative de soins naturels.
Des produits naturels faits maison seront prochainement proposés à la vente.
La naturopathie est une thérapie holistique qui se concentre sur la santé de l'homme et de l'animal sans utiliser de médicament chimique.
Le terme holistique indique que la naturopathie va s'intéresser à l'ensemble du corps, et pas seulement aux symptômes cliniques. L'approche holistique vise à soigner la maladie en stimulant le système immunitaire de la personne ou de l'animal, alors que l'approche allopathique reste trop souvent focalisée sur la disparition des symptômes, sans rechercher l'origine du trouble, ce qui entraîne souvent des récidives.
Ainsi, la naturopathie va porter son attention autant sur le corps physique dans son intégralité mais aussi sur l'aspect psychologique et mental. Michel Odoul signifie avec une grande justesse dans son ouvrage "Dis-moi où tu as mal, je te dirai pourquoi", que "les cris du corps sont des messages de l'âme".
Un corps en bonne santé est un coprs en équilibre. Lorsque le corps s'éloigne de cet équilibre, la naturopathie emploie des remèdes naturels en se tournant vers les plantes, les huiles essentielles, les minéraux, les herbes, entre autre, pour aider le corps à le retrouver. Cela s'appelle le principe d'auto-guérison.

Name: PetCare Manager
Description:
¿Amas a tu peludo? Nosotros también! 

PetCare Manager nace de nuestra pasión por los animales (hola, perritos! ). Queremos hacerte la vida más fácil centralizando todo el cuidado de tu mejor amigo en una app molona.

¿Qué hacemos?

Simplificamos la gestión de la salud y el bienestar de tu mascota. Imagina tener en tu bolsillo recordatorios de vacunas, la cartilla digital, y hasta dónde le toca la próxima desparasitación. Se acabó el caos!

Nuestro objetivo: Que dediques más tiempo a los achuchones y menos a la burocracia perruna. Estamos empezando con lo básico (pero potente!): perfiles completos, calendarios de cuidados con alertas y un sitio seguro para sus documentos importantes.

¿Cómo lo hacemos posible? Con React Native en la app, un cerebro Python/Django detrás y herramientas top para notificaciones y almacenamiento. Un equipo crack de Product Owner, diseñador, developers y testers le estamos dando caña para que sea intuitiva y útil.

¿Por qué te contamos esto? Porque tu opinión y entusiasmo nos importan un montón. Queremos construir juntos esta herramienta para los que amamos a nuestras mascotas. Tu ayuda es clave!

As a dedicated consultancy firm, Himalayan Yak Cheese Consultancy offers a range of services aimed at facilitating every aspect of the dog chew supply chain. From assisting clients in sourcing high-quality Yak cheese for dog chews to conducting thorough third-party inspections to ensure product quality and safety standards, the company is committed to delivering end-to-end procurement support.

Himalayan Yak Cheese Consultancy goes beyond mere procurement assistance by offering expertise in setting up dog chew manufacturing plants. This includes providing guidance on establishing process SOPs tailored to the specific requirements of dog chew production, thereby ensuring efficient and standardized manufacturing practices.

With a focus solely on the dog chew industry, particularly Yak cheese-based products, the consultancy has developed specialized knowledge and experience in this niche market segment. This enables them to offer tailored solutions and expert advice to clients seeking to enter or optimize their operations within the dog chew industry.

For inquiries or consultations, interested parties can reach Himalayan Yak Cheese Consultancy via phone at +9779803718175 or email at yakcheeseconsultancy@gmail.com. The company's dedicated team of professionals stands ready to provide personalized assistance and support to clients seeking to navigate the complexities of the dog chew market.

Name: GEIB BUTTERCUT
Description:
𝐖𝐡𝐨 𝐀𝐫𝐞 𝐖𝐞?
 Our Owner, Edward Geib is the pioneer in the research, development, and manufacturing of high-quality hair cutting and dog grooming instruments in the USA. 
 His international sharpening service has earned him a worldwide reputation for quality workmanship.

 𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐬:
 Left-Handed Shears.
 Right-Handed Shears.
 Clipper Blades.
 Barber Comb.

 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞𝐬 𝐖𝐞 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐯𝐢𝐝𝐞?
 Manufacturing Services.
 Sharpening Services.

 𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐖𝐞 𝐖𝐨𝐫𝐤?
 To obtain the finest materials and latest methods, Edward Geib continually visits steel companies, heat treatment facilities, forging plants, and manufacturing facilities in the USA and around the world.
 The latest state-of-the-art materials, technology, and methods are used to manufacture our top quality shears.
 Our craftsmen combine modern materials and technology with their precision skills and personal care and pride to yield an exceptional product.
 The results are our fine shears which are as pleasing to look at as they are comfortable to use.
 Each pair is finely polished and edges are carefully honed and trued to deliver long, faithful, and reliable service.

 𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐒𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲:
 One major improvement resulting from these tours was the introduction of ball bearing pivot mechanisms.
 Many of our product lines include models with Ball Bearing pivots. This state-of-the-art design incorporates ball bearings in a housing press-fitted into the pivot hole. The ball bearing restricts motion at the pivot to a single plane eliminating annoying "wobble" such as when the pivot hole normally wears due to motion against the pivot pin. The bearings provide minimal friction at the pivot point so scissoring action becomes nearly effortless.

Description:
Every animal is different and every animal has different needs.

Our goal is to treat your animal as they are accustomed to being treated and according to your/their preference, this includes understanding their specific training and paying close attention to certain behaviors and idiosyncrasies.

- Walks, quiet and cuddly visits, playtime. Whatever your needs are, we can do it.

Our goal is to ensure everyone, animals and their people, feel good about the care they are getting.

Name: ASGUARD
Description:
Il marchio Paw Paw rappresenta una linea di prodotti dedicata al settore Pet.
E' distribuito in Italia dalla Asguard S.r.l.s. ed ha alle spalle uno dei più importanti produttori cinesi di Pet Food, la Shandong Zhengyuan Pet Food Co., Ltd., che fa parte di un gruppo di 6 aziende che compongono lo Zhengyuan Group.

• Siamo un'azienda specializzata in cibo e forniture per animali domestici. Ci impegniamo costantemente a fornire ai nostri clienti prodotti di altissima qualità, con un focus particolare sul benessere e la felicità dei nostri amici a quattro zampe. 
• La nostra produzione segue rigorosamente gli standard internazionali, blocco G8, per mantenere alta la qualità dei prodotti. Da molti anni, infatti,  produciamo per Walmart, Target, Aldi, Fressnapf, Lidl, Tesco, Trixie, etc.
Rispettiamo inflessibilmente le norme internazionali HACCP sulla sicurezza alimentare e le norme igieniche SSOP.  Ogni processo è scrupolosamente monitorato ed è stato istituito anche un "sistema di tracciabilità dell'intera produzione". 
Le nostre fabbriche hanno ottenuto un’approvazione dalla FDA e dall'UE ed anche il certificato BRC BSCI MSC per il monitoraggio e il miglioramento delle prestazioni di responsabilità sociale nella catena di fornitura. 
Dozzine di brevetti per i prodotti PET ci vengono rilasciati ogni anno a fronte di tante novità presentate.
• Implementiamo una strategia annuale di inventario che ci consente di gestire sia ordini di piccole dimensioni che consegne di grandi volumi. 
• Decenni di collaborazione con clienti europei e americani, ci hanno dato la capacità innovativa di sviluppare nuovi prodotti adatti alle tendenze del mercato e fornire feedback ai nuovi clienti.
• Molti membri del team hanno maturato tanti anni di esperienza ed acquisito grandi competenze nel settore del Pet, coinvolgendo l'intero processo di tecnologia, sviluppo, produzione, controllo qualità, marketing e vendita al dettaglio.

Name: Hotel Safety Dog
Description:
Nasz hotel znajduje się w samym sercu Doliny Baryczy. Zaledwie 50 km od Wrocławia - miejscowość Krośnice, koło Milicza.
Dysponujemy dużym ogrodzonym terenem, który jest dla naszych gości oazą spokoju i relaksu. Na niespełna 4 ha działce, znajduje się duży ogród ze stawem, sadem i łąką. 

W upalne dni nasz staw przeobraża się w domowe SPA. Pieski chętnie korzystają z tej możliwości, zapewniając sobie ochłodę i zabawę. 
Spory teren daje wiele możliwości. Rzucanie piłką i wszelkie zabawy na „odległość” są bezpieczne. Pieski mogą hasać bez obaw. 

Dolina Baryczy to kraina stawów, lasów i mokradeł. Ten piękny teren daje nam możliwość urozmaicania tras spacerowych z naszymi podopiecznymi. Powiew wiatru, śpiew ptaków i naturalne warunki umilą im pobyt podczas Waszej nieobecności.

Psy przebywają w domu i mają możliwość spania z nami w łóżku. Jesteśmy zdania, że pies jest członkiem rodziny, więc nasi podopieczni mają z nami jak w raju :)

Zapraszamy do zapisów
796663724

Name: Jorgens Kennel Pet Supplements
Description:
Each of us has a responsibility in the world full of miraculous creatures that nature offers us with the rising of the sun. We are a brand operating in Turkey, which started in the State of Colorado to support the healthy lives of cats and dogs, but we care not only about their health, but also about the well-being of nature and all living things. Our operations are carried out in Istanbul at a plant with 2600m2 of enclosed space.

 We produce premium products under veterinary supervision in our facility, which has GMP, FDA, GSP ISO-9001:2015, ISO-14001:2015, ISO-22716:2013, ISO-45001:2018, CE certificates in accordance with the regulations of the Ministry of Food, Agriculture and Livestock.

 Our sensitivity to the environment and oceans is not only limited to the quality of our products, but also manifests itself at every stage of our production processes. 

By using materials from sustainable sources, we minimise our carbon footprint and protect natural habitats. However, our sensitivity is not limited to natural resources. We have a zero tolerance policy against the abuse of animals. We design every detail, from the content of our products to their packaging, taking into account the welfare of animals. 

While we reject the use of animals in laboratory tests, we also act in accordance with ethical standards in every step of our supply chain.

Name: Stay At Zania's
Description:
About Stay at Zania's

Founded in 2012 in the heart of Bangalore, Stay at Zania's has established itself as a premier pet boarding service, dedicated to providing a safe, loving, and fun-filled environment for your beloved pets. We recognize that pets are more than just animals; they are family members who deserve the utmost care and affection when you're away.

At Stay at Zania's, we offer a variety of services tailored to meet the individual needs of each pet, including boarding for dogs, cats, and other pets, day care, and extended stay options. Our facilities are designed to ensure safety and comfort, featuring spacious play areas, comfortable sleeping quarters, and a clean, healthy environment monitored by experienced pet care professionals.

Our Mission

Our mission is to be more than just a boarding service—we aim to be a home away from home for your pets. We are committed to providing a stress-free experience for both pets and their owners by offering reliable, transparent, and high-quality care. Our staff is trained to handle all aspects of pet care, from nutrition and exercise to socialization and relaxation, ensuring that your pets are happy, healthy, and active during their stay with us.

Recognition and Trust

Stay at Zania's has been featured in prominent local publications like the Deccan Herald for our innovative approach to pet care and our commitment to excellence. We take pride in our community involvement and in building strong, lasting relationships with pet owners across Bangalore.

Join Us

Explore our services and discover why Stay at Zania's is the trusted choice for pet owners who want the best for their pets. Follow us on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest offers, pet care tips, and community events. At Stay at Zania's, we're more than just a service—we're a part of your family's extended pack.

Name: Terran Polska
Description:
Opis Sklepu Zoologicznego na LinkedIn 

 O nas 

Witamy w naszym internetowym sklepie zoologicznym – miejscu stworzonym przez zaangażowanych pasjonatów hodowli zwierząt, którzy łączą miłość do pupili z profesjonalizmem i doświadczeniem. Nasza oferta to nie tylko produkty najwyższej jakości, ale także wiedza i zaangażowanie, które gwarantują, że każdy zwierzak otrzyma to, czego potrzebuje do szczęśliwego i zdrowego życia.

 Nasza Hodowla 

Specjalizujemy się w hodowli agam brodatych oraz gekonów lamparcich. Nasze zwierzęta są hodowane z najwyższą troską, w warunkach, które zapewniają im zdrowie i komfort. Posiadamy szeroką wiedzę na temat tych gatunków, dzięki czemu możemy oferować naszym klientom nie tylko zwierzęta, ale także kompleksowe doradztwo w zakresie ich hodowli i pielęgnacji.

 Oferta Sklepu 

W naszym sklepie znajdziesz szeroki asortyment artykułów dla psów, kotów, ptaków oraz małych gryzoni. Oferujemy karmy, przysmaki, akcesoria, zabawki oraz artykuły pielęgnacyjne, które zostały starannie wyselekcjonowane, aby spełniać najwyższe standardy jakości.

 Wyposażenie dla Gadów 

Jako specjaliści w hodowli gadów, oferujemy pełne wyposażenie do hodowania agam brodatych, gekonów lamparcich i innych gadów. W naszej ofercie znajdują się terraria wykonane z płyty meblowej, zapewniające optymalne warunki dla zwierząt oraz estetyczny wygląd, który doskonale wkomponuje się w wystrój wnętrza. Oferujemy także oświetlenie, ogrzewanie, podłoża oraz wszelkie akcesoria potrzebne do stworzenia idealnego środowiska dla gadów.

 Nasza Misja 

Nasza misja to zapewnienie każdemu zwierzakowi najlepszego życia poprzez dostarczanie najwyższej jakości produktów i usług. Dbamy o to, aby każdy klient znalazł u nas wszystko, czego potrzebuje, a nasze zaangażowanie i pasja przekładają się na pełne zadowolenie naszych klientów i ich pupili.

 Skontaktuj się z nami 

Zapraszamy do odwiedzenia naszej strony internetowej i zapoznania się z pełną ofertą naszego

Name: Humane Solution Spay-Neuter Program
Description:
Humane Solution Spay-Neuter Program is an all-volunteer, 501(c)3 organization. We incorporated in 1999 because of the incredible need for a low-cost spay-neuter program for low-income pet owners. We are governed by a volunteer board of directors and have a host of dedicated volunteers who believe spay-neuter is the key to reducing pet overpopulation and the number of innocent lives that are euthanized at animal shelters.

Humane Solution Spay-Neuter Program provides low-cost vouchers to pet owners with financial hardships. The vouchers can be used at several area veterinary hospitals in central North Carolina and southern Virginia. We issue approximately 1,000 vouchers a year, which reduces the number of unwanted pets by the thousands annually. In July 2024, we opened a spay-neuter clinic and are curretnly open on Sundays and Mondays, with a goal of opening more days.

Name: DogSens
Description:
Most people buy a dog without understanding the dog.

That’s why problems start at home . not at the breeder.

This page exists to stop that.

Here, you won’t get “cute dog photos.”

You get straight, honest, breed-specific truth . the kind that saves you money, stress, and regrets.

 Every post on this page has one goal:
Help you understand the dog you have . or the dog you want.

What This Page Gives You:

1) Breed Guides
Clear points for every dog. What they need. What they hate. What problems they bring. Who should not own them.

2) Daily Care Tips
Simple steps to improve behaviour, health and bonding.

3) Common Mistakes
Straight warnings that save you from long-term problems.

4) Behaviour Solutions
Barking. Chewing. Pulling. Howling. Separation stress. Easy-to-follow fixes.

5) Health & Safety Basics
Vaccines. Grooming. Summer care. Home safety. Food guidelines.

You will understand your dog better than 90% of owners.

And your dog will live better because of it.


Who This Page is For:

• First-time dog (pet) parents 
• Families planning to bring a dog home
• People confused between breeds
• Owners dealing with behaviour issues
• Anyone who wants to understand dogs properly

Better dog owners.
Better dog lives.

Name: VetMyPet
Description:
VetMy.Pet, by SNIPBD Technologies, is building the world’s first species-wide care intelligence system — a digital infrastructure to support life beyond humans.

From pets to parrots, livestock to marine life, reptiles to wildlife — our AI is trained to understand, assist, and advocate for the health and well-being of over 2,000 species (and counting).

We are not a pet tech company.

We’re reimagining how the world cares for animals — with an AI that’s hyper-personalized, deeply empathetic, and radically inclusive.

In Phase 1, our platform helps people:

Detect symptoms early and take the right next step

Feed species-specific, balanced diets

Solve behavior issues and enrich animals' lives

Match humans with the right animals using an animal-first approach

We're not just solving problems.
We're building the foundation for the Species OS — an intelligence layer designed to protect and elevate all forms of non-human life.

SNIPBD stands for Snoopy, Nyah, Peggy, Blessing, and Droopy — the animals who taught us love, loss, and purpose.
The “I” in the middle stands for every individual animal we aim to support.

Because in our world, animals are not an afterthought —
They’re a necessity.

Name: Saving Paws Animal Rescue of Kentucky Corporation
Description:
Our Mission: Saving Paws Animal Rescue of Kentucky, a 501c3 ,non-profit organization based in Owensboro, Kentucky, is dedicated to lowering euthanasia rates of dogs and cats in area shelters, educating the public about the importance of spaying and neutering, and promoting animal adoption in Kentucky. SparKy aspires to foster lifelong connections between well-deserving dogs and cats and families and placing them in successful, nurturing homes. Through support, guidance, education and service, our grassroots organization commits to create a positive, sustainable impact within the community and beyond.

Our Story: SparKy was founded in 2006 by John and Bridget Austin as a foster-based only animal rescue. In 2009, the IRS granted SparKy 501c3 status. In 2022, we opened our brick and mortar rescue center on 18th Street in Owensboro. While the majority of our animals continue to reside in foster homes, the rescue center allowed us to grow the rescue and its impact on the community. Area shelters depend on SparKy to lower the number of animals euthanized due to lack of space or needed medical care. SparKy takes in multiple major medical/special needs cases every year from animals needing emergency surgery, puppies suffering from parvovirus, animals needing amputations, heartworm positive dogs, FeLV/FIV positive cats, and a host of other conditions. We also take in numerous litters of puppies and kittens. Every animal that SparKy takes in is spayed or neutered, receives appropriate vaccinations, treated for intestinal parasites, is given flea and tick prevention, and microchipped.

Notre mission est de sauver et soigner ces animaux en détresse, en leur offrant une seconde chance grâce à l’adoption.

Nos actions principales :

	•	Sauvetage et soins médicaux : Nous prenons en charge des animaux ayant des problèmes de santé nécessitant des soins médicaux, tels que des blessures, des infections ou des maladies.  ￼

	•	Adoption : Une fois rétablis, nos protégés sont proposés à l’adoption pour leur offrir un foyer aimant et permanent.  ￼

	•	Sensibilisation : Nous informons le public sur diverses problématiques liées à la santé et au bien-être animal à travers notre blogue.  ￼

Comment nous aider :

	•	Devenir famille d’accueil : Accueillez temporairement un animal en convalescence et contribuez à son bien-être.

	•	Faire un don : Vos contributions financières ou matérielles nous aident à couvrir les frais vétérinaires et à poursuivre notre mission.

	•	Devenir bénévole : Participez activement à nos activités en rejoignant notre équipe dévouée.

Our journey began with pet DNA testing, providing insights into a pet’s breed, traits, and potential health risks—enabling more personalized and proactive care.

At Furlicious, we believe that pets deserve better—better health, better care, and better understanding. Our mission is to raise the standard of pet living by combining biotech expertise, innovation, and compassion to support both pets and the people who love them.

Join us as we build the future of pet wellness—one discovery at a time.

Name: Taki Pets
Description:
Taki Pets was founded on a simple philosophy: furkids are family, and we give them the best. 

With this belief, we craft freeze-dried treats that honour the same quality and care we would demand for ourselves, and our own loved ones.

Our treats begins with premium human-grade proteins, sourced directly from our family’s seafood wholesale business and our trusted network of restaurant suppliers. Our range include sashimi-grade salmon, Hokkaido scallops, spring lamb, and wagyu beef—ingredients typically found on fine dining menus, now for our dearest pets who mean the world to us.

Our offerings are 100% made in Singapore, produced in-house at our dedicated TAKI Lab. Using advanced freeze-drying technology, we process each item at -40°C under reduced pressure to preserve up to 85% of natural flavour and nutrients, ensuring every bite is both highly nutritious while remaining shelf-stable.

Taki Pets represents a new generation of pet nutrition: premium, transparent, and proudly local. From sourcing to production, every step is carefully managed under one roof—giving pet parents the peace of mind that quality, freshness and safety are never compromised.

As we continue to grow, our mission remains grounded in respect—for our animals, our ingredients, and the people who choose to feed their pets with intention. We invite like-minded partners, pet lovers, and communities to join us as we redefine pet wellness—one exceptional bite at a time.

Name: Furr&Purr
Description:
Introducing the one and only cat finger brush, meticulously crafted to pamper your feline companion's 5 facial glands – the ultimate indulgence where they love to be petted. Elevate your cat's well-being and your relationship with them – indulge in the joy of bonding and grooming with our one-of-a-kind cat finger brush, designed to make every moment together truly special. 

Made in America, our finger brush is crafted with care and guarantees superior quality, ensuring a stress-free and enjoyable grooming experience for both cats and their owners. With beautiful packaging that makes the perfect gift for cat owners, our product stands out as the pinnacle of pet bonding and grooming.

Embrace convenience without compromising bonding – our multi-tasking finger brush helps you nurture a strong, loving connection with your cat while effortlessly grooming during everyday activities.

Discover the art of grooming that cats crave, as you create an unbreakable bond with our exclusively designed cat finger brush. Elevate your cat's grooming routine to a realm of pure bliss – because they deserve nothing but the best.

Join countless satisfied customers who have witnessed the health benefits and joy our cat brush brings to their furry companions.

We wanted to spend more time with our cats while juggling the crazy life that we all have today, balancing work, family, and pets. We decided to invent a cat brush that is easy to use and that cats cannot resist.
Cats are all about soothing cheek rubs and scratches behind the ears. We tested our product for two years and the results are amazing! Our cats were getting groomed, massaged, and loved more than ever and, in return, we were getting more cuddles and extra doses of purring. You could literally see the overall wellness of our cats improving with time!

That’s why we invented the Furr&Purr Brush — the world’s first brush designed for a cat’s face. It’s a brush with purrpose and is made in the USA.

Name: Ranch Canin Manitou
Description:
Au Ranch Canin Manitou, nous avons choisi de faire les choses autrement.
Ici, les chiens retrouvent ce qu’ils portent au fond d’eux-mêmes : le calme, la liberté, la nature.

Nous offrons bien plus qu’une pension : un sanctuaire où chaque chien est accueilli avec respect, patience et bienveillance.
En petits groupes, dans un vaste territoire forestier, ils explorent, jouent, se reposent… en toute sécurité, selon leur propre rythme.

Notre approche, certifiée Fear Free et Low Stress Handling, repose sur la confiance et l’écoute de chaque individu.
Pas d’immersion brusque : chaque nouveau chien est accompagné progressivement, pour lui offrir une expérience positive et sereine.

Nous croyons que le véritable bien-être naît du respect :
• Respect du rythme de chaque chien.
• Respect de sa nature profonde.
• Respect de la relation unique qui vous unit à lui.

Pour ceux qui cherchent un lieu différent, humain, proche de la nature, où le bien-être animal est une priorité réelle et non un slogan, le Ranch Canin Manitou est une destination rare.

Offrons à nos chiens ce qu’ils méritent le plus : un espace de liberté, de confiance et d’épanouissement.

Name: Patitopia
Description:
Dondurarak kurutulmuş (freeze-dried) ürünler, bir kurutma işlemi kullanılarak suyun üründen uzaklaştırıldığı ve böylece ürünün ağırlığının büyük ölçüde azaldığı yiyecek veya diğer maddelerdir. Bu yöntem, ürünün taze kalmasını sağlayarak, rengini, tatını ve besin değerini koruma yeteneği ile bilinir.

Dondurarak kurutma işlemi genellikle aşağıdaki adımları içerir:

Dondurma: Ürün, düşük sıcaklıklarda dondurulur. Bu, ürünün su içeriğini dondurarak kristal yapının oluşmasına yardımcı olur.

Vakum Altında Kurutma: Dondurulmuş ürün, düşük basınç altında kalırken ısıtılır. Bu, suyun donmuş haldan doğrudan buharlaşmasını sağlar, bu da suyun katı halinden gaz haline geçmesini sağlar. Bu işlem, suyun üründen uzaklaştırılmasını ve ürünün kurutulmasını sağlar.

Dondurarak kurutma yöntemi, ürünlerin hafif, uzun süre dayanıklı, besin değerini koruyan ve hızlı bir şekilde suyla tekrar şişebilen hale gelmelerini sağlayan bir avantaja sahiptir. Bu nedenle, kampçılık, uzay seyahatleri, askeri operasyonlar ve acil durum gıdaları gibi durumlar için tercih edilen bir yöntemdir. Ayrıca meyve, sebze, deniz ürünleri, kahve gibi birçok farklı gıda ürününün dondurarak kurutulmuş versiyonları da yaygın olarak bulunmaktadır.

6. Kereslet alapú szolgáltatásunk a minőségi és megfizethető kutyasétáltatások záloga.

5+1 ok, amiért a PuliO-t válaszd Sétáltatóként:
1. A PuliO remek kereseti lehetőséget biztosít minden állatbarát számára a fiatal egyetemistáktól egészen a nyugdíjasokig.
2. Applikációnk teret ad a Sétáltatóknak, hogy profin megtervezzék naptárjukat és így minél több Gazdihoz elérhessenek.
3. Sétáltatói Profilodban Te szabhatod meg hogy hol, mikor, és mennyiért vállalsz sétáltatásokat.
4. Értékelési rendszerünknek köszönhetően hasznos visszajelzéseket kaphatsz munkádról és ezzel a legjobb megítélésre tehetsz szert.

Name: Toni Unleashed
Description:
I believe the pet industry is nearly a decade behind human wellness and it’s time to change that. Back when I was running my Pittsburgh pet stores, pet parents constantly asked me questions about food, ingredients, and overall pet health. (How much water should my cat drink? Why is my dog scratching so much? How do you feed raw chicken to dogs? Why are dogs better than cats? JUST kidding on the last question!!)

It was clear: there’s no handbook for this stuff. That’s why I started my podcast, Toni Unleashed. I dive deep into what we’re really feeding our pets (and so much more), breaking it all down so you don’t have to. I read the labels, research the ingredients, and stay on top of the latest science so you can make smarter, healthier choices for your beloved cats and dogs.

Name: Purrs&Barks

En Purrs&Barks trabajamos en cada detalle. Nuestras formulas son el resultado de años de investigación, enfocada en la selección de los mejores ingredientes plant-based y en el desarrollo de combinaciones únicas para cada uno de nuestros productos. Envases biodegradables o totalmente reciclables y etiquetas eco amigables. De esta manera, nos alineamos con la SIMPLICIDAD de la naturaleza, que nos invita a quedarnos con lo esencial: ingredientes realmente EFECTIVOS, de la mejor CALIDAD. 

Por que encontrar productos naturales de alta calidad para nuestros peludos debe ser simple: sin trucos, sin ingredientes ocultos, sin nombres confusos, 100% veganos y libres de maltrato animal.
