Name: Fetcher! LLC
Description:
About Fetcher!

Overview 
At Fetcher!, we're redefining pet healthcare by introducing a state-of-the-art platform that seamlessly connects pet owners and veterinary professionals. Our mission is to simplify pet health management through technology, making it more accessible, efficient, and effective for everyone involved. With Fetcher!, managing your pet's health has never been easier or more reliable.

Our Vision  
We envision a world where every pet gets the care they deserve without the administrative hassle. By leveraging advanced technology, including AI-driven insights and blockchain for security, Fetcher! aims to become the gold standard in pet healthcare, facilitating better health outcomes for pets and peace of mind for pet owners.

What We Offer 
- For Pet Owners: A user-friendly platform that centralizes all aspects of pet health management, including medical records, appointment scheduling, and reminders for medication and vaccinations.
- For Veterinary Professionals: An innovative solution that integrates with existing EMR systems to streamline operations, reduce administrative burdens, and enhance the quality of care provided.
- Advanced Features: AI-driven triage and analytics for early detection and prevention, coupled with blockchain technology to ensure the highest standards of data security.

Why Fetcher!?
Our dedication to improving pet healthcare drives us to continuously innovate and improve. Fetcher! is more than just a platform; it's a community of pet lovers, tech enthusiasts, and veterinary experts committed to making a difference. Join us on this journey to transform pet healthcare and ensure every pet lives a happier, healthier life.

Connect With Us
Follow Fetcher! on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest developments, insights, and contributions to the pet healthcare industry. Together, we can make a lasting impact.

Name: Monstar Wear LTD
Description:
Welcome to Monstar Wear, which is created with our dog in mind; Yoshi Monstar.

Yoshi Monstar, our French Bulldog is years old and lives life to the full. She enjoys lengthy walks (5+ Miles) and this is when we realised some of the dog harnesses on the market were not ideal for her lifestyle and size. We wanted to create a dog harness (along with leads and collars) which are comfortable to wear, non-restrictive and also stylish with the latest patterns and designs.

We also found that with most of the products on the market currently, they didn't fit Yoshi very well. French Bulldogs are a different shape compared to other breeds, their shoulders are wide and their waists are small. If we did find a harness/product that did fit Yoshi well, it wouldn't fit her siblings or it was uncomfortable for them.

We wanted to create a product which could fit the biggest member of the family (Big Alfie the Sharpei/Bullmastiff who weighs around 5 Stone) to the smallest members of the family, Poncho and Ralph (The Chihuahua crosses). This is why our dog harnesses are fully adjustable around the neck and waist; to allow a comfortable and tailored fit.

Our main goal is to always achieve a high level of customer satisfaction with the products that we provide.

We’re thrilled you’ve decided to visit us - please browse our website to discover what we’re all about and be sure to check out our newest dog harness.

If you have any questions, please drop us a message and we will respond as soon as possible!

Name: Petkis
Description:
Nuestra historia comienza al darnos cuenta de los beneficios que originó la dieta BARF en la salud de nuestro perro. Al ver cómo mejoró su salud, su bienestar y su calidad de vida, decidimos seguir probando con los perros, gatos y hurones de nuestros amigos.
Y ellos también experimentaron los mismos beneficios. Así que, en junio del 2017, tras ver el impacto positivo que esta dieta natural en nuestros amigos peludos, decidimos dar el paso de diseñar, elaborar y comercializar nuestros propios alimentos de dieta BARF. 
Nuestros dos pilares son la trazabilidad del producto desde la granja a nuestras instalaciones y una elaboración con mimo y controles de calidad garantizando la excelencia y calidad del producto final.
Por eso, toda nuestra comida natural BARF para perros y gatos está elaborada con alimentos que provienen de productores locales de Navarra (ternera D.O. Navarra, potro de Navarra, cordero de Navarra, etc.)	
Al apostar por productores locales de Navarra contribuimos al desarrollo de la economía local de nuestra tierra. Además, estos proveedores cuidan a los animales con mimo y detalle. Esto se refleja en la calidad final de todos los alimentos BARF que ofrecemos.
Al ser alimentos de cercanía, esto hace que sean productos más frescos, con mayor sabor y con mayor calidad nutricional.

Razmišljaš da uzmeš psa koji će tvoj život učiniti lepšim?

Ovo je mesto gde možeš dobiti stručnu podršku i savete za prvi, najvažniji korak - izbor rase koja se najbolje uklapa u tvoj život.

Često srećemo nesrećne, frustrirane vlasnike i pse zbog kojih je PetSavet i nastao. Osluškujući njihove probleme, otkrili smo da pogrešan izbor rase najčešće dovodi do ovakvih posledica.

Zato smo razvili novi, potpuno drugačiji metod, koji sa sigurnošću otkriva idealnu rasu za svakog pojedinca, par ili porodicu.

5Savet metod spaja znanje veterinara, dresera i psihologa, kako bismo ti pružili proverene informacije, personalizovane savete i podršku.

Evo šta to podrazumeva:

- Pomoć pri izboru rase, uzimajući u obzir sve aspekte tvog života
- Stručnu podršku i savete veterinara, dresera i psihologa
- Pomoć pri pronalaženju odgajivača i kvalitetnog šteneta
- Moja prva knjiga o psu - sve što treba da znaš o životu sa psom
- Sigurnost i podršku kroz svaki korak - od izbora rase do njegovog dolaska u tvoj dom

Verujemo da pravi, informisan izbor rase vodi ka ispunjenom i srećnom životu sa psom.

Zato kroz edukaciju i podršku gradimo zajednicu odgovornih vlasnika i srećnih ljubimaca.

Isprobaj 5Savet metod i pridruži nam se!

Mister Dog houdt van:

 blije honden
 blije bazen
 stevige wandelingen
 een gezellige roedel
 strand- en boswandelingen
 een goede verstandhouding met alle bezoekers in de uitlaatgebieden


“Ik ben gekwalificeerd en vakbekwaam, fris periodiek mijn EHBO-vaardigheden op, houd mijn kynologische bagage up-to-date en ben met ruim een decennium veldwerk en enige duizenden roedelwandelingen in de pocket een ervaren roedelbegeleider en bovenal geoefend raper van excrementen. Whether you're going on vacation, working long hours, or simply need an extra hand, Shiney Day Specialized Pet Care is here to provide reliable, compassionate care for your best friend.


So, why the name 'Shiney Day'? 
During the founder's school years, while enrolled in a dual enrollment program to become a Certified Veterinary Assistant, Cheyenne interned under a veterinarian who fondly called them "Shiney" instead of her actual name. Why? Because she was outgoing and brought sunshine to everyone's day. This nickname followed her through her career as a veterinary technician at multiple hospitals and eventually became the inspiration for the business's name.

Name: Breed Genetics
Description:
Breed Genetics is a women owned integrative pet supplement line. We are members of the American Holistic Veterinary Medical Association. All our products are made with the highest quality standards. This means every ingredient is vetted and traceable and only from certified vendors. We also use veggie capsules since they are less processed than chews. All our products contain no animal proteins due to pet allergies and contain no synthetic ingredients or binders/fillers. 
Our products are made in an FDA registered facility and Gmp certified. We work closely with our Integrative veterinarians to develop relevant products that make a difference in animal health. Our products are available on our website and through a veterinarian. 

Our breakthrough product, Maintenance and Recovery is a natural medicinal herb product that address all 4 types of pain: Nerve, Muscle, Bone and Joint. It has been shown to be successful addressing discomfort from: IVDD, Arthritis, Hip Dysplasia, Disc Issues, Muscle Sprains/Strains and more.... We even have the human equivalent! 
Our mission is to improve the lives of pets through innovation, transparency, quality and integrity from every product we manufacture.

1. Safety First: Without bars, Petpen eliminates the risk of injury that traditional crates pose. Its solid, smooth structure provides a secure space for your dog.

2. Warmth and Comfort: PetPen's innovative design includes solid walls that keep your pet warm and cosy, making it an ideal resting spot in any season.

3. Ease of Cleaning: The smooth, durable materials of Petpen are easy to wipe clean, ensuring a hygienic environment for your pet with minimal effort.

4. Stylish and Functional: PetPen's sleek design seamlessly blends into your home décor, offering a modern and attractive alternative to clunky metal crates.

5. Portability and Convenience: Lightweight and easy to assemble, Petpen is perfect for travel and can be set up anywhere, providing a consistent and familiar space for your dog. Choose Petpen for a safer, warmer, and easier-to-maintain solution that prioritises your pet's well-being and comfort.

Name: Dallas Dog Den LLC
Description:
About Dallas Dog Den, LLC 

Hello, fellow pet enthusiasts! My names is Wade Lindsey, I’m the dedicated owner and sole operator of Dallas Dog Den, LLC. We're located in the heart of Dallas, TX. We've created a nurturing space for your beloved pets.

 Tail-Wagging Excellence 

At Dallas Dog Den, we know your pets are cherished members of your family. Our mission is to provide them with the love, attention, and care they deserve.

 What Sets Us Apart 

 Personalized Care: We understand that every pet is unique. Our services are tailored to their specific needs, ensuring their comfort and happiness.

 Safety First: Dallas Dog Den is fully insured and bonded. Your pet's safety and well-being are non-negotiable for us.

 Experienced & Certified: With years of experience and certifications in pet care, you can trust us to offer the highest standard of care.

 Home Away from Home: Dallas Dog Den is a second home for your pets. They can play, relax, and make new furry friends in a secure, clean environment.

 Our Services 

Dallas Dog Den offers a variety of services to meet all your pet's needs:

 Doggy Daycare: A fun and social environment for your pet to play and interact with others.

 Drop-in Visits: Quick check-ins for those days when your pet just needs a little extra attention or you're out of town and your pet prefers to stay in their own home. 

 Dog Boarding in My Home: Your pet can stay with us and enjoy a cozy, safe, private and loving environment while you're away. 

 Dog Walking: Regular exercise and outings to keep your pet happy and healthy. (30 or 60 min.)

Your pet's happiness is our success, and we take that responsibility seriously. Join the Dallas Dog Den family and discover the best pet care services in Dallas.

 Contact Us Today 

Give your pets the pampering they deserve. Contact us today to arrange a meet and greet or book our services. We look forward to providing a home away from home for your furry companions.

Name: Loyal Pawrenting
Description:
At Loyal Pawrenting, my mission is to ensure that every dog, especially those in shelters, finds a loving and understanding home. As a dedicated animal shelter volunteer, I’ve seen firsthand that not every dog gets the chance they truly deserve. By educating families and potential adopters about dogs' cognitive abilities and emotions, I aim to strengthen the bond between humans and their canine companions, fostering a healthy, lifelong relationship.

I believe in shifting the narrative from viewing dogs as mere products to recognizing them as sentient beings deserving of empathy and respect.

As Albert Einstein once said (though the attribution is debated), “Everybody is a genius. But if you judge a fish by its ability to climb a tree, it will live its whole life believing that it is stupid.” This powerful message resonates deeply in our work together.

So, I ask you: What is your dog's unique genius?

I’m here to help you discover it!

Name: Metz Pet Sitter
Description:
Vos obligations familiales et/ou professionnelles ne vous permettent pas d’offrir la longue promenade quotidienne que réclame votre chien ? 
Vous vous absentez, et vous souhaitez partir le cœur léger et serein en sachant votre compagnon entre de bonnes mains ?
Je peux vous aider à prendre soin de votre animal en votre absence !
Je propose des services de promenades de chiens et visites à domicile des animaux de compagnie en votre absence ;)

J’ai choisi de fonder Metz Pet Sitter pour créer des services qui me ressemblent, fondés sur le bien-être de vos animaux de compagnie et leur sécurité.
Lorsque j’ai entrepris de me reconvertir et de me lancer dans cette aventure du pet sitting, deux choses me sont tout de suite apparues évidentes : je voulais concevoir des prestations auxquelles j’aurais envie de souscrire pour mes propres animaux, et je souhaitais me former pour être en mesure de proposer le service le plus qualitatif possible. 
Étant moi-même la chanceuse propriétaire de deux chats et d’un chien plein d’énergie, il m’est assez simple d’imaginer des services qui peuvent répondre à vos besoins. Mon objectif avec Metz Pet Sitter est de vous aider à trouver les solutions qui vous permettront de concilier les obligations de votre quotidien avec l’épanouissement de votre compagnon.

Dans la mesure où mon objectif est d’assurer leur bien-être en votre absence, et parce celui-ci passe aussi par une bonne connaissance de l’animal, j’ai pris un réel plaisir à me former. Après avoir obtenu mon attestation de connaissances pour animaux de compagnie d’espèces domestiques délivrée par le Ministère de l’Agriculture, j’ai choisi de compléter ces notions théoriques avec une formation aux gestes de prévention et de premiers secours pour animaux. C’est cette formation globale que je souhaite mettre aujourd’hui à disposition de vos animaux.

Forget Regular Pet Stores, It's Time for Something Better for Dogs: Welcome to The Doggos!

In-house Brand, Human-Grade Goodness: We don't just curate, we create! Our in-house brand products are crafted with love and the finest natural ingredients, so good they're human-grade (but we won't tell your pup if you sneak a taste!).
Baobab Bliss: A First in India: We're thrilled to introduce India to the wonder of baobab oil for dogs. Packed with nutrients and antioxidants, this superfood oil nourishes skin, soothes allergies, and adds a healthy shine to their fur.
Nature's Finest, Delivered to Your Door: From wholesome food to gentle shampoos, cozy beds to playful toys, we've got everything to enrich your dog's life naturally.
The Doggos isn't just a brand, it's a philosophy:
Organic Bliss: We believe in the power of pure ingredients, free from harmful chemicals and artificial additives.
Pampering with Purpose: Every product we offer is thoughtfully chosen to nurture your dog's physical and emotional well-being.
Sustainable Love: We're committed to eco-friendly practices, because a happy planet means happy pups.
Join us on this journey of natural dog pampering. Explore The Doggos and discover a world where your furry friend thrives in the embrace of organic bliss. It's not just a store, it's a love letter to your dog, written in the language of nature.
Ready to spoil your pup with the best? Visit The Doggos today!

Name: Valley Pets
Description:
Valley Pets was founded in 2018 in the pioneer valley of western Massachusetts. The idea for our flagship product the BellyGuard was born out of necessity when our cavapoo Bailey was stuck in a plastic cone of shame for several weeks. Our Veterinarian Dr. Constant sent us home with a medicated cream, and a plastic cone to stop Bailey from licking at an irritating rash on her stomach.
 

Bailey was more irritated by the cone than by her rash. Normal activities, like eating, drinking, relaxing suddenly became impossible. After 18 months of engineering design, prototyping, and testing, and iterating, the BellyGuard was born.

Inventor of the BellyGuard Pet Recovery Suit
The Quick, Comfy, Recovery Every Dog Deserves.

Name: Oz a Quail Company
Description:
Pet-Friendly Chemical-Free Cleaning and Disinfecting Solutions

Oz, a Quail Company, offers industry-leading ozone technology, providing pet professionals and pet parents with powerful, chemical-free solutions for odor reduction and increased sanitation. Ozone technology experts at Oz have developed innovative systems that harness the natural power of ozone to eliminate pet odors and disinfect spaces without the use of harmful chemicals. This advanced technology is ideal for pet boarding facilities, grooming salons, veterinary clinics, and even at home, ensuring a safe and clean environment for pets and their caretakers.

Ozone, a naturally occurring molecule, is highly effective at breaking down odor-causing bacteria and viruses, making it a superior choice for maintaining hygiene in pet-centric spaces. Unlike traditional cleaning methods, which rely on harsh chemicals, Oz ozone technology leaves no residues, ensuring the safety of pets and humans alike. This makes it an excellent choice for pet professionals looking to enhance their services and for pet parents seeking the best for their furry friends.

By integrating Oz ozone technology into your cleaning and disinfecting routines, you can better protect your business, your pets, your customers, your reputation, and your budget. The powerful yet gentle action of ozone ensures that your environment remains fresh, sanitized, and free from unpleasant pet odors. Embrace the future of pet care with Oz, a Quail Company, and provide the safest, cleanest environment possible for the pets in your care.
TIP has developed a line of systems under the Quail Systems brand to market ozone in the food safety industries from the field to the fork.  Quail Systems has set out to differentiate itself from others by offering the highest quality systems, monitoring, and service available in the industry.

Name: Dog Care
Description:
Começamos nossa história em janeiro de 2017, no interior de SP, em Bauru. Nosso trabalho iniciou com o conceito de hospedagem domiciliar, a intenção era oferecer um local confortável, seguro e divertido para que os dogs pudessem ficar. Fomos expandindo, e mais dogs vinham fazer parte da família Dog Care, crescemos, mas nossa essência segue sendo a intensa vontade de oferecer um ambiente agradável, seguro, divertido e afetivo para cada pet. 

Em 2021 mudamos para SP, buscando trazer a tranquilidade interiorana para o cotidiano corrido de SP. Viemos para que ao adentrar em nosso espaço, os dogs pudessem ter a experiência imersiva de “quintal de casa”, pensando na qualidade de vida animal. Nessa nossa história de quase 08 anos, já passaram por nós mais de 800 dogs, de todos os portes e personalidades possíveis. Nossa família segue aumentando, e cada um de vocês que passaram por nós, fazem parte dessa história. 

Hoje, somos não só hospedagem, mas também day care, banho, iniciando banho e tosa, e o autocuidado pet. Além de estarmos entre as 3 empresas de hospedagem para cães mais bem avaliadas de São Paulo. 

Estamos felizes de chegar até aqui, e ansiosos para conhecer cada novo Dog que virá somar e fazer parte da nossa família!

Name: Fresh Pet Food Alliance
Description:
North America’s industry-led alliance supporting the growth and integrity of fresh (refrigerated and frozen)  pet foods that are predominantly made up of gently-cooked and raw pet food offerings. We serve as a hub of expertise, regulatory clarity, and education for brands, manufacturers, distributors, retailers and other stakeholders committed to premium quality, real food values, and promoting enhanced pet health outcomes through frozen and refrigerated products.

Our work spans consumer education, policy alignment, safety standards, and brand accountability — creating a trust framework for this high-growth emerging pet food category that deserves its own identity, oversight, and language. From ingredient sourcing and manufacturing standards to labeling, cold chain logistics, and scientific research, FPFA empowers our members to lead with transparency and build lasting confidence with pet owners and regulators alike.

To support this, we are working with industry members in developing a tiered classification system that helps consumers better understand the pet food products they are purchasing, and how they differ. While a key part of our work involves extending AAFCO Human Grade compliance principles into Canada (where AAFCO has no jurisdiction), our broader mission is to serve as a North American alliance for fresh pet food brands, manufacturers, distributors and retailers who want to distinguish themselves based on their investments in ingredients, process integrity, and food safety.

Traditionally pet food purchasing decisions were made based on Price and Convenience, but with the growth of the Fresh pet food categories we now see the addition of Health and Humanization as important purchasing criteria, especially as our relationship with our family pets continues to evolve.

Name: The Sniffworthy Co
Description:
Our dog passed away after being with us for 15 1/2 years.  The loss was devastating to our family. But, about a week later, I realized he left me with a gift…an idea inspired by the hair we had from the last time my wife had brushed him.  It was in a moment of opening that bag with his fur and getting a whiff of his scent that this “gift” presented itself to me.  Smelling him again brought back such a strong memory of him…one that made me smile…that I knew that I needed to do something to help preserve this.  Something that we could go back to over and over when we wanted to remember our dog Duncan and smile.  Most things we had left of him helped us remember:  his collar, paw print, pictures and his box of ashes.  But, they seems to bring a sense of sadness with that memory.  The smell of his fur made it feel like he was there with us still and that feeling was the one I wanted to keep forever.

So, after 6 months of development, I finally came up with just the product to lock his scent in to smell anytime we wanted.  Hence, the  Snifdeewas born: a memory rescue pouch to bring back his memory anytime we wanted to remember him and smile.

Name: Pet Animal Lifeline
Description:
Pet Animal Lifeline (P.A.L) is a grassroots rescue initiative based in the Transkei Wild Coast of South Africa, where poverty, isolation, and neglect have left thousands of dogs to suffer without food, shelter, or medical care.

With only two volunteers on the ground, PAL rescues, feeds, sterilizes, and treats dogs in rural areas where no other help exists. Every dog we save is a life transformed — but we are at our limit.

PAL is run with 100% transparency. We show donors exactly how much things cost, where every cent goes, and how their support directly impacts animals in need. There is no admin office — just boots in the mud, hearts on fire, and a cry for help that we hope the world will hear.

We are calling on:
 Local & international donors
 Long-term volunteers (especially Xhosa-speaking)
 Corporate & NGO partners
 Anyone who believes every dog deserves dignity

 Your support means everything. One small donation, one share, one extra pair of hands — it could be the difference between life and death for a dog in the Wild Coast.

 Visit www.petanimallifeline.com to learn more or donate securely.

Name: Pawsome Pet Pal
Description:
Pawsome Pet Pal is for awesome humans who want great relationships with their pets. Founded by Jennifer Pallanich, CPDT-KSA, Pawsome Pet Pal offers virtual classes, individualized training sessions, problem-solving behavior consultations, workshops, resources and more to help people and their pets have pawsome lives together.
I believe people and animals alike are always doing the best they can with what they have in any given moment. When they know better, they do better.
I believe humans and their furry friends can have wonderful relationships built on trust, respect, love and the frequent supply of treats, play and other things their pets find highly valuable to encourage the behaviors they desire.
I believe positive reinforcement is where it’s at. Positive reinforcement (R+) has a lot of research and evidence behind it. Studies have shown that positive reinforcement strengthens the human-animal bond (as compared to the use of aversives and punishment, which weaken it). It also builds desired behaviors faster than pain-based methods, and trained behaviors remain on cue longer even without later reinforcement.

Name: PIT-Pup-In-Training
Description:
Congratulations on expanding your family with a K-9 companion. As most new pup owners know, everyone wants to approach your pup and offer love and affection. However, most individuals don't realize how important the training bond that needs to take place prior to socializing your new pup with outside entities. PIT is a training tool that allows awareness  to passerby's to inform them you are not able to socialize your pup, no word exchange necessary! 
Once you and your pup have created the vital bond, you can safely distance your self from the need of PIT.

Bongo Cat ekibi olarak, kedi ve köpeklerin dünyasına bir macera getirmek için buradayız. Bizim için, evcil dostlarınızın sağlığı ve mutluluğu her şeyden önce gelir. Onları ailemizin birer üyesi olarak görüyoruz ve bu sevimli tüylü yoldaşlarımıza mükemmel bakımı sunma sorumluluğunu ciddi bir şekilde taşıyoruz.

Bir Dünya Dolusu Seçenek: Evcil dostlarınızın her biri farklıdır, değil mi? Bunu çok iyi biliyoruz ve bu yüzden ürün yelpazemizi onların çeşitli ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için genişletiyoruz. Kuru mamalar, yaş mamalar, özel diyetler, ve takviye gıdalarla evcil dostlarınızın lezzet beklentilerini ve beslenme ihtiyaçlarını karşılıyoruz. Her seçenek, onların sağlıklı yaşamlarını daha da parlak kılmak için tasarlanmıştır.

Mama Zamanı, Parti Zamanı: Evcil dostlarınızın mutluluğu bizim en büyük ödülümüzdür. Bu nedenle, ürünlerimizin hem besleyici hem de lezzetli olmasına özen gösteriyoruz. Onları sağlıklı bir şekilde beslerken aynı zamanda tadını çıkarmalarını sağlamak için elimizden gelenin en iyisini yaparız. Mama zamanı, onlar için bir partiye dönüşsün isteriz!

Bongo Cat olarak, her seferinde daha iyiye ve daha eğlenceliye gitmek için buradayız. Evcil dostlarınızla birlikte büyüyoruz ve onların hayatını daha iyi hale getirmek için heyecanla çalışıyoruz. Siz ve tüylü arkadaşlarınız, bizim için bir macera ve her anı sizinle paylaşmak için buradayız.

Name: Ranger Wildlife Removal and Prevention
Description:
Ranger Wildlife is your trusted expert for humane wildlife removal and prevention. We specialize in providing safe, effective, and lasting solutions for both residential and commercial properties. Our mission is simple — to protect your home, family, and business from unwanted wildlife while preserving the natural balance of our environment.

Whether you’re dealing with raccoons in the attic, squirrels in the walls, bats in the chimney, snakes in the yard, or birds nesting in unwanted areas, our licensed and highly trained professionals are here to help. At Ranger Wildlife, we understand that every situation is unique. That’s why we start with a detailed inspection to identify the type of animal, entry points, and potential risks. From there, we create a customized removal and prevention plan that addresses the root of the problem — not just the symptoms.

Our approach is humane and environmentally responsible. We use proven exclusion techniques, advanced trapping methods, and durable materials to keep wildlife out for good. Once removal is complete, we offer repair and cleanup services to restore damaged areas, seal all potential entry points, and sanitize affected spaces to ensure your home or building is clean, safe, and free from disease or odor.

Ranger Wildlife proudly serves homeowners, property managers, and businesses who value quality, integrity, and professionalism. Our team is committed to providing responsive service, transparent communication, and guaranteed results. We treat every property as if it were our own — because we believe your peace of mind matters most.

From one-time removals to long-term prevention programs, Ranger Wildlife is equipped to handle any challenge, big or small. Protect your investment, restore comfort, and reclaim your space with help from the experts who care.

Ranger Wildlife — humane removal, lasting prevention, and protection you can trust. Call today and let us help you protect what matters most.

Name: WellPet
Description:
WellPet est un projet dédié à l’amélioration du bien-être et de la santé des animaux de compagnie, avec un focus particulier sur la nutrition. Le projet est né d’un constat simple : de nombreux propriétaires souhaitent bien faire pour leur animal, mais manquent d’informations claires, fiables et accessibles pour prendre les bonnes décisions au quotidien.

Aujourd’hui, la nutrition animale est un sujet complexe, souvent dominé par des messages marketing peu transparents, ce qui génère confusion, doutes et parfois de mauvaises habitudes alimentaires. WellPet ambitionne de contribuer à une meilleure compréhension de ces enjeux, en plaçant la pédagogie, la confiance et l’éthique au cœur de sa démarche.

La vision de WellPet est de devenir un acteur de référence dans l’accompagnement des propriétaires d’animaux vers des choix plus éclairés, responsables et adaptés aux besoins réels de leurs compagnons. Le projet s’inscrit dans une logique de long terme, avec la volonté de collaborer étroitement avec des professionnels du secteur animalier et vétérinaire.

WellPet se construit progressivement en lien avec les attentes du terrain et les retours de ses futurs utilisateurs. L’objectif n’est pas de proposer une solution figée, mais d’évoluer continuellement pour répondre à un enjeu central : améliorer durablement la qualité de vie des animaux, tout en simplifiant le quotidien de leurs propriétaires.

Name: Range Line K9
Description:
RLK9 is more than just a dog training company - we are dedicated to building strong and positive relationships between dogs and their owners. Our philosophy fosters the belief that training your dog is an ongoing journey that should be enjoyable for both you and your furry companion.

We understand that every dog is unique, with their own personalities, needs, and behaviors. That's why at RLK9, we focus on tailoring our training programs to meet the specific situation and goals of each individual owner-dog duo. We’ll work closely with you to gain a deep understanding of your dog's behavior and provide a customized plan for them.

At RLK9, we don't just train dogs - we educate owners. We believe in empowering our clients with the knowledge and skills needed to train their dogs effectively on their own. We take the time to explain why you may be facing difficulties with your pup and how you can overcome them. We firmly believe that by understanding the root cause of behavioral issues, owners can better communicate and build trust with their furry friends.

We know life can get hectic, which is why our approach to dog training is designed to fit seamlessly into your daily routine. Dog training shouldn't feel like another chore - it should be a fun and engaging activity for both you and your dog! At RLK9, we use innovative techniques and methods to keep things interesting for your pup while ensuring they learn valuable skills.

At RLK9, we are not just passionate about dogs - we are passionate about helping you build a strong bond with your furry best friend. Whether you're looking for basic obedience training or need help with specific behavioral issues, we will work tirelessly to help you achieve your goals. Join us on this exciting journey of learning and growth with your beloved canine companion!

Name: Sofía Ciliano Educación Canina
Description:
Desde mi amor hacia los perros, me dedico a colaborar con sus humanos para lograr una convivencia armónica y feliz. Mediante técnicas adaptadas a cada situación, parto de la base de que nuestros perros son animales que sienten y piensan. Utilizo métodos que favorecen y estimulan sus habilidades más desarrolladas para no separarlos de su esencia más pura: ser perros.

En 2010 en comencé a trabajar como educadora canina a domicilio con sesiones personalizadas. Al mismo tiempo, durante cuatro años desempeñé trabajos de enfermería veterinaria, lo que me permitió tener un conocimiento más integral de los pequeños animales, específicamente perros.

Desde 2017 me dedico exclusivamente al trabajo de educadora canina, acompañando el crecimiento de los perros dentro del núcleo familiar y modificando conductas de forma personalizada. También trabajo con grupos brindando cursos y talleres para tutores y charlas en eventos empresariales.

Name: Dog Treats
Description:
At Boodles Dog Treats, we understand that your furry companion deserves the very best. That’s why we’ve crafted our Natural Air-Dried Dog Chews with utmost care and dedication, using only the finest ingredients to ensure a wholesome and satisfying chewing experience.  Boodles are comited to be the change we want to see. We hand pack all our products, in the uk into biodegradable pouches and recyclable cardboard postal boxes.
Our pouches are made with 45% – 60% renewable wood pulp starch and completely biodegrade in a compostable environment within 2-5 years.
Our cardboard boxes are made from 60% to 90% recycled board and we seal them with paper tapes for the perfect plastic-free packaging.

Key Features:

    uncompromising Quality: Our dog chews are made from premium cuts of 100% natural, ethically sourced ingredients. We never use artificial preservatives, colours, or flavours, guaranteeing a healthy and delicious treat for your beloved pet.

    Air-Dried Perfection: Our unique air-drying process preserves the rich flavours and nutritional value of each chew, creating a texture that dogs love and ensuring a long-lasting chewing pleasure. It’s the ideal treat to keep your pup happily occupied for hours.

    Dental Health Boost: Chewing is not only enjoyable for dogs; it also promotes dental health. Our dog chews are designed to help reduce plaque and tartar buildup, while simultaneously strengthening your pet’s jaw muscles and maintaining overall oral hygiene.

    Digestible and Safe: We prioritise your dog’s well-being. Our chews are carefully selected and prepared to be easily digestible, making them suitable for dogs of all breeds and sizes. You can have peace of mind knowing that our product is free from any harmful additives or chemicals.

    Sustainable Sourcing: We are committed to eco-friendly practices. Our ingredients are responsibly sourced, supporting sustainable farming methods and minimising our impact on the environment.

Name: Joker - psie terapie
Description:
Jako behawiorysta, zoopsycholog i trener psów specjalizuję się w kompleksowej pomocy psom i ich opiekunom, oferując profesjonalne usługi.
Moim celem jest budowanie harmonijnych relacji między psami a ich opiekunami, opartych na wzajemnym zrozumieniu, szacunku i prawidłowej komunikacji.

Co mnie wyróżnia:
– indywidualne podejście do każdego psa i jego opiekuna,
– pozytywne metody pracy z psami,
– wieloletnie doświadczenie i ciągłe rozwijanie wiedzy i umiejętności,
– szeroki zakres usług: od terapii behawioralnych poprzez spacery socjalizacyjne, spacery miejskie po treningi posłuszeństwa i szkolenia specjalistyczne.

W czym mogę Wam pomóc:
– terapia behawioralna: diagnozuje i rozwiązuje problemy behawioralne psów, takie jak lęk, agresja, nadpobudliwość, czy problemy z zaufaniem,
– behawiorystyka: pomagam zrozumieć przyczyny zachowań Twojego psa i wspólnie pracujemy nad ich modyfikacją,
– treningi i szkolenia psów: od podstaw posłuszeństwa po indywidualnie dostosowane programy treningowe.

Dlaczego warto mi zaufać:
– posiadam szeroką wiedzę i praktyczne umiejętności, które pozwalają mi efektywnie wspierać psy i ich rodziny,
– stosuję metody pozytywne, które wzmacniają więź między Tobą a Twoim psem, jednocześnie zachęcając go do nauki i współpracy.

Skontaktuj się ze mną, aby umówić się na spotkanie i dowiedzieć się więcej o tym, jak mogę pomóc Tobie i Twojemu psu we wspólnej nauce aby cieszyć się szczęśliwym i zbalansowanym życiem razem.

Zapraszam do wspólnej pracy nad lepszą przyszłością dla Ciebie i Twojego psa!

Name: Double Knot Kennels
Description: Double Knot Kennels (“DKK”) has a simple dream, the world would be a better place if every home has a dog, and every dog has a home.  DKK is committed to offer minimally invasive canine research utilizing dogs available for forever homes rather than dogs only intended for testing. Most research kennels utilize dogs intended to spend their entire lives in a kennel. Beagles and Labs are the predominant breed used in Pharma studies because strict protocols as to size and breed are needed to meet the study requirements. While this plan may be necessary for Pharma level standards, we do not believe it is the most humane method to conduct most companion animal and pet food research.

Name: LootPaw
Description:
LootPaw is transforming pet behavioral monitoring by creating a connected ecosystem that provides deep behavioral insights and proactive care solutions. Our platform collects and processes data from a variety of sensors, analyzing movement, activity levels, and environmental factors to detect subtle behavioral changes that may indicate underlying health concerns. By leveraging advanced signal processing, we monitor patterns in pet behavior, such as variations in mobility, sleep disturbances, irregular eating habits, and signs of discomfort or anxiety. In the future, a planned cloud-based AI deployment will enhance these capabilities, providing even more precise predictive analytics for early detection of potential health issues.

At the core of our ecosystem is our flagship GPS tracker, which not only provides location tracking but also gathers continuous behavioral data to identify shifts in activity that could signal changes in a pet’s health. Soon, we will expand our ecosystem with the introduction of the LootPaw Smart Pet Feeder, which will track feeding patterns, portion sizes, and irregularities in eating behavior. By integrating multiple data sources, our system builds a comprehensive picture of a pet’s well-being, allowing owners and potentially veterinarians to make informed decisions.

Using our ecosystem - the LootPaw platform aims to potentially integrate with veterinary systems and other smart home devices, offering a unified experience that prioritizes proactive pet tracking. Through a user-friendly app, pet owners receive real-time alerts and actionable insights when behavioral anomalies are detected, enabling potential early intervention and preventative care. By combining continuous monitoring with intelligent data analysis, LootPaw empowers pet owners and potentially vets with the knowledge they need to keep their pets healthy.

Name: PetiQ - Pet Logistics
Description:
We're not just moving animals, we're building an industry.

"PetiQ - Pet Logistics", manages the entire logistics chain for pet relocations, including documentation, routing, transport, and boarding. Whether customer can travel with their pet or send them alone, we ensure safety, compliance, and peace of mind across borders.

What we do best is solve tricky cases in smart, unexpected ways - with minimal hassle for our customers. We ensure that you stay out of stress. Our role is to take care of the difficult parts, so you don’t have to worry. Your pet gets care. You get peace of mind.

The USA, UAE, EU, and Asia are markets with complex regulations, changing import rules, and strict protocols. We handle cases that others won't, like multi-leg routes, rare species, and tight deadlines.

Why Partners Trust Us
Over 10 years and thousands of relocations. We've solved problems that many haven't faced yet.
Global partner network - local experts in every key market deliver on the ground.  
White-label ready - seamless integration under your brand with no client-facing issues.

Who We Serve
Premium kennels, visa centers, and corporate HR and relocation teams. We act as your logistics department - responsive, reliable, and focused on results.

Real Solutions
- At Tbilisi airport, two hours before the flight. The documents were correct - confusion came from the inspection desk. Our courier’s knowledge made all the difference: the issue was cleared, and the puppy reached Kazakhstan right on schedule.
- A Bali rescue cat, which lacked a microchip and papers, followed our approved plan and passed through Portugal customs without any problems. 
- Warsaw service dog to Dubai: Cabin restrictions on Emirates, tight approval process. We got all the clearance. Employee and dog landed together, zero drama.

Our Foundation
Founded in 2014 and EU-licensed since 2020. We operated through COVID when borders were closed. We didn't just survive disruption, we defined reliability during it.

Description:
Floofball is a female-founded pet startup bringing sports fandom into the pet aisle through parody-inspired toys and accessories. Founded in 2023, our mission is simple: to create a cultural pet brand where fans and their pups can celebrate the game together.

We started with soccer, the world’s most beloved sport, designing plush parody soccer balls and team-inspired bandanas that let pets and their people show off their club pride. From “ChewSA” to “Seattle Hounders” to “Barkcelona,” our playful collections unite the passion of sports with the joy of pet parenthood.

What makes Floofball different?
 Cultural Connection – Our products aren’t just toys. They tap into the energy of global sports culture, giving fans a way to share their team spirit with their pets.
 Parody Meets Play – Every design combines clever parody with high-quality, safe, and fun products pets (and their parents) love.
 Female-Founded & Bootstrapped – Built from the ground up with creativity, grit, and community support.
 Proven Traction – Retail partnerships with boutique pet shops and soccer stores, growing direct-to-consumer sales, and recognition from influencers (including David Beckham’s pup!).
 Industry Momentum – Fresh off exhibiting at SuperZoo 2025, we’re expanding our team-inspired product lineup and strengthening retail partnerships.

Our vision is to scale Floofball into the #1 sports parody brand for pets, expanding beyond soccer into baseball, basketball, and football after the 2026 World Cup. Along the way, we’re committed to building community — supporting animal welfare initiatives and youth sports programs.

At Floofball, we believe fandom is more fun when shared with our four-legged teammates. Whether it’s game day, a walk around the block, or just playtime at home, our products bring smiles, wagging tails, and a little extra team spirit.

Name: Pet Wants Rockville
Description:
Does your dog scratch a lot? Excessive licking of it's paws? Hot spots? Chances are your pet might have an allergy or sensitivity to ingredients in commercial pet food. The most common forms of pet food allergies are related to CORN, WHEAT or SOY. Pet Wants never uses corn, wheat or soy in any of our formulas! Plus we can assure our customers that none of the products manufactured by our supplier were affected by any recent pet food recall concern. Our manufacturer is a fourth generation owned plant with no recalls in all that time.

Pet Wants food is exclusively crafted. It is slow cooked montly in small batches,  all natural, sugar-free, no fillers, and no animal by-products. We source only the best salmon, chicken, lamb, brown rice, and other ingredients. Fresh ingredients make for better food… and better health for pets. And since we never use corn, wheat, soy or dyes, the common pet health problems associated with these ingredients are no longer worries. 

Our fresh food is conveniently delivered to the customer within weeks of production, not months or years. We assure you our pet food is never warehoused or stored for long periods of time. We offer all of our pet food by the pound. Buy only what you need, hand-delivered for free.

Sourcing ingredients is important as well. All our ingredients are responsibly sourced in the U.S. The one exception is our lamb – this is sourced from New Zealand, where the standards for raising lamb is even higher than in the U.S.!

Description:

Our range of shampoos, balms and washes are handmade in New Zealand using only natural and eco-friendly ingredients.

We take pride in our sustainable approach to sourcing ingredients, ensuring that our products are chemical-free and healthy for you, your families especially the 4 legged family members!

We are a family-owned business that takes great pride in our New Zealand roots. Our products are made with love and care so that you can enjoy the best of what nature has to offer.

We source the highest quality natural ingredients and create luxurious skincare products with integrity, from the heart of New Zealand. Our homemade castile soaps are prepared with locally sourced ingredients and are free from synthetic fragrances, parabens, and sulphates. Chuck has a lifetime of experience caring for his own pets and is a certified dog walker with Dog Walking Academy.  We are both certified in Pet First Aid/CPR.
We started this as a labor of love for pets whose people struggle to travel due to the difficulty of finding a trusted professional pet service.  We serve our local area so we can provide the level of care we would want for our own pets when we are away.

As pet owners we echo with these words. We also understand the responsibilities and challenges that we face as pet parents. So, to take away your woes and give your pets the treatment they truly deserve, we bring to you Wag’N Tails, a fully-integrated one-stop platform that caters to all your pets’ needs and provides them with the paw-fect environment to thrive. Skeptical about planning that long vacation with your family because you are worried about your pet’s wellbeing? Well, now your dogs can have a vacation while you are enjoying one. Our services include a 24 x 7 Pet Clinic and Boarding with caretakers and a vet present on the premises at all times. Covering an area of over 15000 sq. ft. with an outdoor interactive play zone as well as an indoor play area, your dogs can run around to their heart’s content and play with other fur-babies. Additionally, we also have state-of-the-art grooming services provided by hand-picked professionals so that your furry little baby looks as good as he feels. This includes haircuts, anti-tick baths, teeth cleaning, nail clipping, massages and much more, all under one roof. We treat your babies like our own. Each dog is separated into supervised playrooms depending on size, play style and temperament, ensuring the comfort and safety of all other pets. Moreover, you have access to the surveillance footage so that you can keep an eye on your doggo while you are away. Our brand includes an e-commerce section where you can also find delicious treats and handsome accessories for your dogs and cats. Because, after all they deserve all the pampering and more!
No matter what, we will make sure that Wag’N Tails is a home away from home for your pets!

Since 1988, Scoop Masters has been helping pet owners and homeowners associations with their pet waste problems. We schedule regular visits to your home or community and maintain pet waste stations, walk the common areas to pick up the dog poop! We offer sanitizing services for dog runs and artificial turf.

When it comes to dog poop bag dispensers, we can consult with property managers or board members as to what brand and style will fit in their budget. We can help you with how many and where to have them installed, and we can install them too. Free quotes are always available.

Most importantly, we maintain them by replacing the dog poop bags on a regular basis, emptying the trash cans and wiping off the station of any bird droppings. We can also make minor repairs as needed to keep them looking fresh, clean and inviting to use.

Name: Unleashed Dog Hotel
Description: Simply put, we’re a small group of people that share one common belief: Dogs are people too!  We want to care for your dog as they would be at home, by you.  We want them to feel comfortable and cared for while they’re with us and also feel like they can have fun and play.  Our facility has been designed with these goals in mind.  From our spacious play areas to our luxury suites.  No detail has been left unattended.  Come in and see for yourself!

Name: Zinzie Pie LLC
Description: Zinzie Pie LLC is a company dedicated to improving the lives of pet parents and their animal companions.  We look for unique products that make their charges safer and the parents’ lives easier. Our products are chosen with care and we use the products we choose. Our company values reflect that dedication to enhancing the lives of our companion animals and the parents who love them.

Name: The City Loo
Description:
Your posh pet deserves a posh potty! That's why we created City Loo, a chic modern pet potty solution so your pet can go potty on their schedule.

We strive to make pet ownership more convenient without compromising personal style. Through innovative design and a curated catalog of premium products, the City Loo brand was created to provide solutions that are as fashionable as they are functional. Custom made & manufactured locally in the Pacific Northwest.

Name: Walks & Whiskers
Description: We love animals here at Walks & Whiskers and have decades of experience working with them. You can trust us to provide a safe, comfortable, fun, and healthy environment for your furry friend. Whether it’s taking them for walks, coming by to feed them, or providing at-home care, the way we look at it is that they would do anything for us, therefore, we should do the same for them. Contact us today to let us know exactly what you have in mind for your pet's home care visit, and we'll be on our way to meet you!

Name: DogMeal
Description:
Anasuya Food Tech Pvt. Ltd. 

 Specialized in DogMeal - Your dog’s instant home-style feast! Replacing 'ghar ka khaana' with a nutritious twist.
 Offering a diverse range: Chicken & Vegetables, Chicken & Egg, Chicken & Rice, Chicken & Liver.
 Prepared with fresh, natural ingredients, harnessing retort technology - No added preservatives.
 Canned to preserve nutrition & freshness - ensuring your furry friend gets the best, every time.
 Catering to the fast-paced lifestyle with easy-to-use, affordable dog meals.
 Our mission: Serve love in a can, ensuring every meal is a balanced plate for your dog. 

 Join us in making meal times better for our furry friends!

Name: Academy of Grooming Arts
Description: Academy of Grooming Arts has been founded in partnership with Commando College for Dogs and Trainers, Plush Puppy – Australia’s number one grooming product brand, and the James Bennett Grooming Academy

Name: Free To Live
Description:
Free To Live is a small, family run business based in York in Yorkshire. 

The company was started in early 2022 when our Cockapoo puppy, Chewy, suffered from dry paws during his first winter. This sparked the idea to make our own paw balm and other dog grooming products, using natural ingredients, to create the best experience for dogs and their owners.

Our aim is for everyone to be able to enjoy spending time pampering their dogs in the comfort of their own home.

We pride ourselves on only creating high quality products that we would want to use on ourselves. 

Our products are homemade, sustainable, vegan and contain dog friendly essential oils.

Name: petlabs
Description:
Welcome to a world where your pets' health and happiness come first, with top-quality supplements and supplies tailored just for them.

With a passion for pets and a commitment to their well-being, PetLabs brings years of experience in the pet industry to provide you with the best products and solutions for your furry friends.

With a solid background in the pet supplements and supplies industry, PetLabs has successfully helped countless pet owners enhance their pets' lives. Our in-depth knowledge of pet nutrition, behaviour, and health allows us to handpick and curate a range of premium products that cater to the specific needs of each pet.

With a keen eye for quality and safety, PetLabs ensures that all products offered meet the highest standards, sourced from reputable manufacturers and backed by scientific research. Our dedication to excellence has earned them recognition within the industry and the trust of pet owners worldwide.

Whether it's supplements to support joint health, calming aids for anxious pets, or eco-friendly supplies that promote sustainability, PetLabs has carefully curated a selection that meets the diverse needs of pets and their owners.

Join PetLabs on this journey towards a healthier, happier, and more fulfilling life for your pets. Experience the difference that premium pet supplements and supplies can make, and discover a world of endless tail wags and purrs.

Name: CozyPattes
Description: Pet sitter professionnelle, assurée et diplômée (titulaire de l'ACACED) je vous propose mes services pour des visites à domicile de vos chats & NAC et promenades pour vos chiens.

Name: Beach Buddies Pet Services
Description: Beach Buddies is a professional pet care company. Our clients know that they are trusting their loved ones and their homes to a well-established, experienced, qualified, insured and bonded business. We realize that no two homes or two pets are exactly alike, so we offer a wide variety of services to precisely fit your needs.

Name: King's Dog Daycare
Description:
At King's Dog Daycare, we hold the belief that dogs transcend the role of mere pets; they are cherished companions, emotional supports, and integral members of the family. Originally established as a dog daycare facility, we have since evolved into a haven for both devoted dog owners and dog lovers alike. In addition, we offer delicious single-origin Columbian coffee and our hot chocolates and matcha lattes are very popular!

For small dog owners, we extend an invitation to use our Dog Daycare services for dogs weighing under 15 kilograms. Our dedicated daycare space is comprised of a spacious playroom and garden. We also offer a range of Grooming services, including indulgent treatments such as Blueberry Facials, Pawdicures, and Wash & Floof's, featuring Melanie Newman products.

For the dog lovers among us, we offer the unique Pet-A-Pooch experience, where you can enjoy 45 minutes of cuddles and playtime with some of our most friendly daycare dogs and even get a snap with our resident Chow Chow, King Louie!

Name: Pet Origini
All Over The Map Patches
Description: Pet Swag to commemorate all the memories you make on the map!

Name: Demi's Dog House, LLC
Description:
At Demi's, pups become part of our family and are treated like our own! 

We are a boutique facility that offers personalized service to both our clients and their pups. We are dedicated to providing a fun and safe environment for pups both large and small.

DDH strives to maintain a fun and rewarding work environment for loyal, hard-working employees who genuinely care about the dogs and care about doing a good job every day.

Nicole Felsher opened Demi's Dog House in 2009. Her little but mighty 5 lb Yorkshire Terrier, Demi (2003-2018), is the namesake and the inspiration for Demi's Dog House (DDH). After Nicole completed graduate school and spent more than a decade working in Human Resources Management for the oil and gas industry, she decided to pursue her true passion for animals and ventured into the dog daycare/boarding/grooming industry. Demi's has been a staple in the Midtown/Montrose community in Houston, TX ever since.

Name: Blue Vetlab
Description: Blue Vetlab is proud to serve the diverse communities of Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, and beyond. We’ve built trust by prioritizing hygiene, accuracy, and customer satisfaction. Our home collection services are designed to fit into your busy life, whether you’re a working professional, a senior citizen, or a pet parent juggling multiple responsibilities.

Name: Roth Pets
Description: Roth Pets is a pet care start-up, based out of Mumbai, India.  Our ergonomic speciality wet wipes are perfect for keeping your pets clean and happy. Launching soon!

Name: Virtuous Vittles
Description: 100% plant-based, delicious, nutritious food for dogs and cats.  Inspired by our love of all creatures, wild & tame, and by our mounting concerns about conventional pet foods & their environmental impact, we set out to find a better alternative. Our kitchens became our laboratories and our companions our collaborators.

Name: Buxton
Description:
Via our chain of affordable luxury cat boarding clinics, and our range of other additional feline services, we aim to challenge the industry standard. Traditionally, you had to choose either small rooms (sometimes attached to kennels, which can be stressful for some cats), or you had to choose extremely pricey alternatives, which are not only unapproachable for some consumers, they also lean more into our perception of luxury than what actually makes cats feel stress-free and comfortable.

With our luxury catteries, you can attain peace of mind, knowing your cat is in safe hands - without breaking the bank. Redefine cat boarding with us.

Name: UNTAMED ANIMAL HEALTH ESSENTIALS
Description: At Untamed Animal Health, we take a caring and scientific approach to create high-quality, effective, and safe supplements that optimize the well-being of pets and horses.

Name: Animal City by Au Monde Des Animaux
Sticky Tongue USA
Description: Sticky Tongue USA's mission is to better the lives of wild and captive chameleons everywhere. Our flagship product is our Chameleon Cricket Feeder.

Name: Bredwell
Description:
Welcome to BREDWELL! Home of the best in bowl, hand-crafted meals and treats for deserving dogs! 
 
We are a woman-owned, dog care company based out of Barrington, IL (greater Chicago area) that operates both online and via a brick-and-mortar storefront and kitchen, where everything is custom and hand-made daily.

Our product line includes a wide array of our Bredwell Goodie Indulgent Treats (bacon & cheese, double cheeseburger, and peanut butter), Bredwell Goodie Supplemental Treats (active health, joint health, and skin & coat), Bredwell Smooches, Bredwell Bits (adult, active, healthy weight, and senior), and custom meals, as well as birthday biscuits, holiday flavors, and special gifts for every occasion.

Name: woofinwaggle, llc
Description: Woofinwaggle was a labor of love and I am proud of the community we built in N. Raleigh.  I sold the company at the end 2024 as I looked toward the future and a new adventure.  I am looking forward to my next adventure in the pet wellness space.  Keep your eyes open for information on Woof Wellness NC!  Coming soon.

Name: Zoomin Groomin Austin
Description:
The Groomer That Comes Whenever You Call.
At Zoomin Groomin, we turned our love for pets into a job we love. Our mobile groomers are experts at pampering your pets and making them feel clean and happy — without the hassle or mess! No wonder so much of our business comes from repeat customers.

Expert Grooming In Your Home Or Driveway
Dogs & Cats Welcome
No Cages — Ever
Extra Comfort For Older, Injured And Anxious Animals
Gentle, Humane And Never Rushed
Low-heat Air Fluff Drying
Non-toxic, Eco-friendly Products
Uses 90% Less Water
Safe for your pet. Safe for the planet.
All of our groomers use a 100% non-toxic and eco-friendly Pure Oxygen Ultra Shampoo that safely cleans and deodorizes your pet without leaving any residue. It keeps your pet’s skin and coat clean, fresh, soft and shiny, saves water and protects the environment. Woof!

100% non-toxic, eco friendly products
Safe, healthy and effective
Reduces usual grooming water usage by up to 90%
Eases the burden on wells, rain water tanks and septic systems

Sit. Stay. We'll come to you.

Description: Cane corso kennel and dog boarding facility based in Belgrade, Serbia.Cane corso puppies and stud service available.

Name: 84 Acres Canine Country Club
Description: 84 Acres Canine Country Club provides a safe space for your 4 legged companion. Our site is a private and secure country estate which is great for walking, playing and relaxing, 84 Acres is the pawfect place for dogs to be dogs and form lasting friendships.

Name: Humains et Animaux Heureux
Description:
Humains et Animaux Heureux est une association dédiée à créer des environnements où humains et animaux vivent en harmonie, dans un esprit de respect mutuel.
Nous nous engageons à promouvoir le bien-être et une coexistence harmonieuse, en particulier entre les humains et leurs animaux de compagnie, tels que les chiens et les chats. 
Nos actions visent à encourager des relations sereines et bienveillantes, en prenant en compte les besoins et spécificités de chaque espèce.
L’association Humains et Animaux Heureux regroupe des professionnels formés, expérimentés et certifiés, capables d’intervenir dans diverses situations auprès des humains (adultes et enfants) et de leurs animaux de compagnie.
Chaque intervenant professionnel de l’association Humains et Animaux Heureux intervient et adhère aux principes et aux bonnes pratiques de l’éducation bienveillante, en veillant à respecter cette philosophie de vie

Name: Orchard Point Kennels
Description: Orchard Point Kennels is an expert-led dog boarding and enrichment facility just outside of Eugene, nestled on the edge of Fern Ridge Reservoir. With indoor/outdoor spaces designed for dogs to be themselves, OPK offers tailored services that go beyond basic boarding. From playgroups to specialized training and enrichment activities, every stay is curated to meet each dog’s needs. Rooted in experience and care, OPK is where dogs thrive, play, and feel at home.

Name: Fluff & Fur - A Pet Boutique
Description: We are an upscale e-commerce pet boutique, offering high-quality and unique products that are sourced within the USA. Our inventory includes a wedding collection for pets, designer pet clothing, specialty food and treats, specialized pet accessories, pet toys, and games, gift items for the pet lover, and so much more!

Name: The Pawsitive Company (Pawtopia Solutions Pvt. Ltd.)
Description: Welcome to The Pawsitive Company - where we're dedicated to enriching the lives of pets and their devoted parents. Our mission is clear: to provide top-quality products that prioritize the well-being and happiness of your furry family members. From innovative toys to premium nutrition and celebratory merchandise, each item is carefully chosen or expertly crafted to enhance your pet's quality of life. But we're not just here for your pets; we're here for you, the pet parents. Understanding the joys and challenges of caring for your beloved companions, we strive to make pet care effortless and enjoyable. Whether you need expert advice, reliable products, or a supportive community, we're here to lend a helping paw every step of the way. Join us at The Pawsitive Company, where we celebrate the special bond between pets and their parents, and work together to create happier, healthier lives for all.

Name: 88 Pets Mart
Description:
Bringing joy to you and your pets since 1989. The Pet Shop You Want. We Have Everything You Need for Your Pet. 88 Pets Mart is a company in Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia. Name: Prancing Poodle Pet Care & Dog Walking Services
Description:
Looking for top-tier pet sitting and dog walking services in Okemos, Lansing, East Lansing, Williamston, Haslett, or Holt? Say hello to Prancing Poodle Pet Care & Dog Walking Services! 

We're the go-to team for in-home pet care and dog walking services, treating your furry family members to all the love, attention, and exercise they deserve. 

Do you need pet sitting services? Whether it's daily drop-ins or extended overnight stays, our experienced and dedicated crew is here to ensure your pets stay happy and healthy while you're away. 

If mid-day dog walking is a challenge, we will be your dog's best walking pal whenever you need us.  

Trust Prancing Poodle for professional, reliable, and heartfelt pet care—because we believe your pet deserves the best. 

Visit our website to learn all about the superior services we provide and to book a free consultation.

Name: PT Heli Pet Solutions
Description:
PT Heli Pet Solutions is a marketing strategic agency dedicated to empowering companies within the pet industry in Indonesia. Our commitment lies in providing innovative solutions, insightful strategic advice, and comprehensive support to businesses aiming to thrive in this potential market. Our team of experts combines industry knowledge with a deep understanding of market trends, enabling us to offer strategies that drive growth and enhance competitive advantage.

Leveraging customized services and advanced digital technology, PT Heli Pet Solutions assists clients in optimizing their growth potential in Indonesia. We recognize the diverse and rapidly evolving landscape of the pet industry and strive to equip our clients with the tools and strategies necessary to navigate it successfully. From market analysis and brand positioning to digital marketing and customer engagement, our services are designed to meet the specific demands of each client. 

At PT Heli Pet Solutions, our goal is to strengthen the market position of our clients by offering all-encompassing assistance. Whether a company is looking to enter the Indonesian pet market or seeking to expand its existing presence, PT Heli Pet Solutions is committed to providing the strategic support and innovative solutions needed to achieve success.

Name: Gliparis
Description: En değerli dostlarımız için hem dayanıklı hem de şık tasmalar tasarlayabilmek için çıktığımız yolda özenle seçilen pamuklu ithal kumaşları çinko alaşımlı ithal aksesuarlarla birleştirdik ve tasmaları günlük yaşamın ışıltısı haline getirdik. Ayrıca en yakın dostlarımızla uyumlu olsun diye de anneler için aynı kumaştan tokalar ürettik. Name: ETdog
Description:
ETdog is an animal education and therapy ecosystem.
We translate the canine universe so you can have a healthy relationship with your pet. 
Because we believe that connections are not something from another planet.

Name: Pongo Dog and Cat Outfitters
Description:
Com conceito inédito no mercado, a PONGO dog and cat outfitters, foi criada para suprir a necessidade de quem quer conforto, design e sofisticação em móveis e acessórios para seu PET.
Com uma equipe incrível de artesãos e costureiros à indústrias renomadas, o novo conceito em lojas de cães e gatos tem objetivo de criar acessórios elegantes e coordenados, com design, para o estilo de vida clássico e contemporâneo. As coleções tem um toque criativo e discreto, usando um sentido inato de cor e um forte uso de materiais nobres e naturais.
Os produtos inspiradores incluem camas minimalistas, bowls em cerâmica esmaltada e acessórios divertidos para os cães e gatos mais exigentes.
Na PONGO, tudo é cuidadosamente pensado para garantir o conforto, a qualidade dos produtos e um atendimento impecável para você e para o seu Pet!

Name: Hundeschule Blickwinkel GmbH
Description:
Du suchst eine Hundeschule, die nicht nur in der Hundeerziehung, sondern auch in der Freude an der Zusammenarbeit mit deinem vierbeinigen Freund Expertise hat? Dann bist du bei der Hundeschule Blickwinkel GmbH genau richtig! Wir sind in Flawil SG, Maienfeld GR und Eschlikon TG vertreten und seit 2017 Ihr Ansprechpartner für eine freundliche und effektive Hundeerziehung.

Unser Hauptanliegen ist es, dich und deinen Hund auf dem Weg zu einem harmonischen und starken Team zu begleiten. Wir bieten Ihnen individuell abgestimmte Trainingsprogramme, die genau auf die Bedürfnisse deines Hundes und deines Alltags zugeschnitten sind. Ob du deinen neuen Vierbeiner von Anfang an richtig erziehen möchtest, im Alltag mit deinem Hund auf Hürden stösst oder einfach sichergehen willst, dass dein Hund gut erzogen, beschäftigt und rundum glücklich ist - wir sind für dich da!

Unser Ansatz ist individuell: Wir setzen auf Kleingruppen mit maximal sechs Hundert-Mensch-Teams. Das ermöglicht eine individuelle Betreuung, in der jedes Team in seinem eigenen Tempo arbeiten kann. Und das Beste? Bei uns erhältst du auch Unterstützung zwischen den Trainingseinheiten. So garantieren wir, dass du und dein Hund kontinuierliche Fortschritte machen.

Der Einstieg bei uns ist jederzeit möglich. Schenke dir und deinem Hund das Geschenk einer starken, freudigen Bindung und eines stressfreien Alltags. Lass uns zusammenarbeiten, um das

Name: Natua Pet
Description: Il cibo per cani e gatti dalla parte della natura.

Name: HypePets
Description:
Welcome to HypePets, where animal lovers and rescue enthusiasts come for education, entertainment, and inspiration!

More specifically, we are a hub for rescue lovers. If you’ve ever rescued an animal from the streets, adopted from a shelter, donated to an animal welfare cause, or given a home–temporarily or permanently–to any animal in need, this website is for you!

Here at Petrics, we share the most interesting questions answered, the most entertaining news and culture, and the most inspiring rescue stories.

Additionally, our mission is to give back to animal welfare organizations so they can continue their good work in saving the constant stream of animals in need. In fact, 5% of all profits from Petrics are donated to animal-saving initiatives!

Our team has been animal caretakers and lovers all our lives. We get it. We know how deep the love for your furbabies goes, and we know where all your questions come from. We have them too! That’s why we strive to bring you the best pet-related content out there, backed by data and real-life trials, as much as possible. All our recommendations are based on experience, not just regurgitated information on the internet.

Meet our team of animal lovers below!

Name: Sarah's Pet Care Revolution (Permanently Closed)
Description:
Permanently closed as of December 2024 after 14 wonderful years serving New Orleans families with trusted, in-home pet care.
---
Sarah's Pet Care Revolution provides thoughtful pet care and owner support that respects the pet, the family, the community, and the planet.  

We believe your pet is more than just a pet. He or she is an important member of the family, a grounding and loving presence in your life, and your trusted companion.

Sarah's Pet Care Revolution is an insured and bonded professional pet sitting, dog walking, socialization, and training service in New Orleans. When we care for your cat or dog, we take that responsibility very seriously. At the same time, we are going to have plenty of fun with your pet.  When you are away, you will know that your pet is not only well taken care of but also loved and appreciated.

Name: Eshla Merchant LLP
Description: Premium quality products made with a history of an emotional connection and love and care for pets. We deal in the fanciest and luxurious horse and dog rugs with the finest quality raw materials. Strong-built, long-lasting, and durable products that your pets would love to have and it will also protect them under harsh weather conditions. For all the pet lovers out there, it is the perfect place to find all accessories for your extended family members, your pets.

Name: Fetch Haus - Australia
Description:
At Fetch Haus we have a simple belief that our fury family members deserve nothing but the best.

Specialising exclusively in Australian and New Zealand Natural Foods, providing premium products, we take pride in the curation of our collection of the finest, all-natural products for your pets.

From nutrition to play, grooming to relaxation, every item in our collection is chosen with your pet in mind.

Prioritising quality over private label hidden agendas,  you can trust that when you visit Fetch Haus, you have access to the most suitable products for your pets.

Our founder Luke, has over 25 years experience in the Pet Industry that has helped shape Fetch Haus into a haven for pet owners who share his passion.

Name: PETS +
Description: We are now closed for operations, but not as a brand, stay tuned for unique products and services dedicated to the wellness of your furry family.

Name: Synaptic Sales
Description:
Synaptic Sales isn’t just a business, it’s a premise. It was born from years of observing sales from the sidelines, through frustrations and disappointments, and from the dream of doing it differently. What began as an unconventional idea grew into a commitment to see the beauty of selling and put it into practice.

At Synaptic Sales, we only sell what we truly believe in and have a stake in, from innovative SaaS solutions to environmental products. That conviction drives us, allowing us to share with others not just what we sell, but why it matters.

J. Andrew Wallace

Name: SafePassages Pet Cremation
Description: SafePassages Pet Cremation (SPPC) specializes in delivering compassionate and transparent pet and equine cremation services.

Name: Ubicanimal
Description:
Tené un rápido acceso para ubicar, adoptar y dar en adopción a todo tipo de animales.

Ubicanimal surgió en el año 2014 como parte de un proyecto liderado por jóvenes emprendedores que buscaban abordar problemáticas sociales. A lo largo de los años, este proyecto fue evolucionando y transformándose hasta convertirse en una página web. Ubicanimal es un ambicioso proyecto cuyo objetivo principal es ofrecer a los amantes de los animales una plataforma en línea que facilite la ubicación, adopción y donación de todo tipo de animales.
Nuestra visión es crear un espacio en la web donde la comunidad de amantes de los animales pueda encontrar y conectar de manera efectiva a animales en busca de un nuevo hogar con personas y familias que desean brindarles amor y cuidados.

Características Clave:

1.	Ubicación Fácil y Rápida
2.	Perfiles de Mascotas
3.	Adopción Responsable
4.	Facilitación de Adopción
5.	Comunidad de Apoyo

Objetivos:

•	Facilitar la adopción de animales en busca de un hogar amoroso.
•	Promover la tenencia responsable de mascotas.
•	Conectar a rescatistas y organizaciones con personas dispuestas a adoptar o recibir animales en adopción.
•	Crear una comunidad en línea dedicada al bienestar de los animales.

Ubicanimal es más que una plataforma en línea; es una comunidad comprometida con el bienestar de los animales. Nuestro proyecto busca marcar la diferencia al conectar a animales necesitados con personas dispuestas a brindarles un hogar amoroso. Esperamos que Ubicanimal se convierta en un recurso fundamental para todos aquellos que comparten su vida con mascotas y desean hacer del mundo un lugar mejor para ellos. Únete a nosotros y sé parte de esta noble causa!

Name: PetCom
Description: Petcom, Meerut's first ever hooman-doggo pet festival, is a fantastic event for our four-legged paw companions along with their family of hoomans. It was establised in 2021 with the idea to give pet lovers an opportunity to celebrate their love for animals - a day filled with exciting games, contests for young and old, doctor consultations, shopping spree, pet adoption from many NGOs and so much more!

Name: Nom Nom Pet Treats
Description:
Making treats has always been something I really enjoyed doing for our 7 furry kids. And if you are wondering why I started Nom Nom the answer is pretty simple. Like many pet parents we were quite frustrated with the lack of natural, healthy treats available at the pet stores. So this is how I decided to make our own treats. We believe that our pets deserve natural and species appropriate food that they are meant to eat. 

Not only do I enjoy making treats for our dogs and cats, I also discovered that there is a huge gap when it comes to natural and healthy rabbit treats. Hence, I started making them so they too can enjoy a variety of nutritious treats especially made for their delicate digestive system.

So after 3 years of making treats for our family, I want your 4-legged family to have the chance to enjoy these natural, species appropriate treats as much as ours do. Every treat that I make, is filled with love, knowledge and passion and will not be dispatched until our furry QC team has passed it!

Name: Oliver’s Highland Pet Crematorium
Description:
Oliver's Highland Pet Crematorium is an independent, family-run crematorium  serving pet owners and veterinary practices across the Highlands with compassion, dignity and complete transparency. 

Set in an idyllic and private location on the beautiful Black Isle, I support pet owners and veterinary practices across the Highlands with a service built around time, compassion, privacy and dignity. 

Inspired by the loss of my own beloved dog, Oliver, I set out to create a service that puts families and their pets at the heart of every decision it makes. 

Every cremation at Oliver's is individual - no exceptions, no compromises. For families who can't face driving or are perhaps too far away, I offer a Highland-wide collection and return service for those who need it. 

I work alongside a local, compassionate and experienced Vet to offer a gentle put-to-sleep service on-site where pet owners are given both the time and privacy to say goodbye in a non-clinical environment. Once a pet has peacefully passed, they are gently carried through for cremation with no need for transport or cold storage. This service can help turn a painful goodbye into a beautiful goodbye. 

I am proud to collaborate with talented Highland Artisans to provide beautiful, bespoke urns and other keep sakes.
Location: Conon Bridge, Alcaig Farmhouse & Steading, Alcaig

Name: LAB+BONE
Description:
As most of you will be aware, incidents of dog theft are increasing hugely. The rise in demand for puppies and dogs during the Covid pandemic has turned stealing dogs into a booming business opportunity.

Our furry family members are being taken from homes, gardens and parks when out on a walk with us. A Vice documentary, “The Gangs that Steal your Puppies”, is a terrifying insight into the organisation, pervasiveness and ruthlessness of dog thieves in the UK. 

Microchips, often misunderstood to be trackers, aren’t up to the job. In their 2021 report, Battersea Dogs and Cats Home states that 63% of stray microchipped dogs collected by local authorities have an inaccurate database record. Plus, sadly, microchips can be removed even as easy as they were put in – and police require evidence to take action.

LAB+BONE offer a solution. They ensure you (the dog parent) can prove you legally own your dog in the event of theft or dispute of ownership, which means they can be returned home.

LAB+BONE is a service that protects a dog’s identity using its DNA. 

DNA is stored in a cryogenic freezer and if your dog is stolen, you the owner has the necessary forensic evidence to legally reclaim your dog. 

If dog thieves knew that all dogs were protected in this way, dog theft would be pointless and families would be safe.
