Name: BrilliantK9
Description:
BrilliantK9 makes The BrilliantK9 Ergonomic Dog Harness
Available in 16 sizes and 31 colors for the perfect fit.
The only Ergonomic no-pull dog harness.
Made in the USA
As lifelong dog enthusiasts who have owned and trained rescue dogs of all shapes and sizes we found a need for better designed, higher quality, products that promote the long term health and safety of all dogs, whether they are top performance dogs and/or your best friend lying on the couch beside you.

Particularly dissatisfied with existing dog walking tools on the market, we consulted with veterinarian chiropractors, dog massage therapists, rehabilitation specialists and dog trainers as well as our friends in the dog agility and training community.

We asked these experts in dog health one question: "Is there any walking tool available that is ergonomic for the dog?"

What we learned my not be surprising, because the answer was "Not Really".

There are physical drawbacks to all collars and harnesses that put pressure on a dog's head, neck and ribcage. These tools also promote the pulling and lunging forward that dogs do when they are restrained.

So we set out to design a harness that was ergonomically superior to anything on the market and that would not encourage the dog's natural opposition reflex (to drive their head down and pull). To meet our standards it must also allow the dog to run, swim, play, compete or move in any direction comfortably.

With the help of our many advisors, and feedback from our customers, we now make the most comfortable harness available to your dog and you.

Our companion animal's health is as important as our own and our mission is to create ergonomic, high quality products that meet their individual needs.

We are grateful to our customers who have chosen our products for their dogs and especially to those who have assisted us in spreading the word about BrilliantK9

Name: FTI Pet Products, Inc. dba Flea Treats
Description:
At FTI Pet Products, OUR MISSION is to provide a SAFE, NATURAL and EFFECTIVE option for flea and tick prevention.

Growing Up in Southern California…
our family pets suffered from flea bites and related allergies. We recall our mom trying every flea collar and shampoo available, with no real effect. When they first came out, we used topicals on our family pets, but always disliked the fact that many contain harmful ingredients and can have bad side effects.
When our mom came across Jeff Gilmore with his Flea Treats at the Orange County Fair in the 1990’s, it was a game changer! Finally, a safe, natural and effective way to control fleas! Little did she know she was late to the game, as Flea Treats started way back in 1980! By the time Mom “discovered” them in the 1990’s they had already built up a loyal following of customers just like her – people interested in flea control without insecticides for their pets.

How It All Happened…
When placing an order the summer of 2022, April spoke with Jeanie and learned she and Jeff were retiring and putting the business up for sale. We loved the idea of a family business and working for ourselves. Our mom would be so excited to see her kids working together to bring the great product she loved to great people who love their pets.
Jeff and Jeanie told us how unbelievably nice all their customers have been over the years, and we’re finding that to be so very true! It’s exciting and gratifying to hear stories of how pets are being helped by Flea Treats – we couldn’t have hoped for a more fulfilling opportunity to come our way!

Name: AniHomeCare
Description:
AniHomeCare est bien plus qu'une entreprise de gardiennage d'animaux à domicile, c'est un projet que je porte depuis de nombreuses années, façonné par une passion profonde pour le bien-être des animaux.

À la suite d'une étude minutieuse du marché, j'ai constaté qu'il y a un manque de places dans les pensions ainsi qu'un manque de solutions pour les animaux les plus sensibles. C'est pourquoi chez Anihomecare, nous nous engageons à fournir des services de gardiennage qui répondent aux normes les plus élevées en matière de bien-être animal, prodigués par des experts ayant reçu une formation rigoureuse et bénéficiant des autorisations requises.

Nous comprenons également que tous les animaux sont uniques, et certains ont des besoins spécifiques. C'est pourquoi nous offrons une alternative aux pensions traditionnelles en proposant la garde à domicile. Pour les animaux qui préfèrent rester dans leur environnement familier, sans le stress d'un nouvel environnement ou la cohabitation avec d'autres congénères qu'ils ne connaissent pas, notre service de garde à domicile est la solution idéale.

Forte de mon CFC de gardien d'animaux et de mes neuf années d'expérience en tant qu'assistant en médecine vétérinaire, une profession qui me passionne toujours autant et que je continue d'exercer à 50%, je m'engage à fournir un service de gardiennage exemplaires à vos précieux compagnons.

Mon objectif est de faire évoluer AniHomeCare vers un service à 100% d'ici un an, avec l'arrivée imminente d'un associé tout aussi passionné. Parallèlement, j'envisage d'élargir notre zone d'intervention afin de répondre aux besoins de vos animaux.

En ce moment, je démarre cette aventure avec deux remplaçants, tous animés par une détermination inébranlable et une confiance absolue en nos compétences.

Name: Welcome dog
Description:
Plus de 100 000 animaux de compagnie sont abandonnés chaque année. 

Du plus profond de moi, je souhaite que ce chiffre diminue et que l’on puisse voir de plus en plus de chiens épanouis et bien dans leurs pattes. Je suis particulièrement touchée par la cause animale, mais je crois aussi profondément en l’humain et en sa capacité à s’améliorer, et à prendre de bonnes décisions. 

C’est pourquoi pour lutter contre ce fléau, j’accompagne les personnes qui souhaitent adopter un chien afin de les aider à trouver la race la plus adaptée à leur mode de vie, pour qu’ils puissent vivre les 15 prochaines années en toute sérénité avec ce nouveau membre de la famille. 

Je les conseille sur le choix d’une race en adéquation avec leur mode de vie pour rendre cette nouvelle famille heureuse.  Je leur apporte également les clefs pour faciliter l’arrivée du chien dans le foyer en leur expliquant notamment quel est le matériel nécessaire, que faut-il faire et ne pas faire les premiers jours, les premières semaines et pour finir, je leur donne quelques astuces d’éducation positive. 

Pour cela je propose un service d’accompagnement individuel pour choisir et accueillir votre chien dans les  meilleures conditions.

Description:
Crafting durability and style for your furry friends. Tail-wagging design, one Biothane collar and leash at a time 

At RexyWear, we've combined our love for pets with innovation and style to bring you top-tier dog collars and leashes. We understand that pets are cherished family members, and our mission is to provide customizable, durable, and stylish pet accessories that mirror their unique personalities. Our journey began with a dedicated pet owner's quest to offer the best for a furry friend.

Our products are meticulously crafted with Biothane, a material originally used for equestrian applications and now perfected for dogs. Biothane is known for its exceptional durability, water-resistant qualities, and vibrant colors, making it a game-changer in the world of pet accessories. This material withstands the elements, remaining flexible and vibrant even after soaking, and it's a safer alternative to traditional leather or chain collars.

What sets RexyWear apart is our unwavering commitment to quality. We offer a unique "Wear and Tear Policy" to replace or repair any damaged product, providing peace of mind to pet owners. We also feature seasonal collections to keep your furry friends stylish all year round and an exclusive membership program for regular style updates.

Our story is intertwined with Rexy, a Pomsky born in January 2022, who served as the inspiration for our brand. With RexyWear, we aim to provide pet owners with innovative, stylish, and quality pet accessories that enhance their pets' lives. Our corporate office is centrally located in downtown Toronto, and we're looking forward to a future physical storefront to welcome customers in person.

With a focus on innovation, quality, and style, we're dedicated to enhancing your pet's life while offering peace of mind to pet owners. Experience the RexyWear difference, where pet fashion meets pet passion, creating memories that last a lifetime.

Name: ZipSpa
Description:
ZipSpa: A Smarter Way to Wash Your Pet

From a Simple Problem to a Game-Changing Solution

It all started with a surprise—when Kevin Redick brought home a German Shepherd for his kids, he didn’t expect his wife’s reaction: “You're not washing that dog in our tub!” That one moment sparked an idea—how could pet owners keep their furry friends clean without turning their bathrooms into a mess?

With over a decade of experience as a product designer, Kevin knew he could solve the problem. What began as a makeshift plastic-lined box evolved through years of innovation. He experimented with an elongated transmission box, bent PVC tubing with hot sand, and tested on over 30 dogs—all to create the perfect pet-washing station.

Meet ZipSpa: The Ultimate Pet Bathing Solution
After 14 years of refining his design, Kevin finalized ZipSpa in 2023—a lightweight, foldable, and user-friendly pet-washing station that makes bath time stress-free. No more messy bathrooms, no more backbreaking scrubbing. Just an easy, efficient way to keep pets clean and happy.

At ZipSpa, we believe the best innovations come from real-life challenges. Our mission? To make pet care simpler, cleaner, and more convenient for pet owners everywhere.

Join us in revolutionizing the way we wash our pets—because bath time should be easy for both you and your furry friend.

Name: WIOECO
Description:
About WIO 
WIO is a distinguished boutique firm that converges the realms of biology, art, design, and technology to craft exquisite natural spaces. 

Our mission is to re-engage and reconnect individuals with the wonders of nature by seamlessly integrating nature into everyday living spaces.

Innovation at Core
At WIO, innovation is ingrained in our DNA. Our products are born out of meticulous research and a deep understanding of natural habitats. We are proud holders of several international patents, including cutting-edge plant media and lighting systems that can mimic any natural light cycle on Earth. 

What We Offer
Our high-end, proprietary product lines empower clients to create small to mid-scale natural spaces that are not only aesthetically striking but also beneficial for well-being. Our offerings encompass: 
-SPACE: Indoor natural creations like aquariums, paludariums, and terrariums. 
-TECH: Technology to emulate natural habitats including lighting, pumps, and filters. 
-DECOR: Decoration elements using living and non-living goods like rocks, woods, and sands. 
-WELL: Consumables for the wellness of nature and users such as fertilizers, filter media, and water treatments. 
-FLORA: A diverse range of flora grown in revolutionary media—Sticky Soil and AquaGrow. 

Global Reach 
Headquartered in Barcelona, Europe, WIO boasts a distribution network spanning six continents. Our team of nature artists, architects, and artisans work passionately to create unique natural sceneries that are the epitome of excellence in design and sustainability. 

Our Projects & Clients WIO’s portfolio is adorned with over a hundred projects for diverse clients including corporate spaces, public aquariums, zoos, and private individuals. We take pride in our collaborations with acclaimed institutions such as Loro Parque, Lisbon Oceanarium, L'Aquarium of Barcelona, and L'Oceanografic de Valencia.

𝐌𝐚𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐢𝐭 𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐨 𝐟𝐞𝐞𝐝 𝐟𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐡 𝐟𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐝𝐨𝐠𝐬 — 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐰𝐡𝐲 𝐢𝐭 𝐦𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐬.

At Thrive Dog Kitchen, we believe that nutrition is one of the key pillars to a thriving, healthy dog. But we also know that feeding fresh food can feel overwhelming, confusing, and time-consuming — especially when you’re trying to do the right thing and don't know who to trust.

That’s where we come in.

Founded by certified canine nutritionist Hilary, Thrive Dog Kitchen is here to simplify fresh feeding for the everyday dog parent. Whether you’re looking to boost your dog’s bowl with real, nutritious whole foods, or you're ready to understand what actually goes into feeding for long-term health — we’re here to help.

Through our frozen whole food blends and our growing library of nutrition support and resources, we’re building a community of dog parents who want the best for their dogs — and who want to feel confident in what they feed.

This isn’t about perfection. It’s about making informed, realistic changes that add up over time.

So if you’ve ever wondered: • Am I feeding my dog the right amount? • Is this ingredient safe? • Should I be feeding fresh food at all? • Why does my dog’s energy seem low? • What does “balanced” even mean?
— You’re in the right place.

Let’s learn together. Let’s feed better, together.

#thrivedogkitchen #freshfeddog #caninenutrition #doghealthnz #rawfeedingnz #feedrealfood #dognutritioneducation #dogparentsnz #freshfoodfordogs

We believe that pets give us their very best every day—endless love, loyalty, and joy. Name: BARK AND BUBBLES PVT LTD
Description:
“He is my Hoooman”, that’s what every dog might be thinking in their heads for sure. To be honest we humans really do not deserve enough to call these cute furballs ours. Because the love they shower on us is beyond our comprehension and we don’t have the mortal power to repay an ounce of that love. We are not pet owners, they own us. 
We might be new online, but our journey started almost 2 decades back. For as long as I can remember, I was always allured by animals be it the Cows and Calves and Sheep & Goats we had in our village or the dogs on the streets in Delhi. Since I was 5, I wanted a dog for myself and like most Indian moms my mom was opposed to this thought. She told me to get a dog when I can afford it and take care of one by myself. So, I waited for long 17 years and got one with my first Salary. He was named JUNIOR, the youngest member of our family who will grow up to be a handsome GSD. This cute ball of fur made me realize what true love is, the kind of love you just can’t expect or feel from hoomans. As he grew our love and bonding grew, he was the best dog I could ask for and then we adopted another GSD abandoned by her owner with a big tumor in her uterus. She was also the best dog I could have asked for, then we adopted another abandoned Shih-Tzu, guess what ANOTHER BEST DOG EVER.  Aren’t all dogs the best dog?? All these years we kept fostering a lot of abandoned and exploited dogs, which made us realize that there are no bad dogs, only bad owners. And this further strengthens my belief that dogs deserve utmost love, care, and affection, and a healthy 

We know how hard it is in India to find good Vets, experienced and trained groomers, quality toys and accessories for our beloved pets. We promise to offer international standards of products and services at Hyper local prices. Our mission is to discharge all pet parents from the stress and hard work of finding such services & give a one-stop solution.

Name: Sniff'n'Waggle
Description:
At Sniff 'n' Waggle, we're dedicated to enhancing the lives of pets and their owners through personalized, high-quality pet supplements. Our mission is to take the guesswork out of pet healthcare by delivering tailored nutritional solutions right to your doorstep, ensuring your furry friends lead happier, healthier lives.

Why Choose Sniff 'n' Waggle?

Personalized Nutrition: We understand that each pet is unique. Our supplements are customized to meet the specific needs of your dog or cat, providing them with the exact nutrients they require.

Convenience Delivered: Say goodbye to the hassle of multiple pet health products. Our all-in-one supplements arrive monthly, making it easy to maintain your pet's wellness routine.

Delicious and Beneficial: Our supplements are designed to be as tasty as they are effective, turning health time into treat time for your pets.

Our Story

Inspired by our beloved Labrador Retriever, Bailey, we embarked on a journey to create Sniff 'n' Waggle. Witnessing Bailey's health transform with the right nutrition, we became passionate about providing other pet owners with access to personalized, high-quality supplements. Our goal is to make advanced pet nutrition simple and accessible, so every pet can thrive.

Our Values

Happiness: We strive to bring joy to pets and their owners through effective health solutions.

Innovation: Continuously exploring new paths in pet health to offer the best for your companions.

Transparency: We believe in clear, honest communication about our products and practices.

Love and Care: Our passion drives us to support your pet's well-being with dedication and compassion.

Join the Sniff 'n' Waggle family today and discover how our personalized pet supplements can contribute to a longer, healthier, and happier life for your cherished companions.

Name: Animalia 2009
Description:
ANIMALIA was established in Varna in 2005 and began its activity as a wholesale warehouse for pet food and accessories for pets. In 2006, the company began importing goods from a number of leading European manufacturers, of which it is currently the exclusive representative for Bulgaria.

Currently, our company has a warehouse of 1000 square meters and an exceptional variety of over 10,000 items and is one of the market leaders in the pet food and accessories market. Animalia is a distributor for Eastern Bulgaria of the largest producer of granular food in Bulgaria - Fodder Food - Lovech.

In 2006 ANIMALIA opened its first pet store in Varna. At the moment, the ANIMALIA chain of pet stores has 14 outlets in the territory of the city of Varna and is a market factor in the retail trade of live animals, pet food and pet accessories.

At the end of 2015, the Animalia franchise program was launched, with which anyone can become our partner under very good conditions. There are currently 19 stores in the chain.

Animalia has a well-developed logistics network throughout the country, through our own distribution and in partnership with courier companies, we deliver our products to the door of every pet store, veterinary office or hypermarket in the country.

Name: Collaborative Dog Training
Description:
Collaborative Dog Training, based in Sun Prairie, WI, serves the greater Madison area with science-based, personalized dog training solutions. Grounded in the science of applied behaviorism and ethology, our approach tailors each session to your dog’s unique needs while strengthening the connection between you and your companion.

Led by Zach, a trainer with a degree in Biology and published research in animal behavior, we combine academic expertise with a lifelong passion for animals to provide effective, evidence-based training. Our private, in-home sessions focus on addressing behavior challenges, teaching obedience, and improving overall well-being in a practical and sustainable way.

We are committed to helping dogs and their owners achieve lasting success through collaboration, mutual understanding, and continued support - even after the training ends. Experience the difference that thoughtful, personalized training can make in your daily life.

Name: Crazy Cat Nanny
Description:
Crazy Cat Nanny • Feline Specific Pet Sitting Service

Exactly What You Need...
A crazy cat lover to give your furry family members the attention and care they deserve while their humans are away, and giving you the peace of mind you need when having to leave them at home.

My promise to you and to your pets...
I will always use a clean bowl at every feeding, offer fresh clean water-not just topping off the bowl, scoop the litter and clean up accidents, offer treats if left for me to do so, and love on them and offer playtime if they let me.  My visit will be leisurely; none of this feed-and-run business, and I'll always text or email a daily update and photo!

How the Crazy Cat Nanny Began...
It was so challenging to find an in-home pet sitting service for my cats that offers the level of care and personal attention that we all expect to find for our fur-kids. I was shocked at how limited the options were! We all deserve trustworthy and attentive pet care, don't we? Yes. Yes, we do.  So I decided to do something about it and the Crazy Cat Nanny was born!

About me...
I'm a devoted animal advocate and a serial volunteer, offering my time to animal, environmental, and community nonprofit organizations. I live a pescatarian and humane lifestyle and currently have two of the coolest cats on the planet. I'm a well-rounded person with a healthy and positive attitude who loves to read, cook, run, and has a passion for photography.

My hope is to alleviate your stress of finding a quality cat sitter in our community.  I'm here if you need me and I promise to care and love on your fur-kids as if they were my own :)

Name: The Bark Avenue Inn, LLC
Description:
Welcome to The Bark Avenue Inn, where every tail wags with joy and every paw finds comfort. Located on the south shore of Long Island, NY, we are a family-owned and operated business dedicated to providing a safe, loving, and enriching space for your beloved dogs.

Born from a lifelong love for dogs, we understand the trust and responsibility needed to care for your pup. Having grown up with dogs and sharing our lives with them today, this passion shapes everything we do, from our warm environment to the personalized attention every furry guest receives.

Our services include:
	•	Dog Boarding: A cage-free, home-like atmosphere where your dog can relax and play.
	•	Doggie Daycare: A fun, engaging space for exercise, socialization, and enrichment.
	•	Pet Transportation: Convenient pick-up and drop-off for boarding or daycare.
	•	Specialized Care: Tailored attention for seniors, puppies, and dogs with special needs.

What sets us apart is our communal sleeping arrangements, designed to support dogs’ social and mental well-being. In our cage-free, pack-like environment, your pup enjoys comfort, security, and connection—never feeling alone, whether it’s playtime or bedtime.

As a WOOF—a Woman-Owned and Operated Facility—we take pride in offering care rooted in compassion and expertise while supporting a woman-led small business.

With certifications in canine and feline CPR and first aid, plus a veterinary technician background, we provide expert care for every dog. Combined with our diverse professional experience in business, customer service, and training, we’ve created a business rooted in love, expertise, and community.

Thank you for trusting us with your furry family members. Whether for daycare, boarding, or transportation, we promise a safe, loving, and joyful environment for every pup. We can’t wait to welcome you to our family!

Name: MVP Pet Transport
Description:
MVP Pet Transport is a minority-owned pet relocation company committed to delivering safe, reliable, and compassionate transportation for pets of all kinds. Based in Florida, North Carolina & Pennsylvania, and serving families, breeders, and veterinary clinics across the U.S., we specialize in providing high-quality transport solutions that put peace of mind first.

Our services include local veterinary transport, long-distance ground relocation, group rides, private transport, and customized travel for pets with special needs. Whether it’s a routine vet appointment or a cross-country move, we ensure every pet travels comfortably, securely, and with dedicated care throughout the entire journey.

We partner closely with veterinary clinics, boarding facilities, shelters, and breeders to support their transport needs and strengthen community pet care. Our 24/7 availability allows us to assist with urgent veterinary transports, last-minute scheduling, and reliable communication designed to reduce stress for both pet owners and pet professionals.

At MVP Pet Transport, our mission is simple: provide more than transport — offer peace of mind. Every pet is treated like an MVP, with safety protocols, clean and climate-controlled transport vehicles, and a team committed to excellence. We believe that quality care, transparency, and trust are the foundation of every successful pet journey.

As we continue to grow, MVP is dedicated to expanding our fleet, creating job opportunities, and increasing access to affordable, high-quality pet transport services nationwide. With each transport, we aim to uplift communities, support veterinary partners, and set a new standard for professionalism in the pet transport industry.
